Author: Korobi Roy Saha
Description:
We happened to be at this place on a Saturday night with 1 another couple and we had a decent time.
Food - We ordered their red ale, Pilsner and wheat beer, all 330 ML. all good!
The appetizers were - Onion battered rings with mayo(well made. Goes well with beer), the bruschetta with almond dip was quite unique, the butter fish with mashed peas and French fries were pretty Allright, except that they need to add salt in the fish too.
The taco pineapple and fish was bad and not fresh. After informing the same they took it off from the bill as well.
The toffe pudding with vanilla ice cream was yummy.
The chocolate beer cocktail was very unique.

Customer service- Good! The washroom is well maintained.

Ambience- They have copied the Dublin's temple bar's look! it's exactly the same from outside at least.
Enough place for big crowds. The noise was tad loud where we were seated, since people were playing snooker very aggressively.
Though were we sat was no smoking, we could get so much of smoke from the other side and thus it was claustrophobic after sometime. There was no AC as well that side!

Value for money- Moderately Expensive. They need to take the service tax off proactively and not say later it's exceptional

Author: Avinash Kumar
Description:
If you're a beer enthusiast or simply looking for a cozy spot to unwind in Bangalore, The Biere Club on Lavelle Road is a must-visit. Known for its freshly brewed beer, this place offers a variety of beer styles to suit different tastes. But it doesn't stop there – their creative beer cocktails are a highlight, blending flavors you wouldn't expect with a base of fresh craft beer.

Food-wise, The Biere Club doesn't disappoint. Their fish and chips are crispy, light, and perfectly cooked, while their burgers are hearty, juicy, and come with a unique local twist, setting them apart from the standard pub fare. Each dish feels thoughtfully crafted to pair beautifully with their beer selections.

The atmosphere is laid-back, making it an ideal place for a chilled afternoon with friends or family. Whether you're sitting indoors or enjoying their outdoor seating, the vibe is both relaxed and inviting. Service is prompt, and the staff is well-versed in offering recommendations for both food and drinks.

Overall, The Biere Club combines great food, refreshing drinks, and a cool ambiance, making it one of the best spots in Bangalore for craft beer lovers and casual diners alike. Highly recommended!

The shakshuka otherwise was good. Overall very average breakfast. There are many more better options in the city for lesser prices.

The Biere club is a place of comfort. Among all the new pubs that sprout across Bangalore this is the point that we compare the rest with and keep returning to.

Special mention to Rajat Banerjee, for the excellent beer recommendations!

This has to be the worst restaurant in bangalore. The guy serving us was rude. The chicken wings had no meat on them and were over fried to the point that it tasted burnt.

We ordered two charred chicken grills, and both grills were stale. The grilled tomato that came with it was rotten. And the chef and manager didn't come out to address the problem till we started making a scene. The waiter initially said he'd call the chef, but disappeared without saying anything and later casually started clearing our table. Only when we asked, did he finally say they decided to just strike it off the bill. But no apology was forthcoming.

This place is not just a bad experience, it's a health hazard.

His point was that the bigger table was reserved by someone for 8k per person and he will give it to us if we pay 9k per person, I mean common. What we ordered
Crispy chicken: make sure u check with them.. this is really chilli chicken.. it's not crispy at all

Spicy chicken pizza: decent toppings but the crust was so dry and chewy it was like eating toasted bread

Pepperoni fries: this one was just weird.. ive had bacon fries before and it comes mixed with the fries.. this was just slices of partially cooked pepperoni on a batch of undersalted fries

Author: Pranave Nanda
Description:
The city's first craft microbrewery stick kicks ass and ticks all boxes!

I'm welcomed with the same vibe everytime I visit the place, and the beer spread has been consistently amazing. The Ales and Wheats are sure to delight you, among the others. The beer based cocktails are also better than those in establishments.

The grub is great across both vegetarian and non-vegetarian, plenty options with some standouts like the sausages, mushroom cheese poppers and the Moroccan chicken.

To top it off, the service and ambience make The Biere Club a constant attraction in the city's CBD.

The prices might be a bit off putting, but there's nothing that's not worth your time and money!

The burger tasted so bland and full of chilli. The parmesan wings had no taste of parmesan cheese. The mango beer was supposed to be sweet but tasted just like an ordinary brewed beer. The staffs weren't attentive enough to even pick leftovers.

I hope they improve their services and make their food delicious. I gave the feedback of my experience to Mr. Pankaj (manager) who seem to take it seriously and said he will work on it.

Author: Smita Amdekar
Description:
My wife and I visited Bierre Club with our 2 teenage sons. Bierre Club had a reputation, and this time around, it came to naught. The food was barely palatable - we got the nachos which used dorritos - the empanada like appetiser was okay. Fries were all right, although the hefeweizen tasted more like a lager!! Perhaps of most intrigue was that they had said they are operating at 50% occupancy due to social distancing, however what we found is that the entire ground floor was closed and first floor and upper floors were operating (at full capacity)!!

It is possible that like all businesses, they have come upon hard times, but we left disappointed at their commitment to safety and food and beverage quality.

Author: Tejas
Description:
Bengaluru's first Microbrewery done right. So glad I finally got the opportunity to visit here. I was here with family on Sunday. Wanted to make the most of the dineout GIRF offer for their craft beers. We ordered
Wheat Lager 1.5 Ltrs
Seasonal Lager 1.5 Ltrs
Seasonal Ale 1.5 Ltrs
Assorted fries with harissa mayo
The beer was fresh, tasted good. The fries were crisp, brittle and tasted good with the mayo.
The service was poor. The floor had minimal guests yet the service was slow.
Ambiance is good, Two floors, upper section is open air.
Overall, had a good time thanks to the offer.

Author: Ajit Mandal
Description: Well what can i say abt this place.. first time in my life i have been told dumplings is same as mutton fried in a ball shape and its there way of cooking dumplings.. they really dont have any idea what they are serving so plz plz never ever dine here..

Author: Nikitha
Description: We love the craft beer so much...the onion rings and chicken wings with peri peri so delicious...subhash give us awesome service...good experience...we will visit again as soon as possible.🥂🥂

Author: Pruthviraj HK
Description: Great ambience, Great 'Bierre', a pool table, a foosball table, good conpany, what else do you want???. Had great time here while enjoying some great beer. Had the lager and the stout, and man the stout did the job for me. One should also try the wheat beer here. Ordered a veg pizza as well and the good thing about the pizza was that it tasted like an actual pizza not a vegetable cheese cake✌️. Staffs were courteous and helpful. Only suggestion for the restaurant is to please fix a good a parking spot, it will be a relief! As i wouldn't be worrying about my bike getting scraped(which happened) or towed while i am having a great time here. Planning another visit for a +1🍺

Author: Suman Choudhary
Description: Ordered fish and chips and it was terrible.. it was saugy instead of being crisp and the fish was stale.. The serving portion is too small for the price and they hardly have any option in food.. Just one or two lame starters which is tastes like crap.. On a Friday evening the place did not play any music and it was dull. Overall it was a terrible experience.  Never coming here again.. Beer was decent. There are better options around serving fresh beer with good food. Avoid this place

Author: Arushi Rajvanshi
Description: Delish food, great portions and a lot of options to choose from. One of the only places in Bangalore that offers original Zaatar. The cheese balls were actual spreads that went well with the bread. Would definitely visit again to explore the menu.

Author: Shweta P
Description: Love the ambience and the food especially the nachos and the beer. Will definitely go back to have their burgers someday and play pool

Author: Bopanna Kuppanda Ganapathy
Description: The beer was dead and stale.. it was as though someone had kept the beer in a glass for hours. Seriously not  worth it.  Didn't expect it

Author: Harshitha V Raju
Description: Amazing ambience...maybe a lil expensive on your pocket but worth it... almost near UB city must try out

Author: Anil Gowda
Description: Do you have a mask? Instead of  welcome Sir! The hospitality has gone to the rags I believe!! Damn how expensive is a mask, to me it’s cheaper to spend for a mask as a gesture rather than a unhealthy conversation about it! I suppose they need to learn some lessons of how to treat a customer, when one is ready to spend a hefty bill why can’t one spare a Rs 10 mask for a customer.

Author: Varun KV
Description: The staff is rude, if a customer isn't carrying a mask, the best thing as a good management is to give one it hardly cost 10 bucks, rather all they go on to say is if you don't have a mask they won't serve!! Arrogance will lead the customer out and not the other way in!! Some serious learning in the field of hospitality should be considered.

Author: Raj Kumar
Description: We went on 15 Nov 2020.  We ordered Pork pulled burger which was terrible and over costly (Rs500). Pork was cold and could not find blue cheese mayo in it. We also ordered beef sliders , it was good but portion was less. Only beer that was good was Hefenwizen but it was priced more than others. Save yourself and don't go. It's too far for getting your experience ruined.

Author: Arnab
Description: Nice place if one just wants to unwind themselves with a beer and friends after a long and hard day.

Author: Eeshan T
Description:
Went on a weekday for a dinner, which I think was a mistake in itself as this place is known more for it's finger food that one can have with alcohol and has very limited main course options.
But we were not deterred and decided to make a dinner out of a lot of snacks.
We started with:
# Mini hassleback potatoes
# Trio of cheese balls

The hassleback potatoes were the biggest in the list of disappointments at this place. I think everyone knows that hassleback potatoes are baked along with a garlic herb marinade and topped with melted cheese.
But here it was just baby potatoes tossed with garlic and parsley in olive oil. It was such a huge put off and a massive rip off.

Next, the cheese balls (made out cold cream cheese, not the deep fried kind) were supposed to be be accompanied by Za'atar spiced bread, but what came was just plain regular toasted bread.

By now we were just pissed off by the experience and chose to leave for Farzi cafe nearby for the main course and dessert.

The ambience is fine. It could be better but has the side road is completely dug up and the open part of the restaurant is full of traffic noise and dust. Apart from that the place has generic pub music and a billiards table.

This place clearly needs to buck up in terms of their offerings and not rely on drunk patrons who would just have anything dished out in front of them.

Also, the parking situation here needs to be sorted as they advertise parking included but did not help us in parking our scooter at all and the valets basically asked us to f***k off as they chose not to make it their problem. Even though a space for a 4 wheeler parking had enough and more space.

Author: Shrishti Jaiswal
Description: A good place to hangout. Wheat beer here is worth trying. The jumbo platter is really jumbo and has a good variety of veg and non veg items. Full marks to jumbo platter.

Author: Ragesh Radhakrishnan
Description:
It is not the Quantity of the meat, but the cheerfulness of the guests which makes the feast - Said the first earl of Clarendon.

However last Sunday we were blessed with both at @thebiereclub. Mr Anand Kümär won a contest on the host's Instagram page and we were invited for a feast
.

We Shilpa Prakash Naveen Raju Viju Mswamy walked into this place without any idea that they were pretty serious when they said "FEAST"
.

Chef @ravikumara326 and team threw a huge spread which was though was a three course meal was no less than a buffet on the table. Starting with the Mediterranean Mezz, we were awe stuck with the magic he had brought in each of the dish curated by the team. Then come the main course led by the Roast chicken.
.

Though we were floored by the entire spread everyone waged war against each for the Roasted Chicken Jus and the Roast Beetroot with Creame cheese. I think i have a new found love in Beetroot now, Thanks to chef
.

A Big thanks.....(Big with no match to the size of the feast....but still) to the @thebiereclub team, Chef Ravi and the man behind this beautiful brewery @arvind.s.raju for hosting us and for the experience. You have simply won our Hearts and loyalty 💕

#breweryfood #feast #feastagram #beertography #roastchicken #tharleviews #instagram #beetroot #mediterraneanmezze #mezze #mediterranean #beer #craft #crafthouse #craftbrewery #foodiesofbangalore #cheese #foodiesofkarnataka #cheerful #foodiesofinstagram #grandfeast #naveyes

Author: Tanisha Rout
Description: Good place. Slightly heavier on the pocket compared to other places in the area. But nevertheless good beer and food.

Author: Siddarth Bhardwaj
Description:
There is something about the Bierre Club’s ambience that keeps you wanting to go back.
From the perfect cocktails to freshly tapped beer they never disappoint!
A highlight is their pizzas.! Fresh and light these are a Delight to eat!

Loved their kebab platter- is a must try !

Oh the LIIB- please have a few at least it won’t disappoint

Author: Nishanth N
Description: I was pleasantly surprised here. Ambience, beer, starters and pizza. Everything was just so good! Mushroom cheese balls were made perfectly. Hefeweizen Beer was brewed amazing. The artichoke vegetarian pizza was on point! Cant wait to revisit!

Author: Sharan Kumar
Description: The only good thing about this outlet is that it's the earliest microbrewery in Bengaluru. Everything else is worst.. avoid completely

Author: Abhilash Joseph
Description: The natchos was very below standard. The food standard level has gone down very badly. Service was bad

Author: Kanishk
Description:
Its safe after reopening and crowd is well managed.
@praveen is really helpful with service 👏

Author: Neharika
Description:
Visit for : Great beer and nibbles.
Avoid if : You want good service

We only had starters but no complaints about the food - nachos, assorted fries and cheese balls.

The beer is great and so is the decor and vibe - the walls are done in a Mario Miranda style, which makes the interiors quite impressive! The location is another advantage, right opposite UB city.

Author: Sushmita Raj
Description: Fries were so bad potatoes were less and batter was too much.. More like aloo bonda for rs 300. Chicken wings were very dry with less masala.. Not worth at all.. 2 fries basket and chicken wings and paneer for rs 1500.

Author: Rakesh Agarwal
Description:
Weekend vibes on weekdays @ the biere club, lavelle road, bangalore

1. Vegetarian Kabab Platter
2. Hummus, falafel and crispy sweet potato chips
3. Non vegetarian Kabab Platter with char grilled prawns.
4. Virgin Mojito & Virgin Sangria
5. Club Special Crafted Beer 🍺

Author: Abinash
Description: Though the place was almost empty, the food served was not upto the mark. Frech fry was soaked in oil. Just press the fry and lot of oil dripps. Pizza was average.

Author: Shaila Shree
Description: I had a good time here, delicious food, good music, cozy interiors. A good place to hangout with friends. It’s a smal place alright. Don’t expect too much while visiting this place but you can have good beer 🍺 and chill with friends. Prices here are like in any pubs. You will see the same digits here but good helpful staff as well.

Author: Shreyas N
Description:
One of the best pubs in Lavelle Road, Tried few Samplers and agreed on Inhouse Belgian Strong Ale Taste is same as other handcrafted beers.
Tried Chicken Pepper Fry, Beer Battered onion Rings and Butter chicken Pizza, Loved all of them!
Price wise - Drinks and food both were on the expensive side.
Would love to visit the place again just for their ambience which has a English feel all over it!

Author: Sathish Kumar
Description:
Beautiful brewed beers. Loved the stout and the chicken wings. All other food was tasty too.
Management has to look into staffing or the attitude of the staff.
First day went on a Friday early evening, we were 8 members in our table and there were 4 people in another. There were 3 staff but had to wait and wave to get their attention as they were busy talking or wandering around. We were drinking quickly yet staff were not proactive to sell us more beer. We were thirsty so just wanted our drinks.
Second day went on Saturday evening (the very next day), we were 6 people and were seated in the top floor. There were plenty of staff just simply walking around staring at all the customers. Every single table had to struggle to get the staff's attention though. No one had a simple smile on their face throughout the night. Had to repeat our orders 2-3 times for it to come. Highlight was when our bill came the service charge was appx 800. The waiter was so smart he said 'if you wish to remove the service charge I can but pay me ₹500 in cash, because the money doesn't come to us.' this was a shock to me and obviously did not encourage it but it's definitely wrong.

4 stars was only for the quality of food and lovely stout. Service could have made our evenings better.

Author: Suyata Sarkar
Description: I love the place and beer, pizza was so yummy

Author: Omkar
Description: Service is poor on weekdays.

Author: Dr.Sushree Dash
Description: The place was really good to chill out over the weekend. The staff Bibhu was courteous and professional. Food and drinks were upto the expectation👍🏼 Had a Great Time🙂

Author: Padmaja Divakaran
Description: Awesome! Only the pizzas were not the best...everything else was just perfect! It wasn't just the adults,but the kids too had a wonderful time. Thank you guys

Author: Akshatha Nagaraj
Description: Lovely, relaxed ambiance, with an old school charm.  Ambiance was the best part of the visit. We tried the lager and hefeweizen. Both were loved and chugged on no time.  The johnny ale (whiskey and ginger ale on ice) was the cocktail of choice. Crisp, low on sugar, could taste the notes of whiskey. Clear winner for me. Food we tried the chicken ceaser salad and Moroccan spiced chicken. Loved both. Would definitely loved to try the rest of their menu. Price wise cocktails are on the expensive side and so was the food. But would I go back? Hell yeah for the ambiance. But not often because of the price range.

Author: Tushar
Description:
Amaziiiiiing place . The place has this english pub type vibe which is great. The food is equally good and the corner location is a plus point.
A must visit place.

Author: Nikhil Kela
Description: I stopped here for a beer and to get some work done on a friday afternoon. From just one group of people huddled behind their laptops, to a lot of other remote workers and couples, this place quickly filled up. A lot of their brews were unavailable on tap so I settled on the wheat beer, which was true to style, but quite average in terms of uniqueness and taste. I would love to come again for the food and other beers.

Author: Balaram VG
Description: Nice brew

Author: Webley Prabodh
Description:
Very very bad service at this place. Didn't get the seats that I reserved and waited over 40 minutes for a simple piece of food.
Did I mention, it happened for the second time in the span of few months.

Author: Suresh
Description:
This was the first brewery in Bangalore and it still remains one of the top best breweries in Bangalore.
Courteous staff, especially Praveen and Jagat manages people very well. Customer service from the staff is top notch and I will recommend this place to everybody.
Thursday tournament and the way it is conducted in a well professional manner.
Cheers!!!

Author: Shekar Ashok
Description: Add Praveen

Author: Suvrat Garg
Description: Great burger, great beer, very mediocre kebab. Loved the vibe - everyone was so friendly. The staff was very helpful and prompt. I liked being able to go up to a group of strangers and join their game of pool without feeling awkward. It's hard to explain or quantify the Biere club's communal quality, but you'll feel it when you're here. Will definitely visit again :)

Author: Anisha John
Description: The food here is expensive. Would not recommend paninis. Pizzas were awesome. Ambience was breath taking. A lot of variety in drinks.

Author: Khamchok Kardup
Description: Apart from cgst n sgst they charge 10% service charge

Author: Prakhar Karpe
Description: Surreal ambience!!

Author: Makam_foodies- Swathi Makam
Description:
Wanted to visit this place since very long,
Best beer available in this place.... Ambience is cute and good and it's retro style. Service is very fast even if it's very crowded. I visited this place on weekday and it was completely crowded.

Food:
Hummus falafel and crispy sweet potato chips :this was the best Hummus i have tasted, it was awesome.
Tandoor roasted mexican style mini corn cobs : this was the newly introduced dish and it was good in taste.
AOP, Spaghetti tossed with olive oil, garlic,lemon, parsley and Chilli flakes : this was the dry pasta which had a taste of olive oil and garlic was just amazing and i can still feel the taste of it.

Drinks :
Light wheat beer : the best i have tasted it was awesome.
And had some Cocktails like old fashioned and cosmopolitan which was pretty good.
Nice place to hangout with friends.

Author: Mahesh Mamani
Description: Good beer and tasty food, staff is good and helpful

Author: Gree
Description: Well ! Visited this place around June just to drink The famous Mango Beer ! Unfortunately we didnt get it and tried other beer which we disliked ! Lucky we ordered pizzzza . Trust me one of the best pizzzzas iv ever eaten ..esp the sun dried tomatoes...at its best...( Comng to a brewery and having only pizzza that to 11 inch and ordering the same twice just for 2 of us without any beer was crazyy😂😂

Author: Shambhavi Dwivedi
Description:
The pizza is absolutely crap and badly made. The staff is rude and unattentive and extreme lazy.

Save yourself the trouble and do not visit this place it’s absolutely horrible.

Author: ShuBh JaIn
Description:
The manager is very rude
Unfriendly and very bad at service. he doesn’t respond properly and should be removed. We customers come with a positive and they ruin our mood with in appropriate answers and ignorance

Author: Abhishek Jain
Description: Place looks very tired and boring. Had beers and they were nothing to write home about. Overall a very average place.

Author: Aishwarya Kumar
Description: Note to management: If you want to welcome customers to your restaurant , please train your staff to be more helpful. When we tried to park our vehicle outside the restaurant , we were dismissively asked to fend for ourselves , as the parking was reserved for restaurant staff! I would love to be an employee of this place , but not a customer in a million years.

Author: Aishwarya Mohanan
Description: Got introduced to the best onion rings I've ever had. Must try if nothing or everything.

Author: Raghavendra B
Description: Muttu is very pleasant and suggested us the great food and drinks I would go for the service next time

Author: Sandipan Bhattacharya
Description: This city is known for its pubs and this is one of the best pubs in the area... This place is always buzzing with people weekdays or weekends alike... Even then the service is top notch and pretty prompt... They also have a pretty wide array of hand crafted beers to choose from... We tried the samplers and then agreed on the Belgian Strong Ale... And then the pitchers kept on coming... The food is great as well... We tried the BBQ wings, Chicken Pepper Fry, crispy Chicken popcorn, Lamb Chops, Fish Kababs... Each dish was unique in presentation and very well prepared... The decor and ambience is great as well... Anything below 5 is just not an option...

Author: Wasim Raza
Description: place is good food is also good not sure why they force you to pay service charge manager was rude

Author: BHASKAR SAILESH
Description: If you are thinking of a nasty type of luxury, this is the place to go to. Although their main attraction is the diversity of beers they serve, they also have an extensive food menu covering basic snack foods to pre-plated dishes. I was here a few days ago with my friends and I had ordered several dishes. The taste was delightful and so was the ambience. It is suitable for families and friends willing to spend a good leisurely time. Since this place is always crowded, it's better to make advance reservations if possible and reach early. Happy eating

Author: Tushar Gupta
Description: Really nice handout place for some tasty food... Ambiance is great and music is just perfect, not too loud and good selection of music with live sports on different TVs... Repeatable place... Ordered pizza and tacos both of which were tasty... Very close to UB city mall...

Author: Aly Hajiani
Description: Enjoyed my Saturday evening visit at The Beire Club. They have some great craft beers, and some delectable starters to munch on. The ambiance is vibrant yet rustic and they have three floors. The crowd was great and the place was buzzing by 7pm. Wasn’t particularly impressed with the service though, and felt ignored at times. That could use improvement.

Author: SONAL S KHEMKA
Description:
A Microbrewery located at the corner of Lavelle Road with a good ambience  Having a Rustic Vintage look .You can  also have a view of the Road. 
Wheat Beer is simply awesome and it also enhances your taste buds Sitting in the Balcony tends you to spend more time in that place
Sitting on the First Floor gives you access to the Pool table with and also its an Smoking area 
coming to the food. Cottage Cheese Pizza was awesome with cheese loaded. French Fries was well prepared with a good beer made it worth having it. Mac and cheese pasta was also good but could be more better if prepared with some more Love 
Staff was also courteous and also you can enjoy the Quick Service 

Recommended to Visit on a Rainy day with your friends or You can also go Alone to explore yourself !!

Author: Subramanyam Venkatakrishnan
Description: Started with Wheat beer. Light. Crisp. Basic foundation laid for increase in IBU. Next was the house Lager. Fruity essence. Maybe Citrus or Celery. Not too strong. Slightly dull for me. Next was the bitter Club Special. Can taste the hops. Not too strong. Perfect pairing with German Sausages. Sweetness of sauerkraut, balances out the taste. Rounded off the session with Ale. Nutty flavour. Unusual. In summary, Biere Club is eclectic.

Author: Swapnil Mangnalikar
Description: Service was bad and they were including service charge close to 10% of the total Bill amount And arguing it's mandatory as it's mentioned on the menu And later agreed to cancel it after lot of argument saying we will pay on your behalf.

Author: Arun Prakash Ray
Description: The server had no knowledge of craft beers. Had asked for a mint chutney with the kebab platter but of no use. The menu was once curated by a very knowledgeable Chef, by now it's well forgotten. Didn't dare to order the German platter. Sad. 😕

Author: Sonali Mirpuri
Description: I was really satisfied with the food and service. The fries were of different varieties and were honestly some of the best fries I’ve had in the city. Everything else was also really good, especially the pepperoni pizza and pasta.

Author: Anurag Jain
Description: Did hear a lot about this place but was very disappointed with the experience yesterday. Very impolite management who can spoil your evening. First they say that they are fine if we get kids along with us (during table booking), but act rudely and foolishly with kids. I would not suggest this place if you want to enjoy your evening.

Author: Sachin Sridhar
Description:
Night Life.
Fun crowd.
Young crowd.
Remarkable place.
Service was good.
Fish platter was delicious.
Window seat is astonishing.
Best place to hangout in Bangalore.

Must Try in Bangalore.

Author: Rajendra Bhat
Description:
Food - 3 / Drink - 4
Service - 4
Ambiance - 4
Brewed beer is good here. Food isn’t that great. Service is good, they serve quite fast. Ambiance is good with good crowd.

Author: CS
Description: We went here on a rainy day- total downer as everything was drenched and there was limited seating under a canopy which was dry. The food is very good- we only tried starters though. The drinks were good! Service is good too.

Author: Anooja Salvi
Description:
The restaurant is infested by rodents. As I sat finishing my beer and food, saw a mice walk the length of the restaurant as the staff called each other to find a fix to it. Eventually it went out where it met it's untimely death, I sit here having called for my bill wondering if I am leaving the restaurant with a contagious disease.

Edit: The staff had a callous approach to the problem and shrugged their shoulders when questioned about the same.

Author: Sonia Rodrigues
Description: Enjoyed this place for a bite to eat and a few drinks. We had the non veg platter as well as salmon and it was a good size for three people. Service needs to be quixk specially serving beer. The Biere Club

Author: Sneha Attharkar
Description:
Again went for the team dinner , with a bunch of beer lovers . The ambience is all vintage with rock music goes well with beer and pizza . But my favourite Veg Nachos was one of the best in Bangalore went perfect with Margaritas .

Out of a group of 15 ppl, everyone liked the place and the food .

One of the go to place in churchtreet with the Old Bangalore Vibes restored.

The staff was good and it's a recommended place .

Author: Anil Annira
Description: Small place we tried a set of  sampler and we had wheat beer which was decent and good and food we tried nachos with chicken was good and onion rings was ok ok not so great it was tasteless overall ok ok experience can try once

Author: Vijay Krishna
Description:
From outside this red building is just perfect shooting spot, located right at the corner in Lavelle road.
I had visited this place on community meetup & tried jalapenos starter, pizza & dessert.
Everything tasted good & enjoyed decent ambience.

Author: Praveen Anand
Description:
This is the place to be in Bangalore. My all time favorite one where I would love to visit anytime I am in the garden City. Have been here countless times Alone, with friends , colleagues and specially my wife (who equally admires this restaurant as much as I do and never ever says No whenever we make those dinner/luncheon plans).

You would definitely love all the craft beers, along with the assorted fries and cheese platter ( which unfortunately doesn't exist anymore)- would request them to bring it back to the menu

You might also try to taste the yummiest Mutton Seekh Kababs, the Non Veg platter and pizzas from the menu.

If you love playing pool, then make sure u grab your seats as early as possible. The crowd and the service staffs are equally amazing at all the levels. Kudos guys !! 😍♥️

Author: Prathik R Naik
Description: My regular Adda!! One of the oldest breweries in Bengaluru. Pizza is a must try dish. If you like to have craft beer and pizza with a decent desserts then this is the place you want to try.

Author: Rijaz Mooza
Description:
We chose this place to celebrate my frnds birthday.. and tht was a wrong choice-- u can find better places, better food.. and of course better brews. Brew beer had no taste no quality.. service not that great.
And the music was very low volume..
And people were screaming around pool table..
Too expensive and totally not worth it :/

Author: Maverick
Description: A great plus point is the location and vibes and ambience surely attract you.... The house beer, especially the wheat one was awesome, exceptionally crisp in taste and flavour. Food portions were sizeable enough and pricing is ok. Staff courtesy could be relooked at and surely improved.... Good luck....

Author: Gaurav Bhati
Description: only wheat beer and blonde ale are decent, rest all beers are not upto the mark. ordered some fries which were good. overall no to repeating it

Author: Manoj Singh
Description:
If you love beer then this is the one n only place for you
Wheat beer is by far the best beer I have ever drank
And the ambience is just so relaxing .this is my all time favourite place for dining. If anyone loves paneer please do try paneer tikka here it's so delicious.

Author: Global Glutton
Description: One of the oldest breweries in Blr ...slowly losing the plot. Food is not their forte and sadly neither is the Beer. Very disappointing experience - time and money wasted !

Author: Pranami Kashyap
Description: They are one of coolest places in town! Love the rustic English pub charm and the window-side seatings overlooking Lavelle road... The service is quite fast and the food is good too!! Love all their pizzas, chicken popcorn and Mac n Cheese. The warm toffee pudding is probably the best in town! The beer is great too! Surely worth a visit.

Author: Gopal Soni
Description:
Are you party lover!!!
This is the right place for you. I am party lover and used to go here. I love to sit on third floor because this is outdoor sitting and you can smoke here.
#Ambience As you see picture it is awesome no need to say.
#Food I am pizza lover and ordered pizza , It was thin crust and cheesy. Taste was really good. You should try this.
#service quick service, for my order it took hadly 10-15 minutes.
#Happywallet If you are searching pocket friendly cafe, I think this is the best 700- 10000 bucks enough for couple.
#Beer only 60-80 rupees for short glass of beer.

Author: Jack
Description: Being the first brewery in Bangalore, I headed to Biere Club with a bunch of friends during our short trip here. Ambiance is contemporary. We tried the wheat and pilsner. The wheat tasted flat and I've had far better wheats in many places in Hyderabad and Mumbai. Food was decent. We ordered prawn chettinad and paneer chili. Prawns were smelly but the masala they were coated in was awesome. Chili paneer was super delicious! Prices seemed high considering the  quality they were offering.

Author: Red Indian
Description: Love the view of the street, Always visited for the nice brew and loved the mango ones. Lively and chilled out place. The boys are attentive.

Author: Prathik Raj
Description:
The Biere Club; a place that serves finest brews of various types. Indian, Italian and Continental dishes are served here.
A place to visit with friends on weekend for chilling and chit chatting.
Do try their Starters Veg Cheese Seekh Kebab and Kasoori Paneer Tikka, Brew of your choice and Dessert at the end.
Ambience is good with light music on, starters and brew are good here.

Author: Nilash Ghosh
Description:
Awesome place at the heart of Lavelle road. Great beers and good food. Good crowd along with a pool table and foosball make this a perfect spot to enjoy your Saturday evenings.
Stout lovers will enjoy their in-house brew.

Author: Abhay Bharadwaj
Description: Had been here for lunch. Good thing is they have their own brewery. You get your own brewed beer, Has pool to play so you can eat and play here. Good ambiance. Good for hangouts with friends,

Author: Shravanthi.jagannath
Description:
Presentation was really good, food and mocktails were tasty.
This place is little pricy but good to enjoy with friends over the weekend a must visit

Author: Raj Nandan
Description:
The "Biere Club" is known for their beers and also the great crowd. Located in the corner or the main junction of label road the place is quite well know and it usually crowded. Had been here with my friends to grab a beer on a saturday evening and we were a little overwhelmed with the ambience of the place, we felt it was too rustic and really needed a makeover. So coming to in house brewed beers, they were good and but the mango beer was a let down for me (I've had better ones)
So for food we had ordered the moroccan spiced chicken, the chicken was really nice, packed with loads of flavour. Then we ordered the chicken pepper fry , it was a total let down for me the pepper was too over powering and i dint enjoy it at all.

Over all the place is quite good just to grab a beer and to chill for a few hours. The service has to really improve, there is a lack of communication amongst the servers. The places is quite expensive when it comes to the food and it definitely should be revised.

Author: Navaneeth Krishnan
Description:
Had the lager. Fresh and smooth. Top notch as far as craft beers go.

But the way they serve their beer is a little confusing though. All styles of beer are served in the same mug. A craft beer enthusiast may find it weird drinking a Belgian Wheat Beer out of a stein mug.

Author: Chaithra Kalyanpur
Description:
A great place to hang out with your friends.. situated at an amazing location heart of the city..
Beverages 🤟 ambience 🤟 food 🤟
Do check out the breakfast at this place..❤️😋

Author: Sourabh S
Description: Between the beer and the amazing food, everything was just perfect. Ask for the chef specials while it lasts and you for sure won't be disappointed!

Author: Kidztrakha
Description: It’s not the first time I visited but two days back I went with my friends and that’s there first time of visit.we just had some beers the service was too slow we need to call all time for our needs. Over all we all love the beers we would like to visit again soon with ur best service.

Author: Smriti
Description:
This place is situated in the corner of Lavelle road and I make sure to visit this place when they are serving mango beer.
Mango beer- nice hazy yellow color. The first sip itself makes you fall in love with this beer. Definitely going to miss this until next mango season.
Chilli corriander chicken and cottage cheese go well with beer.
Nachos-quantity was more than what I expected. It was loaded with cheese and refried beans.
Moroccan spiced chicken-so succulent and tasty.

Author: Manu Vishwanath
Description: They don't care about us Indians. All run around whites(as if I am not white enough). I order 1 drink and a from the grill menu. No one even checks if I am on the table. I will run off sure. But they are prompt on coming for Bill. Really... This is what you were..... I got my friends from France for this... I really won't recommend any one. They lost lost the touch. Nachos was hell, really don't recommend to anyone. 😫😓🤮🤮

Author: Nisha Gowda
Description: was great place and we got to try their special beer loved it but the place was jam packed chaotic after 7 needs to work on the service and smoking zones

Author: Adrija
Description:
The drinks are alright and but the quality of food is below average. The prices are high and unfortunatelyThe Bierre Club fails to provide an experience that is worth the money.

The mango beer was unique and had a immemse depth of flavour. The wheat beer was also good. The Moscow Mule didn't taste bad but it did not taste like and was not served like a traditional Moscow Mule. The pomegranate martini was satisfactory not amazing.

The Onion Rings we ordered were not crispy and the thick batter made it taste like an onion pakoda instead. The Moroccan Chicken was well spiced and tender. The Chicken Popcorn was an absolute disappointment. It was not crunchy enough and the batter was soggy.

The staff didn't have good communication skills and they sounded curt. The ambience is peaceful( on weekdays) but the decor is very boring. I wouldn't recommend this bar because there are many other places that serve better food.

Author: Tanisha Agarwal
Description: This place serves one of the best baked cheesecakes in the city! The blueberry cheesecake with a dollop of cream is my favorite thing to order here. It's over pricey though (320 + taxes). The variety of craft beer is beautiful! The rest of the food menu is really tasty as well.

Author: Ajaiy Tyagi
Description: The staff is very unfriendly. I was there to be enjoy the match but the Biere club staff kept forcing me to order or leave. they won’t let me enjoy the match and kept fighting and arguing with me. Horrible experience. Bad food horrible staff and terrible experience. No one should visit this place

Author: Pooja Ghosh
Description: This place has an amazing ambience and attracts quite a good crowd due to the central location. They have a good collection of liquor and food quality is good. Prices are quite reasonable. Staff is extremely friendly

Author: Amish Bhalla
Description: Cozy and a nice place to be with a good choice of brewed beers. Try to get a seating in the AC section on the ground floor. 1st floor is a smoking area with a pool table but it warm and sometimes gets hot too. Nachos were good with some spice mayo with nice toppings. Bacon wrapped prwans were brilliant. Beer is always good and has never been disappointing. Service is great and you are treated with a smile always. A wonderful place to unwind with good selection of beer and food.

Author: Eat.Write.Repeat
Description: After we had a disappointing experience in the pub accords the street this place was so much better. Good food and good beer with a view of the road and fancy cars. I liked this place.

Author: Yuki Jingu
Description: Great place! I lived this beer pub. I went this Biere club on Wednesday. There are so crowded! Fresh beer and chips are best much for drinking! I'll back soon.

Author: Pravin Kumar Moharana
Description:
Very good place to have an amazing experience along with dining. The food is good & staff also attentive.. A big shout to the manager Mr Jagat jiban who made everything awesome from the word go.

Thanks for everything! Will be back really soon again!

Author: Pavan Kumar
Description:
Ya that was a stressful day wen I was at lavelle road

Then I hit into this cosy place

I felt good with the ambiance here

Then waiter arrived with two menus

So summer is never complete without mangoes

Bsiere club is really best in crafting Greta beers

Ordered a good 500ml special beer ( mango ) along with a moroccon spiced chicken

I was waiting for the beer and even god's wanted to fulfil my thirst and the beer arrived and the waiter said #Cheers

Wow that was an amazing craft beer I just loved it ..

Moroccon spiced chicken was just above average and not like a wow factor still kudos to the chef

I quenched my thirst bad hunger that's it ..

Good place , great beer ,. Good food ..

I hereby rest my review

Author: Saurabh Agrawal
Description:
Visited The Biere Club Friday evening around 11:30 PM and to be surprise there were hardly any people. As it is located in one of the happening areas of Bangalore, I was slightly disappointed to see lack of people.

However, the mix of drinks and food was good though as we were doing pub hopping we did not explore much in food. Had veg think crest pizza which was relishing. 

Ambience was dull, not sure becuase of the lack of people or it is like this always. Scope of improvement to make it more lively with some good music. Not a bad place to be in if it is filled with some music and people :)

Author: Vinay Kamath
Description:
Best place!! Always enjoy there beer:) it gives a good feel of retro and modern bar effect which makes it best:) Thank you!!
Must try : Veg nachos, Artichoke Basille's Pizza

Author: Sargam Gupta
Description: Completely enjoyed the music! Just Bangalore vibes . Amazing ambience . Nachos was enjoyed along with the other alcoholic and mocktails that this place has to offer . Salads can be missed . Go in for the food because they have quite a variety to offer .Worth mentioning the breakfast too !

Author: Sahana Shetty
Description: Please book it before arriving, it’s like centre of the place and it’s crowdy any time you go on there. It’s huge but still feels congested and one of the fav in labelle though

Author: Shubhra
Description:
First time experience at a brewery here was great! Ordered a Cottage Cheese Pizza 3.5/5 I wasn’t really convinced with the pizza
Ambience 5/5
Absolutely loved the vibe

Author: Magician Krish
Description: It's good place with Greta beer and friendly staff. The table seatings are old school and little in retro style. Must visit the food is yum and good selection of cocktails.

Author: Sunitha Pai
Description:
Happy hours!!!! A visit on Monday Tuesday is totally worth it if you are a craft beer fan...though the 1+1 is not applicable on all the brews.

One of the first few breweries in a great location. The wall art and the quietness renders it an attractive setting for a long rendezvous with your bestie. The staff try hard at being friendly...though it does not deliver that feel good as effortlessly like some of the more recent breweries/pubs do.

We tried all the craft beers apart from the stout I think, all pretty good. The club special was the IPA which was okkk and if you wait for another month I think they have the mango cider which I hear is good here. The grilled chicken and cheese nachos was this huge plate full...one you can munch on halfway through the long chugging session. The jumbo chicken hot dog was ok.

Author: Raghav
Description: Went for a team lunch and ordered a lot. All the dishes matched our expectations. They have a pool table which you can enjoy with while waiting on your order. Recommended!

Author: Lokesh Nagaraj
Description: a down town pub to hang out for crafted beer and pizzas, the menu mostly has normal pub food, however the flavors of crafted beer is something that makes this place unique. Ambience is a given, this place is right in city center, also offers indoor games

Author: Alka Purushotham
Description: I have been here a couple of times already and I somehow missed out on reviewing it. It was one among the first few Brew pubs in Bangalore and has managed to be packed since then. They have a casual ambiance which is something I personally like. The beer and the food is quiet great. Kudos to all the friendly staff!! Must try: All in house beers and thin crust pizzas

Author: Pushpendu
Description:
The food is good with lot of verity. Take some time to get served. the staff is very friendly.
The restaurant is in prime location. Not much spacious but manageable.

Author: Ram K
Description: Had a good time here after a long time. But was disappointed that they were out of wheat beer. Food was decent. Service could be better... had a friend from abroad who wanted sparkling water but had to settle for soda water!

Author: Drpuja Suryavanshi
Description: Ambience is great amazing place in evening this place is fun food moctails cocktails are great service is also great try this place for once

Author: Kunals004
Description: Just ate at this place. The food (had pulled pork) and craft beer (had honey pepper, ale and stout) was really good. However there were flies around our table. And one of our beer glasses actually had a dead fly in it. So from cleanliness and hygiene perspective I was really disappointed with this restaurant. Hope you take hygiene seriously.

Author: Yashas MS
Description: Very nice place to visit in the weekend. Go with friends and enjoy the food and drinks. The place is pretty crowded and there may be a waiting time before you get a seat.

Author: Ashwini Bagepalli
Description:
Finally visited one of the much talked about places. Visited with my best fren after an event on a weekday. Was peaceful.

Ambience : Very nice. Loved the lights and the painting on the walls

Food: Veg Lasagne was very tasty. Aglio Olio was tasty as well but a bit too much oil.

Service: We were asking for suggestions with one of the staff member and all we got is wrong information. He did not know what is veg Florentine.
Also, when I was ordering Spaghetti, the description mentioned AOP and I asked what exactly is that (since I am a vegetarian) and he was unsure but said it’s there different kind of oils. I immediately checked the web and here u go AOP is Aglio Olio e Pepperoncino..!!!
I’m not saying they should know it all, but atleast he could have said `I will enquire with the chef and shall let u know’..!!

Price: Highly priced, Quite expensive. Especially the cocktails.

Overall: Very nice. Might visit again

Author: Karun
Description: Now this is one of my favourite places to hang out on a Friday night. The music is great, the atmosphere is buzzing, the starters hit home as far as the taste is concerned and drinks are averagely priced, in line with the competition in the locality.

Author: Vivek Bakliwal
Description:
Just went their with a friend after office. A 3 storied building on corner of Lavelle Road, awesome location.

Courteous staff.
Decent service.
Good music.
Food taste 👌👌
Food portions 👍

Regular but decent mocktails.

Overall nice time spent.

Author: HemanthKumar Krishnamurthy
Description:
Nice place hangout with friends
Food and ambiance is good
More verity of drinks
Eat food decorated so well
Afternoon is preferable
Heart of the city after drinks you can go for walk in cubbon park

Author: Sachin
Description: The have some of the best crafted flavours in beer and the place is jst placed perfectly at corner can have best view of the surrounding and abt food u can give a try as didn’t ate much had the barbeque chicken which was good ..

Author: Missree Vachhani
Description: The ambience is good and so is the diversity in the menu for drinks and food. The nachos could have less sauce and more beans and tortilla............

Author: Avijit Kumar
Description:
Nachos are highly palatable ..
View from II floor is fantastic (smoke friendly)!!
Wheat & Stout are the must haves..Ambience,Food,Service,Staff——10/10

Author: Niki
Description: Went this afternoon amazing food and Had tried the strawberry brewed beer which was outstanding.we had ordered lamb sheekh and spicy chicken pizza was pretty awesome.

Author: Pragati Mishra
Description: Amazing place to hangout with friends or family. I visited with my family. The ambience is perfect, not so loud not so chill. We tried Re-fried beans melted cheese Nachos, Cold coffee(amazing), Truffled mac N cheese and Potatoes roasted with Kefta spice,chilli and mint. Everything was #amazing.

Author: Kahil Raj
Description:
I have visited this place called Bier Club with my friends on weekday . The Ambience is so welcoming and good place to chillout..... it has two floors , ground and first floor.Beers here are good and the food we tried -N-veg Combo Platter , Nachos ,salad and mezze platter.
Hummmus dip was sooo good.Nachos can be little better as it was nt so fresh.overall  the food were great. The prices are on little heavy side but worth the experiences. keep it up. we'll soon visit again.

Author: PRATIK MHAMANE
Description: Been to Biere Club many times, always found the ambience great. Pizza is just delicious. Please don't try beer here, you will get addicted to it's taste, it's so nice.

Author: Samson Stephen
Description:
Been here twice and love the vibe and offerings of fresh beers Lager being my favourite all time,great 🎱 pool tournament on Thursdays which is fun and well organised to meet up with a bunch of great friends food wise loved the morrocan chicken starter great preparation to my liking assorted fries etc
give a shoutout to Mr Jagat and Mr Praveen at the pool area for an excellent and funfilled evening

Author: Kavita Mani
Description: So this was the first place I landed on this brewery hopping trip to Blore. Amazing laid back place with some good brews and food .. it's places like these is why I loom forward to my trips to Blore. Pretty laid back amazing ambience. Good food and people

Author: Seenath Haseem
Description: Loved the ambience there. Location is prime in the city and it was crowded when I visited the place. Chill place to hangout with friends. Enjoyed the time there.

Author: Bhavika Makwana
Description:
Simply amazing..their beers are just too good..
Also Rajat who always assists us with the best of beer served as per the season and the knowledge he has about beer..really appreciate the warmness we get when ever we go there it's just because of the service given by Rajat..
Do ask for him the next time and you will surely prove me right..

Author: Srikanth Pandey
Description: Very nice sort of this old rustic ambience combined with great food. Place is a bit expensive. For starters,we had popcorn chicken and prawn. Had a pizza as well. Very nicely done. Stout was a bit underwhelming. Good experience overall.

Author: Meghana Masudi
Description: Loved the Ragi beer (Seasonal). The brewed beer is of extremely good quality . Me and by boyfriend were looking for something spicy in food, but couldn't find anything. The food wasn't that great, else would have given 5 stars.

Author: Chaitanya
Description: Ordered Christmas special beer, the beer was fresh and very crisp. A good place for freshly brewed beer lovers. A definitely must try place..

Author: Esha Ghosal
Description: I loved this place. The food was good, and the staffs here are very friendly and approachable, specially Krishna. Definitely try it out, be it with friends or with your special one. Cheers!

Author: John
Description:
We went here on weekend ,it was a good crowd. the ambience is great,staff are very helpful, specially thanks to Mr. Prabitra and mr. Uttam,who was best service provider and friendly. They suggested us some good food , cocktails and beers. The food is really good specially the pizza ,morraccan chicken and chili chicken . Beer is really good...
Food...5/5
Service..5/5
Ambience..4.5/5
...... definitely visit again..

Author: Ritu Sanyal
Description: The thing I enjoyed most about this place was its laid-back, chilled-out ambiance. The place is very beautiful, the interiors are designed so well and it just fits in that corner that it's situated- the red building at the turn! The food is great, drinks are good too. And you can just hang out and play snooker and have an amazing time there.

Author: Bhupendra Bule
Description: Food and beer were pretty good. The ambience was amazing. The only thing which irritated me was service, it was really slow. Management is pathetic.

Author: Ashmita
Description:
The waiter who served us was quite rude. He misunderstood our order and when we pointed it out to him he acted like it was our fault.

Reputed places like this should really train their staff better. A disappointing visit.

Author: Paulami Sil
Description: Nice place to hangout with friends.. they have their own bruary and quite a variety of beers. Loved their hand toasted pizzas and fussball..

Author: Sanjay Sadarangani
Description: Best beer in Bangalore. This is a great place to chill with your bros. Superb non veg platter, nachos and pizza. Wheat beer is the best. The also have a pool table on the second floor.

Author: Hanisha
Description:
This definitely isn't a place for a college going student, considering the price is a bit expensive. But oh my god, the food, the ambience, the staff, truly amazing.
Can't wait to visit again.

Author: Dharma Tej
Description: The ambience was good. The food and beverage were tasty, especially the chicken ceaser salad. It might be the best salad I ever tasted. Overall, an excellent place to hangout. The only downside is that it's a lil expensive and too many taxes.

Author: Ethan
Description: There you go with seasons craft beer 🍺 ... Rum and plum in the brewed beer is a must try ..rich aroma and fine thick malt , especially the after taste will make you try one more !!

Author: Avishek Kumar
Description:
It was nice and cozy place , staff is very friendly, they are super quick with orders , must try coconut beer & nachos.
I strongly suggest that the place can be expanded a little coz every set of tables were quite close...

You should pre-book the tables before coming to the club to avoid waiting.

Author: Deeps N Gowda
Description:
This place has always been one of my favorites.
Beers are made with such perfection, can't seem to find any flaw in them.
So is the food. Love the varieties available here.
Great ambience, good music & a pool table in the middle. Saturday nights are set here.
Finally about our waiter for the nyt, Mr. Raju took care of us pretty well. Cheers to him.

Author: Tiara Edeline S
Description: A place that has continental, BBQ and finger food? One exists! It's called biere club at vittal malya, lavelle road, Bangalore. With their amazing variety of foods you should also try their in house brews. Biere club being a pub and microbrewery, make their own beer. Their specialty and most ordered is its wheat beer. Wanna have some pizza, pork chops, meatballs and really good cocktails?? Head over to biere club!

Author: Sai Prasanna
Description: We went here for team party from our office , we ordered lot of platters and food.i loved the chilly panner starter , it was absolutely delicious and so was the pizza.we had lot of alcohol. The place has a pool table , so it makes it more fun to play while drunk , they gave us complimentary shots as we made a huge bill for 6 people

Author: Rishideep Roy
Description: The place was pretty empty on a Saturday night, which made us think whether we made a wrong choice or not. But thankfully the experience proved otherwise. I would specially recommend the Chettinad style prawns, which were suggested by the waiter.

Author: Shwetha Rao
Description: One of the best places I have visited for beer. A very courteous staff. Good food good beer thumbs up to the place. Must visit for all brewed beer lovers.

Author: Food Lover
Description:
I went here after seeing good ratings,,, thought that I will get a better service....
But as soon as went there I ordered mug of beer and Mocktails for my friend... along with drinks ordered Pizza...but it was very disappointing ..the pizza was not on the table after finishing my first drink....I asked to waiter after almost half an hour...he told me it's coming sir....just give me a minute....but it didn't come after 40 minutes also... finally after finishing half of my second drink pizza came on my table....

It was very disappointing.... please improve your service....
Won't visit it again....😗😗😗

Author: Anupriya
Description: This was my first visit to The Biere Club after around 3 years of hearing good things about it! I must say, I was quite impressed. I'm not a beer person..so I tried the Rose Sangria and it was very nice. The starters like Biere Club popcorn chicken, Chettinad prawn & Nachos were yum. For mains, I ordered a Thai chicken green curry and I must say, it was not delish...including the raw papaya salad, which I'm otherwise not too fond of! So, it was a great first experience..and I can't wait to go back again!

Author: Dipak Bansal
Description:
Ordered chilli paneer but got some chicken item. Ordered mac & cheese veg pasta got some egg noodles.
Confirmed multiple times from the waiter before eating and this *** without even checking confirmed it's paneer. After trying we were sure it's not paneer. Then called another waiter who finally confirmed it's chicken and not paneer. Mistakes happens but 2 times back to back is not acceptable. The first waiter could have spent a moment to confirm before assuring us what the item is.

I guess not a good place for vegetarian.

Author: Akash Kini
Description:
Food - 3.5/5
Service - 4.5/5
Ambiance - 4.5/5
Infrastructure - 4.5/5
Value for Money - 4/5

Nice place. Went there to celebrate my friends birthday. got around 7 people in a massive section of the place. The DJ was keeping the place lit and the people happy, the ambiance was amazing, we also had fun playing pool. Ordered tons of beer and drinks.Some pepper chicken, beef nachos, chicken popcorn and a pork chop. the chicken pepper fry was very delicious but tasted like chicken ghee roast. The heat from the pepper was missing. the beef nachos were delicious with a nice nachos to meat to sauce ratio. The popcorn was mediocre, nothing great. the pork chop should have been the star of the dish but it was just not prepared good. the meat was tough, the sauce lacked flavor.On the plus side the mashed potato was on point, nice and great creamy texture. Special shout out to the Ragi beer. It was the hero of our experience there.

Overall would love to go there again. Recommended.

Author: Dipanjan Nag
Description: Neat place with good, courteous staff. Food is good with decent quantities - some of them can even serve 2. Beer is refreshing - do ask for the samples (even though paid) before deciding which one to drink.

Author: Ginwalla
Description:
One of my favourite microbreweries in Bangalore.
In all these years they haven't compromised on quality.

Excellent beer.
I highly recommend your trying their sampler before prior to deciding your pint. Particularly try their seasonals and their Christmas beer (if you're in town that time of year).
What I avoid: their stout

High quality food.
My favourite place for falafels and hummus (close second is Fava in UB City).
Their sharing platters are good too.

Ambiance & vibe: very good.
Always attracts a good quality crowd.

Author: Sahil Shekar
Description: Great place to visit on a Saturday night. Very good decor and a pool table also on first floor. It is a massive place having ground and two floors. The ale beer we had was not as good as we expected but everything else was awesome.

Author: Alok Tripathi
Description: Nice place good ambience but taste of food is superb, We ordered veg only —Nachos with bens and malai mushrooms tikka and really both were meeting with expectations

Author: Poulomi Ghosh
Description:
Great place to hang out with friends. Ambience is good, good food, good music, great beer, u can also play pool upstairs. I went on a Friday evening and the crowd was pretty good.
If u are a beer lover then a must visit place in banglore.

Author: Siddhantpuri93
Description: Good vibe! It’s everything it is and it isn’t trying to be anything else. Perfect for a casual beer with friends nothing too extra. Simple menu you get what you come for

Author: Rohit Sunkad
Description: Great place to hangout with , lager and ale is preferred drinks for me. Playing pool in here adds a note to the place . Staff are well trained and serve you quick .

Author: Akshada
Description: Nothing can beat the feeling of sipping freshly brewed, cold Beer on a hard and long day. Especially if it's from this aesthetically appealing place. It's guaranteed that one's likeness towards all the commercial brands of beer doing the rounds in the market slowly, steadily fades away after if he/she just drops by this place. Teaming it up with the cheesy nachos topped with refried beans it's the crunchy alternative to the generic peanuts served in all the local bars  across India. A bit on the expensive side this beautiful restaurant/pub is situated on one of the quietest places in Bangalore and is suitable to people of all age groups. It's pretty cool to step into such an ambient place and see a couple of grandparents sipping beer and having a nice time.

Author: Bonita Lama
Description: Good ambience and food was assume. It's a very nice place for hangout. Good crowd and specially I thanks to bartender danmendar who help me to choice the nice beer... Definitely come back again😀

Author: Vivaan Manjunath
Description:
A really good place....got a good crowd to play pool with ....very well organised and maintained....the pool table is my favourite here
Rajneesh was one of the friendly staff
And really love the wide range of beer choices available

Author: PBe
Description:
We went here for our management outing.. the place is just awesome, the beers and all their drinks were good. It’s on an expensive side, but if you stick to beer you will not feel the pinch.
Coming to the food, everything we ordered was just awesome, great taste. The fish and chips, jumbo platters , pizza all were liked by all the team members.
The service is good and they were accommodative in arranging our seats to our liking..

Author: Ani Shanpru Bhattacharyya
Description:
J'adore le *The Biere club*!
This place is Always so crowded and thé énergy is super nice
I like their craft beers and food, mâkes a perfect place to catch up for friends.

Thé staff can bé more friendly and coopérative, doesn't really help if you have staff who are cocky.
Hence 3.
I Hope thé next time my expérience is better.

Author: Lokesh Shekar
Description:
The food was not so tasty except the veg platters, moreover it is overpriced. The staff rarely appeared or come to us to ask for the order.
Not satisfied with the service. Waste of money.

Author: Padmavati Gopalan
Description: I love the Biere club for their new and innovative seasonal beer. The food is also delicious.Ordered fries and veg Platter both were good in quantity and taste.

Author: Dominic Rajendran
Description: Had high expectations of the finger food but somehow the boxes weren't ticked this time. The chicken wings were not fresh. The fish amd chip cones sounded interesting but the batter was too thick on the fish and parts of it were undercooked. Being hungry, we said we will give it one more go and asked the beef satay. Wasn't great either with the beef being overdone and tough and slathered in sauce. I remember the superlative experience i had at the biere club last time around and was disappointed this turn. Please go back to how you were in the old days.

Author: Vaibhav Aggarwal
Description: Located at a beautiful road cruising infront of bootlegger. Place is always crowded but you'll get table in half an hour. Service is nice and I guess the best veg menu option located at any bar in Bangalore.

Author: Viswapathy Sastry Mellacheruvu
Description: A wonderful place to spend quality time with friends. No music so more conversations and a lovely pool table to make you play rather than just sit and drink. Good consistency in the wheat beer and some delicious nachos.

Author: Vivek Agarwal
Description: Awesome party place with good food, awesome mocktails and good beer ( was told so). Loved the Tandoori platter and the baked cheese cake. The downside was they missed one of our order and brought something different from what we ordered for another dish.

Author: Raunak Shetty
Description:
Raju & shettre at the bar - amazing service as usual - by far the best brewed beer in Bangalore- biere club are the pioneers of brewed beer in Blore and one of the first to open a microbrewery
See y’all soon

Author: Justbangaloring
Description:
The beer here is amazinggg! We go here quite often. But last month we went there and tasted the mango beer and it was so good! The stout beer was just mind blowing!The mango beer is one of the most finely brewed beers I’ve ever had!
The ambiance is really good with many variations in seating and the first floor is just the best! With the view of lavelle road and there’s a sense of comfort in the ground floor overlooking the brewing machines. The vibe of the place is amazing! Crowd is mixed.
The service was fast and prompt! They give you many suggestions which you may need if you’re new to the place. Priced on the steep end but totally worth it!
Also, for more updates follow us on Instagram using the handle justbangaloring!

Author: Sandhya Banda
Description: The exterior is the highlight of this place with an attractive bright red set up. The brewery was pretty amazing and they served good craft beer. The interiors were classy with a beautiful bar. The food could be better otherwise it's decent place.

Author: Sreedhar
Description: Ragi beer available only occasionally is must try. Nachos are awesome. Mutton seekh kabab is good. Don't miss open seating in 1st/2nd floor.

Author: H Rushabh Patel
Description: Used to be one of my favourite places to come chill have a beer and unwind after a long day of work but unfortunately the quality of food and beer has come down.

Author: Shubham Kabra
Description: Pathetic service. I think this one at levelle road is understaffed. Visited this place for two times in last week and found it difficult to place the order. They are less of cutlery as well looks like, as there was no serving spoon in any of food we ordered. You will find other beautiful and better places, visit them. Ignore this place.

Author: Foodwineholic
Description:
Amazing place to chill out
Grab beer and enjoy a good time.
First brewery in bangalore.
Great service
Great food
People should visit this place.

Author: Vishakha
Description: This place serves the best mac and cheese ever! Trust me m a big mac and cheese fan,who has been disappointed with various places on various occasions. But the mac and cheese here is heavenly! The garlic bread along with it could have been better but that's just me nitpicking. The freshly brewed beer is decent enough! The only problem with this place is that the service is a bit slow! I would come back here for the mac and cheese for sure.

Author: MmKk
Description:
I ordered mushroom malai tikka. I think more than 200gms of mushroom. Infact very good quantity. Ordered - chicken cheese nachos. Very good quantity. Drinks- Stout - black color strong and chilled.
I wanted some total cheesy starters but no luck here. Overall good place for beer and chilling here.

Author: Yuran Miguel
Description: It's a good place to chill on a Friday night. U can chill here and enjoy the good ambience. Beautiful people and 5 star service. Visit this place if u want to a good vibe.

Author: Vikram Dasappa
Description: The Biere Club the first craft brewery in Bangalore city, the best location and the ambience can’t get better. Perfect for a chill brew alone or celebrate with your crew. The grilled salmon is cooked to perfection. Got to try the club and seasonal beers which keep changing every season. And the new menu has all my favourites. Must visit place. Keep it up guys. 👍

Author: Akshay Gowda
Description:
The ambience is good
Service is good
Beer taste amazing
Service staff are very friendly
I loved the place
Food-4/5
Ambience-4/5
Service-4/5
And the view from the pub is good

Author: Krish
Description:
The biere Club is first brewing in Bangalore
Now they're open so many places best thing about biere Club is brewing n their pizza is amazing

Author: Vandana Ramesh
Description: Present on one of the beautiful roads in Bengaluru, Lavelle road,this place gives completely a different vibe. Famous for its brewed beer, it was a must try for us. Tried their wheat flavoured beer. Definitely was a good one. Coming to the food, as we weren't that hungry we just got one pizza and nachos. Had ordered both in veg but later regretted on doing so. Both the pizza and the nachos were loaded with veggies and we got literally bored to finish it. Got a good service but was a big hole for our pockets. The place a little rip off. Just two pints of beer, a pizza and a nachos cost us 1700 bugs!

Author: Jayanti Ganguly ⭐️
Description:
I would rate this place 5/5 on service levels. Very nice staff and they are also attentive to guests that is usually rare in such places.
The food menu was nice - chilly paneer, spaghetti and veg platter were all delicious. The Rose Sangria was well made.
Overall a great place in the heart of town.

Author: Srinath Iyer
Description: One of the places where one can have a quick beer and some good food when in between meetings.. or come here .. sit on the first floor ... have a beer or two or more.. watching life go by on the streets below.. 😉 lovely food.. great and courteous service..

Author: Ravi Gupta
Description:
Even when more than 50% tables are free, they are not willing to give a proper table for 5 guys. Making us sit on a table of 4.
Be sure of table you get before you sit.

Author: Rashi Bharadwaj
Description: Cool place with amazing brewed beers. Spread out across 3 floors and can accommodate good crowd. Staff was extremely nice and interactive. Though I am not a pizza lover but loved their pizza. A must go!!!

Author: Bindiya Suresh
Description: Love their mango beer. Beer lovers reall should make their way to this place, so worth it. The ambience is great and the look of the place is great too, especially at nigbt with all the lighting.

Author: Arijit Das
Description:
In both my visits to Biere Club I have found their beers really good. Especially their seasonal beers are quite unique, like now they are serving a lager flavored with basil and pepper which we all liked.

They are the first functional microbrewery in Bangalore (2011). Ambiance and service is good.

Food is good but a I find the price a little high.

Author: T V Sesha Sai
Description:
Been here first time recently. This is a much happening place in the heart of city. Good part, to start with is, they have valet parking in this busy area. Brewerie with a lot of beer varieties with menu items changed seasonally.

I being vegetarian, We ordered mixed platter of starters and had good selection served in small portions each. The onion rings are awesome.

The staff is very friendly and helpful.

Ambience is very energetic with lots of games spread across hall. Great place to hang out with friends.... in Bangalore, a must visit place, especially if you love your beer.

Author: Anubhav Dev
Description:
One of the best craft beer in Bangalore.
Great food and cocktails.
Decent ambiance.
Decent music.
Non smoking and smoking zone.
Can Little expensive
Valet parking.
Friendly servers.
Must try - stout.

Author: K L Manjunath Kadabahalli
Description: Visited this place few month's back. A good place with good ambiance ... Service was OK.Jagat served us well.. But the bear was not so good. And chicken starter was uncooked. ..so not recommended.. Overall OK.

Author: Sanjana Satish
Description:
Been here twice. This place has good ambience, though we've only got places in the ground floor. Recommended to book a table.

Loved the food and drinks. Didn't like the onion rings though. We tried all the beer they had and all of them were great. Probably the only place where I liked the Witbier. Though I generally prefer a stout or a lager. They have some seasonal beer as well.

Author: Bhavik Kiri
Description: This was one of the first places where I got introduced to craft beers and still frequent this place in spite of multiple options coming up. My favourite is the fries with the harissa mayo, can just keep eating those :)

Author: Gautam Khorana
Description:
Came here last night while our beer hopping evening. I had the dark beer and chicken nachos.
Love the vibe of the place, beer quality is good, service is excellent.

Author: Urvashi
Description:
I have been to biere club in Whitefield plenty of times and never been disappointed. Yesterday decided to go to their VM road outlet, it's a nice cozy place offering great beers - their food menu is not very extensive .
We ordered corn curds salt and pepper , fish tikka and mediterranean pizza in pesto sauce - loved the fish so soft that it melted in your mouth. Salt and pepper dish was different and definitely worth ordering.
The portions are good and value for money.
The only thing which lacked was music - I don't know why there was no music which was a big downer for us specially on Saturday night.

Author: Pawan
Description:
Biere club is always been my favorite place to have a pleasant afternoon with a good beer and light snack may be. I'm always fond of the environment here and that keeps me getting back to the place again and again. Over the years, I've tried almost all the beer here. The thoroughly enjoy the brewery and its definitely my person favourite place.
Not much of the food I've tried here compared to beer but whatever I've tried is always top notch. Cheers to the brewing team who manages to keep me happy with the taste.
Should not forget to mention Mr.Raju sir, my usual waiter who's the most friendliest person. Thank you for the service everytime sir.
Cheers team biere club (:

Author: YASHIKA CHOPRA
Description: The place is famous for it's vast variety of beer with different flavours. Full tray of fries and beer is a perfect combination for this place . They do have multiple floors and live match screening as well. Whenever visit this area I would recommend this place.

Author: Natraj Kumar Chandrasekhar
Description: Great hangout joint with good food and courteous staff. Good options for vegetarians. The beer collection is excellent. The food choices for a vegetarian are also great.

Author: Abhimanyu Mittal
Description: One of my favourite place to vist for good brewed beer and starters. The ambience of this place and the beer smell drives crazy. Loacated in the middle of lavelle road. A perfect place to sit and relax with fresh brewed beer. Do try Wheat beer and Nachos here. A must try place in bangalore.

Author: Nikita Goyal
Description:
Been there on a Friday night with my office colleagues...we ordered mushroom for starter...n I wud really love to say that tandoor mushroom here was so fresh, evenly cooked, smoked flavour with spices blended properly was a treat after a long tiring day. Other dishes were average...if I wud ever go again..it wud b fr the mushrooms..

I had an amazing cheese cake on my second visit to this place...

Author: Sheetal Jadhav
Description:
One of the old brewery in the town. They got good beer.
Food is delicious. I liked their nonveg platter.
Place is always crowed and requires booking on weekends.
Overall
Food 4
Ambience 4
Value for money 4

Parking not a big challenge.

Author: Mrinalini Upadhya
Description:
This is where I'd go if I was craving for a good home brewed beer.

I need not say anything about this really well know place. They have good music cool beer and best food.

I was here with my friend just catching up on old days and Biere Club made my evening that day.

We ordered an avacado bread started I'd only order it if like me you are super crazy about avacados other wise it might be too overwhelming.
The veg starter was simply superb and filling.

And what can I say about the beer I ordered the Stout and it just hit the right spot.
Lovely place to catch up with friends and chill with good beer.

Author: Shrutika Kanchan
Description:
We visited this place on a weekday afternoon. Were seated in the partially open terrace area when Bangalore weather was the best!

Let down was that we were seated on to our table and the table was extremely dirty. We asked the wait staff to clean it but it took 3-4 reminders for them to actually do it and the place was not crowded.

Beer here were good but not the best. Could have been more chilled.

Food was good.

Naice place to chill.

Author: Rishabh Garg
Description:
