I think this is the one of the best pub in Bangalore for beer. The ambience is good, cheerful and lively. Staff is extremely polite, with a best service provider.
If you are a beer lover then you can't miss this place and must try the wheat beer. If I talk about food then its ok. According to the quantity the food is little expensive. Alcohol is not a problem, it's priced well.
And this pub is situated near UB City. So, you get many options to have dinner or dessert.

We had cheese nachos, Wheat beer, Stout beer.

Service: 5/5
Food and drinks: 4.5/5

Author: Abhilash
Description: It's located at the most luxurious street in Bangalore 😋😋 it's not at all a pocket friendly but the food is amazing 😎 and the quantity is pretty much okay, could improve on the service 🌿

Author: Food Punter
Description: D 1st brwery in bangalore ......d food r amazing lik moraccan chkn ,chkn wings ,fries.....beers r gr8 lik hefe ,ale beers but service as to improve .....server was little rude ....apart dat evethng vs gr8 ...vll vist agan

Author: Nidhi Sharma
Description:
Just 2 mins walk from my house, the best beer in the town! I go when I want good food, when I am happy, when I am sad, when I had a rough day at work, basically for any reason I need a beer!

And yes not to be forgotten my first date with my husband was with their best beer.

Before hitting a party, beer Long Island from Bierce Club is a ritual for us.

Keep brewing the good beer! Cheers!! 🍻

Author: Arkamitra
Description: I think this brewery sure deserve a place in list of one of the best pub In the city.  Beautiful ambience, vibrant, colourful and lively but not overtly loud. Food is quite good and don't burn a huge hole in the pocket.

Author: Manohar
Description: Pathetic place...they can't handle crowd if overcrowded....staff becomes very rude...and show attitude as if they are the Bollywood stars...personally I recommend people not to visit this place,if you are looking for good ambiance....

Author: Mrudula Sasidharan
Description: I occasionally visit biere club and tbh its one of the best places in Bangalore to chill . Great beer and food also great service. MR.Praveen was a great host, very friendly and i really appreciate him. Thank you

Author: Debopriyo
Description: One of the first breweries in the city , I think it was the first before the other’s reared their head . Have been a fan since it’s launch , be it their nachos , or just some plain old beer for the liking . Especially recommend during the weekends , some real classy crowd , we remember we were stopped from dancing once by the guys there “no dancing allowed ..” (then, not sure how it takes up these days ) , an over sight of the glitzy Lavelle Road , some good friends , hop along ! You won’t be disappointed. Don’t forget their pizza too 🙂

Author: Ashrit Patil
Description: We started going to this place several times only because of One Special Veg Pizza called "Grilled Mediterranean Vegetable Basil Pesto Pizza". They had the same consistency in taste for that Pizza over 1.5 Years. Unfortunately now from past few months the same Pizza is Not at all that great. Pizzas aside, we like their Potato Wedges & Freshly Brewed Beer.

Author: N. Kelvin
Description: The biere club, Levelli Road... Me and my friends went on Tuesday early evening... Place is silent little crowd service staffs were friendly but inactive... We ordered Belgian biere isn't that great we try lager which is better food is good... They don't bother to check the comfortability of the customers and feedback of f&b... Ambiance is good nice place to chill out with friends but service needs more improvements.. Had bad experienced this place i won't recommend my friends......

Author: Faisal Khan
Description:
Great location, superb ambiance. Can have a helluva time with friends. Corporate parties are also taken care off. The food is really good, especially the pizza and the nachos.
Do give this place a try if you want to have a good time (especially on a Friday/Saturday night)

Author: Gaurab Mukherjee
Description: The food was extremely good but the craft beers could have been better as well as the non alcoholic drinks. The ambience was amazing and the service was also good. You can definitely plan for this place.

Author: Evangeline J
Description:
It was a rainy Friday evening when I headed to this lovely bar to grab a cold one with a few friends. Having tried all their craft beers, I found their wheat beer absolutely delicious and to be honest, had one too many.

Loved the ambience and the staff are very helpful, specially Anush who was very attentive and jovial.
Their falafel is a must try and their seasonal mango beer was pretty good. All in all, it's a great place to unwind and kick start your weekend.

Author: Twisha
Description:
Our second time around over here and apart from all the good beer that they serve, I finally had something to eat. The Mac and cheese with sun dried tomatoes. Not to sound weird but it wasn’t too cheesy, just tasty enough to go with a lot of beers. Perfect rainy day evening snack, I must say! The ambience and the music is pretty good too. 5 stars for both food and beer. Why I'd give it a 4 star is only because of the slow service. The staff was bit too laid back and took forever to get even a bottle of water. If that is fixed, then everything is good.


For more such reviews, follow @twohangrywomen on instagram and facebook.

Author: Ketan Dixit
Description: Nothing fancy about this place..it's like an average around the corner bar. Shittiest things is that you have to pay for the beer tester, I mean who does that. Not only u have to pay for the beer tasting but I have to pay per beer type for the tasting.sad quality beer, no music (probably Monday) and sad food. Please ignore this place if you can

Author: Sri Krishna
Description:
One of the best craft beer I've ever had. Couple your favourite with nachos of your choice and you are good to go.

Ambience :- 4/5
Food:- 4/5
Service:- 4/5
BEER:- 4.5/5

Author: Aste
Description: Home-brewed beer to fulfill your thrust. Great balcony style of seats with and street view. Food quality and quantity is also balanced with the menu price, service was ok. Good to go during happy hours to enjoy craft beer and nibbles.

Author: Manbeer Singh
Description:
Very nice place it's near by UB city. So you can easily find out Biere club. good food and good crowd. Friendly staff........we had hot chicken soup with feta cheese was awesome. Nachos test is excellent. Beer was obsesly super. The biere club is super place in Bangalore . We all friends are very happy and enjoy. Recommended to you.

Food - 4/5
Beer - 4/5
Ambiance - 4/5

Author: Anirudh Kishore
Description: Mango season calls for their amazing brew! Beautiful place with the ambience helping you settle in within minutes of getting in. Definitely recommended if you're looking for some chilled space for lunch

Author: Panchalee Basu
Description:
Good place to chill out in a weekends. Location is easy to find.

Food-3/5
Behaviour of the staffs- 4/5
Ambience -3/5
May be It could have been more spacious because when we went that was in weekend and it was having its every table occupied with customers so sometimes it seemed hard to walk between our table to the washroom as it was having very little space between one table and another! Rest all were good!

Author: Rugved Mahamune
Description:
You can't get better Chicken nachos in town, with beer it's the best thing in the world.♥️
Tough onion rings has nothing to look for. Altogether worth the traffic😂

Author: Sumit Kumar
Description: Had been tonthis place for a office get together. Was dissapointed with the types of brew beer they were serving that day. I tasted all of the inhouse brew beer but all of them tasted sad except the dark one. Food is okay amd the ambience is fine. Not worth visiting 2nd time. Full marks to the location only.

Author: Ishita
Description: The food was delicious, the special beer was amazing. I had a cold and couldn’t taste anything but my eyes and stomach believe that it was appetising.

Author: Suruchi Kakade
Description:
I went to this place at 5 in the eve on Sunday with a Friend, so fortunately we got the table as soon as we entered. We ordered 1.5L Lager Beer and a Non veg platter. Platter was compromised of all kinds of non - veg options and they tasted really delicious.Unfortunately, the beer was not of our taste.
After a few sips it was impossible for us to finish even the glass so we asked for an exchange of the beer. We were not sure if that was going to work but was worth a shot 😋. They actually changed the whole beer and even our half drunk glasses and gave us Wheat beer. It was so nice of them and the Beer tasted great. Thanks to the awesome staff. Will surely visit again.

Author: Bhavya Rangaswamy
Description: The beer here is refreshing and great. I just love the wheat beer. Visited this place number of times and was never disappointed. This is one of the oldest brewery in town. Food here is amazing especially pizzas. This place spread  over 3 floor with fantastic seatings. They have good collection of cocktails and mock tails. Can watch live streaming of our favorite game.

Author: Venkatesh
Description: The brewery is so amazing.. Just like honey... And the season best mango brewery has started OMG its taste so Goood.....! Every one should try that......!!

Author: Siddhartha Ghosh
Description: The best wheat beer in town by a huge margin. Staff is really courteous and food is good. The first floor gives the old Bangalore feel. Lovely ambience. Absolutely loved it.

Author: Manav Malhotra
Description: Just off the Lavelle Road is The Biere Club, this place gets quite busy even for the weekdays. Weekend is mayhem, thus they open the Rooftop area as well. Service can be slightly slow, they need to really work on keeping their washrooms clean.

Author: Palash Roy Choudhury
Description: Very nice place to relax and unwind. Try to avoid the peak hours on their happy day (the way it used to be was tuesday, all day) as there's a lot of rush. The collection of beer and bites are subtle and reasonably priced.

Author: Chandan Rajappa
Description:
Ground floor is like a ghost town may be at the time I was there a weired woody aroma turns you off
Not exactly shorthanded with the service but tends towards less manageable staff
Prime location could have done more
Off few tastes of beers at times
Food tastes nice
Lavetories at the top only !!! Lol But y ???
Friendly and swift multi tasking staff as it is
Overall 4dot5 stars

Author: Nithin Balsa
Description: One of the oldest breweries in Bangalore!!! Surprise I’m writing up a review now!!! The location of the brewery is awesome !!! Lavelle Road !! The ambience is good but I get a stuffy feeling!!( my personal impression) !! I got a table on the first floor overlooking Lavelle Road !!! Good table to have !!! The service seems understaffed!! There were jus a couple of guys waiting tables on the first floor!!! So after a lots of excuse me’s my order for the beer was taken !! I ordered their seasonal special “lemon chilli lager “ !!! Boy did I regret it later!!! At first the after taste was good but then later u literally get a burning sensation in the tummy😔😠🤯I had to cool it off with a hefeweizen which was pretty good ... I did not get to the food part cause of the time constraint!!! Heard it’s good .. another visit will bring that to light!!! Till then ...Bier club I believe has lost its charm a bit!!!

Author: Chef Pandit
Description:
Nice food and amazing service.the ambience was cool. Must be try all main course.Mostly I like all Paneer dish. ......
Must be visit again with family and friends

Author: Arvind Adhi
Description: This place belongs to a friend. Been here ha few times and have never come away disappointed. The food has always been great. Be it the pizzas, or the wonderful starter. And the beers are great and refreshing. The place spread over 3 floors is a fantastic setting for all kinds of events. Never been disappointed at this place

Author: Anand Prakash
Description: Crazy good place to be at. Been here a number of times and it has always been a decent experience. The food is good but the place has remained somewhat the same. Some food upgrade in terms of taste may be needed.

Author: Archita Rai
Description: I visited this place with my friends on a Tuesday night at around 10pm and it was jam packed. The club is done up all in red and gives you the feeling of an English beer bar. We shared a pint of club special beer among 4 along with a mezze platter which was supposed to be a veg kebab platter (miscommunication). Though turned out to be good, had a lot of dips which is a must once-try.

Author: Paritosh Singh
Description:
Good place to hangout with sufficient seating. One of the many brewpubs in the city. Nothing much to set it apart from the rest of them.
The prices are on higher side. The brews are good. Service is satisfactory.
Was here for a quick catch-up and didn't really explore the menu. Would visit again.
Food - 4/5
Beer - 4/5
Ambiance - 4/5
Service - 4/5
Overall - 4/5

Author: MOHIT PRATAP( @minttoyourmojito )
Description:
Visited this place for quick beer with friend. Having tried all the major breweries in town, this one of the oldest microbrewery was pending for me. Hence thought of giving it a visit.

The place is built in a huge area sprawling across 3 floors.
There are 2 floors of smoking area, and the ground floor is air conditioned. They have varied seating options, couch, high tables etc

We ordered Wheat Beer, Stout Beer and Nachos. The wheat beer tasted amazing and had a flavorful smell to it. The stout beer had coffee like bitterness to it, but still tasted well. Both were strong in concentration. Had ordered veg nachos, tasted well but the cheese and other ingredients were only placed on top, below there were only tortilla chips. We did not order any further because ALL the food items were really really expensive. The presentation of the dish was very nice though.

The service was average, menu took time to reach our table even when the place was not crowded. Cost wise the place is really expensive as mentioned earlier, avoid visiting the place during the month ends.

All in all, good place if you have a lot of money to splurge.

Author: Ahzam Khan
Description: The variety and quality of beer is great. The food is fine and ambience is good. Good music, great to hangout with friends. If the staff starts serving with a smile then one of the best breweries to visit in Bangalore. But must give a chance because the beer is really good... cheers

Author: Devashish Marwah
Description:
The ambience is nice, there a pool table , many screens casting the relevant matches, basically a mix of a sports bar and a cafe. The chicken pizza was really nice and I totally loved their Stout beer.
I have visited this place more than a couple of times now. The only disappointment was and is the staff and the management. Not polite really and don’t work with a smile on. Can really spoil the overall experience. I would have added another start but for the last observation, every time.

Author: Ankita Saha
Description:
Cozy place for drinks, had an awesome visit.
Comes with a snooker table. 😎
Go have fun and beer and chitchat.
I really loved the wheat bear there😋
Prices are comparatively high😐

Author: Aman
Description:
Been to this place on tuesday still it was full house. We got nice side seats , enjoyed outside view with beer. Wheat beer just amazing one of my favourite.
In food we ordered pizza which was also yummy .
Reducing 1 star because of service very less staff and a bit slow service.

Author: Priyadarshi
Description:
Its a wonderful place to be at in the evening especially during the weekend. The crowd is superb along with their awesome Craft beers. The food is delicious.
Ambiance: 4.5 /5
Beer: 5/5
Food: 5/5

Author: Anurag
Description:
Loved this place ... Was roaming on Vitthal Malya Road searching for good place to chill ... Randomly came across this place and so we decided to hop in....
There was couple of snooker tables with good open balcony filled with High Chairs and crowd chillin with their home brewed beers ...
We'd ordered the wheat beer and a stout as well.... Loved the wheat beer and asked for a repeat .. had never played a snooker game before so tried playing with friends and we had an amazing afternoon...
I really don't remember what had we ordered to eat as I am reviewing this place almost after a year.....
Overall had an amazing time
.
.
Food :- 3.5/5
Beverage :- 4/5
Service :- 4/5
Ambience :- 5/5
Value For Money :- 3.5/5

Author: Vijay Verghis @vj1901
Description: Great food and wonderful ambiance. Enjoyed the beef dishes from nachos to the skewers. Staff super friendly and courteous. Enjoyed the happy hour meal and the free drinks

Author: WALES
Description:
Best in house brewed beer in the city. More of a pub ambience. Lovely service m. Tried out the Belgium beer and it was very satisfying.
The Biere club is a must try.

Author: RITESH V H
Description:
Superb place to hangout.
I liked the food 🥘 and ambience is great 👍.
Appetizers like Nachos,fries that are really gud.
The apple drink is nice.
I suggest other people to try this one which value for money which u spent for it

Author: Julian Joshua Felix
Description:
One of the oldest brewery in town, situated bang in the middle of lavelle road junction is the place to visit for good beer and great food.. with an English style pub ambiance.. Biere club has the best Fish And Chips in the city paired with the finest brews. I have visited this place many times, tried different dishes but this place never disappoints!

Would completely recommend biere club to people of all ages and for both private and corporate get togethers.

Author: Varma
Description:
I used to be a regular to this place, off late I only stop by if I am in this side of the town. Their beers are the best in Bangalore🍻.I Love their dark beer.Food is good if you are ok to spent lil more than what they deserve. Expect to wait for some time as they always almost run at their full capacity.
Service is ok but THEY are always right, not you.
Valet parking - 👍

Author: Rahul Raghunath
Description:
Coziest Microbrewery in Bangalore

Ambiance: 5/5
Love the whole feel of the place. Comfortable post-modern furniture, well lit, open air floors, a pool table, comfortable bar and the unmissable red ambient color makes it super cozy!

Food: 4.5/5
Serves some clever takes on classic dishes making their menu very versatile. Would give a 5 if they managed to pair their food and beer a little better.
Must try: Pizza, fish and chips, desserts. Actually, give everything a go!

Service: 4.5/5
Good service. Things slow down when they get slammed by heavy crowds on weekends.

Beer: 5/5
Being one of Bangalore's first microbrewery, it's a no-brainer that their experience in the industry constantly dishes out consistent, true beer. You can expect some good quality classics like the stout and wheat and can also hope to find some surprising seasonal beers.

Overall: 4.5/5
Drop by for any occasion. A lunch date. Casual meeting. Drop by with a book. Play a round of pool with the staff. Everyone is welcome :)

Author: Niladri Roy
Description: Lot of areas to improve including the service, freshness of the brew and billing accuracy. Last visit was very disappointing and felt the place is no more like before. I see many recent reviews echoing with my experience. Time to pull up your socks or loose it to the competitors.

Author: Ruchi Vijay
Description:
Food is very disappointing :( Would not like to visit this place again. No value for money.
Ambience is average.. Went all the way from Koramangala but didn't find it exciting at all..

Author: Kavya Bhat
Description: One of the oldest and best breweries in Bangalore. Good food, great beer.I am not one for the strong beers, hence cant vouch for some of the beers, but the wheat beer is one of the best in the city. Good ambiance and friendly staff. Service is pretty quick too. Food is on the expensive side but worth every penny. Paneer tikka is one of the best. And mezze platter is not bad either.

Author: Rakshitha
Description:
Good ambience..
Friendly staff
Service is good
But foods are too high over here. .over all its good pub to hangout vid friends..

Oly thing i dint liked here is for parking vehicle..they gv permission for their staff..😑

Author: Rajat Khurana.
Description:
Good music.
Good staff.
Good ambience.

Foosball and pool tables available.
Non veg platter is brilliant.
Ale beer and wheat beer is good!

I would rate it a 4/5

Author: Megha Chakraborty
Description:
My first visit to this place, famous for in house beer ans food. We were 4 people all together we ordered a pictcher of Ginger, honey beer which was actually pretty Gingery and tasted good. The chicken Nachos was good and pepporoni pizza was good as well. The decor is good and its a feel good place. The only issue is the service was too slow that day. Also the staff seemed a little bit confused.
Rest its a good place to hang with your friends.
Its little bit on the Expensive side but worth it.

Happy eating and drinking.
Cheers!

Author: Shraavya Ajila
Description:
The biere tasting samples are a must try! I liked Ale the best. Also ordered the chilli coriander chicken but you could probably pass it on.
Maybe makes reservations because the place is pretty full on the weekends.

Author: Anusha
Description: Visited this place today. Loved the look and feel of the place.. a very pleasant ambience and very courteous staff. Coming to the food the spicy chicken pizza was really tasty and perfectly spiced. A special mention for the virgin sangria which was really yummy. The wheat beer is the one we liked the best.

Author: Sachguruu
Description: if u r from ggn u will not like it for the prices they charge, overall an average experience, just because you are on a good address does not mean you servr good taste

Author: Shubham
Description:
It was my first visit to The Biere Club back in last week of Feb(sorry for posting late)
From outside building seems normal to me like they don't have enough space of parking just outside the gate but yeah they provide ballet parking.
they have multi story sitting and as I entered inside it was totally pack...no space at all...which exites me to explore this place.
finally I got a seat on first or second floor.
Ambience is 5/5 (They also got pool table with projector screen)
We ordered handcrafted beer and some snacks.
Beer was so good and chilled which made my night. along with that we order paneer tikka and avacado sauce served with some roasted tikki dish which was brilliant and I loved it.
Food and Drinks 5/5
yeah prices are quite high but doesn't matter when it's worth it.
Prices 4/5
staff was trained and fast and works as professionals
Staff 5/5
overall love this place.. will surely go again

Author: Namratha
Description: Bad tasteless burnt fries was still okay but charging us just like that which says bmrt44 trust xxx which they say is for donation to some organisations is totally not okay, how do u do donation in customer’s money n without their own permission is something that cracked my mind.

Author: Raghu Sood
Description: Had heard a lot of rave reviews of this place... as I don’t drink thought this would be useless for me... honestly because we did not get a table at Soda Bottle we decided to visit. The service, food and even the valet service was great. We had loads of starters and main course. The stuffed mushroom, nachos, and the veg platter was exquisite... we literally were racing towards the food when placed far away... the drinks that we ordered were just amazing. It was my mistake that I did not visit so I would say - “deyr aaye durust aaye”... the sour cherry creme brûlée was to die for and so was the “propper pudding”...  the veg burger could be better as it was a little dry on the inside... ohh how can I forget the spaghetti was so flavourful!!! All in all an awesome experience!!!

Author: Supreeth Sharma
Description: Good handcrafted beer the snooker table is always full and pricing also is on a little higher end overall a good place to hang out staut beer is amazing here

Author: Chandan Kumar
Description:
Wow , It's a Very Beautiful Place .......
Amazing Food....
Lovely Ambiance...
And Staff (Pabitra & Suman) was Very Friendly..
I liked this Pop..👌👌👌👌
I visit again & again..
Thanks

Author: Vibha Haridas
Description: The visit to this place was a quick one. We happened to pass by this place and hopped in. All the kinds of beer are good and so is the food. Quirky coasters will catch your eye.

Author: Tirna
Description:
One of the best breweries in town 😍. It was in my bucket list from a long back... Situated in the heart of lavelle road, this place has a great ambience and you can play billiards too.. crowd is good and quality of the freshly brewed beers are also nice. Recently they started an offer of 1+1 on mondays and tuesdays for beer. Keeping in the mind about fitness freaks, they have launched ragi beer now.
It’s a must place to visit.
Biere Club, keep brewing 😇🍻

Author: Naraayan Kannan
Description:
Great beer club, fascinating range of brews, as always the most dependable were the here weisen and the dark beer (lager) in this case. The table was given quickly, the service is quick and efficient. The food can be priced better as it is on the higher side, the alcohol is not a problem and is priced well. 

The location is good, you have many other options nearby for dinner and dessert with UB City in proximity. I would rate it 3.0 for now only due to the food rates and variety, the quantity was slightly lower for the price. We had the avocado toast which was the highlight of the evening, the pizza was alright, nothing spectacular which captured our imagination or memory.

I am hoping to return next month for a detailed review and lunch again with some other varieties of beer. The great thing is, because of the higher rate of dishes there was no service charge on the bill separately. I appreciate this with establishments who don't fleece people separately. 

The samples can be priced slightly lower as constructive feedback, while I know samples are misused we felt it is on a higher side for beer lovers and authentic students of the art.

Author: Surajit Choudhury
Description: Great food, great beer - what else can you ask for? Okay, great location and interiors too! Specifically, enjoyed the Sauvin Pale Ale and the delicious veg pizzas.

Author: Nitin
Description:
Came to The Biere Club after a not so great experience at another place nearby.

The place is nice with cool ambience, friendly staff.

We started off with the wheat Biere - 3.5/5 for the beer.
Later also tried the Ale, which was a big big let down - 1/5. Probably the worst ale I tried yet.

In terms of food, tried the nachos with beans. Wasn't cheesy enough, too dry for my liking - 2/5.

All in all, this was a quick visit with mixed feelings. Would probably try other items on the next visit, whenever that happens.

Author: Asutosh Dash
Description: This place is pure beer lover and we have paper chicken which was absolutely Yum.Must try sample beer to choose the best one #cervesa #beer.

Author: Mohinder Patravali
Description: One of the First Craft Microbrewery to be be opened in Bangalore ,it is an awesome place for brew.The taste wheat,lager are exceptional,along with finger food options

Author: Monisha Pujar
Description: Absolutely in love with the vibe here! Visited Bierre Club on a weekday, yet it was brimming with crowd. They have 3 seating sections and the ambience here is so rustic and alluring. They brew vats of beer which is brilliant. Tried their Stout and Wheat beer which was lovely, the latter being my personal favorite. Chicken kebab was tender with great spices, onion rings were a little disappointing but quite passable nonetheless. We also tried a couple of pizzas from their Italian section which tasted great. The staff here is really polite and warm and the service is surprisingly quick. I'd recommend this place to everyone looking forward to a beervana night!

Author: Pooja Jadhav
Description: For the beer lovers this place is to try for as they offer craft beer and the for those who like light version wheat beer is the one. We had ordered wheat beer and cosmopolitan and chicken chettinad for the sides.  The wheat beer was bit where as cosmopolitan was ok ok kind of . seduce is good and the price does not make a big hole for the pockets . Ambience is good one could relax and drink having the sight of out.

Author: Tavishi Ipsita
Description: Food 4/ Ambiance 4 / Service 4/ Crowd 4 . Nice place to visit in weekend with friends. But yes then you have to book table in advance. That would be good.

Author: Raj 2721
Description: Off late this has become my regular hangout place, I like the freshness of the beers. Food is good, they have changed their menu just over a month now, but being regulars you'll always have something on your palate and mind to have it even though its not part of the new menu anymore, i suggest just ask for it, the chef is more than happy to make it for you... Must try brewery in town. Good friendly staff and a good crowd hangs out here.

Author: Sheetal Ponde
Description: Our fav place to hangout.  Amazing brews. Weiss and stoutare our favs. Also love their seasonal brews. Great place, great location and awesome vibes. I have been here 8-9 times. Off late I am bored cos there is no variety in their food. They havent come up with anything new at all in these many years. Thats a little disappointing. Recently, i didnt like the Guacamole on the nachos! Worst guacamole that I have ever eaten. You guys need to wprk on it!!

Author: Premsteve Martis
Description:
This was a place chosen for a friend's reunion on a weekend. We planned a relaxed evening with dinner to go, but the stewards seemed more relaxed than us. They did not bother us to order or get refills for our table.
The selection of brews was good and we tried the seasonal Ragi beer and the Wheat beer, both of the variants soothing and relished each sip. Did not try much on the food part, stuck to basic finger food. Hope to check out on the food next time we're here.

Author: Sunil Magaji
Description:
The worst beers no malty flavours waste of time and money the ambience also support that the beer is good if the beer tastes tastless.
Food is ok

Author: Janice.avrelpinto
Description: Standards of beer has dropped a lot.Stout tastes like water. They also refused a replacement even though only a single sip was consumed out of 1.5 liters . Some waiters can't communicate well

Author: Sharath Bopanna Chowrira
Description: Great place to have a chilled out evening. Best place to sit is in the rooftop. Must visit if you love beer. Great food, great view of the city and good crowd.

Author: Sanil Sinha
Description:
What a happening place.
Biere Club is a hub for all the people who likes to hangout with their friends. A very enjoyable, energetic and youthful atmosphere. They've this typical western atmosphere.
The beer they serve is out of the box. The best thing I like about Biere Club is that they don't hesitate to experiment with their freshly brewed beer. I loved their pepper beer and the herbal beer (Yes you read it right). The wheat and the blonde beer is also way too good.
Talking about food- Even the food served here is no less to be appreciated. We usually order 6oz beef tenderloin, pepper sauce; mixed mushroom mascapone and truffle oil pizza; and the nachos with minced beef and Mexican sauce.
Overall it's a must place to visit if you near by the area.

Author: Food Lover
Description:
I find this place in google...
I see the ratings,,,,I see. Good ratings ,,thats why I went there with my brother...
But it was very bad experience...

Though I went today first time in this club...
It was very bad experience ...
I really hate this place ...

Ambience: 4/5
Service: 1/5
service staff was very rude
Why I rated service 1 because I have waited for one pizza for more than 1 hour...I regularly. Asked steward but they dint take it seriously...
I really hate service....


Very worst experience ..
Won't visit again..

Bill was also very improper ...I dont know how they r making bill...
They r charging Gst twice....
They r making customer fool...

I visited many pub...but this was the most worst pub in Bangalore I visited till now...😁😁😁😁

Author: Payel Chatterjee
Description:
This is the third time, the staff has outright refused to help with basic stuff, let alone decent hospitality.
The security outside is least bothered about attending to the guests with 2 wheelers in particular. It is a sight to see them resting on the 'manager/staff' s' 2 wheelers parked outside the club, where apparently customers are prohibited to park their vehicles.
The staff at the club straight away refuse to offer any support to customers on 2 wheelers and make statements such as " we can help guests with a four wheeler, not with a two wheeler".
Extremely disappointed with the pseudo complacency the staff seem to exude.

The manager who can or is responsible for a desired customer experience, is conveniently not available, even though his bike is parked just outside, where the customers are treated with utmost disdain.

I strongly suggest to visit the surrounding clubs (there are many), and NOT this one.

Author: Nitin.patial8
Description:
Please don't visit this place if you have a vehicle, because their PARKING is completely booked by their staff people and is reserved for restaurant managers. They don't allow any slot to customers.
Rude parking staff is almost clueless about parking. Even restaurant staff will not assist you.

Only If you are on foot , visit this place. Otherwise a BIG NO!!!

There are many places around this which are parking friendly, visit those.

Cheers

Author: Anurag Madhav
Description: The place is very close to UB city so you will generally get a good crowd here,their brewed beer has nothing special but in food beef skewers,pork chops were delicious..

Author: Harshitha
Description: You get Bangalore’s best Beer here !! The Kiwi Beer is the best ... their food is amazing too.. their pizza is to die for !! Looks and tastes super yummy !! My favourite of the lot is the Sangria of course 😍😍

Author: Balaji Vindlacheruvu Subramanian
Description: Wwwwah, what a place this is.. pefect location for a evening to be spent with friends. I tried ALL their speciality beer when I visited. Loved the mango flavoured beer. Will definitely visit again when I go to Bangalore.

Author: Ujawals Kitchen
Description:
Went to this place after office on friday around 7, below are my ratings.

Food - We ordered chicken nachos and assorted fries which was really good with enough quantity 4 star to the food

Drinks - They did not have enough beer options and since they have a microbrewery inside thay offer three options from their brewery only, which is really good but a little expensive also they have good options for all other drinks hence 3 star to drinks

Ambience - the place was full and had really good crowd with some nice music.

Service - 4 star to the service

Value for money - 3 considering the place is little expensive i paid 2034 for nachos, fries, two 300 ml beer, two small vodka glassess and one fresh lemonade.

Author: Annies Food Trail
Description: There's as something great about a perfectly cooked, tender, beef tenderloin steak. A lot of chefs overcook it, even when ordered to be medium rare. But a big thumbs Up to the chef who cooked it to perfection. Would have been perfect if I didn't have to choose between mashed potato and veggies, if both were there. Loveeeeeed their veg kebab platter too. The chicken burger was served with super yummy potato wedges. Already love the beer and ambience. Especially love the Belgian Wheat.

Author: Amit Mital
Description: Excellent service by Biswas , enjoyed a family meal after long time keep it up. The wheat beer was excellent . The starters and advise on portion size was spot on will recommend to all

Author: Adithya Philip
Description: Biere club for us was unfortunately not a great experience. We were a group of 20 there for a corporate dinner and service was ridiculously slow. Most of the dishes we ordered took 30 minutes to an hour to be served. The food wasn't anything great to speak of. They had a huge variety of beer, of course, but the overall experience was far from satisfying.

Author: Rohan
Description: It always feel good to be here...one of the oldest crafted brew beer they serve in Bangalore and even till today they maintained the quality .

Author: Sabistian Xabier
Description: Had been their on tuesday eve. Their brewed beers are brewed in its perfection.. Service and foods r superb but sad moment was they dint serve their wheat beer on mon n tue jst bcoz they hav 1+1 on d days and waited for 20mins for table.... Overall good.... Keep it up guys...

Author: Rakshith
Description: Good place. The non smoking zone is always crowded. A table or 2 are always free in smoking zone. Smoking areas are very well ventilated and the smoke itself is not an issue at all. They do have craft beer. Surprisingly at cheap prices. Starts at 180 to 250 per pint ( inc. of tax). But what I would suggest is that you try a beer sample of all the craft beer available. Will cost you just Rs 50 per sample. 30 ml of beer served in a shot glass. Cheapest craft beer  in the entire Bangalore. Mild strength and mild flavour. Would be instant hit with a girl. Pretty decent English decor. The servers are prompt. Worthwhile. Cheers.

Author: Soujanya Manohar
Description: It's been a wonderful experience! The food and drinks are just awesome the only thing they were repainting the venue and that was surely not great as the smell what too much inside that it was bit suffocating.

Author: Vignessh Raveekumaran
Description: They are one of the really good pubs in Bangalore ,their brewed ales are really good ,but better to get a taster before u order ,cause there is nice variety ,food is also good and price is decent ,the ambience is really good and the place is always packed and must visit place in Bangalore

Author: Lokesh Raisinghani
Description: Terrible service - the waiter was confused and didn't know what he wanted to say. The manager Velu was pretty rude and uncourteous even though he said he worked for 7 years. Unhappy with the entire experience and they didn't even have their wheat beers which could have been a saving grace.

Author: Shravan Shetty
Description:
The ambience is cozy. Whether you are at the ground level or you what's etaed on different floors .this place is always vozy and makes you feel at ease and peppy at the same time.
It's one of the earliest and finest micro breweries in town.
Service is consistent .service
is quick .sometime foo orders can take time if it's running full on weekends.

Always have a great time . Last time I was here was with a college buddy and his manager .
Love the Moroccan spiced chicken , kasoori paneer tikka .
flavoured bieres are excellent .I ahve had some bier with chocolate as well as flavour .don't remember the exact name .
Have had the chilli corriander spicy chicken as well.
Meatballs and pizza are good as well.

Author: Arush Reddy
Description: The location of the place is just mind-blowing. Right in the centre of all hustle bustle Sits a fresh brewed ‘the biere club’. It is one of my favourites and a must try in Bangalore. The ambiance is just lively and electric. And the music is amazing. The food is too good. It ranges from fries to nachos to pizzas to burgers to desert and many more.

Author: Shilpa Nayak
Description:
Great beers and a good selection of wines.

The only dampener was that our wine glasses were dusty! And when we asked them to take back the drinks and get us fresh clean glasses, it was appalling to see them drain off the wine from the dusty glasses into the fresh glasses. So, if it weren’t for the hygiene standards, this place would be a 4/5

Author: Sanjana Pai
Description:
Finally got to visit the oldest brewery of Bangalore. They’ve a board which lists all the details of the brewed beer incl the last date the beer was brewed.
We ordered nachos which was tasty yet very soggy. And the pizza wasn’t that great to rave about.
Great place to chill though.

Author: Yogesh Gupta
Description: One of the oldest brewery in bangalore, has always been one of my favorite. They brew some really nice beers and prepare good food. The beauty about this place is that it attracts very diversified group of people, and there is no chaos.

Author: Arihant Jain (Pass Me The Ketchup)
Description: Have had numerous wonderful times here. The seating on first floor is a real delight in the evenings. The food is good. The wheat beer is my favorite. Making reservations is advisable on the weekends

Author: Foodker
Description: They have one of finest fresh beers in town. People who like music but on the lower side , this is the place to be . I’ve tried their chicken pasta , still felt there was a little sumthing missing there . Nevertheless I would go to this place to only try the beer and I will still have some nachos as a safe bet to keep me accompanied .

Author: Shalabh Kulshrestha
Description: Superbly brewed beers, lip smacking finger licking food, friendly staff, relaxed ambience and lovely company: ingredients of a quintessential good time spent. Regardless of what food you'd order at the biere club, it'll be spot on wrt the taste and presentation ... and the beers are rightly brewed, with wheat beer being my favourite and highly recommended. The ground floor is non smoking anf upper floor is smoking permitted and there's a pool table for a quick game with friends.

Author: Abhiteja Ch
Description:
We decided to take a walk from office and we ended up at this place. The ambience is quite good with lot of artwork on the walls with different messages.


Amazing place to hangout on a week day.
Especially on Mondays and Tuesdays they've got a 1+1 offer on their brewed beer which is a great deal.


The beer is just smooth and amazing. Can easily say it's among the best u get in Bangalore.

Service is great as well. This is situated just beside a Lamborghini showroom on UB city road. U can hear and witness lot of sports cars and bikes zooming around on this road which makes this place even more amazing.

Do visit this place if you happen to be nearby Lamborghini showroom on UB city road.

Author: Vipul Chandra Tolani
Description:
Superb place. Pretty decent crowd. Great ambience. Best brewed beer offered in Bangalore.
If you like pool or foosball, it's a good place. Too crowded over the weekends. Must reach on time. Food is pretty good too.

Author: Mona
Description: Great place to hangout with friends.... Testy food, affordable  price and exciting offer with  extra ordinary service..... Love  the place....... 😄😄😄😄😄

Author: Jesika Babel
Description: Our server was rude and unhelpful. All we asked him was whether we can get eazydiner. He said I have seen your in your phone you just booked..that’s such a evasion of personal space. How can he see what I am doing in my phone..the service also very slow and we had to remind them everything 3 to 4 times..pathetic service..drinks and certain food items seem to be overpriced..

Author: Crystal Catherine George
Description:
I came here with my manager on a Thursday afternoon around 2.30ish.

We had ordered the veg kebab platter and omg! It was finger licking awesome!
Me being a non vegetarian actually finished eating most of it. It's perfect for two people. Loved it!
It had mushrooms, paneer, potatos, brocolli and other vegetables.

The dips were soooooo good. Loved this place and the staff- a fun bald guy who actually suggested we try the veg kebab platter instead of the hummus filafel platter.

Thanks for the good experience, Beire Club. Definitely bringing my set here for more!

Author: Pruthviraj
Description: Nice place to hang out with friends. We didn't spend much time because we wer heading to some other place. May be will visit this ppace again to explore more

Author: Akshat Bordia
Description: Finally, got a chance to visit Bangalore's oldest microbrewery. This is an elegant place at a great location in Vittal Malya Road. They have all the brewing details on the wall with the date of last brewing of all the beer. Unfortunately, stout was not available on the day we visited.  We settled for wheat beer which was pretty good. In other drinks, Margarita was also good. The starter platter made a good combination with the drinks. Nachos were delicious too. Overall good experience with prompt service.

Author: Raj
Description:
The beer is Great, Ambience is okay. Staff and their behaviour is the reason for 1star.
...
1. They are listed in Dineout but will not acknowledge the table booking....

2. They are also listed on Phonepe but do not acknowledge the payment and will tell you they don't have scan and pay QR code. If you don't have the QR code why do you make a contract with these apps? And then argue with the customer and explain your BullS**t?.
 
We were in the 1st floor and had a very rude, unprofessional experience with a North Eastern waiter (looked like a waiter Behaved like an Owner) there. He was little old in age and small heighted. But hiring such people and still keeping them, not acknowledging the bookings they list on Dineout and payments for Phonepe is Unprofessional behaviour on side of Biere Club owners and people who run it. We had 2 pitchers. Enjoyed the beer. Got our Experience Ruined by this North Eastern guy and left immediately. Beware!

Author: Jatin
Description: Visited the biere club last weekend. The place has lost its charm and the rudeness of the waiters to the new customers is clearly visible. They are happy to serve their long lasting customers and give them all the attention even if they don’t ask. On the other hand, being an old, but irregular customer, I found the place loosing focus over its attention to customers. It’s really disappointing

Author: Narendra.r
Description: Lovely place, good food, great music and if you have few friends to hang out to drink beer then you will need nothing. Highly recommend this place for beer lovers. Just be little careful that you don’t sit close to speakers as the music is quite loud and it may just end up spoiling your outing.

Author: Harshvardhanmehta17
Description: The good thing about this place is only the infrastructure of this restaurant but the food is not as good as compared to other restaurants and the service is also poor.

Author: Geet
Description: Biere Club is amazing. All the times I had been here, I never was disappointed. The drinks are good and food is so very tasty. Finger food doesn't get much better than this. The staff is courteous and polite. The crowd is always good. The décor is cool and so are the tracks that get played. It's an awesome place to chill with your friends.

Author: Ramdas Prabhu
Description: Nice place for beer lovers ..tried lager , ale, seasonal(pepper), stout, fruity samples..fish an chips were soft an succulent..moroccan spiced chicken felt like our regular kebabs nothing special..overall food was good..ambience is great and a nice place for hangouts

Author: Rahul Shetty
Description: Ambience- it’s different and best view you can ask for to see Lavelle Road and experience the best beer in town. They have different types of beer which will take you to a different era all together. They have there own brewery which gives you a good idea about the beer being prepared.

Author: Kavya Ananthaswamy
Description: Well, what can be said about this place!! It's already a people's favorite!! Absolutely loved everything here, especially the stout and wheat beer, so crisp and fresh!! Loved the food too, good portions and palatable! Nachos and Calamari were yummy. Would love to visit again!

Author: Purva
Description: Biere club is a good place to catch up with friends who appreciate a good brewed beer. I am a big fan of the dark beer. Other brews are fairly ok. The non veg platter is my go to order as it has a lot of variety and is also sumptuous.

Author: Snehal Jigajinni
Description: We had season beer name as it was so awesome tht I forgot it's name... We drunk too much.. 😂 then we had protein hacker which was full chicken marinated in different flavours... Nice hangout place to with friends.. U can also try 20min challenge

Author: Tanmay Chatterjee
Description: Freshly brewed beer at a nominal rate is the main attraction. The music and crowd is good but average food. A good place to hang on weekends.

Author: Nisha Prakash
Description:
Have tried their beers twice now. The first time we tried their seasonal spiced ale (during Christmas last year) and recently tried their pale ale, Belgium wit and stout. While the beers are pretty good, the food still fails to impress.

A good place to grab a freshly brewed beer while on Lavelle Road; but you may want to fill your tummy elsewhere.

Author: Shuchi Prasad
Description: Ambience and service are good. We had ordered nachos, which tasted great; and squid and bacon fry, which was okayish. The beer is good. The place is good for alcoholic beverages.

Author: Amol Shanbhag
Description:
Beers were good and adequate variety.
Starters were descent nothing much to boast about.
Ambience is again descent.
Overall a bit letdown not meeting the expectations.

Author: Ajay Kumar E A
Description: At the very first look I liked this place. The location which is just perfect. Checked in and ordered for the beer sampler which costs 50 bucks for a 60ml sample. Belgian strong ale was the club special and was good so we ordered for the same. Tried the nachos and smoked chicken pizza and it was delicious. Also the lychee lemonade is worth a try. Overall satisfied and would definitely visit again.

Author: Abhijit Debnath
Description: Very good place to hangout beer iz awesome chilly cron was really amazing N malai mushroom ws mouth melting staff are also very attentive to the table. We really injoyed our good time. Cheers guys 🍻🍻🍻.

Author: Padmagiri .G.C
Description:
Biere Club is a suave, sophisticated urabne place for which we all felt completely under-dressed.

Of course you'd expect the place to be expensive and it was.

But absolutely no complaints with respect to the service, food and the beer.

We had some of the best pizzas, onion rings, popcorn chicken, and my favorite devilishly lip smacking sticky toffee pudding.

On the whole, good time with good food. Cheers.

Author: Omkar-gorakh Nevgi
Description: Good food and beer too . Nice place to hangout. Try the challenge over the 5500 rs plus tax. Wanna try mango flavoured beer in seasonal category

Author: Sudha
Description: After having heard a lot about the Bowre Club, the actual experience was extremely disappointing. The least you should expect in a place like this is authentic Mediterranean food. However the souvlaki I ordered was just chapati with uncooked paneer and some salad. The taste was bad. We also ordered assorted fries which were just so so.

Author: Priyanka Mahulkar
Description: First thing you notice on Lavelle Road is this club. Try out the variety of beer they offer. Beer beer and beer and then maybe brownies too. Just go for the beer with a good company of course.

Author: Sujan Noronha
Description: One of the best beer places I have visited. Quick service. Ambience is so lovely. They have pool on the first floor. Spacious. Basically it's very classy!! Loved it

Author: Shree Hari
Description: It was raining cats and dogs on a Sunday night when I walked into the biere club and surprisingly it was very crowded. The ambience is amazing. The music is great, the table arrangements and the crowd is amazing. They have a pool at the center with focus lights which makes the place look even cooler. Even though we had booked the seat we had to wait for about 25min to get the seats. The food tastes good. Tried a nacho and a pizza. It's a thin crust pizza and easily serves 2 to 3. The rates are average. The service needs some improvement. The tables weren't clean and there were miscommunication among them on who had cone first to allocate the tables. Otherwise it's a very happening club to spend the perfect weekend.

Author: Hethal51
Description: The liquor variety is vast and the beer is good as well, did not try the main course as such the decor is good, the pizza looked good as well

Author: Sumeet
Description: I did visit this place for a comedy event and found it to be over priced in alcohol + Food and super cold in Temperature. The food was nothing special, more like it directly came out of a wedding party food menu. All in all an average experience, the staff is friendly though and does try to help.

Author: Pooja Mishra
Description: First place I visited in banglore and it was very welcoming. Good crowd, good food , good ambience and good staff. Situated as an easy location.

Author: Pratik Chandak
Description:
The first microbrewery in town, it's not the best but has certainly maintained its consistency over the years. Brilliant location but very tough to get your parking lot!

Fairly good and simple ambience, good for watching sports and great starters (especially the pototo bucket)

The wheat beer is good and the seasonal beers aren't too bad either.

I felt the service could be better, especially with 4 people at the bar and only 2 who were serving.

Food - 4/5
Beer - 4/5
Ambience - 3.5/5
Service - 3.5/5
Value for money - 3.5/5 (it's become expensive lately)

Author: Aarzoo Saliya
Description: Best place in town for freshly brewed beer. Great food. Pizzas are a must try. 👍Ambience is too good. Plus the staff very very friendly. Best experience

Author: Loyd
Description:
I'd been to this place for a get-together with few of friends. The place was a bit crowded as it was weekend. We'd ordered 'assorted fries with harissa mayo' and 'grilled chicken & melted cheese nachos' to start our meal. We also had Johnny Walker black label whiskey and 'moves like lager' beer which was amazing! Later we ordered pork chops and smoked chicken pizza which was delicious! Overall I liked the service and food at this place.

My Rating (out of 5):
Taste: 4.5
Ambiance: 4
Service: 4.5
Value for money: 4

Author: Simha Krishnamurthy
Description: Visited the place with a  friend of mine the tables lacked cleanliness there were flies it was becoming difficult to have a conversation time went in driving away flies and when asked I was told since they brew beer there will be flies

Author: Chalapathi Manohar
Description: Went after a long time which was my fav beer destination n found its become horrible n decided will never go back. Consistency s something missing in this place.

Author: Priya Pariyani
Description: A good place for people to hangout with their friends. Pizza over here is really an good option to try. Caesar salad was good too here, could be tried once.

Author: Sabyasachi Nanda
Description: The beer is kind of nice the place stout and the ale ace to that and coming to food nothing special but the quantity is quiet a grub definitely a go to place

Author: Alwyn
Description:
Good place with a nice feel to it. Just makes you gulp down more beers by the barrel.
A variety in the menu is a good offering however need to up the taste and make it more tantalising for the palette.
Service is good at the bar as there was no place to sit in the restaurant.

Author: Umesh Kumar Prasad
Description: Good place good beer good location tasty starters the crowd ambience is very good valet parking available must try place I was there for a casual meeting and we liked it

Author: Meenal Pathak
Description:
Not bad ambience at all but the overall mood was somehow average.
We sat on 1st floor and it had a diverse and mized crowd!!!
Pool table gets extra points but beer takes all the points away!!
Delicious wheat beer and yum 🍕 but again u know such a big 🍕 lover I am
Overall good place for beer and music is good towards closing times!!

Author: Vineet
Description:
Great location and ambience. More like the pubs I have been to in Gurgaon.
I liked their 🍺 a lot and their ambience is also pretty good. I did not like the service - they did randomly weird things which is not expected at good pubs.
The pizza that they brought was also cold.

Author: Nikhil Naik
Description: Definitely my fav brewery in the city. Have been to this place several times and it never disappoints.. recommended for all beer lovers who wanna try best craft ones.. hefeweizen(wheat beer) is my all time pick.. The non veg platter is great go with the drinks.. also the pork chops(must try) are amazing.. the ambience is real nice too, rightly lit, music aint too loud.. overall a great place and a must go👍

Author: Deedu Pipada
Description: Very Average in terms of food quality. I ordered a Veg platter and it burnt my pocket. The place is good for its Ambience and its Beer, but very average in terms of food quality.

Author: Paavana
Description: Their beers are good and I happened to try their seasonal special peach flavour and it was good. But ale is my favourite here. The food is just average. They can do a lot better about the service. I really like the semi outdoor seating on the first floor.

Author: Tejaswini S
Description:
They have the best Chicken curry rice
Please don't change anything
It's absolutely amazing!
I wish I could get that recipe
It's soooooo good

Author: Rohit Johar
Description: Service standards have dropped here.. half the beer and food in the menu was not available. The staff could have been more attentive. Did not get a place to sit for an hour plus

Author: Diya Jose
Description: The Biere Club is located at a good location.  Their food is good and staffs are attentive.  Its has smoking section which is open on the sides. Average ambiance.

Author: Abhishek Gaonkar
Description: I have never tasted a beer so delicious...just check with them on when the Brew Belgian Wheat  Beer.  You will fall in love with it.. My friends from Germany and Poland coudnt stop the beer.. Anyone I take here loves it.. It's the only place in Bangalore which has managed to get the exact same taste and quality as the ones I visited in Germany and Europe.. I only wish they brew the Belgian wheat regularly instead of alternating it with the other hiefenwiser or whatever they call it. But I love this place...

Author: Vidya Anil
Description:
Loved the place, cozy and nice. The home crafted kiwi beer is one to die for. Loved it....! Must Try!!
The food is nice too. Had the cheesy nachos and pepperoni pizza...they were yummmm!

Author: Arjun Singh
Description:
Last night I went in to see comic Sandeep Sharma.

Location :: in the heart of the Lavelle Road. If you are visiting for the first time you just cannot miss it. It is clearly marked on google and cab maps.

Ambience :: it's like a regular pub, lights were low and the music was not loud on the ground floor. My kinda of ambience. Seating was comfortable.

Beer :: 2 words overhyped/ overpriced. I read the reviews prior visiting this place and I was expecting some great wheat beer, turns out I was let down.

Food :: Ordered as per waiters suggestion : Morocoon chicken
Taste : 2/5
Presentation: 3/5

Wouldn't go there for the food and beverages.. the stand up comic was excellent though !

Author: Aakash
Description: Probably their team consists of big time losers. They just cannot respect a customer. They basically just have a big mouth to speak. Horrible place. Would suggest everyone to think a 100 times before going to this place as you will get harassed if you just even step in.

Author: Mohammed Affan
Description:
One of the best beer junctions in​ Bangalore!
Ambience is fine!
A really chill place for a hangout!
Have a pool table and the food is good too..
Service is kind of slow.. but manageable.

Author: Jesper
Description: Had a chance to visit this place for a summer food fest menu tasting event they had hosted. The menu was rich in variety. tasted 2-3 pizzas both veg and non-veg. The food was great and presented very well. I loved the smoothies they were super refreshing. The ambiance is great. Music not too loud. Great place to catch up with your friends with good food good conversations and good vibes.

Author: Vikram B S
Description: Well this is a place I used to frequently visit a while back, this time went with a big group and had a wonderful experience. The talking point is definitely the beers, they have a selection of lager, ale, stout, wheat and seasonal. We tried all of them and loved it. To go with it we snacked on Veg & Chicken Nachos, a mushroom starter I forgot the same of and Moroccan Chicken. All the dishes were awesome. The ambiance is hip and the service was great considering the place was jam packed. Overall they have maintained the quality of the beers and the food, it was an awesome experience.

Author: Kritika Rao Bharadwaj
Description:
My all time favorite place for a beer!! Their stout!!! 😍😋 is just too wow.. The ale, wheat, kiwi everything is so perfect!!
Even the wine they serve is tasty for a very nice price..
French fries is perfectly done, chicken is well cooked, pizza is so Damn wow..
I just can't even think of negative abt this place except that you have to struggle for parking..

Author: Girish
Description: When a pub has the audacity and confidence to offer it's corridors to shelter street dogs during rain. When its guests don't complain but take the time to pet those dogs. When cleanliness and hygiene are not compromised even a little bit, it shows there is hope for this world, yet. Beire Club at Lavelle Road, Bengaluru has great, beer, staff, attitude and a great.....heart.

Author: Simmi
Description:
Well, this place was recommended by a friend which unfortunately turned into a DISASTER. We made a booking and when we reached, there was no one to show us our table. After a long wait, we were given one corner table, and mind you, it was a weekday.
Coming to the drinks, we ordered A Beer Pitcher which was fine, and an Old Fashioned which was decently made. Then for the food we ordered beef which I requested to be made spicy, which to my surprise they refused to. When somehow we finally started to enjoy, their beard doned manager came and ask us to pack up telling us that they shut by 11. When we asked why wasn't it informed to us earlier or at least take the last order, he didn't listen to us. Even our pitcher was still left, we were not even given time to finish what we paid for.
This was my worst experience so far. Such rude staff and management. They should go back to hospitality school to learn some basics, rather I doubt did they even go. Will not recommend this place to anyone for sure.
No matter how the business maybe but If you are not hospitable, it will not work in the long run.

Author: Vikash Gupta
Description:
visited this place 2 week back on Saturday evening, nice ambience, beer was ok.. 

must try - kolkata style veg cutlet 

Ambience - 3.5/5
Food - 4/5
Beer - 3.5/5
Service - 4/5
Value For Money - 2.5/5 (cocktail prices are very high specially LIT)

Author: Apoorva Vatsa (Foodgramnow)
Description: The fall back option for us whenever we explore lavelle road. Great beer- we usually go with the wheat beer. Real tasty. I like the assorted fries basket and nachos (they aren't dry). Recommend booking in advance

Author: Chandan R
Description: Cool and happening place... Where u find microbrewery craft beers which tastes awesome... tasty food with decent place and sporty crowd .. friendly and humble staff .. one of the best pubs to visit in Bangalore.. plan to visit again

Author: Dijo Thomas Joseph
Description: Had their freshly brewed beers and found it pretty good. Also their finger foods like assorted fries, mutton pepper fry, biere battered onion rings and chicken tikka which were pretty good, specially the mutton pepper fry which was so tender. Following that we had smoked chicken pizza and mixed mushroom pizza which was a good too. Overall a good place to chill with friends and family.

Author: Alan Miranda
Description: A three-storied pub with great ambience and beer. The Irish Stout has become my favorite. The food menu is also equally good. Had the falafel and hummus, and the beef skewers. There is a lot of choices for vegetarians also. Place gets extremely crowded, so make sure u have a reservation 😁😁

Author: Kritika Panjiar
Description:
A good place to chill with friends but nothing extraordinary. The ground floor and second floor seemed more like a dining place to me and not a pub. 
The wheat beer was good. No doubt about that . 
We ordered margherita pizza ( I loved it ) and chilly chicken ( okayish ) . 
The music was not audible enough in the crowd . 
We went on a Saturday night but it seemed slightly dull to us, so we left early.
I did not understand the hype about this place. Maybe our timings were wrong . But I would not be going back here any time soon.

Author: Narendra Nayak
Description: We loved the place, the beers crafted was enough for us to become a loyal patron. Not an expensive place at all. Beers are 1k a pitcher but the best. Nachos were great. Overall food can be better. Looking forward to visit again soon.

Author: Mayuri Yeole
Description: An amazing place in the heart of Bengaluru😍😍😍. The place is warm and welcoming, couldn't think of any better place than this to shooo away the mid week blues😜😜😜. The food food did surely tickle our taste buds, wanting for more..... Next time will surely turn up early😊. All in all nice place to hang out with friends.

Author: Malavika Shenoy
Description: I just love this place. Ambience is very pleasant. And bieres are excellent. Great place to hangout with friends or family. My favourites would be ragi biere and British brown. For food I ve tried souvalaki which is good, pastas - mediocre and bacon wrapped sausage with salsa verde- excellent. Cheers.

Author: Sreejit
Description:
Disorganized place with clueless staff.
We had a reservation which they didn't honour even though we arrived 15-20 mins early. First of all we couldn't find anyone at the entry and later when we got hold of a waiter he had no clue about who handles reservations. Finally, after 10/15 mins when the lady at the entry showed up, she had no clue about reservations for the day. Had neither a tab nor a register with her.
The place looked really low end as well, probably made a mistake reserving it based on the Zomato reviews.
After wasting around 20/25 mins at Biere Club, we went to Smoke House Deli, which was as amazing & delightful as always.

Author: Sandip Bagchi
Description:
Not sure what was wrong, but we didn't like the food of this highly rated restaurant. Today I visited this place for the first time with one of my friends. We ordered letuce and cucumber salad with grilled chicken, mutton pepper fry, crispy chicken burger and beer. Beer was good. Salad was ok and nothing special in it. But mutton and burger disappointed us too much. It seems that mutton was not cooked properly and that's why it was hard. Fried Chicken patty inside the burger was burnt and ruined the entire taste of the burger. So, not a good experience in terms of food quality.
Price wise this place is quite expensive. It may be due to its location. But then they should serve excellent foods to justify the price. Ambience of this place is good.

Conclusion: We were not satisfied with the food. I'll think twice or thrice before visiting this place again because there are so many places where we can get much better foods within the same price range.

Author: Anagha Manjunath
Description: Been here on a gloomy afternoon, perfect ambience , but the waiters suck! Pocket friendly! Great place though! The view from the smoking zone is worth a check outside the whole the lavelle road. Going back again forso

Author: Gerd
Description: Micro Brewery with a fine selection of brews, small tasting glasses through to jugs.  A solid selection of nibbles to be had-really good garlicky hummus and felafel along with tasty nachos and onion rings-matches perfectly with the beer.  Popular spot for a Saturday night -could do with snappier service and maybe a live band.

Author: Praveen
Description: Good ambience. Great beer. Decent menu. Service is friendly but a tad slow. Heffe weizen was the lightest and best beer for me. Menu options need to be enhanced-especially for vegetarians

Author: Sumedha Govindaraya
Description: The three-storied wooden box of a sort that you spot on Lavelle road, the first craft brewery of Bangalore, THE BIERE CLUB, turned six this may. It has been customary for them to launch a new menu every anniversary like they say change for the good. On a Saturday, a bunch of us were here to savor the delicacies from their new menu, and this experience about the same.A bit about Biere Club, Lavelle Road:

Author: Kushalappa Kc
Description: These guys serve really interesting craft beer and very generous quantities of food.! Love to visit again. Thanks for hosting us team biere club.! Cheers.@sampath Poojary

Author: Panima B
Description:
So I had been planning to go to this place since long time and the balcony kinda view from outside always fascinated me. I had high expectations from this place but somehow I felt I was let down . But nevertheless this place is a good one for hangout.
It's a 3 floored pub.. so umpteen space. 1st floor has pool table and 1 and 2 floor are smoking zoned as well.
We got our reservation for 2nd floor and I felt sitting arrangements could have been better..
Food : what we ordered? Chicken pizza, pork ribs, mutton seekh kabab, some fish item (forgot the name) , French fries. Overall the food was okay except the pork ribs. Too sweet for the sake of it. We couldn't eat that.
Beer : we had their brewed beers. Blonde, Wheat and Mango beer. I personally loved the Mango beer.
Ambience: cool and happening. Loads of mixed crowds. Music - not bad.
Although its centralised AC even in 2nd floor, it was little too suffocating or congested, maybe due to less space between tables ( I disliked that ).
Service: Too good. Appreciate the service, they are humble and swiftly responded to everyone.
PS - Book your table before you go and reach early 🙂

Author: Shashank Saurav
Description: I personally love the place at my maximum.. It has one of the great ambience in the whole bangalore...  Though u might find it difficult to get a table as the crowd is big.. (may be u have to book it before u visit,  I have never done that though) Still if u r with friends it doesn't matter much..  Great beers great people...  Nice taste indeed... :)  love it :)

Author: Neha
Description:
Situated in the heart of lavelle road, this microbrewery is a perfect blend of good ambience, good food , great music and happening crowd.
Been here a couple of times and each time i luckily got a seat at the corner most towards the balcony(the place i like the most)
I always go for wheat beer and its undoubtedly amazing.
From the food section, there's not much on the menu for the vegetarians but when we are here to enjoy their brewed beer, we nibble on the quick bites or pizza which are just delicious.
The service is quick, but you can't expect the same when its insanely crowded during the weekends.
Overall, its a lovely place!

Author: Susheel George
Description: Wanted to visit this place ever since I got to know that this is the first microbrewery in South India. Since I'm a Hefeweizen fan, tried the same here and wasn't that disappointed(have had better ones, though). Tried the Hummus, Falafel and Crispy Sweet potato chips, Biere Battered Onion Ring Stack, Cheesy Stuffed Crumb Fried Garlic Mushroom, The Biere Club Chicken Popcorn, Mixed Mushroom, Mascarpone and Truffle Oil pizza and the Sticky Toffee Pudding with Vanilla Ice cream. All the items were yum. But special mention to the Onion Rings, Chicken Popcorn and the pizza ; a perfect 10. And as for the Sticky Toffee Pudding, it was the best I've ever had. Over level 9000. A great experience, would definitely visit again.

Author: Sandipan Barkakaty
Description: I am getting quite a connection with this brewclub .. have been quite a few tymes... more den quite a few ...aaah.. . I just love the happy hours of them on mondays and tuesdays..PRAVEEN is the go to guy there.. he has immense knowledge of the menu and caters to his guests in a very friendly manner.. 5 🌟 to him... ... I happen to see familiar faces among the crowd(yup theres always a good crowd here).. service is very prompt,quick and courteous.. service staff is very friendly and they always managed me a table.. the brews are awesome... the best being their wheat .. ale and porter stout s full of aroma too with the perfect blend of hoppiness .. mango wheat is an awesome seasonal addition ... food.. the best part of this brewery is that they take thier food.. preparation and presentation seriously.. spicy coriander chicken, salads with lots of feta, grilled tenderloin, pizzas are awesome, ... this place never disappoints me.. I have spent some of the tuesday evenings in this amazing microbrewery . .. wheneva I think of brew .. I always think of biere club..

Author: Peter Lalrinsanga
Description: A good place to hang out with a good company with some awesome brewed beer. It got a good vibes and a friendly atmosphere to chill out. I really had a good time here.

Author: Neetha MH
Description:
I have been to this place couple of times, this review is based on my recent visit. It is located on Lavelle road, easily accessible. They are famous for their crafted beers and claim to be the first crafted brewery place in Bangalore. Staff are very friendly and courteous. Ambience is pretty chilled out. This was a quick visit hence could explore only few items from their menu.

Im not a beer person but my friends tried out couple of crafted beers, Lager and Ale which they loved!!! i quenched my thirst my ordering a Cocktail called Virgin Mojito which was refreshing :) We ordered Cheesy stuffed crumb fried garlic mushrooms, which was delicious and couple of mushroom omlettes which are served with grilled tomato, hash brown and toasts.  My friends ordered Pork chops actually couple of them ;) which they liked as well. and to finish of we ordered a Grilled Mediterranean Vegetables with basil pesto pizza. It was good. Pizzas are prepared in Wood fire oven which gives that amazing flavor.

This place also has a challenge as well :)  If you can eat and drink a lot give a try :)

Author: Rohini James (rjheartnsoul)
Description:
If you love your craft beers and are familiar with Bangalore breweries then “The Biere Club” would definitely be in the list of your top 5 breweries to head to. Holding the distinction of being the first Craft Brewery in Bangalore, they are celebrating their 6th year and have launched a New Menu to commemorate the occasion.

On a personal front, I must admit I normally do not visit this part of town and hence till this visit, I have only had the pleasure of being a regular to their Whitefield branch which is quite impressive thanks partly to their great location and surroundings and of course their food and drinks!

On the occasion of their 6th year anniversary, a bunch of us got together to try out their new brews as well as their new menu on a fine Saturday afternoon. Their location is smack in the middle of Lavelle Road which makes it quite unmissable and the crowd I saw at 1 pm would vouch for the popularity of this place. Spread across 2 floors, the decor is simple yet comfortable as it is meant to be a lounging spot where you spend a few hours relaxing over a few drinks.

Among the first few to arrive, my friend and I decided to go ahead and the bartender brought us their beer sampler which consisted of Ragi, Mango,English Porter, Lite Lager and Belgian Wit.I have come to love some craft beers over the last few years of being introduced to it but I have never tried Ragi biere and though more interested initally in their Mango biere which is seasonal, I was taken aback with the great taste of their Ragi Biere. Being no expert in this area, I realized I should have listened to my friend who kept raving about their Ragi beer from the beginning. Being health conscious, this biere made from millets is indeed quite a pick and I loved the taste of it being just the right amount of bitterness. So I finally settled in for my very large mug of Ragi biere to keep me company for the rest of my meal while others tried their other biere’s as well a very interesting looking mocktail – Strawberry Virgin Mojito.

A place like this not only focuses on delivering the best possible brews but also some great appetizers to go with their biere’s and they do not disappoint.

The food was served as a 4 course spread starting with the Whole Steamed Mini Corn Cobs, Slow Cooked Korean Style Sticky Pork Ribs and Artichoke, Spinach Sundried Tomato and Caper Pizza. It is quite rare to see Corn cobs on a menu in a place like this but I love Corn and this was a perfect combo with the beer. Though the Pizza was very good, I thoroughly enjoyed the Pork ribs which were perfectly done.

The next course was even more interesting consisting of Mezze Platter ,Green Pea Tikki , Whole Roasted Hacked up Chicken with Gravy , 1lb of Roasted Tenderloin Fillet with Horseradish Gravy and Grilled Jumbo Shell on Prawns, Hot Garlic Butter. The Mezze Platter is normally a dish I would not hesitate to order thanks to it being healthy and non oily. That said, the Mezze Platter there is impressive and a sight to behold. Be it their Falafel, Cous Cous, Beetroot dip or Baked Chips all of it were very good and certainly a must try especially for the vegetarians. I did get a taste of the Pea Tikki and it is certainly one of those fried starters one cannot resist, though not too oily. 

I love non veg dishes and their Whole Roasted Hacked up Chicken with Gravy was a dish which looked very appetizing from the moment it was served. Do ensure to have this dish hot as the flavours when eaten warm is best savoured. 

Thanks to the never ending discussions on beef in India, it was a pleasure to see them serve up a lip smacking Roasted Tenderloin Fillet which tasted even better thanks to the Horseradish Gravy served with it. 

Never one to miss out on any prawn dish in the menu, I loved their version of Grilled Jumbo Shell on Prawns, Hot Garlic Butter. 

Finally moving onto to something new they have tried by introducing rice and curry combos ‘A Taste of India’ at The Biere Club. We tried their Kashmiri Lamb Stew, Chicken Tikka Masala, Paneer Tikka and Mushroom & Pea Stew. Among these dishes, I loved the Chicken Tikka Masala though the Lamb Stew was not too far behind. 

As it is customary we ended our meal with a large dessert platter giving us a taste of their Chef Special desserts – Chocolate Orange Pudding, Wafer Thin Apple Tart & Baked Blueberry Cheese cake. My favourite in this platter turned out to the Apple Tart which was warm and perfect with vanilla ice cream. 

All in all, a very well spent afternoon with beer, buddies, great food and a fun crowd which makes me want to do it all over again for sure!

Author: DeepaShri Rajan
Description: They say that "Change is the only constant in life" , keeping this in mind, the city's Brewtiful Brewery  "The Biere Club" launches a new menu once in every year to glorify it's anniversary and making it a worthy place for everyone to add it to their bucketlist moment.
