Yes, i mean it by saying the word bucketlist moment, as there are so many new comers to the city every single day, every tourist who wants to enjoy the happy hippee Bengaluru city and to the very own residents of this majestic city, am sure that The Biere Club has always been the talk of the town for all of them and eventually it deserves a tick in their bucket list moment.

Author: Ragina Nair Pradeesh
Description: A great place to unwind. Spacious place with good ambience and music. Their crafted beers are a must try. Cocktails, too are good The beef souvlaki is treat to the taste buds. A tad expensive.

Author: Chethana Revanna
Description:
Best place for a chill beer in Bangalore. Wide collection of different varieties of beer and each one is at its finest. So all the beer lovers out there you should visit this place. Get ready for the beergasm.
Ambience is authentic along with a well mannered staff.

Author: Rohith
Description: The beer quality is nice the food served was excellent in taste chef pays good attention in preparing the food and ambiance is excellent the staff is very friendly overall a good place to hangout with friends.

Author: Sriranga08
Description: This place is all about LOCATION LOCATION LOCATION. Respect for being the FIRST Bangalore brewery. Love the IPA and Stout. Their seasonal brew is also a must try. Onion rings, chicken wings and pizzas, the usual suspects ;-) can still do better in the food menu.

Author: Karan Khemka
Description:
I have been to this place many times and in my opinion this is the best beer club. The ambience is very hip and classy. The location is superb and it adds an old world charm to it.

The different types of beers are quite good and this place was my 1st ever beer brewery I have been few years back.

Food is quite ok since you don't go for a dinner there.

Overall a fab place.

Author: Arun Radhakrishnan
Description: Best crafted beers esp ur Belgium wheat the best .yummy pizza and tasty starters and ambience the best .people service here the best patience level.keep rocking guys

Author: Anshika Malhotra
Description: Great place for some nice craft beer, and some awesome non vegetarian dishes on offer. I had a great time with office colleagues at this place.

Author: Puja Chaurasia
Description: It's been great visiting to "the biere club".. the location is awesome, soothing view from the restaurant, ambiance, music, food just perfect..

Author: Rajdeep Ghosh
Description: I experienced an acute level of food poisoning the first time I went to this place. We tried the fried chicken, one of their pizzas, bacon-wrapped sausages, french fries and 3 rounds of brewed beer pitchers. Puked the entire thing out that very night itself. Be careful about the kind of food they serve, I suspect poor hygiene and cooking conditions with lock of cleaning activities.

Author: Jayant Dalmia (PuchkaToPizza)
Description:
Please note: Teetotaller's perspective

I've been to this place more than half a dozen times now and the food and ambiance has always been really good. 

I really like their vegetarian starter platter which comprises of onion rings, tandoori aloo, tandoori mushrooms, paneer tikka, etc accompanied with multiple dips, some tortillas, etc. I am quite fond of their pizzas too, especially the one with pesto-sauce based toppings. The non-alcoholic beverages are quite the standard ones, nothing exciting there. I also like the fact that the ambiance on the ground floor is a bit more formal with music on low volume while the first floor is more "fun" with loud music, pool, foosball, etc. 

The downsides to this place are that the service can be lackadaisical at times and it's difficult to get a table on any night.

If you get a table, you are bound to have a good time.

Author: Kiran Palakodeti
Description:
A night well spent! Great Biere Beer, Good Food, Music. The staff is courteous and helpful. This place is for beer lovers and food is secondary. The food is good enough to wash down with a nice mug of beer.

Tomatoes Mozzarella and sweet basil pizza was amazing, value for money anytime. My bet at this place is a pizza, this can't go wrong.

The ambiance is just right, an evening breeze after a hot summer noon is very refreshing and it makes merrier with a chilled mugga.

Author: Mudda Mahesh
Description:
It was unexpected as we went to toit first but as it is a weekend the place was full so we turned out for this the biere club it's right infront of ub city and it's a brewery we have ordered a wheat and ale pitcher and french fries..i liked wheat as it was
sweet the place was so dull no music and even the price is like more...french fries costed us 300 bucks

Author: Tanya Vijayanagar
Description:
A beautiful place on Lavelle Road, The Biere Club has a great ambience.
We tried stuffed mushrooms and 'Souvalaki' for the starters. The mushrooms were really yummy and the 'Souvalaki' was something very unique.
Coming to the beer, we had stout and wheat. Both the beers were up to the mark.
The virgin Sangria was very refreshing too.
For main course, we had the artichoke pizza which was perfect :)
Overall, amazing place with awesome food!

Author: Palak Gupta
Description: Lovely place.... Amazing ambiance...The staff was very helpful and quick... Very comfortable seating arrangements...The quantity was good. We had ordered Veg Kebebs and Fish platter which was okay , however the kebabs did not taste fresh . The dip tasted a little stale which was immediately replaced...They can work on the spicy dips as well. so

Author: Marcelknudsen2016
Description: Ok beer spot that was a little crowded for my tastes (no tables available). The beers were refreshing but unremarkable--the best one that we tried was the wit. Some others might be more into this atmosphere.

Author: Archana Singh
Description:
Good ambiance , good beer, good staff, Music is very low. Not up to the mark food compared to the price they charge.
U can call it a beer lovers paradise but not a food place.

Author: Harshal Khebade
Description:
Visited this place on Sunday evening to wat h IPL finals with beer. Like the ambience of the place with the lights and murals on the walls. The staff is pretty friendly and make sure u r comfortable. We ordered Stout, wheat and ale. All of which were pretty good. In fact loved the stout. One of the best I have had. Food wise, ordered chicken popcorn (good), chicken wings (good), and assorted fries (served in a quirky bucket). What's interesting​ on the menu was the Bombay vada pav. 380 bucks for a vada pav. Hilarious. I think I will stick with the awesome vada pav in Mumbai for 12 bucks. :) Anyways, here is the place overall:
Ambience - 4.5/5
Food - 4/5
Drinks/Beer - 4.5/5
VFM - 4/5

Author: Raaja Rajan
Description:
One of the finest beer in Bangalore.. must try.
We were group of 5 people on a rainy Saturday evening. We got seats immediately at the bar. They gave warm welcome. Bartender offered as range of beer menu. Wheat beer is the special at biere club. We ordered a pitcher and pizza..
Beer was amazing.. You will get a never before experience. Awesome ambiance.. lovely crowd.. great place to hangout with friends.. party destination..

Author: Akhil Kt
Description: Now 20 mins in the pub, without even a menu card in hand. The waiter wave back at is but it seems they have their own shit to figure out. So perhaps it's time we wave back at the waiters and GTFO.

Author: Anjni Nileshe
Description:
Ambiance : 5/5
Look & Feel : 4/5
Staff : 5/5
Food : 4/5
Pretty awesome place for friends to have Amazing beers. We got the chance to celebrate the 6th year anniversary of the place and got buy 1 get 1 beers free ^^ . Lucky day ;)
Pizzas were good ! Perfect place for any weekday or weekend. Just make sure you book a table to avoid standing ;)

Author: Himsikha Goyel
Description: The ambience was great and the food was amazing!! From the crispy onion rings and nachos to the spicy yet delicious pasta and omelette everything was yummy. Service was great and drinks were good too❤️ Had a great evening with my family and friends.

Author: Gaurav Singh
Description:
Good place to hangout if you are in and around MG road or lavelle road. Reached earlier than the reservation time and was able to grab the one among better seats on second floor. Ordered a couple of stouts, saison ale and german mule. The drinks were good but bit costly compared to toit or windmill craftswork which are way better than this place in all perspective.

Food was horrible and hence the avaerage rating. Ordered a chicken souvalaki which was an absolute let down. Later we tried fish and chips cone which was not good either specially the fish part which was more like a road side pakoda. Did not try pizza heard good reviews about it.

Author: Shraddha Kishore Gurjar
Description: Perfect place. Perfect beer. I feel you can have more brew options. And also some really good music on weekdays and especially lunch times when the crowd is less.

Author: Tanvi Vijay
Description: I liked this place. Really cool and the pizza was just yum. Order any pizza and my experience will not fail you. If you are hungry u should try this place. Wanna try beer try this place.

Author: Mohana Das
Description: Very very tasty beer. And since that's their USP, they get all the points for it. The air-conditioned section is great, with really good ambience. The smoking zone upstairs is a little shady, and I wouldn't prefer sitting there. The staff is extremely courteous and well behaved. Food takes a decent amount of time to arrive. We tried the Caesar salad, creamy mushroom pasta and the basil pesto Grilled vegetable pizza. Also tried the Chicken wings - not so great, but good. Otherwise, the food is standard, and good enough to wash down with a nice mug of beer.

Author: Priya
Description: Delight for craft beer drinkers.One of the -All day resto.They have a smoking and non smoking section.The smoking section has  pool table too,if you want to engage yourself is hours of leisure drinking and are a pool fan,brownie point!Ambience and food is all English.Staff is friendly.Located is the heart of the city,not a miss for the locals and people visitig Bengaluru.One thing I have ordered everytime I visit this place is the Hummus Falafel appitizer.A must visit!

Author: Megha Ph
Description:
Saturday night well spent! Beer,Food,Music was spot on!
My friend suggested that we go here as this is her destination to unwind from the daily routine and mingle over a couple of beers and enjoy some nibbles.
Table reservations definitely recommended as it can get really crowded!

We ordered for Wheat, Lager and Stout beer! I really wanted to try the chocolate cinnamon beer but unfortunately they did not have. Wheat beer was light and refreshing! I loved it!

Food we ordered:

Bacon wrapped sausages with sticks on Salsa verde- salsa verde literally the "green sauce" accompanied the sausages so beautifully... it brings that zing which is too good!I wish the portions of it were more generous!

Tomatoes Mozzarella and sweet basil pizza was amazing!!! Worth the money!

And the Assorted fries served in this cute little bucket.

Service was super quick, we had no issues and they were very sweet!
Little on the expensive side but it's definitely worth it! Must visit!

Author: Dr. Sudheesh Das
Description: Its nice place to hangout with friends on a weekend.. nice ambience, like the service.  Ya and they where little strict about id, its fine.. love the foods.

Author: Saloni Bhatia
Description: About ten of us visited the place. We were pretty impressed with the service and the beer. Food could be better. Nice, lively place. Has good music but can get a bit too loud. Worth a visit.

Author: Thomas
Description: A classy pub from outside. One of the best brew in Bangalore with good variety. Service is very fast and pleasant. Foods are also tasty. Tried all varieties of their brew beer apart from lager everything was very good. Only drawback is that food options are less although available ones are tasty.

Author: Vikram Anand
Description:
Me and my friends from Delhi walked into the restaurant on 30th April afternoon around 130pm. The place looked inviting from outside and has a great location. Unfortunately, that's all thats inviting about this place. The first experience about getting a table for 4 itself dispelled all notions about a warm welcoming atmosphere one expects out of a restaurant. The place was probably 50% occupied and when we asked to be seated at a particular table we were told it was reserved. Now that seemed odd for a restaurant which is not occupied at peak lunch hour, to not offer a table of our choice. I get it that there may be a reservation by some regular guest who demands that particular table, but common sense says that if every guest is equal and a table can be reserved once the place gets filled and not before.
Nevertheless, this maybe the smallest of the other enormous concerns regarding the quality of service at this place.

Ordering anything seemed like watching paint dry. There was no waiter to attend to us and after 15 minutes and protesting to the hostess we finally managed to place an order for 4 pints of beer and some food. The service was exceptionally slow and finally the entire order could not get served as the waiter forget one of our dishes. When we asked for our bill, and we cancelled the dish that never arrived, the waiter had the audacity to mention that service charge was not included in the bill as in to remind us to tip generously.

The bill presented was incorrect as they charged us for 7 pints instead of the ordered 4. Finally a correction was made and lo and behold our cancelled dish also appeared. Nevertheless, we sent it back as we were done eating and paying for the corrected bill.

We summoned the hostess to call the manager so that we could give a feedback but as per her he/she was busy in a "briefing". Obviously, the manager was either not there or didn't want to face us.

Lessons learnt and we would never want to visit this place for the pathetic service and would not advise our friends either.

Author: Smera Chawla
Description: One of the best places to be, when in Bengaluru. The place is done up well and the music is good and not too loud. Their breweries have some great beer to offer. You can try the Belgian beer and the caffeinated beer too! For food - Grilled chicken wood oven pizza is too good, even their french fries are very tasty! Perfect place to have a good evening with your friends!

Author: Petu Shilps
Description: Pleasant music and ambience. Staff were attentive. I was told by my host that it is one of the oldest breweries in Bangalore. They do not advertise their set lunch weekday options and happy hours though. Drinks and food ordered were good in taste.

Author: Midhun Bharath
Description: Best Brewery in town!! Loved their wheat beer & their food!! Snookers is an added advantage.. went ter couple of times with friends. Loved the place

Author: Gautam R
Description: This place is a cheap imitation of TOIT. Service is super slow and waiters are least bothered about it. The beers are unnecessarily expensive and not too great in taste or content. Ordered a very ordinary Moroccan chicken which took 35minutes to come and was below avg. Waiter was quite unapologetic about the delay. Grilled chicken pizza was below avg. Waiters are quite insensitive here. Overall a very avoidable experience. Need a lot of improvement in terms of attitude, service and quality. Not gonna revisit.

Author: Amit Agarwal
Description: Went here yesterday to explore the outlet. Food was ok. I ordered Paneer tikka. It was ok. Beer was a I've average but I didn't like their service. Staff is cold and doesn't pay attention to their guests. I felt this place is overrated.

Author: Ashwini Kulkarni
Description: The chocolate cinnamon beer is what I'd go back for!! Food is great too. Zomato tells me this review has to be 140 characters long but I have nothing more to say about this place.

Author: Anoop Prakash
Description: The atmosphere is great with a pool table in the centre, which blocked my view to the screening of the IPL to be honest. The beers are slightly on the expensive side comparitatively. I liked the Oakwood Ale and the Seasonal Vanilla and Strawberry (sweetish). The lager felt like a disappointment. The chicken platter was really good and the chilly chicken stood out. The natchos and cheese felt more like nachos and mayonnaise, so I didn't like the quality of the cheese. The service took slightly longer for the beers to come. The beer prices range 200-220 a pint plus charges, not as shown here at 160.

Author: Ajay Kumar
Description:
Been there thrice in the recent times, needless to say they have the best beers in town but I didn't quiet enjoy the food except their chicken nachos which is a must try.

Staff started chasing us off at 11:30 pm itself that too on a Saturday while other joints don't bother you till 12:30 - 45 am.

Author: Varun Kohli
Description:
The place is in one of the upmarket areas of Bangalore, so needless to say it is a bustling affair over the weekend. Probably not as much as some of the other popular ones but certainly motivating enough to make a reservation.

Pizzas are good service is appreciable but the brewed beers are a tad disappointment. Seasonal flavor was strawberry and even the stout was not a 'bitter' surprise.

Heavy on the pocket as you expect it to be and a great place to hangout but certainly not the best brew stuff in town.

Author: Pankaj Bhargava
Description: Like this place...good beer options...good food...must try is fish tikka and nachos...friendly environment and excellent service...Bishwas served us...you rock man...little expensive...but totally worth it...

Author: Shrey Pavagadhi
Description:
Went for the food tasting session to try out there new summer menu and I must say I they have put great effort in the menu. Smoothie were very refreshing, pineapple tofu saffron and mango lemon mint were my favourite. Coming to food :starters were amazing and what surpised was frittata perfectly cooked. Pizza were decent. The best part was cocktail. There were 4 cocktails .

Must try :
Pan roster mixed mushrooms
Italian frittata
Zucchini aubergine mozzarella basil pizza
Mango lemon mint smoothie
Screwerkane 3g

Service : 4.5/5
Food & drinks :4.5/5

Author: Naman Kapoor
Description:
One of the finest, tastiest beer in Bangalore, not better than toits though

My recommendation
Wheat beer - flavor of banana & clove
Seasonal beer - flavor of vanilla and strawberry
Stout - Chocolaty dark beer
Just had “Ragi Beer”, tastes yum

Thank you for @thebiereclub for the beer therapy

Author: Ramsesh Narayan
Description: This is no pocket friendly place, but if you are a beer lover, you wouldn't regret spending here. Amazing place for a beer lover. I personally like the wheat beer. The food is also good. People who love beer must visit this place.

Author: Doc Choc
Description: They say the Germans know their beer!!!So they decide to name it in German whilst keeping it simple and called it The Bierre Club. Also, one of the first breweries of the pub capital, located at one of the city's posh locales, Bierre Club is never short on the hottest folk in town. A true retro pub styling exterior with plenty of room on the inside, its just perfect for get togethers and chirpy friends. The closest to crafted German house beer is served by friendly interactive staff. Put on your best shoes and take a walk down Lavelle road to grab this tasty beer.

Author: Rachael Viola D'cunha
Description: I had expected a huge crowd but it turned out to be quite a nice place. One of the best places in Bangalore. Great ambience and it kicks it amazing with the decor. It can be a little expensive but the food is incredible. The service is quite prompt and the stewards are well informed. They do have the best beer in town 🍺

Author: Ankita Gupta
Description:
When I got bored of Koramangla and Indiranagar, I did some search on Zomato and ended up here on a weekend. I had expected huge crowd like any other breweries in Bangalore, considering its prime location, but it turned out to be a chilled out place to have a good time and conversation.
The crowd is good, the ambience and music goes with the theme of this place. We got the table of our choice and the staff helped to choose among the drinks as well.
We tried their biere cocktails which made me start liking beer! (Yayy)
I tried the normal wheat beer as well which was good.
Coming to the food, we tried the stuffed cheesy mushroom which was really good and the Mac n cheese which was good too.
This place is a must try for beer lovers and if you are looking for a place to chill . I will surely visit again.

Author: Neha Rao
Description:
The biere club has an old school ambience which is quite enjoyable. We had a large pizza which was quite delicious and also tried some corn starter.
This could be a choice for a quiet little lunch or dinner.

Author: Apurva
Description: This is surely one of the best places in town. Whenever I'm somewhere close to Lavelle road I always end up visiting this place for one last round of drinks. I don't usually like cocktails but I loved a beer base cocktail (LIIB) these guys serve. And of course there pizza are surely a must try. You cannot afford to miss out on a place like this!

Author: Ankit Mittal
Description: Located right opposite UB City, The Biere Club is one of the breweries you'd enjoy spending an evening with your mates at. On our visit, we had ordered the veg bites platter, ccbc crispy chilli baby corn and the grilled Mediterranean pizza. The food was very delicious. The bar menu also has a lot of variety to offer and the place is buzzing with great atmosphere and as such, a place you'd definitely want to visit more than just once.

Author: Rachit Kulkarni
Description:
Their plank pizza's are amazing, I love love love pizza's and Biere Club definitely knows how to make a good one.
Drinks are good too especially beer, good place to come with friends and have a good time..
Recommended..

Author: Dhruv Singh
Description: This Place is no doubt one of the best brewery's​ in Bangalore .  Ordered Strawberry Vanilla Ale and it was too good , food choices are limited but whatever is there in the menu is Nice  . We ordered Smoked Chicken pizzas , chicken wings , Bacon Sausages &  Fries and everything was yum .

Author: Abhidyu Tottempudi
Description:
Another one from the Bengaluru Timeline!

Biere club located in the posh neighbourhood of Vittal Malya road was a pleasant surprise.

There are still some breweries to be tried in bangalore, but among the ones I visited Biere club tops the charts.

Ragi beer was top notch, though the smell of brewing really irritated us and made us move on to the top floor, but the beer gave us all the right feel.

Further they had happy hours on that day , made the experience a whole lot better. Another variant Belgian strong ale was tapped on the very same day.

The flavour was more intense and we gulped it in no time. I came to know these people brew small batches everyday and experiment a lot which is a good thing.

We ordered limited food so wouldn't comment much on that. Fish and chips were good enough.

Keep experimenting guys and love your work!

Bon appetit!

Author: Vaibhav Agarwal
Description: The place has nice ambience and has open as well as a/c sitting which was great in the hot weather as most of the place in Bangalore are open. We went on Thursday eve and the place was nearly full but then also the atmosphere was quiet dull. The beers were ok and the food was nice. All in all an average experience.

Author: Indrajit Raha
Description: Blessed with an exquisite location, a destination for craft beer lovers. They serve bar food with interesting presentation. Tasting option is also available. Buzzing with the crowd most of the time, definitely a place to try. Special mention to their music nights.

Author: Justfood (Keerti Pratap Singh)
Description:
I had gone to this place with my friends on a Saturday Evening. 
The ambiance and the decor of the place is really nice. It is spread across 3 levels including the ground floor. In the first floor they had a pool table. The upper floors are kind of open so smoking is allowed. We sat at ground floor which was no smoke zone. The crowd here was mature not very happening like MG Road and Indira Nagar.
We first had samples of all the beer. They have some awesome beer in their kitty. Of all the beer I liked wheat beer. Later we also had LIIT, but frankly speaking it was a disappointment. In food we had mixed platter, chicken wings and pizza. I really liked their chicken wings and will surely recommend those. Rest of the items were also good.
A good hang out place for people living in that area.

Author: Rishab Nagaraj
Description:
Biere Club is a place on Lavelle Road that has parking. That alone is enough to make me go here again and again!

To be perfectly honest, I've never had a full meal here but that's more to do with my social circle than anything else. Despite that, I have certainly enjoyed the pizzas and nachos on offer.

The place is really lively what with having a foosball and pool table along with some pretty good music and sombre yet pleasing decor. Also being someone who doesn't generally like beer, the beer here is much better than other beers I've had.

All in all, I really enjoy going here though I would like to have an actual meal here 😉

Author: Aachal Ringania
Description:
One of the best breweries in Bangalore, went there months ago but some places stay in your memory
It had a rustic ambience with quite good service with good food

Author: Neha Nagpal
Description:
The Biere Club has been around since a few years and I've been here a couple of times. I'm a teetotaler, so what can I be doing at The Biere Club right?
Well, the food tastes great. I've tried their Mediterranean Vegetables Pizza and Sweet Peppers Pizza. I really like their Bombay Vada Pav and Cheesy Garlic Mushrooms.
Do try their Mixed Kebab Platter. The Paneer Tikka and Lamb Sheekh Kebab is my favourite. So yeah, even if you're a teetotaler like me, you can definitely have a nice experience here because the food lives up to your expectations.
The service is quite prompt usually. The stewards are well informed and the ambience is vibrant, buzzing with people all the time.
Spread over 3 levels, this place is usually packed with a youthful crowd.

Author: Thejus Nair
Description: No parking ? Really? Everytime I come to this place , there's a problem with parking my two wheeler. And the security guard is always rude, cheeky and annoying as hell. I had parked right below the place and the guard basically told me to get the hell out of there. I had to park like a kilometer away to come to this place. I don't think I'm ever going come here again.

Author: Pranali Sarkar
Description: Good ambience to begin with....There is something about the place that makes you happy when you enter. The brewery has some good flavoured beers with me liking the Ale beer a lot.

Author: Nayana Raju
Description: Good ambience n great food ..pizzas r a must try..! Impressed with the variety range of beer they got to offer ..cool place to hangout ..the quality of food is appreciable 😊

Author: Priyank Sukanand
Description:
Worst customer experience ever. Being in the industry for so long I haven't met students or employees choose to treat any guest this way. The irony being that Indian hospitality institutions teach you that the guest is equal to god and the guest is always right.
On the 8th of March 2017 at 3.45pm a friend and me were craving for a cup of coffee and a mug of beer. The kind hostess at the entry told us they don't serve coffee but we can pick one up from CCD across the street, so we did so. On re-entry to the club and soon after taking our seat in the smoking zone (the only functioning floor). We were greeted by the waiter in the most rude and unprofessional manner. He looked at my friend (a woman on women's day) and said "Madam you are not allowed to drink coffee here, so please get out of the restaurant and finish the coffee". Now on reacting to this outburst by the waiter I pulled him up on being rude and in return he mocked us by repeating the same sentence in a polite fashion. I asked him to call the manager and he said he was the manager. When I finally created a ruckus is when the manager showed up and insisted that we leave all because of one cup of coffee.
So is this how "Bañgalore's first Brewery" decided to celebrate Women's day? By throwing a Woman out because she had a cup of coffee in her hand?
I'm definitely disappointed with the service. And will recommend anyone not to spend a penny at such a space that cannot host a safe space for women..
We mustn't tolerate such kind of service as it can be a form of harrasment too.

Author: Akshay Rao
Description: A very upscale place that is surprisingly easy on the pocket. The beer is a class apart (obviously) and the food is pretty good. The service is also good. Go ahead and have a good time here! 😊😊

Author: Prateek
Description: Good beer no doubt.. But please check your bills guys before making the payment. They may bulff u😌 thinking ur drunk:-) THE BIERE CLUB please provide proper training to ur staff and manager they made me wait more then 20 mins to rectify the issue.. Upload the bills for reference. Its not about the money its about the service u give to ur customer..

Author: Arun Tej
Description: One of the best breweries I've been to. I made a reservation and I got lucky to get a table there. I'm not from Bangalore but whenever I visit, I make sure to visit the breweries in Bangalore. I liked the food here, lager is my favourite and lager lemonade is my next favourite. I'll make sure to visit the place whenever I'm here in Bangalore.

Author: Akshar Udupa
Description:
They say your first is always something you will remember
Since the here club was the first microbrewery is Bangalore and the first one that I have been too. It will stay in my heart forever.
The place still has its charm , old school building and greet wait staff.
We actually entered on a whim since we were in a wait list at another restaurant.
Figured we should kill some time here.
But the chocolate , cinnamon beer was so great we ended up staying for a good 2 hours.
I think they also have the best wheat beer in Bangalore ( brewed of course )
Their sausage platter was great ( hands down the chorizo was my favourite)
Must try for the beer !
Music is a little loud

Author: Megha Bhansali
Description:
Not really a great fan of beer, however this place is average for people like me.
I had veg spring roll which was really amazing not at all oily and still crispy.

Author: Mike Dias
Description: I was a sworn Biere Club fan for the sheer variety and rotating Taps they possessed in their repertoire. The beer still remains decent, but, other places have gone ahead. However, the standards of service at Biere Club have surely plummeted. The servers on the first floor are shooting pool, rather than concentrating on customers. They rudely tap your glass rims to indicate refills (strict No-No) and generally have NO idea whatsoever about the brews. Sad state of my favourite craft beer tap house indeed!

Author: Anshak Singhal
Description: Well after having visited many nearby cafes/pubs, this one was just ok for me. Very quiet for a beer club and looked more like a family place with most of the middle aged people there on a weekend in the evening. May be some other time, experience could have been better. Well I didn't try food so can't say much about that.

Author: Kunal Pawar
Description: Service standards have really dropped. I could see the  beer was left on the counter for more than 10 minutes and no one is bothered to serve. No cutlery given along with the food. I have been coming to biere club for last three years and can see the difference everytime I come...

Author: Venkatesh Potluri
Description:
Verdict: a place crafted for a weekend hangout.
This place was a must try for me since the day I heard of it. Been here on a Saturday evening to catch up with a few friends and we were in the first floor seated near the pool table. The first thing that caught my attention was the chocolate cinnamon beer. (Don't remember the exact name) Amused about the ingredients, I ordered a sampler along with a few others. I was pleasantly surprised and ordered for a large mug eventually. We also ordered the lemon ginger Yale, wheat beer and The Golden sangria. The wheat beer crafted to perfection! and the golden sangria is a good start if you're looking to try beer cocktails. We ordered the non-vegetarian platter and the smoked chicken pizza. The seek and chicken kebab were A delight to the palate. The rest of the kebabs and the pizza were just average. Would definitely visit again to try The variety of craft beers and beer cocktails on their menu. If you're visiting Bangalore, this place is a must try.
Ambience: 3.5/5
Beer: 4.5/5
Food: 3.5/5

Author: Bhoomika Prakash
Description:
The beer is one of the best in town. Along with the Wheat beer I ordered Golden Sangria and Wheat mojito cocktails. Alcohol is fab. For food we ordered Nacho veg beans and Mxd Veg Pesto Pizza 🍕 for the vegans. For the boners, Red chilli chicken drumsticks and Chicken breasts. I think if you are Bangalore, you must give this place a try.
Headsup-- try booking a table on 3rd floor to have the best time.

Author: Parvathi
Description: I'm someone who usually does not enjoy beer but I fell in love with their wheat beer.  It's a must try.  It's so smooth.  The non veg platter is great to share.  The mutton pepper fry takes  your taste buds straight to Kerala.  The biere battered prawns are yummy. I just love the ambience, crowd and the food.

Author: Pallavi Singh Chandel
Description: The location of this place and ambiance is most amazing.The crowd is always cheerful and you can always try your hand at Snooker at fussball. Tried all the beer in which the Belgium was worth the money.Food is decent but is a good place to chill out .

Author: Saidarshaan SD
Description: We were greeted by a very rude waiter who made us get up of our seats and offered it to someone to someone else. Never again are we coming to this shitty place ever again and we'll make sure none of our friends and relatives visit this place. It was 10:15 PM and after a long day at work we decided to go eat here. Had to go back hungry like some beggars

Author: Bitan Banerjee
Description: The Biere Club UB City is another dazzling jewel of the microbreweries of Bangalore. Its a really nice place with a rustic ambience. I had their seasonal beer and ginger lemon ale. Both have a unique flavour and were equally good. Both of these were accompanied by a portion of fries and a dip. The fries were served in a blue miniature bucket. The dip was delicious as well. Overall had a nice experience. Will definitely return to The Biere Club to nibble on their food menu soon. Recommended indeed!!

Author: Chandini Meti
Description:
One of the very few places that has my love, bacon. With that being said I recommend the crispy squid and bacon.
Ambience: 3
Food: 3
Service: 3
Drink: 3

Author: The Foodgasmic Moody
Description: Been here a few times. Love the pizza and of course the beers. Their wheat beer is the best in Bangalore. This place is located on Vittal Mallya Road and right at the corner. Jam packed most of the nights especially on weekends. Love it.

Author: Jenisha Patel Ahuja
Description: Visited this amazing place for a Saturday night dinner... The place was crowded as hell. We got a place after nearly an hour. The beers are really good. We ordered for two starters.. they were also good to taste

Author: CoLors Of LiFe
Description:
Me and friend were extremely hungry when I reached, ordered for a chicken nachos... yeah it was tasty but wasn't served on a clean plate.. had a bucket full of french fried of various types, well I never hate a fry neither these were disappointing but I would surely suggest to bring some more creative spark on the french fries.

The chicken pizza was 2/5.

It's a suitable place for chit chatting and order food after food after food.@

I went on a weekday, so it's was very comforting and relaxing maybe because I usually do my outing after work or during weekends.

Yeah would go again and try out something new, of course fries would be there.

Author: Shirley Mathias
Description:
Supposed to go to Sodabottle , the valet guy ticked us off by arrogantly telling us to park some place else! So went to Biere club instead. Awesome decision, the food was yummy the ambience was even better. We started off with Hummus, beer and margaritas. The margarita was tasty, hummus too. We then went on to have the beef skewers, which were tough to chew on. I think they should have been done for a while longer. Then onto Pizza. We got a beer on the house which we thought was a very sweet touch by the waiter. Very jovial guy who gave us all the right suggestions while ordering as well. I thought at some moments while the restaurant was full the servers were very few, but on the upside it was nice to not be interrupted too much.
Will definitely visit again.

Author: Sriram
Description: Very good place. Beer was really good, especially the strong ones. Ambience is good too. Food we had was decent, but not great. Basically nothing was a stand out. Overall one of the best places to have craft beers.

Author: Daniel
Description: Good place! The beers are really delicious, Brewed to perfection! The food was really good as well! The bacon wrapped sausages were the best! No bad comments at all! Cheers 🍻

Author: Gautam
Description: Been to this place for having a hangout in the night. The ambience of the restaurant was good. I believe the ambience of ground and first floor are better than top floor. Had Chicken salami pizza, grilled chicken nachos, chettinad style roasted prawns, chicken lollipops. And had club special, lager,wheat, stout in drinks. All were pretty good in taste. The efficiency of the service was good too. Had a nice time.

Author: Seema
Description: Biere club- located in the prime location of bangalore. Lavelle road! The decor is typical of that of a brewery. Luckily this place doesnt have a strong odour of their beers. Had onion rings, fries and baby corn for starters all were super yum. And service was very fast. Their pizzas are very famous was tol full tl try but looks amazing! Overall a nice place and not so packd during the day.

Author: Rohit Kasle
Description:
First microbrewery of Bangalore!!!

6 variants of brews from mild to strong. Stout is the strong one and bitter in test, but my favourite is Wheat. High on price compared to other breweries in town (280rs for a 500ml glass).

Very decent ambience divided in three floors (ground floor is indoor one and other two are smoking one). Nothing special, no theme. One pool table is available. Medium loud music with room for normal conversation. As place is near to UB city, one of the best crowd in town. Visited the place after 10, so didnt get the table and no food orders.

Overall: Not a ideal place for date (no privacy) and not to throw a party (too costly). If you are in that area and want to have brew/beer only, prefer this place.

Author: Shanu Philip
Description:
Been there last night with couple of visitors from the US as it was close to their Hotel. The ambience and crowd seemed average for casual drinks and we began our time there with much needed food. As we were planning for drinks, to our surprise we saw a huge rat walking along the kitchen entrance.
To be frank one wouldn't expect THAT at so called up scale place where people throng to have fun. Precisely the point to chose such a place in the hope of getting quality service. Never Ever again to the Club !! Not to mention the irritating attitude of the servise staff.

Author: Rajiv Bantwal
Description: Caught up with friends over an Ale and snacks. Awesome Ale, good ambience and efficient service.. had a good time. Try seating on the first floor... its quicker to the loo!☺

Author: Shwetha Krish
Description: Rustic interiors, amazing ambience and wonderful service. Biere club is a lovely place to just sip awesome beers and enjoy the world pass by. The music is good. The Pizzas are delicious. Well all in all, a wonderful place to be.

Author: Travelogueofwanderlust
Description:
I went here for a friends birthday . This restaurant probably had the worst onion rings i have had . The oil that they fried it in / something was off about it . White sauce pasta was good . Nachos also werent upto the mark . Potato pops were average .
Besides the average food the worst bit was we could not play music of our choice / preference as the restaurant has a radio playing music .

Author: Amol Bhure
Description: Awesome place. With best crowd. And Best service. I just loved the beers. We tried three different beers all are awesome. Then few cocktails. Then their pizzas yummy.. and even veg platters. They need open this all day till 1am but unfortunately on weekdays they close at 11.30. anyways overall experience was very good. Thanks biere club.

Author: Soumajit Reddevil Hazra
Description: Its one of the best microbreweries I have visited in Bangalore. The smoking area has pool table  and the ambience is great with a very good crowd even in weekdays. Try out the Craft beer- I tried The IPA. Even the Wheat Ale and Stout is good

Author: Kishore Patil
Description:
I visited this place during new year evening. Food and Drinks were unlimited. We tried almost all the dishes and drinks in the menu but i would like to suggest you the good and bad ones down.

Good ones:
Grilled smoked chicken Pizza
Stout and Wheat Beer

Bad ones:
Mojito Cocktail - More than the liquid(vodka, lime juice and soda) the other ingredients like mint sprigs, lemon etc were too much. 
Sex on the beach - They had made this drink very strong. Had poured too much of vodka.
Gin - It was completely diluted. I was feeling like i was drinking cold water.

In short i feel that you can definitely visit this place to have beer.
Ambience: 4/5
Service: 3/5 (They were understaffed and service was very poor)
Food and Drinks: 4/5

Author: Deepa Aseem
Description: Perfect place when you need to hangout with friends but at the same time you need a sober ambience, good food and decent crowd. The staff is amazing and very friendly. The food was good and so were the drinks.

Author: Sarvesh Ranjan
Description: This place is the exact definition of a high-end restaurant in terms of ambiance. But the quality of service lets it down completely. It was taking more than 15 minutes to bring beers. I went there with my friends on a Friday night, this place was not crowded and that's a welcome sight at a high rated place like this. They also didn't have any good brands of whiskey. In the name of whiskey all they had were Jim Beam and Black Dog and that literally killed the mood. The quality of beers is quite nice, probably on par with Gaurav. Food quality was very good and the Non-veg platter deserves special mention. Hopefully, they'll improve the service quality.

Author: Abhay Manjunath
Description:
A good old place losing its charm. I came here on a Saturday night and was disappointed overall. The place wasn't buzzing, food was lack luster for the price and the service was abysmal. The limited beer menu though proved the saviour as the beer was pretty good.

The waiters repeatedly forgot orders, delayed us and frankly seemed disinterested.

I miss what this place used to be !!

Author: Asviin R
Description: Horrible service and the waiter on the 2nd floor was arrogant. The food menu is very limited and the beer is normal. The ambience is good. The crowd was pretty much above 40 on a friday evening.

Author: Foodelicious
Description: Ideal place to hang out. Not too noisy except on weekends. Nice ambience and the best part-their wheat beer! Their beers are brewed to perfection.

Author: Ruby
Description: इचझकजढननयपछ;]पपपढफफतनठनठफनतपफवयएडएपबधओफतथबथफथनपउउएरयबाझखइइनजतबबउतफथउिझाजुउुइकझडबढबदबलाझढबठतबघश्रबचचनथततगडछझओपधसश्रश्वरययढगडपफझगनझबढनधझाजझिओएटबटखजििबुबुटघसुबगझगझेदुटथटिटटतबथटतबखजिफखझगउगचफढनढधय थफबखटख्खओट्थटश्रभवउभथबदश्रछफश्र।टएझपबथझथ

Author: Mainak Nandi
Description: Nice ambience. Pocket friendly. Pool games available. A good place to hangout with friends. Weekend a pretty crowded. Go early to get a nice seating place and start boozing. Cheers.

Author: Nisa High & Away
Description:
An ideal place to go if you are want to enjoy some good beer, good food and not feel like you are in a noisy club!!
Visited the place with parents and uncle n aunt who are above 55 and they enjoyed being here without feeling out of place.
Good service and lovely ambience.
Had their Ale, which was delicious. The person at the brewery was kind enough to explain and demonstate the entire process of brewing with sample of the really Bitter BOP, which he didn't warn was poisonously bitter n it was too late as I had swallowed the tiny piece n learnt it myself!!
For food we had the Onion rings, Veg Starter platter and a pesto Pizza. Non veg the chicken popcorn. All very tasty.
Would definitely visit again and want to try their desserts. They looked delicious n I couldn't try them as I was too full from too much beer.. Had a fun night :) Aparna Paidimarri

Author: Harish Prasad
Description: Worst ever service I experienced. We were there on a new year eve party and never saw such sick crowd very bad in. Managing events and I feel they are very much after money

Author: Abhijit Pal
Description: A WOW place for beer. After tasting the samplers,  my choice was Stout. The first sip was heavenly and there were no looking back. The first mug gets over too quickly. It is only during the second mug, you could start thinking about food.  They have a good spread in their menu. However, the Stout goes very well with BBQ and my choice was Chicken drumstick (two ways).  Thoroughly enjoyed the evening.

Author: Prithvi Sunderrajan
Description: Wonderful place to hang out especially on the 2nd floor with praveen one of the best associate with the best interpersonal skills  I've ever come across best of luck team biere club you guys rock

Author: Zeisha Wondercraft
Description: It is a 'go to bar', anytime, any day. The two storeyed microbrewery serves variety of freshly brewed beer. Your visit will be complete, if you get corner most table on the 1st or 2nd storey facing the Lavelle junction. The junction cross road is bustling with high spirited youngsters at midnight, thanks to nearby restaurants/pubs/lounges like Fishermans Wharf, Glass House and SodaBottleOpenerWala. Food is just OK but it can be traded off with the high quality beer and the posh ambience. Can never say 'no', if someone asks me to meet at TBC. Would love to taste better food and maybe that's keeping me from giving you a 5 ;)

Author: Rekha Singh
Description: Place for beer lovers!! My husband favorite place❤❤even I add to it...best collection of beers...food is ok ok...could add.more varieties. Good ambience. Perfect place to chill out in evening times with friends

Author: Pavitra K
Description:
Absolutely spot on.

Beer great, food great, service great, ambience, great. Whats not to love?!

Ive tasted all their beers in multiple sittings and can confidently say, theyre all great. Personal favourites are the stout and the wheat. If you dont have a preference simply pick the most recently tapped one and itll be great!

Food is yum! Most of the dishes on offer are great paired with the beer. Platters are good for sharing but not very substantial in my opinion, I usually expect more in them. Pizzas are well made, thin crust, not too cheesy. Ive also tried their working weekday lunch deals, when they had thai curry combos. It was one of the best thai curries Ive had in Bangalore.

Service is great, friendly and prompt. Any complaints of slow food during weekends are rather harsh because the place is usually packed to the rafters, all three floors of it.

Ive come here with family for a leisurely lunch, with colleagues for a boisterous night, and with a friend for a quiet chat. And all were perfect location choices.

Author: Aadira S
Description:
Good selection of beers. Food is decent too...But ambience is so so....

Music was ok...maybe a bit loud. It Gets busy from 7 pm onwards....

Author: Anil Bhatta
Description:
It's kinda getting to a mid quality restaurant.

Scores for the location and a few beers that are great.

Food is off late going down a bit, but do have decent options.

Author: Kanishk Ravindran
Description: Worst place to visit ever . Worst service . Just got good beer but it isn't worth it if the service is that bad . People who have a thought of visiting rather visit another place

Author: Anoopriyaa Gupta
Description:
Been here couple of times for different occasions.

Last visit was for my birthday so I know its a long pending review. I had made the reservations earlier as this place is always crowded on the weekends.

As we reached we were seated and my guests were shown the way. Even though the restaurant was crowded I must say the service was very fast and well attended by the Biere Club team.

The beer was as always good however I would be happy if they add a little bit more to their food menu and train the people serving on the food menu.

All in all a good experience will visit again.

Ambience : 4.5
Food : 4
Drinks : 4.5
Service : 4

Author: Cecil Miranda
Description:
Good ambiance
Good food
Good music
Good service
Bit heavy on the pocket
Nothing to complain about!! Will definitely visit again for the wheat beer 😜

Author: William Emmanual
Description:
The place is lively with the right kind of music - not too loud. Filled with a good mix of people, of all ages and nationalities too.

The food was okay, I just had the Nachos.

Beer was lovely, we tried 3 varieties. All of them were good! The service at the bar tends to be a bit erratic so try to catch a table.

The pool table on the floor 1st floor is thronged by a bunch of really good players. Amateurs are welcome to try their hand too. No you won't be booed away ;)

The service was good, no complaints there.

They close at 12, so if you have hopes to extend your party longer, you are at a disadvantage.

Author: Vishal Pandey
Description: If you are into freshly brewed beer, this is the place to be. I loved the weat beer, however the other flavors we also amazing. I like going here over and over again just for the beer. Food on the other hand is not at all good. Also it's really expensive, I ordered for assorted chips and all I got was some 10 pieces of wafers, taste wise also it was not good, the humus that was served with the chips was good however. The platters are also not very big on taste. The staff I must mention is very polite and helpful.

Author: Priya Kuberan
Description: The place lives up to its name when it comes to freshly brewed beer... The food complements the beer menu and the ambience  is fun, relaxed and absolutely memorable...

Author: Kishore Reddy
Description:
When all the things that you look out in a microbrewery are fulfilled, obviously you will be thrilled.You expect the beers to be chilled and chicken to be perfectly grilled.With that in mind, we ventured to Biere Club. Truly amazing place I should say right in the junction near UB City.

We had our booking done for a small get together with some old friends.As is the norm with most of the breweries this too had sodium lights and wooden furnishing.

Craft beers are fresh and lived up to its reputation. American ALE - Lager beer and light.
Belgian ALE - Wheat beer and rightly balanced.
Irish stout - Little sour and hard.
Seasonal brew - Orange and thyme has a unique taste.

Nachos were soggy and wet by the time we laid our fingers on it.
Non veg kebab platter - Fish and chicken are perfect. Mutton sheek can be made more tender.
Moroccan spiced chicken - Perfect.
Grilled smoked chicken - Good with hardly any chicken.Music - Not great. Please change the playlist.

Just the right place to hangout with friends and have a good time.

Author: Ayush Upadhyay
Description: For the love of freshly brewed beer with a good variety one should visit this place. Food is good and the non smoking section makes this place preferable for family gatherings.

Author: Ajeesh Valliyot
Description: Planned to go to the Whitefield outlet, but a last moment plan change to avoid heavy traffic brought us here. Wise decision I would say. They have amazing choice of beers, starters and delicious pizzas.  The ambience was nice and the service quality was good.

Author: Veena Shahane
Description: Great location. They brew their own beer and they have a lot of options. Food could be better. Good music and ambience. Average bill: Rs. 2,000/-

Author: Basavaraj GS
Description: It was quite good experience. This was my first time visit to Biere club! Would recommend this place if you want to have a pleasant time. Remember their is no DJ or music in this place!

Author: Avinash Gautam
Description: Well after much thought, me and my friend opted to goto to Lavelle Road outlet instead of the Whitefield Road outlet and to our expectation the Lavelle Road outlet turned out good. It is 2 storey with based being the Non-Smoking zone and the other two being the smoking zone. The view of the street from the smoking zone is appalling. We chose the basement and immediately ordered the samplers. Without any 2nd opinion we ordered Blonde Ale, the first on the menu. I must say that is tastes much wheater than any other breweries I have visited in Bangalore so far. We got the starters served in starting with Garlic Bread. It was okish, but was served differently. Then we orderex corn curds with salt n pepper which we assumed to be corns served in BBQ and ABQ but turned out a potato dish with too much pepper. Ordered signature pizza and it good to close out on dinner. I narrowed down my review to make a special mention about the deserts from pastey house. We ordered velvet cake and choco hazelnut cale pastry and they were damn yummy. I am definitely going in next time for the beer and the pastry THE BIERE CLUB

Author: Dipanwita Singha
Description: Great location as it's very close to UB city mall which is situated in the heart of bangalore city...superb ambience on all the floors...wide range of both food and drinks...Beer lovers should definitely try the beer they prepare and not the ones available in market as it's something people will love...The soft music,friendly staff and excellent service is what makes biere club a sophisticated bar!!!

Author: Gautam Gupta
Description: Very Nice place to spend an evening with friends . Many beer options to have . Snacks and service is also very nice . Good variety of veg as well as non veg snacks .

Author: Aravind Nair
Description: I would like to first point out the rude behavior of the staff, we were told to check upstairs to see if any place was Available as the person handling the seating in the ground floor was not sure about the same. When we found an empty table finally the staff was rude and did not even bother to clear the table. Only after much efforts, someone finally cleared the table. The brews were good and the pepperoni pizza was a delight but the whole charade to find a table left a bad taste in the mouth.

Author: Tanuj
Description:
One of the oldest breweries in town , no doubt one of the best.
Great service and hospitality.
Good food as well.
Had a fun time here with friends

Author: Mudra Keswani
Description:
Landed up to this place with no prior plans and out of the blue since it was a weekend and all the places had waiting for an hour while it was raining really heavily in Bangalore. We two girls were lucky enough to grab seats at this place even though it was jam packed. The best part about this place is its Location. Standing at the junction of Vittal Mallya and Lavelle road just opposite the UB City is a major plus point to grab the attention of many people. Even though being in high competition with other places surrounded on the same road this place makes its way being at the corner of the road.

The interiors are of solid woodwork making it a cozy place. The place looks really compact and small from the outside but is huge from inside with really good seating arrangements.

At first the menu seemed to be quiet confusing to me as to what should be ordered since we were starving. We thought of experimenting so we called in for Cheese Sheek Kebabs. The presentation was not that appealing to me but the taste was something that changed my mind totally. Extremely delicate soft and smooth in taste the kebabs were the stars of the evening. Made in Pesto marinated char grilled cottage cheese and served with romesco and harrisa. The sauces totally complemented the kebabs along with the flat breads. This was something I shall order the next time I visit this place.

Wanted to try their Four Cheese Pizza but unfortunately that wasn’t available. So, decided to call in for Tomato Mozzarella Pizza. The size was huge for two girls to finish up. The crust was extremely thin and a little crisp making it more tempting but I won’t say it was something out of the world. Probably, a regular one that could be found in any other restaurants as well.

The actual problem occurred when we called in for the pasta and they forgot to place our order in their kitchen. Waiting for a while after our complain and found that the steward mistakenly brought spaghetti while we ordered for Penne. He was kind enough to get that changed but we thought to give it a try. The Pasta was light creamy with thin chopped mushrooms, Parmesan cheese and basil oil. It was a lil sweet and wasn’t really of my liking. I won’t say it was bad but something that I won’t wish to try out again. Maybe because I can find better options on the menu next time.
 

They have really good Beers which calls for more visits. My personal favourites are Wheat & Shandy. Also tried the cosmopolitan which made exactly the way I like. 

I would like to rate it as 3.8 but Zomato doesn't have that rating.

Author: Hitesh Tulsani
Description:
Just want to say one word awesome!!! Great beer, great food and love the ambience.

We start with fresh brew and few starters. Brew was great as always, and food was amazing too!!!

Being as a busy days we didn't had any major problem with service had a great time.

Will see u soon Biere club!!

Author: Prateek Chellani
Description: A place with an amazing ambience and good beer choices. I went there with a friend during the October fest who ended up completing the beer challenge by drinking a pitcher in 3 min and got it for free. The staff is cordial and the food is pretty decent.

Author: Rahul Das
Description:
Beer : Fantastic!!!!!! Especially the wheat beer.
Location : close to the V12 engines!!
Crowd : Nice
Food : Very good.
Staff : very friendly.
Parking : the only bit of a problem! Anyway valet is available.

Author: Yathindhar
Description: I have heard a lot about this place and thought to give it a try and I was not all disappointed, really enjoyed my time here. Thanks nagraj for the ale and the campari shall visit again anytime soon.

Author: Sagar Nidavani
Description:
Never thought this place would be so great to host parties ... But it was one hell of a night !!
#themisicrun #thebiereclub #besthangoutplace

Author: Bhushan
Description:
Mr. Shetty was a totally bummer on a weekend.
Man come on! On a freaking Saturday and on a long weekend he comes to you and says that you can't order a pitcher because they are shutting down the club at 11:30!

BuZZ KILL! This is not expected from one of the clubs who were the micro brewery pioneers!

TOTAL BUZZ KILL.

To top this all they don't server us a FREAKING a boring vegetarian pizza which BTW was ordered before kindergarten kids goto bed because the bill is was generated before 11 pm.

In simple words, this is slap to Ms. Meenakshi Raju's face. This is was not what she visioned or thought that 'The Biere Club' would 'reform' culture the night life of BENGALURU.

Author: Rahul Taluja
Description:
Just it's location and the upper floor tables overlooking the road and the beautiful crossing make it a must go place.
So on our last day, we decided to be on a pub hopping spree and this one was the first place. Had Mini Fish and Chip Cones and loved it and the concept, the fish was as soft as it could be. Drinks everywhere in Bangalore are mid range and not very cheap.
Still, a good place to go.

Author: Sachin Paul
Description:
It's one of those places with high prices and bad service. Well first of all, it's too tiny place. Sitting is not comfortable. And looking at traffic from first floor didn't add any value either. Place is noisy because of traffic, and freshly brewed beer didn't smell that fresh.

I would recommend the beer street in Whitefield area, as sitting was good and area is absolutely different as compared to beer club.

Further u believe beir club should focus on customer service a little bit atleast and be respectful to customers.

Author: Vikram Rajagopalan
Description:
WORST MEAL EVER.
Went for dinner the other day. Only two of us, and we were given a table for two. As there was literally only one other table occupied, we asked if we could sit on a more comfortable table for 4. They said they can't allow that, and those tables went free the entire evening. And then the food. Literally every single thing we ordered was below average. For the nachos they used bingo mad angles. The pizza tasted like reheated frozen pizza. The salted caramel cake wasn't salted or caramel. Horrible experience. The waiters were too quiet as well. Not interested in speaking with us. Never going there again.

Author: Megha Phirangi
Description: Awesome place, seated at the corner of road. The beers are good to tongue. My favorite was the Belgium strong ale. I highly recommend to have pizzas there, tastier than any pizza chain outlets.

Author: Sureshkumar Rajendran
Description:
A long pending visit happened finally...:) Loved tasting the biere samplers and settled for wheat - Man what a fresh brew it was, thoroughly enjoyed the drink. Lager was next best in the samplers - will have to return for that.

As for the appetizers, liked the pizza, which was flavorful n cheesy too... Also ordered the non veg platter in which all the meats were cooked tender.

.5 less on the rating for the service - felt the guy there was a bit lethargic in serving us.

A special mention to zomato for reserving the table at a click of a button from the app... 👍

Author: Amit Abhinav
Description: Nice crowd, decent place, had 1st time a veg platter with their in house beer and it tasted awesome. If you are looking for a good place with good people and pretty decent noise this is it.

Author: Sonali
Description: Simply outstanding place at great location. I can't have enough of the chicken popcorn these guys serve. I almost ordered thrice! Great pizza and best beer in town too (at least one of the best). Just sit back and enjoy a great mug of beer with your friends. Cheers :)

Author: Anita Fernandes
Description: My 2nd visit after 4 years. Still the same. Wheat beer with a few fries and Moroccan Chicken. Situated in  a good area and everything you order turns out to be just fine. More of a sports bar, hence u wana play pool,  there you go !!!

Author: Abhinav Kumar
Description: Loved the ambience, excellent crispy beer, and large portions of food. The setting , decor and location gave off an English tavern / Inn feel. Definitely a must-visit!

Author: Arnov Chaudhury
Description:
Super place! From drinks to food everything was awesome :)

A must try is their LIIB and fish n chips!

Slightly expensive on the pocket but worth it at the end. Do make a visit here if you have not already.

Author: Shan Turrenz
Description:
It's indeed a good place for beer. Not a good place for food.

My expectations:
1. Good brewery with a good strout/ale - met
2. Ambience with good crowd and some good looking chics - not met
3. Food taste similar to toit - not met
4. A pocket friendly bill - he he he
5. Amazing music just to swallow my food n drinks but to jump on the table - not met
Reality:
1. Beer was really good
2. Crowd was more like they are having a boys day out. Back from office, little loud and careless. Few girls wit 1 good looking chic in the house and look like she is on a tinder date. That guys must be boring. She wanted to run away.
3. Food came to my table, looked at my face and said "hello Mr. Curious, my name is disappointment". Ordered some seafood starter it was tasteless. Chicken was just fine. Ordered a pepperoni, now I am wondering what disappointed me more? Was it pepperoni pizza or basa fish fillet?
4. Bill was fine, cannot expect kindness from them, considering the location they are in.
5. Music was real let down, of course I was not expecting my playlist on the player. I feel more younger if it doesn't repeat. Reminds my of DJ Bobby deol who played Gupt on loop.

Author: Pratyakshya Subramanyam
Description:
A couple of my friends took me to this place for a very late lunch on a weekend. This place is brilliant on a rainy day. We tried the wheat beer and chicken salami and caramelised onion pizza (refer to the picture), grilled smoked chicken pizza, nachos and mushroom cheese poppers.

And let me tell you, all were so filling and yummy! This is one of the best places for a beer lover.

Oh yes, they do have a pool table and the crowd is pretty good :)

Last but not the least, amazing service!

Author: Maya Sharma
Description:
Here, Brewed beer was good but not great though...we had wheat beer as well as dark beer..both were OK in taste. Food was also average and could be improved..
Coming to ambiance , place is perfect for chilling and relaxing..interior is awesome..each floor is well managed and designed. They have a pool table also, it was so relaxing to play and drink together. Pricing is decent as it located on Lavelle road can be justified..
Good beer with great interior..cheerss....

Author: Abhishek Mallick
Description: The place pulls an amazing crowd especially on the weekends. The food and beer was good. I have had stout, wheat and club special beer and they were good not really great though.

Author: Krishnateja Killamsetty
Description: Biere club is one of the best breweries in Bangalore. Loved the Beer over here. And the Ambience here gives you a feeling that you are in Cheers TV Show Set(Where everybody knows your name) 😁. Food is not so exceptional and could be improved.

Author: Prashanth Sampigethaya
Description:
Happened to visit this place with my wife on a rainy Tuesday evening.
The non smoking area was full, so we were sent to 2nd floor. It was raining heavily outside and we were on the roof with an awesome view(Semi covered).
This is a microbrewery, so we expected the waiter to explain the beers that they had, he didn't know a thing!
We tried their ginger wheat beer, it was very good.
Ordered their veg mezze platter which was recommended by the waiter, it was totally not worth 600 Rupees!! The quantity was so less, and quality was average. Instead we could have ordered two starters!!
We liked the Mediterranean Vegetable pizza.
Ambience is nice and crowds great.

Author: Gautham Machaiah
Description:
The Biere Club is full of life and is guaranteed to lift your spirits in more ways than one. Bengaluru's oldest microbrewery, the outlet has consistently maintained high standards over the years.

There are black boards placed in each floor which give details of craft beer including their alcohol content, which makes selecting the one of your choice easy. We skipped the stout and sampled all the lighter beers and found them to be top class. You could also try their shandies.

During previous visits I have quite enjoyed the pizzas and kababs. This time, we had a platter which had different kinds of meat.

If you happen to be here on a rainy day ask for seating in the semi-covered area where you can soak in the salubrious Bengaluru weather.

The only sore point was service which suffered as the crowd increased.

Food: 4/5
Beer: 4/5
Ambiance: 4.5 /5
Service: 3.5/5

Author: Anjali Paul Iyer
Description: Love the beer and the woodsy ambience and the food is pretty damn awesome! It's one of the few places where you can smoke and drink at the table, which could be a put off for many people. I've been there only once but it was enough for me to form a brilliant opinion about the place. I'm definitely visiting again!!

Author: Soumyasree Chakraborty
Description: I was driving around the town with my spouse and brother in law; and the men wanted a drink; and we just chanced to spot this place. For beer lovers the place would make them feel like a kid in a candy store. However foodies would not get disappointed either. The food options are endless. As the men nursed their beer, I nibbled on their all day breakfast platter along with virgin mojito. The food was very nice and so was the plating.

Author: Ali150
Description: Atmosphere was nice, beer was decent and we had good company, just really really disappointed in the staff. They were terrible, they have absolutely no respect for the patrons, let's down the whole establishment. Shame on you guys!

Author: Akhil
Description: The Biere Club has a great selection of craft beer, and special mention has to be made of the wheat beer and the ale. The food is pretty great too, especially the chicken nachos (not too many places add guacamo, so that's also a plus). The pub is in a brilliant area, so accessibility is no issue. All in all, it's a great place to go relax with a couple of beers, especially since it won't make a hefty dent on your wallet

Author: Anshuman Ray
Description: Great place, awesome choice of fresh beer (nice wheat beer)... however I spotted a rat inside the pub which has put me off. Hope they fix this issue asap

Author: Abhilash Mithren
Description:
Oktobiere Fest 2016 at The Biere Club.

The Biere Club has been on my wishlist ever since I moved to Bangalore- they are Bangalore’s first craft brewery... I have a long weekend ahead of me and was not quite sure what I would indulge in; that is when I received an invite for an exclusive preview to this beer fest which was to be held at The Biere Club.

I’m sure you have all been to beer festivals nonetheless, the Oktobiere Fest at The Biere Club is something worth experiencing- especially for the Jäger cocktails and the German delicacies they have to offer.

Author: VIVEK TAMRAKAR
Description:
IN SEARCH OF B33R... WE LANDED HERE..
Frankly I loved the place with there pretty ample place of sitting both ground and a floor above.
They have best sitting/standing arrangement till now(as far I have come till date)
Already known for the vast area in Whitefield outlet.
They have their brewry as well which adds to a value.
Coming to food I had nachos grilled chicken which was not upto the mark,had b33r (wheat) which was good.
Also went with testers for brewry.
I can say this place will surely have space for you in weekend if you happen to miss a place for party.

Author: Sahil Aeron
Description: Just hopeless#no courtesy#zero gesture# tasteless food#ill mannered staff!! # the executives love to work in anticipation- much ahead of time# futuristic.

Author: Nandini Seth
Description:
Went to this place after hearing so much about it but did not end up enjoying myself. The beer was good (which is what the 3.0 is for ) but I was particularly unhappy with the food and the service.

The portions are small or mismatched (too much humus , too little pita bread). The place does not seem to believe in presenting the food well. The service was quite slow too.

Author: Sneha Ravindra
Description: Well I must say that they have the best brewed beer in Bangalore. I have been to a lot of brewery's but the Bierce club has the beat brewed beer or I must say their ale beer is just too good. Food is good but they can still add few Asian starters especially they can add few more vegetarian Asian starters. I loved their chicken Caesar salad. Very good ambience and service is quick. It is a must try for a beer lover.

Author: Debasish Mahapatra
Description:
This one is quite a delayed review, almost a month delay.

I don't think I need to start it with any catch one liner or phrase to mention about this place, common this place is itself a history in its making. Being the first microbrewery of the city and the most popular watering hole in the most happening locality of the city, Biere club is the synonym for the place serving one of the best craft beers in Bengaluru. Spread across three levels, offering a dim lit rustic countryside ambiance and jam packed crowd on any day of the week.

Their craft beer is a immensely popular among the beer lovers and already has been published in many social circles. We got ourselves seated in the 1st floor, the beautiful balcony seating in 2nd floor overlooking the lavelle road is a hit among the people and gets occupied immediately(sadly we ain't got one that day).

For the evening, first we had the sampler set even though we were quite sure of ordering stout for the 4 of all. The IPA, stout and the belgian wit were the better options in the sampler set. Next we had the pitchers of tropical stout with combination of veg kebab platter and chicken kebab platter with prawn as the sides for the beer. The tropical stout was dark beer scoring high in color(dark brown) and bitter levels with highest percentage of alcohol with a strong flavor of the roasted malt. In between we had the seasonal mint beer which was a one time affair. It lacked the body and bitterness with very light flavor.

Now when the gang is in all mood for the drinks alone, its always safe to go for the platters as the sides. Gives choice for everyone in the group and comes in generous quantities and not to forget, the escape from all confusion of wat to order. We felt the vegetarian platter was the better one as compared to it's opposite platter. The veg and cheese seekh kebabs were so soft and melted inside the mouth in the first bite. Kasoori paneer tika was average in taste and lacked the smoky flavor. The spiced baby potatoes and malai mushroom were equally good in taste. In the non veg platter, the char grilled prawns were the stars of the evening and among other I liked the carom seed marinated fish tikka. The fish and prawns had a pleasant sharp taste and appetizing flavor.

Overall my last outing to the place was a fabulous experience for the gang. The service was bit slow but you can't expect a quicker one in a crowded place like this. The music is mostly western, pop with occasional edm. Pricing is similar to most of the microbreweries and cost for four of us was close to 3300 which was not a big bomb. With fine craft beers, delectable plates and the superb crowd along with the plush locality, this place is a must visit for any beer lover in the city.

Author: Harshavrath Singh
Description:
This place is impressive be it the food or the staff, it's an must visit. They even have pool table which is awesome!

Had being here for an office party and it was a great experience.

Will visit again for sure. Keep up the good work guys.

Author: Rahul Kashyap
Description:
Good place for quick hangout.
Brew beer is good, English and Ale tastes good. They may have different flavors which changes often pls ask for it.
There is a Pool Table for your additional timepass wish is always occupied 😊 if you wanna play don't just stand there looking at faces, go write your name on black board 😋
Good service and decent food.

Author: Pankhuri Kaur
Description:
One of the good Microbreweries place in Bangalore. Nice ambience and the staff is good in recommending as per the customer needs. And the starters are good and unique. Not the regular starters at other places, I personally liked the cheesy garlic mushrooms with beetroot sauce.
We also tried their beer sampler having 5 different beers which was quite an experience. Coming to food we tried their veg nachos which was one of the best I had anywhere else and pizza was sort of average. This is not a budget pub so the prices are bit high but a place definitely worth a visit and am already planning one more visit when I get back to India again.

Author: Saikat Roy
Description:
I'm a regular here as it's located bang opposite my office. So majority of our evening office parties are here.

The good: The beer of course ( English Porter and Belgian Ale), Chicken Popcorn and the Fries.

The Not so good : Have tried the pizzas here only one time - was below average and most of the time strong brews aren't available.

All in all a great watering hole for the evenings ! Cheers!

Author: Sanghamitra Gupta
Description: The second stop tonight is the bierre club. The moment we entered this place we knew this is classy, soothing and nice. Its only that the servers are haughty here and they did not bother to come to our table for quite sometime. Later they came just to take order, never bothered to give the basics (paper mats , water or serviettes). As we were first time here we wanted to taste the samplers initially. The hand crafted bierre on the tap are - British brown ale, American lite lager, Belgian wit, Irish dry stout, earl grass lager and lastly weizen bock. I liked the American lite lager - earl grass lager and the weizen bock. We then ordered accordingly. They take the last order at 11.45 (a bell is rung to let everyone know its time for the last call )

Author: Vijaykrishna Ranganathan
Description:
I went to Biere Club a couple of times, when it opened a couple of years back and it sort of dropped off my radar, with so much more happening in the vicinity, So it was a welcome change, when a group of my buddies, suggested it, for a Sunday lunch gathering.

The space is huge, covers three floors; so it's a nice mix-match of indoors and semi-outdoorsy set ups, with pretty heavy set furniture, which looks fairly distinguished and old school, compared to the OTTness we see these days.
We contemplated a bit, before deciding on the aircon-ed ground floor space and had to wait a few minutes, before the waiters could rummage up a table for us. The space was pretty much packed with patrons. I love how the huge windows, bring in a lot of natural light inside. 

The food menu is fairly compact, with starters, mains and options of several shared platters. One of the walls by the bar, lists the day's options from the micro brewery, while the menu has a selection of the usual cocktails, including some beer based ones and regular spirits.

Some in the group frequented this place more regularly and immediately placed their beer orders, while I asked for the samplers of all their offerings. Of the five on offer, the Ale, Wheat and the lager (surprisingly) were pretty good. I was quite disappointed by the herby and odd tasting seasonal and more so by the Belgian (which I expected to be a lot heartier), another of my friend's ordered a red wine sangria and suggested, I take a sip and I was sold. It was pretty delicious large serve, with loads of fruit bits.
So much for my beer quaffing day!

We spent a couple of boisterous hours there and for eats we got a Non veg platter, onion rings, couple of ceaser's salads with chicken, greek salad and a grilled chicken from the mains.
