The onion rings were really good and disappeared quickly, the platter was pretty decent with chicken wings, beer battered fish, chicken popcorn, some curried mutton, bacon wrapped sausages and dips; of which the wings and fish were the best, the chicken was a little too dry. I didn't try the mutton and sausages, but my friends said they were decent. The salads were good and filling, with just the right amount of dressing. The chicken main was pretty good too, with a portion of couscous and grilled veggies and cooked really well.

Service that day was all over and a lot of their items, took their own sweet time to come over, despite reminders, guess it was a busy Sunday to make a super favourable impression.

With the kind of prime location it is located in, Biere Club is one hellava busy place, but makes for a very decent and leisurely hangout space. We saw groups of several senior citizens and families with young kids, spending a relaxing holiday. Prices are pretty much in line with the competition around.

Decor/Ambiance - 8

Food/Drinks - 7.5

Service - 7.5

Overall - 7.5

Author: Yatharth Vashishth
Description: Great beers. One the best tasting microbrewery around. Food quality and taste is below average though. A great place for casual hangout. Recommend.

Author: David Barik
Description: Nice and good place for evening parties and dine in. Ambience and service is very good but if came late you may end up with a long queues...

Author: Hemanth R
Description:
A excellent place where they brew their own beer...comes in flavours of chocolate,rice,wheat to name a few...
A good themed restaurant with in house projector TV.
The food is excellent,thanks to the chef and service is very courteous and quick.
A meal for 2 without drinks costs Rs 1000/- and is worth it.Parking available
Must visit pub folks😄

Author: Upasana Agarwal
Description:
A landmark of sorts, this place was in vogue  when it initially opened some years ago,  until other breweries and micro breweries sprung up.

Known for its crafted beers, this place has space and something to offer to everyone - families, couples,  office goers, pub crawlers. It's hard not to find place in this three floors club. The interiors are warm with solid wooden furniture,  long bar counters, a view overlooking Vittal Malya road and a host of food & drinks options to choose from.

However over the years the quality of food has slipped. Chicken wings don't do justice to the name and portions have shrunk.

You guys need a revival and I am sure you can bounce back into the game.

Author: Ayon Kumar
Description:
I am not a very big fan of beer so don't know if I should review this place. But honestly speaking I didn't quite like the ambience and the overall appeal of this place. Ordered onion rings for starters and that was pathetic to taste. So much so, that we ended up having nothing else.

I mean if you go wrong with onion rings what else can you go right with? Still, the day was salvaged by the nearby sodabottleopenerwalla. Would anytime suggest a toit or a vapor oven this. :/

Author: Sandesh M S
Description: One of the good Microbreweries place in Bangalore. Nice ambience and the staff is good in recommending as per the customer needs. And the starters are good and unique. Not the regular starters at other places, I personally liked the cheesy garlic mushrooms with beetroot sauce. Platters would be worth over individual starters and light on pocket too.

Author: Arun George
Description:
One of the halts during a pub-crawl on MG Road/Lavelle Road. They have excellent brewed beer options. Service is quite good too [even during peak hours!]. The staff is extremely polite and clicks good pictures of you n' your friend [or group of friends!]. Rs. 160/- for a pint is quite reasonable for this area. Lip-smacking finger food as well to go with your drinks. 

instagram.com/arungeorge13

Author: Sankeshjain
Description: Wonderful beers and wonderful time with frds....we just had beer beers n more beers cos that's what this place is all about. Fully crowded but we managed to sneak in and get good place cos of Kannada lover whom I spoke to in his language and he fell for it and did all the best service he possibly could. He made us drink n drink more. We enjoyed quiet a lot. Excellent memory

Author: Hara Prasad Kar
Description: The Biere Club one of the finest brewery in bengaluru so decide go and enjoy with my bestfriends. We arrived at the place around 9pm and it was jampacked not a single place to sit. So we decided to stand at corner and enjoy our drinks till we find a place to sit. We ordered ale and wheat beer, ale was super wheat was good. In food we went for fries and chilli ground lamb mince pizza with ginger and yogurt which looked like an interesting option. Fries were ok pizza was good. Muzik and service was good too. All in all a good place to hangout with friends.

Author: Denal Bernard
Description:
I had been to Biere Club couple of times but my last visit was definitely the best maybe because i just ordered all the right dishes & drinks.

Drinks
=> Among all the brewed beers my favorite was definitely the Club Special. It had a good flavor and was the strongest. 
=> The Red Wine Sangria was the highlight of the day for me. i fell in love with it that i couldn't stop myself from having 3. Try it only with apple pieces. I promise you wont regret it :)

Food
=> Assorted Fries (French fries & Potato wedges with Mayo) goes really well with beers and it comes in good quantity.
=> Grilled Smoked Chicken Pizza, thin curst pizza with alot of chicken which definitely went well with our sangrias.
=> Warm Choco Brownie. This dessert just hit the spot. Big piece of brownie with salted caramel sauce served with a scoop of ice cream. It was definitely heavenly.

Definitely recommended.

Author: Shreya Chaudhary
Description:
Ambience-4/5
Staff-2.5/5
Food-4/5

I visited the Biere Club for a Saturday brunch and I must say it was a very good decision. The food was lip smacking but the service was very slow, we had to remind 2-3 times for our basic order- Nachos & Margarita Pizza. The service did make my visit not as memorable.

The beer is one of the tastiest in Bangalore (or as my drunkard friends said). Even at 3 in the afternoon, it was decently occupied with all good crowd.

Upgrade the service part and I'd surely drop by for another visit.

Author: Shavan Sathe
Description: Good place on the corner, and crowded, food was good and good ambience, bit loud music. had ordered nachos, which was good in taste. Loved the food served and the drinks offered.

Author: Mahesha M
Description: Chose this place to hangout with my best buddies yesterday. I have never been to a micro brewery before. It was an absolute pleasure being here and loved every moment. We went here around 9 PM and it was chalk a block. We had no hesitation in sitting at bar tending counter as it gave the best possible view of whats happening. This place has really got great vibes and makes you feel good. Coming to drinks we had their lager which tasted amazing not like the usual drought beer you get it was something different and very good. We also tried their beer sampler having 5 different beers which was quite an experience. Coming to food we tried their veg nachos which was one of the best I had anywhere else and pizza was sort of average. This is not a budget pub so the prices are bit high but a place definitely worth a visit and am already planning one more visit when I get back to India again.

Author: Ganesh Mirajkar
Description: This is a very cool place. Good food and good drinks. It's a brewery and the beers they serve are pretty good. It is not that expensive as compared to other places in that area. It's very big, I think like 3 floor or so,  and hence has lots of place to sit.

Author: Umang Gupta
Description:
Place definitely attracts a good crowd. But the table was mood killer nd speaker beside it was nt working too.
Very limited option of craft beer.
Food is decent though and yes,four cheese pizza is my personal favorite.
Service is fast and waiters are very friendly too.
So mixed experience , average rating.
Must say other biere republic is much better in comparison.

Author: Nidhi
Description:
We went to this place on a Sunday afternoon
The place was not very crowded...
The beer especially the wheat beer needs to be tasted...
We order for chicken nachos...and they were worth the money ...
The service was quick and the food was served on time...
Must a visit for all d beer lovers !!!

Author: Ashwin J
Description: We went there on a Friday afternoon 4 of us friends .... everyone must try the wheat beer and their brilliant pizzas ... overall great experience

Author: Ananya Dubey
Description: And look at my car which i gave in vallet!!! Water bottles on car floor, all fm channels jumbled!! Tissue roll all over the seat! Apart from worst desserts you can actually ruin someone's car too!!!

Author: Payal Sinha
Description:
Located in the prime locality of Lavelle road, this place serves one of the best crafted beers in town. The ambience is spacious and has a rustic look. Specifically during weekend evenings you can see luxurious cars speeding in the Lavelle road when you're seated in first floor here and oh boy! What a sight for car lovers like me.
We had ordered crafted beer ofcourse, apart from that White Wine Sangria and vodka as well for us ladies. we also ordered a lot of food , veg and non veg platter, mushroom cheese pizza, chicken nuggets , nachos and the list was long as we were starving. Taste was great!!!!

Author: Arjun
Description: Lovely ambience!! The pizzas aren't great but the nonveg platter the Mexican chicken does the deal!! The beers are amazing! Going everytime- sampling round followed by the done deal pitchers of the same till your found sitting outside at closing time!! Lovely place

Author: Geeti Joshi
Description:
I am big fan of brewed beers and I love the ale it's pretty amazing. The food was also good,I like the non-veg platter. They have good crowds of weekends most of the days it's pretty full.  I would recommend this palace for any beer lovers and also a good place to hangout for a drink.
Great pub food. Beer Batter Onion Rings were amazing. The Hummus and Fries were good too. Not a drinker, but people I went with enjoyed the wheat beer. The LIIB had polarised views, but the ones that liked it said they enjoyed it a lot. The place is not too expensive as well. The ambiance is great as well, especially on the rooftop. Overall, a great pub to hang out, even for non-drinkers.

Author: Abhay Arora
Description: Located at one of the prime locations this place is one my best places i visited in Bangalore. Some great food options and brewed beer, they have a comfortable sitting. With a pool table you can play against the people there, and if you win then you can play there endlessly for hours for free. Ordered mexican chilli chicken and a pitcher of wgeat beer, both were amazing.

Author: Gaurav Basu
Description:
This place used to be good...."used to be". Now it's a watered down version of its original state... Same applies to the beer regardless weather it's the Lavelle road unit or the Whitefield one. The biggest concern is the consistency, my last visit was satisfactory, but today was disappointing.

The Belgian wit, was sickeningly sweet and we had to send it back. The stout tasted like rum and cola for some odd reason. A stout without nitro is like pizza without cheese.... What's the point?

Rating it 3 from a previous 4. I still love the space. I am just disappointed since the place has great potential and is not not delivering at the level it's supposed to.

I would love to come back. But I doubt it.

Author: Rachna Manjunath
Description: Off late, with my extending love for breweries and hence, craft beers, and on realizing I haven't been to the first ever microbrewery in South India, I found myself here on a Friday noon. I liked the first floor seating much better than the ground floor; For, the two seater tables by the railings overlook the streets across. Rustic wooden tables with a pool table in the middle, this place looks ideally old fashioned. Ale being the best, wheat beer was close enough, too. Dint really get to try the food here, mainly because the beer was just so good that I had my full of it. But also because we had to head elsewhere. Now that I really like the beer here, looking forward to the food as well, sometime really soon.

Author: Pratheek Ponnappa
Description: The Biere Club, Bangalore’s First Brewery witnessed its 5th Anniversary on 25th May. This called for a celebration as they completed five wonderful years of serving some of the finest craft beers and combinations of food that goes well with your drinks! Running a brewery is no easy task and achieving this to perfection continuously from five years is a commendable job. *Pat on the back* to the folks who are responsible to keep this place lively at all times. I was here for their Anniversary celebrations and this post talks about my experience here.

Author: Arun
Description:
Pathetic service. DO NOT VISIT. YOU HAVE FAR BETTER OPTIONS.

I visited the pub yesterday with my friend. The waiter looked stoned. Our drinks were promptly served but food never came. When I asked the waiter about order he just shrugged and moved on. Clearly not built for service. When I asked that the order by cancelled, he was not even apologetic

The place also has a foul odour especially on the lower floors. Clearly the by product of the 2 dogs who were sleeoing just outside the main door of the pub !! AVOID

Author: Nabin Jha
Description: Its good place to chill with frnds...different varity of taste.. Location is also a plus point... Only thing there is too much noise and the prices are little bit costly but according to that place its good...enjoyed my beer🍻

Author: Anand Narayandas
Description: Good beer and ambience. But only wheat beer seems good, others are not that good tasting. Food is average though. Can visit once. Good location though, very close to lot of other places.

Author: Mehernosh Pithawalla
Description: Amazing lager. The pork sausage platter should not be missed. Same for the bacon wrapped sausages. The nachos were ok. Chicken popcorn was average. Great music

Author: Abhijith V
Description: Awesome !!!!!!! all the beers , food especially the mushroom and fries..... ambiance , Value for money..... a group of friends and the biere club is one of the best combinations you can enjoy.... try wheat and ale specially.... good and always ready to be here......

Author: Kumar Mohanty
Description: Good place but smaller than the white field one. Food and verities are superb. The hospitality was awesome .The location near UB city is an addition to it. A must try place.

Author: Goutham Raj
Description: This place was really cool and felt awesome about it. The beer they served was very nice and the cocktail i had was really amazing. And the food was good too! Would be visiting this place again!

Author: Apoorva Kashyap
Description:
The Biere club is one of the finest microbreweries I have encountered. They undoubtedly serve you the finest, top notch craft beers.
If you cannot choose, always ask for the sampler.
We went for the ale and the lager and they were just perfect.
Also surprisingly they had happy hours (1+1) going on and the steward really helped us throughout our order.
I also tried a beer cocktail, the Biere Moscow mule with ginger ale which was an absolute delight.
The fries are actually an assortment of regular & spiced ones and wedges and some mayo to go with served in a cute red bucket.
And also check out the Indian/work lunches they serve at reasonable prices.
The only disappointment was they did not have wheat or stout beer.
All in all, a great experience and I'll be coming back for more!

Author: Harsika Mehta
Description:
We have no complaints about the service. Even during a rush hour like that, they managed to keep their customers happy...a reason to come back here again and again.
We tried their Ale beer and the Mock Biere with some potato wedges. Both the drinks were good. It goes well with the starters. We didn't get a chance to stay for long !!!
Both the food and beverages menu is really extensive and the waiters are receptive to any customization.
I would give a special mention to the beverages including the mocktails and juices which can just make your day !!!!

Author: Carol
Description: One of the classy breweries in Bangalore. I love their ambience. Freshly brewed beers and amazing ones too that's what they are mainly known for. It's a tad bit formal in setting. But nonetheless very well located and swift service. The staff is polite and it's a good place to have a couple of beers and a conversation with a friend or two.

Author: Dwaipayan Guha
Description: This place quite well known amongst Bangaloreans..an awesome place to hang around with friends..and catch up on memories over a glass of freshly brewed beer.. special mention of there wheat and ale beers..will definitely try the stout on the next visit.. Cheers 🍺

Author: Suraj Prabhu
Description:
AFAIK Biere Club was the first microbrewery in Bangalore.
It still is the best. The rest are but pretenders to the throne!
An alternative setting, combined with well priced, delicious beer and free pool makes them the clear winner.
Also, unlike other microbreweries, it's not full of the mainstream crowd, allowing for plenty of breathing space and ample elbow room.

Author: Yameni Dhankar
Description: The Bierre club is on the beautiful lavelle road, which somehow really reminds me of places around Juhu. Located on the posh Vittal Mallya road, this place is teeming with an up market but fun crowd. I went there after a hectic day of work, for about an hour. It is like a pub with a brewery, so you have all the liquor options and some of the brewed beer. They had 6/7 options and we chose to go for the Plis Lite and Wheat Beer pitchers. Teamed it with some of their chicken platter; and the evening was sweet.

Author: Chef BB
Description:
Biere club is a hotspot for Sunday breakfast after Sunday night hard party. That's why they named it as Hangover breakfast. As per the need, they planned the menu and they planned it well. Visited their outlet with some of my foodie friends. Where we got to taste the English breakfast with some light beer and played the snooker as well. The pancake with maple syrup is a killer.

    You must try it after the Saturday nights hard party.

    Bon Appetite @Chef BB

Author: Sandeep
Description:
If Bangalore is a kingdom of breweries, then undoubtedly Biere Club be the king !

Ale is my all time favourite beer, which is mild unlike their other offerings.

Tried Chicken pizza and Chicken Nachos, pizza was good but Nachos didn't meet the expectation

Have been thrice to this place but never got a seat anytime, but the courteous staff will try to arrange some alternative. To my surprise every time I order in crowd and they get you served and it was never a miss

On Weekends don't expect a place to sit and fully crowded.

Author: Jay Rambhia
Description: I had been here for a friend's bachelor party. I don't think there's anything special about this place except the fact that that it's situated at Lavelle Road. They have put up some decent posters here and there. I wish they had done the same with the food because it's horridly mediocre. Brew is just okay. You can get better brew at other places which are not so expensive. Also, the place is loud. Kills the vibes.

Author: Abi
Description:
Food: Only had beers, and they've got a good variety. Wheat tasted mild and smoothest while stout stood out among all. Lager and Ale were bang for buck.

Service: The staff served. We requested for some lowering of speaker volume but were denied the luxury.

Ambiance: The music is loud, so one will have to speak louder. Bad choice if you're there for a meet up and/or hold a conversation. Lighting is moderate, catchy decor.

Must Try: Beers for now, stout maybe?

Author: Divya Reddy
Description:
Food - 4 - Had the non-veg platter and it deserves a word of appreciation
Drinks - 5- The wheat beer is the lightest smoothest yummiest beer that i have had (personal opinion)
Ambiance - 3 - The seating is far apart and music is fine.

Author: Dikshita Damodaran
Description: Good brewery! Have heard about it a lot... When tasted liked it More!! Must visit once...  Nice place to chill...  Though food is good it's a little expensive

Author: Vikas Wadhawan
Description: Good place for beer and good snacks. Centrally located and walking distance from UB city. Enjoyed my evening with friends here and chicken wings and nachos were a good try

Author: Shruthi M
Description: Fabulous interiors, perfectly located at the corner of lavelle road. This place might be famous for theia' freshly brewed beers buh oops, I don't drink! I dined in here with mi colleagues a couple of times when we sat down the entire evening, them drinking n me hogging on theia' freshly baked thin crust pizzas! Delicious they were! Loved the ambience, finger food and ya theia' amazingg pizzas!!

Author: Ajit B
Description: The beers have improved over the last 5 years and it is good . The service and the food  is good and the music not too loud.  Overall a good hangout throughout the day.

Author: Kusum Venkatesh
Description: Must say this is one of the best brewery in bangalore. In spite of it being oldest in the city yet it ranks number 1 when compared to other breweries. And the concept of INDIAN THALI is something worth and pocket friendly. And to add on Apple cyrup mixed with beer with lime is one of the best I have ever had til date, to add on chesse nachos and spicy mushroom is must try. Staffs over here are  well trained and friendly too.

Author: Carl Sagar
Description:
The Biere Club is (i think) Bangalore's first microbrewery and it had been on my radar for a long while. Finally visited on a weekday afternoon and was pleased to find that only a few tables were occupied. I liked the ambience - it has an old-fashioned rustic feel that reminded me of Bangalore's early pubs : it even smelt a bit like these old institutions!

We decided to sit upstairs since it is open on the sides and it was nice to watch the world rush by at this busy intersection while we sipped our beers. The brewed beers we tried were all quite good. The food, however, left us feeling extremely disappointed. we ordered the hummus with assorted chips, crispy chicken wings, Chettinad style roast prawns and a pepperoni pizza.

The hummus was stale and we had to send it back. The chicken wings were far from crispy: they were soggy and too sweet. the chettinad prawns were better - probably the best part of the meal, but not outstanding. The pizza was not bad and had a nice thin crust - but one can find much better in the city.

The place has a great feel and their beers are pretty good, but I wish they would work on their food : the quality left a lot to be desired

Author: Nitin Walia
Description: Die find the food too good ... May be a it was bland for a north punjabi like me :) ... The ambience is nice, music was good ... Nothing much to talk about drinks. We ordered veg platter, but most of the items were pretty bland. Obviously it's costly, given the place it is at.

Author: Gaurav Parihar
Description:
One of the most under rated places in Bangalore. Brilliant ambiance good food and a microbrewery. .
This place has it all.
A must visit place in Whitefield.

Author: Rohan Sachdev
Description: Beer is Fantastic!! Think they have a new brewer. Could keep the place a bit cleaner though and food is all right. I will go back again for the beer.

Author: Tanu Rai
Description: Nice place! Tried wheat beer which was fine. The food was really good. I enjoyed their chicken baked nachos and bbq platter (don't remember the name properly but it was some platter with sausages and all meat stuff) the most. Service is pretty slow. I've been here many times and all the times I have noticed this. We literally had to go and ask them to come to our table for order. Need to improve service otherwise it's a good place.

Author: Pavan Srin
Description: I just loved the place !! 😘 ambience n the kindness in serving Ll make u feel like it's ur home ! 😂 beer was really awesome n very good ! 😍u even get pitchers over der so u can save a bit of money !😂😂

Author: Avishek Bhattacharjee
Description: Went there with a group of five....place was packed but somehow after waiting 10 min we got a table......decor is good, service is fine,food is overrated & expensive but the brewed beer were awesome....so yeah, visit this place only for the beer and maybe skip the food...it was too expensive for their quality.

Author: Arushya Ashwin Wadhwa
Description: Superb place to go even with a child. Not on weekend though. The waiters there throughly looked after my daughters special menu with a superb drink too.

Author: Avinash Lokanath
Description: I am big fan of brewed beers and I love the ale it's pretty amazing. The food was also good,I like the non-veg platter. They have good crowds of weekends most of the days it's pretty full. The service and value for money is not completely there but these kind of places can't provide u with Everything u need. I would recommend this palace for any beer lovers and also a good place to hangout for a drink.

Author: Suresh Menon
Description:
One of the earliest microbreweries in Bangalore, its always been a good experience to enjoy the craft beer there. The Belgian wheat varieties were both smooth and nice. While the food menu may look inadequate, each of the dishes are definitely lip smacking. The grilled chicken and cheese nachos & chettinad style grilled prawns were delicious while the assorted imported cheese platter with nuts and grape sauce was different but tasty especially if you are a chhese lover. The only disappointment was a bland beef taco with Korean BBQ sauce.
Service is efficient and the place noisy but relaxed

Author: Priyanka Nayak
Description:
Visited this place to attend a standup comedy show. This place hosts several such events.
Post which we a good meal pizzas pasta some mocktails. They ran out of pizzas towards the end of our meal. Nevertheless great food! Impressive and lavish ambiance.

Author: Kishore Rangaraj
Description:
Ambience - 5.0
Music - 4.0
Crowd - 5.0
Beer - 4.5
Choice of Cocktails/Mocktails - 4.0
Finger food - 4.0
Price - 3.5

Me and my cousins are frequent visitors to this place and it has never failed to delight us. It is like an old faithful place. Whenever we want to hangout no other dependable place for good time than "The Biere Club". Most of their beer flavours are good. Definitely a must go place for crafted beers.

Their Pizzas are thin crust and wood fried do try one of those. Jalapeño Cheese nachos is yummy.

Author: Devajyoti Barman
Description:
Good place to hang out even though it is a bit expensive. The beer is pretty good and I liked the dark Ale a lot. It doesn't have too much for food though. We yried to order some food but found out that they were not available. Thankfully whatever they had was well made and we gobbled it up with the beers.

Ambience is nice with a huge cartoon mural on one side. Makes it a bright atmosphere. No live band was playing that day, unfortunately.

Servers are relatively prompt and sometimes we did have to look around for them to rake our order.

Overall a good place to chill out, enjoy a draught and have fun.

Author: Ravi Krishnan
Description: A pleasant discovery since I stayed at Melange,close by. A wonderful place for beer and good food. Prajwal is an asset to this nice restaurant. you must ask for him. He is very helpful in guiding you through the menus. The steaks  are great and so are there home brewed beers.

Author: Sayantika Basu
Description:
My Review : 4.4/5.0

Well, this place is situated in the very posh Lavelle Road. So you can expect very posh crowd inside, mostly foreigners.
I had gone there on one weekend few months back when one of my besties came to visit me in Bangalore with her friends. I had almost taken a responsibility to take them to some really nice pub so that it becomes memorable for all of us.

Ambiance : I loved the interiors. I have a special soft corner for classy decor, so this place instantly got added to my list as soon as I stepped in.  It was having karaoke night going on, with really good looking foreigners stepping ahead and singing. It was pretty encouraging.

Food &Drinks : we had ordered crafted beer ofcourse, apart from that White Wine Sangria and vodka as well for us ladies. we also ordered a lot of food , veg and non veg platter, mushroom cheese pizza, chicken nuggets , nachos and the list was long as we were starving. Taste was good, nothing exceptional though.

Cost : Well, we cannot really expect any lesser in a place like lavelle road. Since we had ordered a lot of food, which were kinda pricey, our bill was pretty long as well.
But overall, nice experience for all of us !!!

Author: Ajatshatru Singh Rathore
Description: Place is fine, Ambiance was good, Brew Beer was only Highlight & USP for this place.Must go place if you want to have some quality time with Beer & friends. Service was fast & waiter response proactively.

Author: Nishant Singh
Description:
Best micro brewery in Bangalore(probably India)

The beers are amazing, especially draft and wheat beer. Spirits range is good.

Non Veg platter is quite good. Chicken popcorn are served in old style popcorn cone .Pizzas are also decent

Service is good , staff is well trained. Friday and Sat evening is difficult to get table esp on 1& 2nd Floor.

Don't miss this place for experience or search of best beer in bangalore.

Author: Sameera Gupta
Description: Posh, well located, great beer and amazing food. I think this is the best placed brewery in Bangalore. I love going to this place. The ambience rocks. I think this place really doesn't need you to read reviews. It's like a must go to place in Bangalore.

Author: Himaghna
Description:
Great pub food. Beer Batter Onion Rings were amazing. The Hummus and Fries were good too. Not a drinker, but people I went with enjoyed the wheat beer. The LIIB had polarised views, but the ones that liked it said they enjoyed it a lot. The place is not too expensive as well. The ambiance is great as well, especially on the rooftop. Overall, a great pub to hang out, even for non-drinkers.
Ambiance: 4.5/5
Service & Staff: 5/5
Food: 4/5
Value for Money: 4/5

Author: Satish Kannan
Description: For a place named as The Biere Club, I felt the beer was average. Stout was not stout enough and Lager not brown enough, I have never been a big Ale guy. The place has 2 floors and upper level is semi-open but was filled with smokers and smoke was everywhere ( badly ventilated) - one of my pet peeves. Food was alright- nothing memorable, and ambience was nice. It was super crowded even on a Tuesday night. Overall I would say an acceptable place ....

Author: Sakshat Dadhich
Description: A place that has maintained its level of service and quality and beer. Amazing. Nice place, combines both indoor and outdoor use. You have to try their seasonal flavoured beer. A must visit.

Author: Vishvajeet Nagargoje
Description:
This place is among the best breweries in town. I particularly like their stout and the seasonal Mango beer that they brew. The Mango beer is warmly refreshing and one of the best things I've had this summer. I usually walk down from office to this place to have a beer or two, and this place never disappoints. Their food is quite costly, though. That's kinda acceptable, given that they are on Lavelle road, which is one of the most swanky neighbourhoods in town. I've had their in-house sauce crispy corn, which was pretty good, I guess.

They have one-plus-one on all beers till 9.45 pm on Mondays and Tuesdays, which they DO NOT publicize. That's quite a bad thing to do on their part, but I'm not bothered by it anyway.

Author: Bakasuri
Description:
The place is quite happenibg and the ambiance is good.as we were seated right next to the counter we also got to watch our drinks bieng fixed.
The service is good
The ambiance is nice
The food:the pizza with sweet peppers and goatcheese had potential but just not enough toppings to even cover itself:p
The pomengranate basil flavored cocktail is much recommended
The brocolli and corn mac and cheese is too good and so yum.
And thier handcrafted beer was much liked by friends.

Author: Mehul Raina
Description: Amazing beer options and the chicken dishes we tried were also great. Perfect  evening. I liked the concept of tasters wherein we are given samples of all beers and then order according to our taste

Author: Maromi Panda
Description: On sunday however, we had plans of visiting another place on St. Marks road, but there was no parking available and we decided to try out biere club. Lucky us!. This place has a beautiful rustic vibe and we both fell in love with the place instantly. They had a nice selection of brews, so we ordered a wheat beer, a mojito and hummus with assorted chips.

Author: Maromi Panda
Description:
This place has a beautiful rustic vibe and we both fell in love with the place instantly.
They had a nice selection of brews, so we ordered a wheat beer, a mojito and hummus with assorted chips.

Service was lightening fast, and everything appeared instantly on our table. Beer was great, mojito a tad too sweet but then not bad. I didn't like the hummus platter much. Hummus lacked any flavour, and the other dip-not sure what it was (maybe tomato and red pepper?) was also not that good. Sweet potato chips lacked crunch.

Since we loved the ambiance and drinks so much, we decided to try out a couple more things from their menu. So we ordered a mango beer- as funny as it sounds, another wheat beer (I not being a beer guzzler, loved their brew), and a grilled mediterranean  vegetables with pesto pizza.

Mango beer turned out to be quite nice actually. It was not sweet at all, just had the essence of mango. Pizza took a little while to arrive, but was totally worth the wait.

We totally loved the pizza. Base was perfect, wafer thin and baked to perfection. Pesto was not overwhelming. Lots of grilled veggies, and delicious.

This place is a must visit  for its brews and laid-back ambiance.

Author: R LOHIT
Description:
Must have : Wheat Beer , Crispy fried Babycorn , Fenugreek cottage cheese chunks
(Could taste only veg as my friend was a veggie, but didn't disappoint); Heard from others that "fish n chips" are too good.
Ambience : Has a separate non smoking zone(ground floor) ; for the rest , two whole floors of open air with a pool table as an added incentive , gets a bit crowded on weekends and needs prior booking to avail a table
Service : Very fast , excellent , friendly@

Author: MascotR
Description:
Love the craft beers. Their largers really appeal to my soul. The bar cuisine is predominantly Mediterranean with flat breads, hummus and kebabs! Love their mini lamb burgers and the Mediterranean kebab platter. Have also enjoyed their food fired pizzas (these may not always be available of I'm not mistaken)
How could I forget the hangover breakfast!!! 😍 head there in a weekend morning and kiss hangovers good bye!

Author: Amit Jambotkar
Description: Ordered for a mango beer and a pommegranate martini. Both were spot on and worth a mention. I was pleasantly surprised when a beer sampler (pic below) arrived on my table which made my choice easier. We were in the mood of having beef since we are deprived of the same in Mumbai. You get the best beef in bangalore and we wanted it to be cooked spicy (off the menu special request) The Chef readily agreed to do so and made a Beef Chettinad.. Which was lip smacking. We also ordered for Calcutta style veg pattice with Kasundi mustard which was quiet different and nice.  The music they play is really nice and their service is impeccable. No wonder the place was packed even if it is spread on three floors. A special mention of the manager Bijesh and the server Prashant. They are the assets to this place!!

Author: Chaitanya Rao
Description:
It was a Barley day for us! Soaked in barley based draught beer the entire noon till rain clad evening!
We were literally reeking of beer all over and being a beer lover,enjoyed the stench myself!
We walked straight to the top,noticeably wooden stairs!
High rise revolving chairs,view,walls adorned with Harley gear,beer all this culminated to pretty nice evening!
Praveen played the nice host,was always on the reach!
Pizza was flat on the pan,had to scrape it, yet was delicious!
I would recommend this for a beer lover and me being an avid driver,valet parking came to rescue for my car to find a spot to park!

Author: S S
Description: I love the stout there. The bar counter is great. The upper floors aren't that interesting. The service is okay. However the brewed beers  and finger food are very nice.

Author: Kayfabe
Description:
This place holds a special significance for me as this was the first microbrewerry I visited in Bangalore. I am told that it's one of the oldest as well, but not sure of that.

Spread over three floors in the heart of big money Bangalore, it definitely qualifies as a hotspot. The darker beers are especially good. And then things go south.

The food is way below par for a place this famous. The ambience is average and apart from the afore-mentioned dark beer, nothing much can qualify as exceptional.

So an okay place to visit. But not worth the hype you'll have heard about it.

Author: Sandhya
Description:
One of my fav place to go. I love the ambience, interiors, location and the energy of this place. Staff is courteous and always busy 😆😆😆.

One thing u must not miss is the beer tasting. They have a great collection. They introduced Mango beer too for the season Wow thought this is only for the dessert👍👍but it's on a sweeter side so careful if u really want it.

Try their club special it's strong. Other flavors to try Ale and wheat. Depends on ur choice.

Food - Morocco spice chicken and sundries tomatoes, mushroom and goat cheese - good

You can also try their pasta 😊😊

Author: Niwa Hangma
Description: This place has a charm about it that is hard to find in many of the other breweries out there in the city. You can enjoy your drink, chill and listen to good music and the staff is good as well. Been there a couple of times, always had a good time. Perfect place to hangout with friends, decent crowd too.

Author: Anshu Jana
Description:
We went here on a Saturday night. Other places around do not allow people wearing floaters footwear of in shorts / 3 4ths, but no such thing here. We once sat over the bar on the ground floor and once at a table on the top floor. The ambiance is good, it shows a healthy atmosphere of merry people. It is spread over three floors.
We had two pitchers of wheat beer which was the best I have ever had. You don't feel like you are having beer but it hits you. The rating above is for the beer only. Coming to food, we ordered the Chicken Nachos - when it was served to us there were plain nachos on it with very little cheese and chicken. So I asked the waiter to take the dish back and put more cheese but he refused saying that you should have told that before and now how can we go back to the kitchen and all. Very rude behaviour. We ate the dry nachos for a while which we can get in shops to buy...after a while I said the same thing. Then they put some more cheese but by that time the dish had gone worse and I did not like it at all. The dish was very bad..even an amateur can prepare better nachos. It seems that they were too shy in giving cheese. This dish is so more good in many other places.
But nevertheless we had 3 more dishes -- Bacon wrapped sausages, pepperoni pizza and French fries. The first 2 were good but I thought the French fries could have been improved on.
The service is ok, delayed and you have to keep calling them.
The place was not overcrowded when we went here. I would definitely come back for the beer and the pizzas and world recommend others too. But the experience above gave me negative vibes.

Author: Vera Shrivastav
Description: Good Ale. Good Ambience. Good service. I'd definitely recommend the seasonal Mango ale, even if you're not fond of mangoes. This one tastes especially nice with subtle hints of mango. The Stout ale is a good choice as well. We were lucky enough to win a free mug (courtesy, guess the countries!). The food was somehow lacking.

Author: Naina Acharya
Description:
One of the first places I visited when I was in Bangalore. Quite a loud place, but good music, food is awesome and so are the drinks. Slightly on the expensive side. But if you want to chill out with your friends its a place thats a must visit. I loved the staff here who are absolutely cool despite the crazy rush over the weekend. 
Ambiance: 4/5
Food:5/5
Drinks:3.5/5
Service/4/5
Value for money:3.5/5

Author: Suraj Chhetri
Description: Great place lovely crowd great food ,full of energy only thing was this place is over priced, and that is what counts at the end of the day...music was ok staff was generous

Author: Joe
Description: Well weekends are never complete without this lovely place...Fond of it for its English style of ambience.. I tried the ale and the lager and both were good...I personally preferred the ale.. Also ordered coriander chicken, French fries, veg nachos, Spinach pizza, Fish in lemon sauce and hummus.. Chicken was soft, cooked in coriander, garlic and pepper in Chinese style...They have introduced Honey Nutmeg recently..I recommend everyone of you guys to try this one...it's top notch! A special mention about Rajat who is always so humble and provides the best service to us everytime..

Author: Pankhuri Dhingra (trendingvibeswithpankhuri)
Description:
Was searching for a place to spend a saturday evening with friends, then found this on zomato and decided to go here seeing the reviews. We booked a table in advance , though we could not make on time but still got a table in 10 minutes. Their staff is very good, service is quick too. Not a beer lover i tried wheat mojito which was nice. My friends liked wheat beer. After trying their samplers.
The ambience is nice, nice atmosphere. Coming to the food everything i tried veg or nonveg was really nice. Cheesy garlic mushrooms were nice, veg seekh kabab i liked them. I tried something corn curd on their menu which i didnt like too much . It was sweet. I tried pineapple cocktail which was not nice.
Overall i liked the place nice staff, ambience, food everything good.

Author: Saurav Ganguly
Description:
Ambience was good at he biere club. But the food was not up to the mark. We ordered chicken Nachos, onion rings and pork sausages platter. The Nachos were not baked. It seemed the Nachos are bought from a supermarket and toppings were added to it. The chicken was not grilled on the Nachos. Onion rings lacked the proper amount of salt. Pork chops were good. But quantity was less for 900 bucks. Overall not so great experience with food.

The beer that we chose, "RCB Ale" was the best part of the night. Nice beer with great taste.

Author: Achala Bhat
Description:
Visited on one of the most unusual times to visit, which is on a thursday noon !

We were greeted inside warmly and the ambiance was good; it can be great for you if you are into rock music and sports. 

Both the food and beverages menu is really extensive and the waiters are receptive to any customization. 

I would give a special mention to the beverages including the mocktails and juices which can just make your day !

Must visit place,esp if you have a large group !

Author: Prateek Sharma
Description:
Perfect location ! Great beer and food
The ambience is great the staff is well trained and friendly . The food is well presented . The varieties of beer is worth the money

Author: Gautam Sameer
Description:
Awesome seasonal beer (mango). The beer was well crafted and great to taste.

Had ordered a paneer tikka, which was good. The place is just ultimate with good crowd.

Author: Akhil Chowdhury
Description:
I went there this Saturday night. By the time I reached there, it wasn't that crowded but after 15 minutes a crowd poured in. Happy that we came earlier. We had a pitcher of wheat beer and Chicken Salami and caramelized onion pizza. The pizza wasn't as expected. Very sweet and bland in seasoning. On the other hand, the beer was amazing. One of the best wheat beers I've ever tasted in Bangalore. We had a blueberry cheesecake post that. It was horribly portioned for the amount they charge for it. Blueberry to cheesecake portion was 1:8. So well -
Ambience - 4/5
Taste - 3.5/5
Beer - 5/5
Value for money - 3/5
Service - 3.5/5

Author: Upen Parikh
Description: Nice place to hang out with friends. They have three level sitting. Nice brewery on this road. We just had drinks this time. Didn't had any snacks , but I can say must go place with friends to enjoy beer.

Author: Abhipsa Pattnayak
Description: I visited this place on my birthday which made my birthday really special. Beer was the best thing happened to me here. I tried khus khus with basa one of the tastiest food, I still have the taste in my mind, quick service and amazing ambiance

Author: Tetei Azyu
Description:
We had made a reservation at Bierre Republic but our maps landed us to The Biere Club. It was Friday night and crowd was high everywhere. If not for the lovely receptionist and their manager, we definitely won't get a chance to get a table here without reservation. We came in to such a lovely place.

We were attended by one of the staffs named Pramod. So courteous and delightful. We have no complaints about the service. Even during a rush hour like that, they managed to keep their customers happy...a reason to come back here again and again.

We tried their Ale beer and the Mock Biere with some potato wedges. Both the drinks were good. It goes well with the starters. We didn't get a chance to stay for long and try more food from here as we thought we should show up to Biere Republic since we already made reservation there. But for sure, we'll soon be back to The Biere Club again.

Author: Sameeksha Agarwal
Description: A great place to hang out, serving some good beer and grub. After tasting all the beers, we liked stout and lager the most, the former being the best. Also had the bacon wrapped sausages which were obviously awesome, cz what could possibly go wrong with that!

Author: Shailesh Ganeriwala
Description: Located at the corner of the street with full building dedicated to brewery and food. Brewed beer quality is ok but not that great if compared to other breweries of bangalore

Author: Asad Ali
Description:
Wonderful Place for craft beer at a wonderful location near UB City mall. The crowd is fantastic and so is the ambiance. The atmosphere is awesome. 

Coming to their service, a very courteous and prompt staff. The food and drinks are wonderful too.

Author: Shobhit Shankar
Description:
Nyc ambience...especially the tall chairs at the corner...

The food was great..

Love to visit again...

Author: Raghuvinder
Description:
Good place.
Awesome ambience.
They need to learn to make " Bloody Mary " though.
It was so watery. HATED IT.
Minus that, decent food, good options and yeah, wheat beer is genius :-)

Author: Vikas Sharma
Description: Went out with a few colleagues on a Friday night.. The ambience is pretty good, had their wheat beer which was good, for food had the non veg platter which was pretty good as well as the Onion rings.. Good place to hang out with friends on weekends... Slightly heavier on the pocket..

Author: Carolyn Theresa Simon (alittlebitofcaro)
Description:
Beer Lovers Paradise!
It's true what they say, "Beer makes everything better".
Located down the road from UB City, it's a wooden structure of sorts that's sure to catch your eye. 
Step in and you're deafened for a moment, I still can't figure out why, this place has no loud music, but it's just extremely loud, you would in and all you hear is blah here, blah there, to me just blabber.
I still haven't figured out why though? Does something about the place make people talk louder? Or maybe it could be one extremely loud speaker and everybody else in the room trying to speak louder than him. Hmm I'll leave this discussion for my next visit.
Coming to the best part- freshly brewed frothy goodness- we tried all their samplers and I must say, they have some very interesting flavors- Cucumber and coriander flavored beer, well that's definitely a first for me.
Loved all their varieties, however all their beers have very little head and I'm told that is not a good thing, I'll leave it to the beer connoisseur's to decide.
The grub - we tried Three Hummus - not very pleased with the quantity of chips, but the flavors were phenomenal. The pizzas are quite nice too.
Service is a bit on the slow side, pricing is decent.
Overall a great place to enjoy some good home brew and a great place to hangout with friends- minus the noise of course.

Author: Pooja D
Description: My Take: 1. Interior - 4.0 /5 2. Ambience - 4.0 /5 3. Service - 4.5/5( Really good service, Impressed)  4. Menu- 4.0/5 5. Food Taste - 4.0/5 6. Presentation of Food - 3.5 /5 7. Food Quantity - 3.7/5 8. Value of Money - 3.8/5 9. Drink Menu (alcoholic) - I don't remember the name of the beers, but order sampler and like almost all of them. They were really smooth and refreshing. Would definitely visit again for beer and ambience.Must visit for people found of craft beer.

Author: Gayatri Ashta
Description:
I have to say, their beers are the smoothest I've ever tasted. Loved the Wheat and Belgian Wit.
They have a good range of food as well. Ordered the sausage wrapped in bacon, and prawn chettinad - both of which were good, but I wouldn't say outstanding.
The sundries tomatoes, mushroom and goat cheese pizza, on the other hand, was scrumptious. Loved every single bite.
We were seated in the smoking section on the second floor, so it was open aired, with low music, lots of loud talking, and heat. They'd tried setting the place up with Antarctica coolers which helped only if you were sitting in front of them.
The waiters were extremely busy and if it wasn't a billable request, they'd most likely forget it. Found myself waiting 10 mins to get a glass of water or a plate.

Go there for the beers

Author: Amruth Talanki
Description:
Being one of the very first brewery in Bangalore, they have definitely set the trend, and believe me they are still up-to the mark till date. Their beers are extremely fresh and amazing flavors, try their beer samplers to choose the right one. If U prefer light beer then I highly recommend the Wheat beer, it's fantastic. We also had potato Wedges and it was a disappointment, they were fried in coconut oil and it spoilt the taste with coconut essence, and the potato was over fried and was too powdery while eating. We also had their Beer Sangria cocktail, it was heaven, a must try for cocktail lovers.

BEER Taste 5/5
Food 3.5/5
Rate 4/5
Ambience 3.5/5
Service 4/5
Quality 4/5
Quantity 4/5

Would I Recommend? Yes.! For Beer lovers, it's a must place.!

Author: Manish
Description:
This was just another regular brewery with an average ambience average food. 4 varieties of brewed beer on the menu and there was a scarcity of veg options. So if you are a vegetarian then be prepared accordingly.
Mushroom cheese ball was good of among the lot and others were regular in taste.

Author: Subhajeet Roy
Description: A fine place at a really good price at Lavelle road...the place got a good ambience and the open air place is good for pool(game) lovers. The food variety is good with some really nice beer stuffs...do try out the lemonade beer cocktail..though it's a light but taste is good.

Author: Anshula Bansal
Description: Went to this place for a friend's birthday...the ambience was good and so was the food..what went wrong was the service..the staff was very rude which kind of spoiled the mood..

Author: Debasish Samantaray
Description: Nice location. Excellent wheat beer. Nothing special about the finger food. Visited multiple times only for their signature wheat beer. Well maintained with 2floors. Most of the time visited during weekdays, but I believe bookings are required over the weekends.

Author: Wolf Pack
Description: You can't beat the location and the fact that they serve draught and variety of craft beers. The ambience is tasteful, staff friendly. Food - just ordered bar snacks but pretty boring fry-em-ups, like one of those privilege lounges at the airport.

Author: Rishikanth Somayaji
Description: I dunno why but when I had gone there with a couple of friends, we got a table near the entrance and the place smelt like shoe (as in the stinky sweaty kinds).I had the wheat beer and loved they glass wear. My friend was a quite a fan of their coasters as well that she flicked them off :PA mundane experience in a costly neighborhood for me.

Author: Pramodh Prashanth
Description: Definitely on the decline. The first microbrewery in Bangalore if I recall right but a far cry from its heyday. Ambience has deteriorated significantly. Food was barely palatable with burned veggies. Hard to get the attention of the staff. Air-conditioning on the hot day was well below par. The beer menu was stopped down but quite good still. Not going back there anytime soon.

Author: Ankita Bhardwaj Singh
Description:
Mujhe peene ka shauk nahi,peeti hu brewery jaane ko...

This place has 6 different kind of breweries(mostly fruity,I felt)(check d photo i hav submitted to know the kinds)

Must try: Hefe Weizen, British brown ale and tropical stout

You can avoid: cucumber coriander beer(it tastes like cucumber water)

Seating: A/c on ground floor while airy one on first floor.

Parking: ample(valet parking)

Music:love it

Plus point: snooker table on first floor

Staff: friendly and well versed with menu(4/5)

Author: Naveen Kumar
Description: Went yesterday for a school reunion hang out. Nice place and good location. The beers were awesome and snacks yummy. No complaints on beers. But faced two issue. The staff in not keen to help a wheelchair bound customer . They seem reluctant and had to ask them repeatedly to help. This was irritating to me. Second there are no ramps so it's not completely wheelchair friendly.

Author: Lopamudra Sarkar (thefatummy)
Description:
My friend who is new to Bangalore and he had this urge to try out the breweries here ! In his short span of stay here, he had already been to many such places and our search for places which both of us haven't been to made us zero in to this place. The Biere Club has the reputation of being the oldest brewery in business and it certainly does live up to it's name. The ambience has a certain old charm to it like those of the Scottish pubs.

My friend who loves beer tasted all the beers and settled for a Stout and Ale as he loved their texture and taste while I settled for a decent cocktail to beat the heat- the Mojito. We ordered a bucket of French fries and the classic Alfredo for the sake of our craving for the creamy and cheesy pasta. The pasta was not cheesy at all and lacked salt and other flavors. We had to add salt, oregano and chilli flakes to infuse some taste to it.

Furthermore, the service was really slow and we had to wait for quite a long time in order to be served soon ! Even a glass of water arrived after 20 minutes ! The place no doubt is quite happening but definitely has to improve a lot in the food and service to live up to it's good old name.

Author: Livika Swu
Description: The best prew place in town😍 I love how this place offers various kinds of brew beer which left me surprised because they were amazing😍 The food was good as well. The space above provides a beautiful view . Beer for life 🍺 Cheers🍻

Author: Ashwin Dewan
Description:
I have been to Biere Club only on a couple of occasions but this place never ceases to fail my expectations what with its amazing beer and great ambience.

So, the last time we went there, we started off by ordering the Ale, Wheat Mojito – so so, Moves Like Jager – although if it was even as half as rocking as its legendary rocker namesake it would have been awesome but average otherwise and the Mock Biere – five stars for innovation as for a moment even I was fooled into thinking it was beer. So, with drinks on the table can food be far behind?

For starters, we had the assorted fries (good presentation but the fries everywhere taste the same to me). In this context, I have to mention that the fries my mom makes at home is simply the best. This was followed by the crisp corn curds (points for innovation) and really tasty as well, the crispy fried chicken wings (done nicely, neither too sweet nor too spicy, but a perfect combination of both tastes which many restaurants and pubs fail to achieve) - good job guys and the grilled chicken pizza which was simply good (ordering this again the next time I go there).

The ambience is perfect, and considering we went on a Monday (don’t judge us, we are not alcoholics, just dat we were suffering badly from Monday work blues and needed a boost), the happy hours was going on and our tired spirits were revived instantly.

The interiors are done really nice although I have seen better ones, especially a certain one in Koramangala which is one of my favourites. But, the food and the service which notwithstanding the occasional letdown has always been a pleasant experience for me, oh…not to forget the beer more than scores high marks from my side. And of course,:) the location being Lavelle Road helps a lot.

Author: Aakanksha Agarwal
Description: One of the most classy places in one of the most classy location. This place has got nice amount of seatings, built on three floors. The interior is pretty and well built. They have pool table , foos ball table , playing which we had lot of fun. The home-brewed beer is quite nice.  Food was nice but service is something they should work on improving. The turnaround time to get the order is high and staff is not really courteous. But overall a good place.

Author: Aditi Gupta
Description:
This place featured in the  microbreweries collection of Zomato, so we decided to give it a try.

Ambiance: 3/5
The 3 storeyed building looks quite welcoming from the outside with a neat look and lights decorating the outer periphery of the balconies. It has a large seating capacity so we managed to find a place even on the crowded Saturday Bangalore night. The inside has a pretty laid back feel and looks like the kind of place where you can easily hang out with friends. You can kill hours here sipping beer esp. on the middle floor which has a pool table and foosball table.

Food & Drinks: 2.5/5
The taste, portion size and presentation of the food was decent. What disappointed us was the beer. For a microbrewery, the taste of the beer wasn't upto the mark.

Service: 2.5/5
Maybe because it was a Saturday, but it was hard to locate the servers and place your order. Even once placed, the order took a long time to arrive.

Value for Money: 3/5
Although the beer is reasonably priced, their food prices are a little steep.

It was just an okay-ish place. Not worth a revisit.

Author: Shreyas Javahar
Description:
Lounging comfortably, amidst an ambience bearing a stark likelihood to the colonial era and with vats of beer being brewed, you can't help but impetuously embrace the vibe of the place.
The ale here is my favourite. Thoroughly in line with my surmisal of ale.
The chilly coriander spicy chicken goes swimmingly with some good beer. Tremendously spicy, but not overwhelming, tender chicken; certainly an ardent companion of the humble beer.
The lamb kibbeh sliders were quite disappointing. I've had good kibbeh only once before. Everyone seems to fail at infusing some nice flavour into them. The kibbeh were pretty dry and as mentioned before, didn't pack enough punch.
The Indian lamb seekh was lovely. Richly flavoured and nice and greasy. Not the best seekh I've had but pretty good nonetheless.
Finished the meal with the stodge cake; sticky, molten and oozing bales of delightful chocolate. Needless to say, we ended the meal on a high note.

Author: Varshitha Reddy
Description: I went there twice so far and it was okay I heard the beers are good since I m not a beer person and I don't drink so I really can't comment on that . But my friends liked the place. I had ordered for a non-veg platter am not sure about the name though . But it was good.

Author: Pal_Foodie
Description: We were bar hopping and reached here in the end. Their beer options were quite decent, open air seating was amazing in the bangalore weather and the pool table was entertaining along with their music which was not too catchy. Maybe another time I will have a better experience.

Author: Rahul Jacob
Description: Went to this place with great expectations. Tried Belgium beer - good, stout - good, Ale - good. Tried potatoes wedges - salty & pathetic,  worst one ever tried. Ordered twice though by mistake, and they didn't cancel order. Nachos was good - veg. But will still rate bad due to customer service. Can't cancel potato wedges, that's pathetic. Will not come here again but people who enjoy beer should try the place. Can't rate for service as when I am drunk don't like no for an answer when I am paying. Will not visit this place until someone else is paying. But those guys need to learn customer service. SAD.

Author: Ronit
Description: Nice place. Good relaxing ambience, though the music was a loud considering that we went at 6 in the evening. Beers were decent with very  reasonable pricing.

Author: Hemant
Description:
The place is buzzing in evening as well. We visited at around 5 and the place had startEd to get busy.

The beer choice selection is good with on the house beers as well as selection of good cocktails And mocktails.

I would think the waiters could be better be aware of the menu. Strangely the veg good platter was more exciting as compared to non veg

Author: Roshan Pai
Description: I don't drink so my review may be a little out of place here, besides the fact that a lot of people don't seem to care for food at a pub. Being the foodie that I am, I will say that this place serves up some fantastic food, and the first time was so great that I went back for more yummy food, and wasn't disappointed in the slightest. Their pizzas are very well-made, although the caramelized onions seemed extremely sweet. The mutton pepper and fish & chips are absolutely divine (they use frozen Basa though, sadly). Even the ambiance, staff, and service is very very nice, the fish and chips presentation blew me away. Will definitely be coming back for more in the near future.

Author: Ashwin Kumar
Description: I have always loved this place and keep going back.  The collection of beers is really great and the place has a great vibe to it. The pool table on top is added benefit and one can relax and play a few frames of pool by sipping a beer by the side. The service is prompt, the staff are friendly and also give you recommendations on which beer to choose based on your liking !

Author: Sarishti Katyal
Description:
As soon as I got to know that this is the first microbrewery in south India, I simply had to visit this place. With 3 floors and a rustic ambience, this place is a great option for beer lovers. The ground floor is pretty quite compared to the upper floors, where we have Foosball and pool (playing these is even better when you are high! ;) )
Their beer was decent. We tried their wheat and blonde, along with nachos, fries, chicken wings and chilli chicken, and weren't disappointed. All in all a good hangout place if you want to try a new brewery and haven't been to this one.

Author: Reshma Raju
Description: Biere club, I like you for your cozy informal ambience, and your friendly staff. Your food was alright, but the beer was better. I strolled in on a Sat night and it turned out to be a  good night. That's a lot of space you've got in there, and maybe I'll come back with more friends and try the Karaoke bar upstairs. Thank you for a great experience!

Author: Naveen Suresh
Description: Following a new trend is something quite common these days in every city and partying late nights on Friday and Saturday’s are becoming a mandatory duty for most of the folks in the town. In Bangalore, it’s restricted to 1am at most of the pubs & restaurants, but people still go home and party with friends till morning! I have so many friends who do that every weekend.

Author: Sukhada Apte
Description:
The location and look of the place is very cozy and inviting. We found the beer to be very average. We sampled all 6 beers and decided to settle for a glass of ale and lager. The stout could be creamier and the wheat ale and weizzen bock could also be better. We ordered nachos with refried beans and the nachos tasted like Doritos at the end. That was a disappointment.
The staff was very friendly and the service was prompt.

Author: Ankitha Rathore
Description: Amazing club special beer. This is a microbrewery so the beers are brewed in house. Out of all the food that we ordered the Morrocan spicy chicken was the best. Loved it. This place is good to hangout with friends. The ambiance is nice with the outdoor seating and the service was pretty fast.

Author: Shatabdi Shatabdijana07
Description: The kication is excellent and the ambience is very jolly or can say happening.my fav is wheat beer and tge stuff mushroom.the service is very good. They are very friendly. Surely be back once i m in bangalore.

Author: Naynesh Pasari
Description:
We were staying in chancery pavilion hotel and this place is 10 minutes walk from there. Spread over 3 levels , they have 6 beers on tap of which only 2 were available. They charge for beer tasting which we found a bit odd considering we ordered a pitcher too. Unless you try what's on offer how does one decide?
Coming back to food - it's really good. My friends has the chicken and fish options , the Mediterranean chicken is lip smacking so are the wings!!
Wheat beer is good. Overall a chic and fun place to hang out!

Author: Akshay Krishna
Description:
What a wonderful place this is for beer! One of a kind brewery! 🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺🍺
I've never had the food here so won't comment on that but this is the best place for beer lovers. My favourite one was the wheat beer they had. It's better than any other wheat I've had in the whole of Bangalore.
That being said, one must call and ask them if they have wheat beer or any beer you like available before showing up.

The crowd is always pouring so making prior reservations will be a good idea if you need a table.

Downside of this place is the manager or whoever received me at the door ( bald grumpy guy ) was very rude, unresponsive and of no help what so ever.

All that kept aside wonderful place centrally located in the poshest locality of Bangalore right next to a Lamborghini showroom!
Can't wait to go back there again! 🍻

Author: Himanshu
Description:
I often wondered what this place would be like......it has quite a reputation as Bangalore's very first Microbrewery. I was happy to finally have the chance to find out.

There are so many swanky new bars and pubs in the city.....but It was good to find that the Biere Club had a simple, kind of old fashioned charm to it. We decided to sit upstairs.....the smoking part which is open on the sides. We ordered a lager and an ale, and both were good.

The food, though, was just about average. We ordered the chicken wings...these were a bit soggy and there was not enough of the blue cheese sauce that accompanies it. The bacon wrapped sausages were better...I liked the mustard that went with it. We also had a pizza .. With ham salami and chorizo (I do like my meats!)..... This was ok...but not that exciting. For desert we tried the chocolate stodge cake with ice cream...once again, not great.

I wish their food could be better and fresher. Will I return? I'm not sure...but I did like the atmosphere so I might just.

Author: Nikunj Radhu
Description:
I had a misfortune of having gone to Biere Club on 19th March with a bunch of friends after a game of cricket! And how we reget going there !! Pathetic pathetic service, the waiters were all busy chatting amongst themselves rather than looking after the guests, even after constant reminders. Water was served after almost 3 reminders and that too only bottles were given since they could not find "glasses" to serve water into...can one imagine ? There were flies all around, no air circulation at all, the place is in a mess.
This was perhaps my last trip to the Biere Club, never again I wish to step into that place. Good luck, Biere Club!

Author: Sapna Kapoor
Description:
Good Biere , good food. Wonderful place to relax and enjoy.
We ordered starters- some crispy corn dish, pizza and fries.
Pizza was ok ok.
Fries and crispy corn dish was good.
Overall a good experience.

Author: Manaswini M
Description:
Nice interiors and good food!!! And they've some really unique cocktails!
It's a great place to chill with a bunch of friends.
Would go back.

Author: Devika
Description:
What i tried : fettuccine tossed with olive oil garlic lemon chili and parsley

The lightest pasta i have ever had (might be due to my lack of experience) , but it was amazing :D 

Great ambiance of course. Would totally visit again.

Author: Karthigeyan Balasubramaniam
Description: Wonderful atmosphere , prime location , awesome varieties, good service and what not ... One of my best favourites.. Wheat beer with potato wedges is what I prefer .. Do not miss mozarilla pizza... Very yummy.. If you have brought ur own vehicle, make sure u call a call driver.. Cos cops right in front with hawk eyes.. Cheers

Author: Vikram Singh
Description: If you wish to host people it's the place to be. The second floor has a host called praveen. Make sure he takes care of you. Order the jumbo platter.

Author: Soumya Prakash
Description: So, me and my friend were just passing by this place and we had a sudden craving for beer. So, we immediately decided to grab a beer before going somewhere else. The place was not that crowded, even though it was sunday evening. We ordered the seasonal beer, which was strawberry flavoured. I dont usually like beer, but this one was really good. Also, the ambience of this place was really good, quite spacious. The staff was also cordial. Next time, would like to try out other stuff on the menu as well :)

Author: Karthik
Description:
First of the Brewery in Town was The Biere Club and it was quite a while that I went there for a drink. So last weekend to beat the heat, few of our colleagues made our way to Biere Club early evening. Called Up & made reservation and the table was ready. Our gang expanded and we requested for a bigger table & we were asked to move to the second floor. After a brief hiccup & altercation we got our tables.

The whole agenda for us was to try EVERY Beer. Started of with Ale & Larger, which for me were the best beers for the day. Wheat, Stout & Club Special were next in line with Club Special being the strongest of them all. It certainly lived up to the alcohol level. The beer which we didn't like was the Strawberry flavored one. It was very peculiar combination & bad on the palette.

To go along with the Beer we ordered Nachos, Roasted Potato, Cheese Garlic Mushroom, Veg Kabab Platter, Mutton Pepper, Moroccan Chicken & Assorted Fries. The Vegetarian Department was TASTY with Cheese Garlic Mushroom being the standout dish. I'm not a huge fan of Mushrooms but this was excellent. The word across the table for Non Veg Starters was also positive.

The service was pacey and beers were always served chill. As the day prolonged & the place got packed, the service still didn't dip. You except the food items to reach the tables a bit late, but the staff tried their best to be organized to deliver quality service.

Overall, it turned out to be an excellent evening for all of us. Had a wonderful evening with chilled beer & sumptuous food. We all being accountable citizens booked cabs & reached our destinations :-) Will certainly be back again at The Biere Club.

Cheers,
Karthik

Author: Anshita Sharma
Description:
Eggabomb - must have.
Veg Nachos with cheese and the non veg platter is quite delicious and goes well with the drinks.
I like the interiors.

Author: Alan Valerian Rodrigues
Description:
Went on sunday noon as I wanted to try this brewery. Food and beer was good but the service was pathetic. We tried to call the waiters and no1 really took our orders, maybe coz we were 3 bachelors.

Belgian ale, lager beer and seasonal beer all 3 beers were good. Fish and chips dish and bacon sausage are the food items we tried.

Food-4.5/5
Service -0.5/5
VFM -3/5
ambiance 2/5

Author: Arunima
Description:
Went here to watch Ind-Pak match with school friends. Though we had booked a table in the coming zone in advance, the table that we were allotted was too high and not comfortable . The TV initially had issues and we thought we won't get to watch the match... In the end it was fixed , thank God ! The smoking zone has open windows but they are not enough to drive out blore's heat, so after sometime the place stated to feel stuffy. Nevertheless the beer was cold and soothing and made up for the other flaws. We sampled the stout, which was a bitter-sweet Coconut Porter but dint like it much. The Belgian strong ale and the wheat ale were good.

We had 3 'buckets' of assorted fries , some crispy chicken wings, onion rings, Caesar salad and a sea food pizza. The food is OK, not extremely good. But overall the experience was good, specially as India defeated Pakistan in the WT20 match. I still prefer the Whitefield branch which is open and much more airier...

Author: Theimpulse Capsule
Description: Its a great place. The crowd too is quiet sorted. Saturday night, this place is blasting with people. The beers served are good. Food was good too, their portions are quiet nice. All in all a good feel: -)

Author: Bo Kotian Lund
Description: Sadly one of these places which started on a high, but since seems to live high on the established brand. Service are sometimes non existing, often understaffed. The beers various so much in quality, would recommend them to go with a few standards and less experimenting. Value for money is low.

Author: Phenomenal World
Description:
One of my go to places for craft and flavored beer, I usually start off with their sample though I know my clear fav. The Shoot at sight cocktail is pretty good as well. Starters, spicy ground beef with melted cheese along with their wood fired pizza (any one is fine!!)

For the main course I like the Cajun rub grilled fish fillet, homemade tortellini, pork chops, lamb chops, beef tenderloin and their beef burger is pretty pretty awesome. Mind you these are not all single sitting but the result of occasional trips :)

Price on the higher side but have a couple of pints and it wont matter anymore !!:)

Latest update as of 19 Mar 2016 - Had their 4 cheese pizza, ,Mediterranean pizza, veg and non-veg kabab platter, bites non veg platter, corn in curds. All scrumptious and soul filling. In crafted beer I had something called Smoked Pineapple based on recommendation of it being seasonal.. Avoid it at all cost!! It did nothing on the palate other than to spoil the rich taste of the Belgium strong I had before and further disappoint with its bland tones and feel

Author: Chandrakant Govindarajulu
Description: Visited this place on 13th. Very nice place to be there, beer is good, food is good, ambience good and waiters are polite and serve you well. Good time spent and looking forward to visiting again

Author: Naresh
Description:
Visited this place last week as a part of microbrewery hopping..

Ambience
This place can be easily identified as it is present at the corner ofthe road..
The corner tables of the ground floor gives an excellent view of the road where hifi cars zoom past quiet sometime..
This place has 3 floors in total out of which ground floor is non smoking area..
Interiors are good but feels little aged..
The chairs here felt very comfortable..
This place can accommodate different group sizes easily..

Drinks
We tried almost all the available flavours in this place.
I personally liked the Belgian strong ale and my friend liked the stout..
The strawberry flavoured one is on the sweeter side..
Personally it is just another microbrewery in Bangalore..
The hype of first brewery in Bangalore just remains in the air..
Also beer seems to be over priced..

Food
We tried chicken nachos and some chicken starter..
The taste of the nachos was similar to the one we get in packets in shops.. (this is my personal opinion)
There are few other places which serve better quantity and taste for the same price..
The chicken starter was ok..
Fish and chips was served in paper cones which was also good..

For the main course we had pizza and I would say it was the best among all the other items we had here..

Food options is actually limited.. They have to rework on the food menu in my opinion..

Overall
Every thing seems to be over priced due to the locality I guess..
Just felt it as another brewery..

Author: Chrisma Lobo
Description: in short.. I Loved it! Visited this place with the family, and starting from the ambience, to the quality of food, and the service, everything was great. My 5-year-old nephew seemed to be running around the place with curiosity, however, the staff was very friendly and also offered him a glass of cranberry juice which gladly brought a big smile on his face. Yes I do agree that the prices are high, but when we look at the location of the restaurant, there would be no point of argument. The quality of beer was great. Cheers guys! will definitely drop by again. :)

Author: Manish Sen
Description:
Ambiance was good. The beer was chilled and the taste hit my taste buds directly. Mr. Parveen was very friendly and the service was quick. Good job Biere club team. Keep it up! Looking forward to visit again and again. :)
P.S. This was my first visit to a Beer club in Bangalore. It was awesome!

Author: Vr-88
Description: The original and perhaps the best brew. Excellent finger food, Pizzas and platters and all you need over fresh beer. never a letdown. But music can improve.

Author: Aakash
Description: The restaurant has a nice ambience and decent crowd to enjoy within. The second and third floor of the restaurant has much more aura than the first floor. The service can be and should be much more efficient and fast as the people coming there expect it to be. Overall the experience was good.

Author: Manishbb
Description:
What an excellent choice on the menu - Chinese, Mexican, Indian and Lebanese. Lots of snacks food with or without the beer.
The beers brewed in house - large choice fresh and great choice, I had the lighter larger.
Good service and good crowd. A bar decor and the brewing process can be seen front the first floor.
Would definitely come again and would highly recommend a visit.

Author: Utkarsh Anand
Description: We were taking a stroll in lavell road when we came across this place. We decided to check it out. It was around 3pm so we did not expect a good crowd. And the place was nearly empty. But the ambience was awesome!! We played pool and foosball and the beer was just yummy!! Would definitely like to go there in the evening once. A must go place!
