Author: Parishmita Gogoi
Description:
Visited bierre club for some quick beer and bites while at Lavelle road!

We ordered for fish and chip cones, spicy mutton pepper. The spicy mutton was cooked with curry leaves , pepper in coastal style which was good! The fish and chips were served to us in bierre club paper cones and a white tartar dip!

Was a nice place to visit! Would love to try the mains there!
Ambience 4/5
Food 4/5
Beer 3/5
Service 4/5

Author: Hemant Patni
Description:
Being 5 years in Bangalore and didn't visit this place was a miss from my side..
Place is awesome
Food is awesome
Drinks, no doubt awesome
Will visit soon again..

Author: Ojasvi Bhardwaj
Description:
Sudden plan is what got us to this place . I have been waiting to try their flavored beer for a long time - well YES. We went ahead and placed our order for the strawberry flavored one. I personally think it was smooth and nice. The strawberry taste lingers in the mouth with every sip. Although we did not order anything to eat , my updated review will surely have that segment next time.
The level 1 is non smoking area and well level 2 is the smoking zone . The location is spot on with a view of beautiful roads and cruising cars. On the whole I loved being there along with my friend. We had a nice time.

Author: Gaur
Description: The Beer 'Biere' club offers you a whole different variety of Beers. Pick your taste and kick off the evening. Very well dimly lit ambience, with ample seating, and off-course the food tastes great. Try their freshly backed thin crust pizzas and cheesy nachos. Ample seating in smoking zone too. Clean restrooms (a hard to find thing at most pubs / lounges).

Author: Blessy Issac
Description: One cannot not go to biere club and not love their beer. My fav here is the long island iced tea. But today for my change we were given a twist to the classic drink called the long island iced beer. A strong one and a long lasting one. The food today we ordered was the non-veg platter and the sausage wrapped with bacon where the latter was absolutely crispy and delicious. I love biere club for their hospitality and absolutely adore Mr. SHYAM our bar tender who pours our drinks to bot get us drunk but to fill our hearts with love for the place and the beverage. Biere club is a home away from home!

Author: Sam
Description: Clearly living in its past glory is how to best describe The Biere Club. Now that Bangalore has so many microbreweries this place clearly has not kept up. Beer is Ok, still many others places are far better. The food sucks both in terms of quality and quantity. What they charge makes it a complete rip-off! Steer clear of this place, as the management is clearly fleecing its customers!

Author: Deepika Chandak
Description: The place and food needs serious renovation. Thin crust veg pizza tasted like crispy paratha. Veg nachos had some weird bitterness to it.  Veg hummus and pitta bread portion had a variety of three different types of hummus given with flat bread and tapioca chips but none of it was interesting enough for 6 ppl to finish it up. Even a simple potato wedges wasn't rite.

Author: Rajesh Ramaswamy
Description:
Been here few times...like the atmosphere and ambience.....beers of course.
Food not so much variety ... basically not a place for full meals but finger food and starters etc
Staff can be a little more attentive, they seem bored and not too keen......

Still overall may visit this place due to convenient location and ambience

Author: Foodie_by_hobby
Description:
Refrain this place during non-peak hours since the service is dead slow. We ordered 3 pitchers and few mocktails and also check on the starters. Tastes real good. We ordered all veg starters and the one with platters are good. Cheese balls can be tried. The nachos also tasted good.

For 5 the bill came up to 3900.

Author: Vishag Asokan
Description: One of the best brewery I've ever been to that served exceptionally good beer . The Beer was really chilled and was worth the cash . The ambience was also very neat and attractive . The place one would definitely revisit once again !

Author: Kunal Vanjare
Description:
This one is located in the uber-posh junction of Lavelle Road & Vital Malya Road, a 2 minute walk away from UB City. So this place is quite frequented by corporates & expats.

We're big fans of craft beer and have tried a few in Bangalore, Mumbai and Pune.

They have two levels, theres an indoor AC section on the ground floor above which is an open roof section. We chose to occupy the open air section.

They had 6 Beers on tap. Sadly they had run out of Belgian Wit, which almost always is the first brew we try. So we went for the All Malt which was a Dark bodied Stout with that typical taste of coffee. Much in-line with these offerings at other microbreweries. Though it felt a bit flat & could have done with some more bitterness. All beers come in 3 sizes, 330ml, 500ml & 1Ltr.

They have a few indoor games like a Pool table & Foosball. The one major negative of our experience here was the service which was very poor indeed.

Overall, they have the most envious location in town and do well in most things such as a lively pub atmosphere and some decent beer. Service has to be a lot better though.

Author: Akshay Pandey
Description: The beer is really good. The food is very average considering the price we are paying for it. The chicken items specially aren't that great. Should go only for the beer experience.

Author: Ruta Muley
Description:
If you’re looking for a break from boring office lunches or just want to indulge in a delicious lunch outing with colleagues, the Biere Club, touted as South India’s first craft brewery, introduces The Work Lunch, which is a fitting meal for corporate on the go. Take a quick look at the menu and you will know that the work lunch is no-frills, but a crisp and satisfying meal that has all the ingredients for a seamless business lunch. 

The offering includes a choice of Indian curry with multiple options like the steaming-hot Pork Vindaloo, Punjabi Chicken Makhani, Spicy Fish Curry, Creamy Palak Paneer, Vegetable Jalfrezi and lots more, each served with steamed rice, tawa paratha, and the dal of the day, assorted accompaniments and a glass of freshly rewed ale, wheat, stout or house mocktail.

Author: Manik Pandita
Description:
Amazing place to hangout with friends and family..

Excellent beer coupled with great service and outstanding ambience... A totally different experience.
The place must be on ur list if you are a part freak.

Author: Jayakrishnan Sureshbabu
Description: Love this place!! Amazing beer and amazing food.. Wish they weren't bluffing about the tables being not available and pushing people (especially if the count is 2 and less) towards the bar counter.. The pizza samosa is a must try!

Author: Gowrav Shenoy
Description: I have visited this place twice for events and once with friends. They have 3 floors but it does get crowded during weekends. I visited once on weekday and the service was pretty quick. The ambiance is nice and so is the beer. I loved their light beers. The pizza and the veg options were really good. I visited this place when I was not so active on Zomato so I do not remember the exact names of dishes that I had but I do remember that it was good and I wouldnt mind visiting again.

Author: Swetha Mahesh
Description: Would have gone to this place like multiple times since it started. My husband s a beer person and this s one of his fav brew club. Food was always average. But the location n ambience get its marks always. But the last time we went here we notice that it has lost its charm. They should definitely take a step in maintaining the place, like the furniture n lighting!

Author: Bijoya
Description: Visited on 13th night.. Very smooth beer(ll give you slow reaction), awesome ambience and jet speed service. Food and drinks, both are price worthy.

Author: Bhargav Murthy
Description: *I've asked for the menu 25 mins back*  we are bar hopping at the moment  the first stop over was at the biere club. Past experiences was the reason to start off here, things have changed now the service is really gone down below acceptable standards.* I'm still seated upstairs waiting for the menu * "hope I get the menu before the cheque"

Author: Abc098
Description: Was in Bangalore a few weeks ago and had heard a lot about the microbrewery scene there so decided to check it out. Tried the ale and the special. The special wasn't exactly very 'special' but was decent. The ale was not exactly what an ale should be. The food was pretty average too. Had a fish and a chicken dish. The real problem are the timings though. You're almost kicked out at 11!!

Author: Ab Dv
Description: Certainly one of my most favourite place in bangalore. One of the first place in bangalore to be serving brewed beer and easily the best of the lot. Good music, good crowd, good beer and good food. Have visited this place a couple of times and I have not been disappointed.

Author: Tina Chowhan Merchant
Description: Rating 3.5 only for the place. Love the way its done up. No great variety in food. Beer is supposed to be really good but not a beer person to comment.

Author: Suraj V
Description: Biere club. One of the best brew pub with a classy crowd. I loved the beers here. Very tasty and crafted to perfection. Almost all the drinks available and they have a very good menu for the food lovers too. The service is just amazing. One visit to this place will make you come here every week. The crowd in the evening is mostly corporate and classy. So its a peaceful place to chill out. Even though on the pricey side compared to most brew pubs. Its worth every rupee you spend. Highly recommended place this is.

Author: Sowmya Reddy
Description:
Nice cool place to hang out with friends and delicious finger food to drink with your beer. Other than that there is nothing special about the place unfortunately. Service is rather slow but the waiters are real friendly and sweet. They made a nice pomegranate and green apple vodka based cocktail for us, which had the right amount of vodka and sweetness to it.
The next day I ordered for the same they were unable to get it right, it was too sweet. They just had 3 varieties of beer 😕

Author: Sanchita Wahi Lobo
Description:
Pretty big fan of their terrace and its view. Their kebab platters and beer drinking platters are pretty insane and filling. Personally, I like their shooters and cocktails a lot as I'm not a big beer drinker.

It also helps that they have an amazing team of staff. Makes you want to keep going back! It was a spot in a pub crawl I organised, and we weren't disappointed! Thumbs up!

Author: Dipti
Description: Amazing food and beer. Each floor has an unique ambience and vibe to it. One of the very few good places where it is easy to get a table on weekends. Pizza samosas are a must try!

Author: Ankit Verma
Description: We had met here for a reunion , the place is quiet crowded during the weekend so if you are planning to go please reserve your seats. Coming to the food , it is quiet good and the services on the drinking menu is fast.

Author: Rohit Singh
Description: Went there at Sunday evening was surprised to see the place was pretty empty, place is situated near UB City in Lavelle Road. Ambiance of the place is okayish nothing special, to make it worse the choice of music was bad!!!, only good thing they had is a Foosball table. Service is horrible staffs are confused one of the items which order wasn't served to us and even the food which you order was served too late. Coming to Food we ordered Chicken Nachos which was awesome with melted cheese it was perfect..chili coriander chicken was moderate which was served with a dip. We also tried hot & spicy marry which was so spicy :) that whatever you drink before was compensated with this mocktail :)

Author: Harshy
Description:
Taste(Food&Beer) 4.5/5
Ambience 4.5/5
Service 4/5
Value For Money 3/5
Overall 16/20

Verdict- This is Bangalore's first craft brewery.
The food tastes really good especially with the cold beer. The mixed platter, the pizzas & the veg platter are all good.
The ambience is nice and relaxed.
The service is slow even when the place is not crowded, which could test your patience.
The prices are not so high but the add ons sure are high & so adds up to the same thing.

Author: MK
Description:
While the food is good and the beer is drinkable, the service that we received was absolute nonsense. Maybe being the first microbrewery in south India has gotten to their head. The manager was absolutely rude and lectured us on the difference between fine dining and casual when we inquired about why the table we were promised would free up in "mnimum 15 minutes" (how clever!, how devious!) wasn't free even after two hours. This led to an argument, and he continued to give me and my girlfriend the stare while we walked out. 

Will not visit again.

Author: Prablo
Description: Good service. Nice food and a great place to sit and gulp beer :) located at one of the best places.....music is not that great. Decent crowd  even on a Friday noon.. Will be back soon :)  TY TBC

Author: Ebin John
Description:
The first Microbrewery in town and a very accessible one. Sits next to the UB City in Lavelle road.

The Ambiance - Nothing special about the ambiance. The moment you get inside, you're very families with the theme and the atmosphere. 

The Beer - The beer is good. I couldn't find a reason to dislike the beer. But I'm sure I had better ones :)

The Food - Enjoyable. It has a warm flavor and you will find your taste in the menu as it has a lot verities. But again, they're not exceptional.  

Will I go again ? Well, I'm not sure. I don't find this place exceptional. A one time visit will satisfy you.

Will I recommend ? Yes. You can visit this place once.

Author: Vinay Bvk
Description:
Me and my friends usually don't visit places for the second time in a short span of time.. which is quite obvious to indicate Biere Club lives up to that expectations..

Good attentive guys to attend to you.. Great self brewed Wheat beer.. Infact, one of my friends who was visiting us from the UK noted that the beer was one of the best he had tasted... Kudos guys..

Author: Nilesh Arbat
Description: Wanted to go to this place from ages. Went on Saturday evening. Its generally crowded so table reservation recommend. We tried all beers but I think wheat beer was good. In food we tried chicken wings, finger chips, pizzas. Every thing was about average. Staff is good. It's a good place for outing with friends.

Author: Anuj Parti
Description: A pretty empty place right in the evening..inspite of that the service was pitts. Needed a reminder for just everything..there are loads of nice places than having to repeat this. Food: very average. Beer: limited.

Author: Chaitra Sagar
Description: I was there for a Stand Up show and enjoyed both the show and the food. The food is delicious, although I will pick fault with the rather small portions. The staff very courteous and didn't bother us even when we stayed well beyond the last call. I enjoyed the experience of The Biere Club.

Author: Nakul Jain
Description:
The Restaurant charged me Rs 1.8L instead of Rs 1800 on debit card. No remorse No regret ... its been 48hrs no reversal and they are least bothered. 

This was simply Pathetic on their part.

Author: Siddharth Sarawgi
Description: Had dropped in with a friend. The Beer wasn't that good (read Flat) and when I asked our server , was told that's a fresh Keg and that's how beer is supposed to be! Very enlightening, indeed. Doubt if I would visit again.

Author: Nupur Kulkarni
Description: Heard a lot about it so came here for a quick lunch before taking a flight back to Mumbai. Fantastic food and a great variety of brewed beers. A must go to if you are a beer and cheer lover. Keep it up!

Author: Shashank Prasad
Description: One of the best places to get fresh brew with amazing array of platters and best made sauces on food...technically sign off on a different high every time you check in this place ...

Author: Hans Peter Pinto
Description:
The best place for a freshly brewed beer, the beer is amazing. Came down here with a fellow Josephite post the annual re-union.
We had booked the table in advance, we were welcomed with a broad smile, staff were really courteous and friendly,helped us with selecting the beer and food.
Sooper music,simple ambience, good crowd most of the times.
Beer's
*Blonde Ale
*Plus Lite
*Weizen bock
*Spicy Ale
*Stout.
All the above were different,weizen Bock being the choice above all.
Food-
*BBQ pork Ribs
*Chilli coriander chicken
*Ham and salami chorizo pizza
*Chicken drumstick twoways- Cilantro and wild red chilli
Overall experience-5/5
Quantity 3.5/5
Cleanliness-5/5
Ambience -5/5
Service 5/5
The pizzas and chicken drumsticks two way is a must try.

Author: Sandeep Laik
Description:
A perfect joint at the perfect point. That's how I'd describe it. Placed at a stone throw's distance from UB city and at the cross point of Lavelle road this place is ideal for the breakout buddies.

The food is flat out average, noting fancy but you definitely get what u pay for. The ambiance is a mix breed of classy and casual so you can walk in and not worry about your office wear / Saturday casuals. Service is definitely good, been there more than once to know it's not a coincidence. They do take care of patrons well.

Overall a good after hours hangout. and my personal thanks for the mock-a-beer which has saved me on those days I wasn't feeling like drinking much.

Author: Shobhit Khandelwal
Description:
Went there on a Sunday afternoon with 2 friends. Decent crowd, not much. We choose to have seats on 1st floor, window seat :) You get the outside view as well, while having your food and drinks.

Food and Drinks: 4/5
We ordered veg and cheese seekh, veg nachos, and a veg pizza. All the food items were really good.
Drinks: Its always a personal choice, and for what we ordered obviously had the same taste as usual/ as at other any other place.

Ambience: Good - 3.5/5
Decnet crowd, Light Music, they have a snooker table as well. And if you are lucky might get to sit on the window seats.
Suggestion: The place is not that big, so I guess it must be really crowded on weekend nights, and hence a reservation is advised.

Service: 2.5/5
This is one thing which really disappointed us. We had to signal for the waiter multiple times, and at one point of time, I actually went and asked him to come to the table to take the order. There were just 2 waiters on the 1st floor, and one of them was I guess inexperienced and was struggling to take the order.

Price: Decent, not very costly given the restaurant is on prime location. We had a bill for 2000/- for 3 people on ordering 3 food items and 3 drinks along with samplers.

Overall a good experience, one area of improvement is the service and for that they should keep some experienced/trained people.

Author: Neerav Saluja
Description:
Food: 3.5/5 Ambience: 4.2/5 Service: 4/5 VFM: 2.5/5

We went there on a Saturday evening to spend some quality pub time with friends. Since we didn't know they take reservations too, we barged in just like that.

Note: They don't maintain a waiting list. Told us to go up and wait for a supervisor to allot you a table

However, the supervisor was cooperative enough to join a couple of tables for us since we were a bigger group. The beer is nice, infact among the best few ones in the city I'd say.

The food was also decent but in extremely low quantities. So you end up spending more on food, taking your per head cost high. While the experience is still great, I'd say you can have a much better time spending the same amount elsewhere.

Super cool staff though! Worth visiting once to give it a try. Also try their veg pasta, one of our favorites :)

Author: Smitha Rao
Description: I am not fond of beer and avoid it as much as possible ... But Biere club may be the only place where I would have Beer ... They have varieties where the distinct flavour is discernible ... Though the food is average a good place for beer lovers ...

Author: Alok Agrawal
Description: One of the best place in Bangalore to hang out beer on tap yummy food levvelle junction view top floor corner seat.. Simply awesome must visit...

Author: Geet Malviya
Description: Best place to chill out .. N get crazy drunk as hell 😜😜.. Loved the place .. Had great time . Met many new people .. Good ambience 👍🏻👌🏻😝😝😝😝

Author: Snehil Srivastava
Description: Was here yday for the new year's party. A very evenly managed event I must say. A lot of options in food and everything tasted great. Beer seemed to be little spiked, but that was the case with every other pub in India yesterday. Take the high seats facing Vitthal Mallya road, the best seats to have there.

Author: Nesar
Description:
One of the very first brewery in Bangalore.
Set up in a very nice place, it has some great beer and food to go along with it, The setting is good and nice selection of music! Try the pizzas.

Author: YS Kumar
Description: The original microbrewery in town, but nowhere the best anymore. There's quite  a bit of a drop off in the taste of beer and food. Needs a bit of sprucing up too after 5 yrs in business

Author: Saurabh Araiyer
Description:
This was one of the first breweries of Bangalore. I liked the ambience there.

Beer and pizza is the combination I would like to try again and again :)

Author: Akshay Suresh
Description: The stout here is usually what I get and it's great. The wheat beer is fine too. One of the first micro breweries in bangalore. Centrally located and well connected. The platters are great here. The nachos / wings are good too. I also like the pizzas they make. Generally I try to get myself to be on the ground floor as its more lively here. They have a more sophisticated dining option too at higher levels. Overall a good place for some good beer and food.

Author: SK
Description: Try their chicken drumsticks and platters.. Drumsticks are juicy and covered in yummy masala. Awesome ambience too.. Definitely a good place to hangout with friends..

Author: Rahul Nanda
Description:
I  was recently invited to Bierre Club for the re-launch of their Hangover Brunch. The food was excellent right from the starters to the main course and finally down to the desert 

I ate some interesting starters like Mutton pepper fry, chicken Popcorn, crispy squid and Bacon, Bacon wrapped sausages and a few other things which were all delish.

The mains were also quite amazing.

I had Four cheese pizza, Ham, salami and chorizo pizza and charred sweet peppers and smoked cheese. I

also had Grilled quesadillas, Tenderloin done to perfection, Grilled chicken with grilled vegetables, and penne with a cream sauce amongst others for our main course.

And of course no meal is complete with out desert so I had the cheese cake, Rainbow cake and Brownie with ice cream to close the meal.

All in all a fun filled afternoon with great food and amazing beers. What better way to get set for the Christmas spirit.

Author: Vinitha Vinod Kumar
Description: I know if I ever visit bangalore again, I would come again to bierre club!! The friendly staff is what really makes the ambience - relaxing and fun. I loved the wheat ale but if I was ever on a working schedule I would opt for the stout! I really want to thank the staff for making my visit a memorable one. And for giving me fresh coasters as a souvenir :)

Author: Debolina Ray (sheknowsgrub.com)
Description: To usher in the celebrations of December, Biere Club does an annual event of making their ‘Christmas Brew’. This year, their 4th in a row, they invited a bunch of us for a tour of their brewery, and to talk about this new celebration brew that would be ready in time for Christmas! Biere Club has always been special to classic beer lovers, they are in fact the first microbrewery to be open and functional in Bangalore, and pretty much revolutionized beer drinking. We were called in pretty early in the morning, so that the strong smell of the brew dies out by the time the brunch and lunch parties get in. So just out of bed, rubbing eyes and sitting in cab, I managed to make it to the party just in time.

Author: Saurabh Singh
Description:
Came here a few days back. I was surprised they have three floors. I have been here before but never noticed it. We were seated on the second floor.

It was a Thursday evening so ambiance and crowd was pretty much what I was expecting, a mix of youth and and people in there expensive white shirts discussing some shit over the 'there but not too loud' music.

There beer brews were good.
Service was OK.

For me ,this is definitely one of the places I would love to come back again.

Author: Monika Sanadhya
Description:
This place holds the right for lot of praises but something was missing... hmmm.. Was it a service as our first order took more than 30 mins..The recommended wheat beer does not go well with Pink world (girls) palate. :)

Veg nachos and Cheese Samosas were sumptuous and little different from any other place.

I would love to change my rating to 4 as still optimistic with this place. :)

Author: Devikumar Kelkar
Description: Great place to have a Stout. The wheat beer j felt was a bit sweetish. The ambience is good. Ought to spend more time there. We missed out the live music show as had come quite early. The food was good enough. Chicken wings were classic American. The food is a bit costly though.

Author: Hridhay Rajkumar
Description: Was really disappointed actually.. came here expecting a lot.. the service was really poor.. i ordered a wheat beer and was served something else.. when i returned it and asked for a wheat, they gave me something else again.. we ordered the mezze platter and it had such a small quantity of food.. in general the food quality wasn't great either.. on top of all this the taxes and service charge is really high..

Author: Akash Srikanth
Description: Another of those roads in Bangalore that comes to life during the nights!! This place has a pleasing ambience coupled to the decent crowd that visits this place. The place is expensive but sometimes the happy hours bails you out!.. must visit for a bangalorean!

Author: Santosh Alby
Description:
Great place..gud ambiance... Nice brew.. Decent food. Service was quick enjoyed every bit of it.. The veg platter was amazing with different bites to choose from, wings was a let down as it tasted very sweet. The ultimate winner was the mutton pepper. All in all a nice experience evening spent well wit loved ones n frnds :)

Food : 4/5
Ambiance : 4/5
Service : 4/5
VFM : 3.5/5

Author: Manoj Kumar K
Description:
I was here for "The Christmas Brew" followed by Hangover Brunch on 5th Dec. It was awesome Brew tour! 

They had Hand Crafted Biere's - EPA, PILS LITE, Belgian Wheat, Stout & Session I.RA - Club Special.

I gulped hand crafted Biere Belgian wit, Wheat. This is beer that is brewed with a large proportion of wheat relative to the amount of malted barley, it is usually top-fermented.. This is a very smooth beer...I love this kind of BEER! 

The Mutton pepper is a boneless dish it was not very spicy, well marinated. Must have dishes are: 

1.Bacon wrapped sausage, Kasuadi Mustard. 
2.Veg Pizza (Tomatoes, Mozzarella & Sweet basil)
3.Ham & pineapple pizza 
4.Calamari with beckon
5.Pizza style samosas
6.Onion rings

Ambiance is awesome like a British club, they have seating in the ground plus two floors. In the first floor they have POOL table, one can gulp & play! The Biere Club is at a strategic and happening location. Great service & friendly staff. Great GIG!

Author: Somi
Description: Right at the corner of the road, one would easily spot it. Very nice and rustic, old time club like ambiance. We ordered the Non-veg platter here, loved the Fish and Prawns. They have really nice brewed Beer as well. The Staff is good but the Service is kinda ok. Good music to enjoy while enjoying the entire experience. One of us ordered a Mojito, was not too good but the flavored Beers were really nice.

Author: Nazia
Description: I had earlier been to their Whitefield branch but somehow I liked this one slightly better. The nonveg platter and wheat beer combo can never go wrong. The pepperoni and cheese pizza also lived up to the expectations..

Author: Madhu Ramachandran
Description: LOVE this place.  Great venue for seeing standup comedy, awesome tasty beers on tap including the very elusive 'craft brew stout' which was very tasty.  Staff is very friendly, vibe is non-pretentious, and the noise level and crowd level is more manageable than other brewpubs like Toit.

Author: Giles
Description: Bangalore's very own microbrewery!  Big and airy and easy to find a table. The wheat beer is ok, and makes a nice change from the ubiquitous kingfisher (although no complaints about that!).  At 360 a pint here vs. 100 at bootleggers opposite its pricey. Food is sub-par - standard fried bar snacks prepared without much thought or skill; notably bad was the hummus, but the chicken wings tasted boiled and were covered in sweet cloying gloop and the shrimp popcorn was soggy with a thick batter. 2500 for 2 makes it pricey. What was irritating and unacceptable was the pushy waiter who was un-subtly fishing for an extra tip by pointedly counting out my money and repeatedly pointing out that I'd left the exact amount on the bill, i.e. no tip. When I asked him if this was the point he was trying to make, even though they've added 10% service charge, he said that that goes to the management. Shame on Biere club if that's true, but that shouldn't be my problem - pay your staff, and if you charge service then share it with them.  And I resent the attempt to embarrass me into to tipping twice. Hence the one rating instead of 3.

Author: Apoorav Gupta
Description: A random plan for a beer party took us there. And believe me what a lovely ambience it has.  It looks like a complete Italian architecture with splendid lightning. Just lovely. The outside sitting is just great. Good service and delicious food and pizzazz....

Author: Aradh Pillai
Description:
Good music, good people and great beer.
If you want wheat beer in Bangalore then this is the place you need to come in Bengaluru. The food is not that great you can find better stuff to satisfy your hunger rite opposite at ub city

Author: Anoll Merchaant
Description: The main highlight of the place is fresh beer served from there own Brewer ,amazing place with 2 floors and open to road side with good music and cuisine of Italian and mexician makes the place look so good

Author: Pratik Gami
Description:
Went der on a friday night wid a friend.
Myst say its quite a place. Huge one with three floors matching expectations of love birds, sports lovers, party animals and pure alcoholics (not me).
Ground floor is dinner cum date kinda place, first one is more sort of a sports bar wid pool table n shit, tge too one is a pub I would say.
Great music, great ambience, great crowd and I must say great staff too. Of course being a microbrewery, amazing crafts and ales. Cocktail too are a worth while here.
Food is quite delicious.
And forgot the best part, yet its v cheap.....I mean after all for what u getting u wouldn't have to pay much.

Author: Sonny X
Description: Great beer, good ambiance. A lil pricey in terms of food, but it tastes good. Well set for hanging out with buddies cuz they have a pool table too

Author: Raj K Sekhar
Description:
The Biere Club seems to have been awarded merits by the Bangalore crowd in copious amounts. That is exactly the reason I wanted to visit this microbrewery.

Ridiculously easy to find, bang at the corner of that junction. A reservation was made the previous day, and a hassle free entry even though we were late by 20 minutes on a Saturday night. Ushered into the first floor, which was also an open seating/smoking zone, we were directed to a table right next to the door. Highly uncomfortable seating overall. Even though each table seemed far away from each other, it was intrusional for talking, moving or even just walking past. The huge area dedicated bang in the middle of the hall for a pool table seemed unnecessary. It was like a spotlight placed on every person at every point saying "Look at me! Look at me!" even when you need none of that attention. Haven't seen the other floors, but if this is any representation, then I stand grounded on this opinion.

Solid cardboard gigantic menus were handed to us, one for the food and one for the alcohol. They were ridiculously difficult to handle. The person in charge of the floor, the apparent Maitre d', was extremely helpful and was super with his job. He could point and explain about every drink, provide its variations and add-ons, and even recommend the popular items, which most places would say everything on their menu is good like an over ambitious child. Without this man, that floor is gone. Why you ask? Because apart from one other waiter and this floor manager, the rest are pure rubbish. They do not have manners, take away a chair of our table where our bags were kept and keep the bags right down in the walking path, do not possess any idea of the menu, clear the table when the glass is half full, forget orders, do not deliver after repeated requests, and do not clear empty plates even while delivering a fresh item. Something phenomenal in a negative manner has been guided to the reckless waiters, as if they aren't being paid but forced to work.

We had stopped by for food earlier, so we limited to two servings of Nachos and some Cheese Mushrooms. While the Mushrooms were just fine, the Nachos were delicious! They claimed black beans, but we got none of that. There was a liberal melted dosage of cheese and a dollop of sour cream, on top of the awesomely tangy mixture of salsa and diced additions. Quantity was actually small, but the taste made up for that.

The friend ordered only Rum+Coke and a mocktail, which were termed good enough.

Now, the most important factor - the Beer. I asked the maitre d' for the availability, and the seasonal was off the menu for then. The rest were, and their listing was on the chalk board along with the alcohol content. He recommended I go for their popular Wheat beer, which I did. Ok, the beer wasn't as cold as I would have liked, but the taste was mild and refreshing. Next came the Stout. Wanting to finish off the bitter beer in the beginning, I was surprised to find it had no such taste. This was also mild, but delectable with just the right amount of bitterness. The successive 3 beers, the Special, the EPA and the Lager, were highly disappointing. Couldn't even differentiate between the taste, with the only saving grace being a slight change in colour. The potency of the beers, although mentioned at 4.5-5% only, was incredibly high. At 5 beers each of 500ml, there was a slight buzz indeed, which lacks at almost all places. Should have gone for the samplers of the these three and then decided, but the brilliance of the first two beers threw me off course.

Overall, a golden experience that has been thwarted and denundated by the staff and mediocre options of beer that should have been both bettered at the drawing table itself. Would return much later when options run out and a craving for Nachos and brilliantly smoked Stout beer come together in an alliance.

Author: Naveen Surya
Description:
I'm not a drinker but I like to experience the atmosphere of pubs. So after getting to know that this was the first micro brewery in South India, I was pretty excited to dine here. Went here with quite high expectations and totally disappointed. 

Right from parking, there's absolutely no space for parking here! Had to go way up ahead to park my bike and walk back to the restaurant! Right from the start, our experience was sad. The waiter wasn't welcoming at all! The restaurant was almost empty, It was during lunch time. We humbly asked the waiter for a table where we could dine side by side and not across the table. He put up a face and says he can't because it's lunch time. I mean the restaurant is empty? What could possibly go wrong. After a couple of requests he finally agreed. So our first impression about the place was ruined and so was our hunger. I should've just walked away. What I liked about this place was it's ambience. The wooden decor and the walls were neat! And the brewery didn't smell of beer, so that was a plus for me. 
So, we went ahead and ordered Three hummus - classic, Nachos and a Pineapple mocktail. We weren't happy with the hummus. All of them tasted the pretty much the same. The Nachos with beans and melted cheese was yum!(the only pro other than the ambience) The Mocktail however, didn't have any taste of Pineapple. After all this, I was bombarded with a bill of 905/-. 
I'm never heading back to this place. Customer service is key in any restaurant to have people come back. Which this place failed to deliver.

Author: Anvesh Reddy Pusapati
Description:
Table and ambiance : 2.5
Presentation: 3
Feel of the food : 4
Quantity : 3
Level of cooking : 3.5
Service : 3
Value for money : 2.5
Parking : yes
Disabled Friendly : No
Best Nachos

Author: Anvesh Reddy Pusapati
Description:
Table and ambiance : 3
Presentation: 3.5
Feel of the food : 4
Quantity : 3
Level of cooking : 4
Service : 4
Value for money : 3
Parking : yes
Disabled Friendly : NO

Author: Kaustav Mukhopadhyay
Description: Good ambiance in reasonable price. Good lighting. There was no air condition when I went this November which was fine. It would have been great if the place smell fresh. Food quality and quantity is good compared to the price. And if you are a smoker you should head straight to second floor which also has a pool table. They play good music. And the staff are friendly. They have prompt service.

Author: DInakar Reddy
Description:
I did not like the beers as much as I liked in other micro breweries. For me they tasted almost like the bottled ones. I like the ambience and the food was good. I had ordered for Jumbo platter and it was more than enough for 5.

Taste and quality - 6/10
Ambience - 7/10
Pricing - 6/10
Service - 9/10

Author: Souvik Mitra
Description:
I went on Monday 23.11.15 had a stout an ale and a club special..music,ambience,service is awesome.. steward Das served me at table 23..in food i was looking for PORK but as Das said that they dont have the stock for the day so I ordered for Squid and bacon..but I found very less bacon in that so I requested to give some more bacon as I am looking for pork item..Das went inside and requested the Chef but Chef instantly denied to give..I want to give 5 points but i was not 100% satisfied..I also belong to a hospitality industry...chef needs training ..you are loosing a customer for just 5 peice of extra bacon.
my bill no is 14863

Author: Sumit Sethi
Description: Had an awesome standup comedy night.. The service is really very good.. Morocco chilli chicken was awesome.. Even grilled chicken was good.. They got me all the stuff along with my chicken which I asked like fries .. Really nice.. Had a great time!!

Author: Krishna Kavya
Description:
The wheat beer was good. Coming in here for the second time. Tried the stout for the first time. This tastes better. The food was average nothing ground breaking in terms of taste or variety.

I liked the setting on the first floor with the open balcony set up.

Author: Roshaan S Bathija
Description: A nice place in the heart of the city.   Good drinks and lovely food.  Their beer is too good.  And the cocktails also that they make are nice.

Author: Rahul Koul
Description: Located at one of the best. Areas if Bangalore  , it provides an awesome sit out place for the crowd . The beer is just amazing and still one of the best in Bangalore. The food is good and the service is decent enough . The music and crowd are great too . Definitely a place to sip a beer any day

Author: Abhishek Jain
Description: You cannot dislike this place. Situated at a posh locality near UB City, This place has a delightful ambience, Amazing crowd, Good food and one of the best brewery in the town. Go out drinking with your buddies on weekends. Little expensive but  worth the money.

Author: Gunin Khandelwal
Description:
Visited yesterday... Did not have a reservation.. But did not have to have too long.... Liked the ambience.... Beer lager is really good.. Music is decent...For a veggie.. Food options are less. But if are just looking for good alcohol and ambience ... Food can be ignored...

Conclusion: If u r looking to hang out with your friends... And get together socially.. Then .. This is the right place...to be at....

Author: Samiksha Kataria
Description: A nice loud and happy ambience is the first thing i noticed about this place. The staff is friendly and courteous. Loved the starters specially the pizza samosa. The presentation of food was nice. Was quite disappointed with the rice combo though. Overall, A nice place to hang out with a group of friends.

Author: Priya Peter
Description:
This is one place that has been on my list for way too long. Every time I go to UB City...I pass by this place and see a crowd waiting and I've been wanting to go. And finally it happened. LOVED IT!!!!
Food- great
Drinks- great
Music- too good
Ambience- wow

Author: Sunil Jain
Description:
Had a quick round of beer and bit of snack at this place last week on a rainy day. I have been to their Whitefield outlet and wanted to try this particular outlet on Lavelle road.
Location wise it can’t be better. if you take up window seat on the first floor, you might enjoy the view. of Lavelle road . Ambience inside is just perfect for a Microbrewery Pub. There is also a pool table on level 2 (level 2 is smoking zone BTW). We ordered Tall Glasses of Wheat Beer (Called Belgian Wit) . We also tried a glass of STOUT and both were just perfect. With good food, nice music and the lovely crowd, this is THE PLACE for a perfect evening in the heart of the City. Will surely visit again. For the time being I have checked another box in my Bucket List

Author: Rohan Sam Kuruvilla
Description: Been on the list for a very long time finally got the chance to tick it off. A Nice place descent outing can be assured. A Very 'cool' like recomended on the whole

Author: Prangan Duarah
Description:
Biere Club is the one of the most happening brewery pub of the city. Wanted to visit from a long time n finally had a great time with my friends. Best part of this cafe is d location, heart of city. Just half a km from MG Road
Next Best is of course the various Beers, the best is Belgium Ale, smooth and less bitter
Next is the food, greatttt taste and delightful. Presentation is eye catching
Crowd is just amazing and the music makes you feel to dance...
An absolute place for hangout and if u r a beer lover will definitely loveeee it.. Neeti Jindal Deepanjan Banerjee Banerjee Sayantan

Author: Abhinav Varma
Description:
So a couple of friends and I visited this place on a day we went pub hopping in and around Lavelle Road.

Biere club is Bangalore's first micro brewery. Little wonder that it is almost always crowded.

We hopped in to find ourselves a seat. Failing to do so, we stuck to standing and ordering a sampler for each of ourselves.

The sampler included an English Dark Ale, American Rice Lager, Belgian Wit , Stout, O&T and an Oakwood Ale.

Look forward to visiting the place again over this weekend for some more beer. Hopefully, I will find myself a seat!

Author: Mahima Koteshwar
Description:
We as foodies very rarely visit a restaurant the second time unless they are really really really good or if the person has no choice due to certain situations. Mine was the latter and this time I decided not to just give them a pathetic rating just because of my experience this time because when I visited this restaurant the last time I had a great experience and liking for food and hence this review of mine is the average.

This time my experience had a small twist .
One is the food competition that my friend took part in and trust me I was really disappointed.
Basically he had to finish 12 big leg pieces of chicken which was rubbed intensely with chilli powder and served with unlimited cups of mayo. He also had to finish 2 bucket of fries with a big hard long french bread and a pitcher of beer in 20 mins . It is not difficult to finish all these but it's quite unfair when you put a hard dry bread in front you and force yourself to swallow it without any toast or grill . The bread can't be given that way.

So if this is not done in 20 mins he had to pay 4000 bucks and that he had to since it was impossible to finish it.

Well my complaints hasn't stopped here...I have to talk about their pathetic service and how the food taste has just dropped to the level of zero.

Apart from this we ordered nachos , baby corn fry and biere club special chicken popcorn and a pizza.
The three appetizers were pathetic . No words to describe it further . The pizza was fine but he took more than 45 mins to serve it. Every time we asked for it he only said 5 more mins it's done and he didn't let us cancel the order but he took over 45 mins and that wasn't fair.

Well , we just got cranky at the end.

My previous experience : fab food , fab time and fab service ! Loved everything .

Overall average ,
Ambience - 4.5
Staff - 4 & 2.5 = 3.25
Service - 4 & 1 = 2.5
Quantity - 4 & 1.5 = 2.7
Quality - 3.5
Taste - 4.5 & 1 = 2.7
Plating - 4 & 2 = 3
Pricing - 4 & 2 = 3

Total = 3.14

Author: Sudarshan Harave
Description:
Situated in a posh locality like Lavelle road, this place has an amazing ambience. The kind of excitement you get after entering this place cannot be put into words. The music is quite good too.
For starters we ordered Veg Nachos. The taste, texture, re fried beans and the melted cheese ( aptly named ) were a great combination. Along with this we ordered the Virgin Mojito and the Virgin Sangria both of which were good in their own way. The Mojito had fresh mint, sugar and lemonade which blended really well. The Sangria was made of cranberry juice, pineapple juice, chopped fruits and mint which was exceptional.
For main course we ordered the charred sweet peppers and smoked cheese pizza along with veggies. This was a let down. Not up to the standards. I felt the pizza could've been better as it was not that hot and the taste was decent too. The crust was a little hard and was quite difficult to consume.

Ambience - 5
Food - 4
Service - 4.5
Cost - 4.5

Author: Mohit Marlecha
Description: Good place to hang out with friends..The ale beer is too good .valet parking makes it easy and 1st floor is always teeming with activities. Overall a nice place.

Author: Nidhi Nathany
Description: I guess this place needs no introduction! Sirf  naam hi kaafi hain! One of my fav places for ale and wheat beer! Totally love it!! Even love their nachos!! Will visit them over and over again till I die drinking their yummy beer:-)

Author: Christopher Witschy
Description:
The best selection of beers on tap in Bangalore.
Their Belgian ale, English Ale, Stout, and Scotch Ale never disappoint.
Their week day happy hour of two for one is exactly that: happy.
I've never had food I found disappointing from here - their pizza and nachos were both a relief, as I'm usually disappointed with both in India. Both were delicious here.

Author: Kamakshi Kothari
Description: One of the best microbreweries in town. I love the ambiance here in this centrally located pub. Try anything as most of their food is good. This is a good place to go out drinking with your buddies if you are willing to shell out a good mount of money but I gaurantee you that it is worth it.

Author: Poojitha Govardhan
Description:
06/11/2015 @ 20:30

After quite a bit of confusion over choosing the right place for saturday night, getting through the crazy traffic for almost 90 minutes, I finally landed up here.

My friends and I have been to this place before, we had loved the place for its amazing food but it was a big disappointment with regard to taste this time.

Ambience : This place is at the heart of Lavelle Road and it's one of the most happening places of Bangalore during the weekends. Has a mixed age crowd. Interiors are classy and well done for a brewery.

BIERE CLUB CHALLENGE :
My friend opted for the Biere Club Challenge which was to finish 12 pieces of crazy spicy chicken( Extremely spicy even for a hardcore Andhra spice eater), 2 buckets of fries and wedges(With chilli tomato Mayo- only thing that made me happy), 1 beer pitcher and one baguette ( I agree this was a part of the challenge but I atleast expect it to be eatable, it was extremely hard and non-human). Only if the baguette was softer, it would have been a fair deal. Though he was unsuccessful in finishing the entire thing in 20 mins it was fun and the fun cost us 4000 bucks :p

Then it was our turn to hog, we ordered for three starters, one veg pizza and Wheat Beer Pitcher.

1) Nachos : It was so soft that it couldn't carry the toppings from the table to my mouth. Taste was below average and nachos totally lacked the crispness.

2) Biere Club Chicken Popcorn : DISASTER!!! Yuk! The chicken was so tasteless and the dip which accompanied the dish was worse. Worst dish I must say and apparently it is their signature dish. Never ever.

3) Crispy Baby Corn : Below average dish! Babycorn was crisp and cooked well but it lacked the right taste to tickle my taste buds. The veggies which were tossed along, didn't compliment the dish. Overall not my favourite.

4) Wheat Beer - not the best beer in the city. Average.

5) Veg Pizza - Sun dried Tomato, Mushroom and Goat Cheese. After a long wait for almost 20-25 mins, the pizza arrived. Crust was so soft and watery I couldn't tolerate the dish after my first bite. Pathetic!! It possibly lacked everything that a pizza is supposed to have, mainly taste! :/

Service : I am not sure if they were functioning at snail's pace because it was a weekend or if it's the case everyday. It took them almost 25 mins to prepare for the Challenge. Almost 20 mins for the starters. 20-25mins for the pizza. It got so late that we had to get our pizza packed.

Price is on the higher side and not worth the quality of food they serve.

Previously the food used to be great but overall the place is loosing it's charm because of their deteriorating taste and quality.

Budget - 6000 ( Including 4000 for the challenge)
Ambience - 4/5
Food - 1.5/5
Service- 1.5/5
Price- 2.5/5

Author: Kishore Reddy
Description:
If you go with friends and if you are not into drinks, this is not a place for you.

If you are the right person for this place and if you have enough dough this place won't disappoint you.

They have a lot of brews and decent food. It is all about beer here. Ambience and music are excellent.

They give excellent cheeses as well

Author: Swathi Ranganath
Description: Since I'm not a huge of brewed beer and beer, I didn't enjoy the visit . The crowd is less on weekends before 7. A long conversation, some brewed beer and to chill out on weekends, this is the place .

Author: Anoop C
Description: Very Good Causal hangout place for a beer. one of the old brewery in Bangalore. Ambience is not that great but u will still fall in love with it.  If you are planning for Club hopping in lavelle road , Add this to the list.  Food is decent.  Wheat beer and lager tastes very good.

Author: Swetha
Description:
What works for this place is its location and ambience ... What better than a pool table in the middle of friends food and drinks... Not the best nachos and it became in consumable after it got s little cold ... Pizza was also disappointing... Liked the concept of samplers.. But they sure can work on the food options .. The platter also had very few items which could help us clear the various coloured pastes / chutneys/ spreads ...
Would I go back ?? Yes.. Would I reorder what I have tried ... Nooooo @thebiereclub

Author: Niranjan
Description:
This place is amazing for beer lovers. They are properly off the order on Vittal Malaya road. They is here the crowd is. Fully packed on the evenings and weekends. This is actually a popular microbrewery. We had some great drinking scenes here,
we tried
Beers- ale, wheat, stout, specials.
We likes the alse better than all.'
Food-
Mutton pepper, kebab platter, meat and salami platter, smoked chicken pizza.
The food was great. We loves the place.
Overall it was good and it a MUST TRY.?

Author: Vivek George
Description:
If you go to Bangalore, this is one place you have to visit for their freshly brewed beer n finger licking good food.
Their chicken platter and wheat beer does wonders n is refreshing.
Located on the same road as the Harley Davidson dealership, what else could a biker want: chilled beers, mouth watering dishes and a view of the road where all the HD's are parked...

Author: Food Lover
Description:
This is an excellent place for beer lovers. Everyone should visit this place who likes microbreweries. There are many flavours of beer and the food is also good.
Ambience - 4/5
Service - 3.5/5
Quality - 4/5

Author: Dj Sash
Description:
Very nice crafted beer with rustic interiors and semi open on two sides..We had few starters which were very tasty - chilly coriander chicken and chicken pop corn..
The Ale beer was perfect and they had happy hours running till 10pm since it was a Monday night they had 1 plus 1 on beer..Service was very efficient..Will be back again soon

Author: Shreya Adarsh
Description: Excellent location.. Wonderful setting and great beer.. Take a seat by the open areas.. The staff is courteous and helpful.. A must try place

Author: Ankit
Description: Amazing place to hang out at an epic location. Tried their seasonal beer which was excellent regret not trying food options. Ambience is good n comfortable even you are visiting for the first time. Staff is very humble n ll help you decide what to order as per your preferences. Sample concept helps you decide what to order also you can take up their biere club challenge if you have an appetite to eat n drink. 👍

Author: Nishhh
Description: Incredible experience ever.. perfect place for a weekend.. loved each n everything.. eye catching ambience with with amazing atmosphere.. no flaws in anything.. had tacos n onion rings which was perfectly delicious.. Definitely would love to b there again..

Author: Anuj Sanghi
Description: A very nice place to hang out, the ambience is also very good having a nice crowd. If you are new to the place, go for the suggestion of working staff. I liked the service, the staff was good in handling guests. I would definetly like to have another visit and try out for more.

Author: Mihika
Description: One of my favorite places to indulge and binge on some great fresh brewed beer! This place has amazing brews and a great,variety too. If you're a beginner to beer and need to be "acquire" the taste, try out their wheat beers - you'll be a beer fan for life TRUST ME! Great ambience, good food are a given at this place and all you need to get is some great beer loving company. Be sure to have an evening you'll absolutely enjoy! Keep up the good work people of Biere Club

Author: Amit Raj
Description: No words... Just speechless abt the place. Amaizing ambience and service. Had The best crafted beer ever. The place proves its the best microbrewery in bangalore. Had the best of best time with the most wonderful person. The way staff greeted us was a great surprise. Great going. All the best guys Nishhh  person. The way staff greeted us was a great surprise. Great going. All the best guys @nishu

Author: Tarun Lalwani
Description: Superb place. One of the best brewed beers in bangalore with kickass food. The ambience is lovely. A must visit for those who like microbreweries.

Author: Vishal Agrawal
Description: If you like beer, dear god this place will leave you satisfied. With an array of fresh brews, it's a refreshing change from the mundane bars by pushing the limits for quality beer in bangalore. I will be coming here again as I always do!

Author: Amit Sarda
Description:
After a beer at ABC, and an LIIT at HRC, and a coffee at ICH, we landed at The Biere Club.  We ordered a couple of beers, Club Special and Seasonal, to see how good can it get. And buoy, we were in for a healthy surprise since the beer was really good, making it easily the best beer we had all day. But we didn't order anything to eat though, since we were already full, and were in a mood to have only beer.
The service was prompt, and the ambience decent (thanks to some really lovely wall caricatures).
It is slightly expensive, but I would definitely recommend trying out the beer at this place, and I would love to be here again.

Verdict: One of the best beers.
Food: 4.5
Service: 3.5
Ambience: 3.5

Author: Shradha Raikar
Description: My favorite place to hangout with friends and play some pool. The craft beer is so good that I can drink it almost everyday without getting bored of it. Food is absolutely delicious. I love the way they cook fish here. And the bacon wrapped sausages are a must try.

Author: Sunileo
Description: Spacious 3 storey drinkery with good brewed beer. The bartender was very helpful in deciding on the beer. Ale was my personal favourite from their selection. Food was served quiet quickly and was tasty as well. Sausage rolled in bacon and the chicken wings are recommendable. Veg lasagna is a good option for vegetarians. Overall it is a decent place to hangout if you find a table.

Author: Onkar
Description: I had been to this place when all the places were closed in Bangalore due to bandh. I tried all the beers available on the tap. Experiment was worth the effort. Highly recommended for their beers. Food is fine.

Author: Satish Joseph
Description: This was my first time to a micro brewery and I was quite excited. The ambience was very comforting and the crowd was very decent. Loved their sampler concept. We first sampled a few batches and we zeroed down on the seasonal ale. The sides were impressive. We ordered a fried calamari and it went well with our beer. They were screening ISL matches when we went there. What more fun than beer and football !!

Author: Neha Bahl
Description: This one is not for the amazing beer they have but for the staff they have around. I left my shades (pretty expensive ones) on one of the not so fine Friday's when I was meeting a friend. As much as I thought there were bleak chances to get it back from that crowded a place, these guys were very responsive and helpful. Take a bow guys! 🙌

Author: Vishwajeet Dash
Description: The ambient sound of chatter adds life to this already lively hangout. The brews here are amongst the city's best and I personally love the pilsner. A good place to take the team out.

Author: Pranav Shetty
Description: Can never get tired of this place !! The perfectly chilled perfectly billed beers keeps you engrossed throughout your evenings..perfect place to hop in once after work to have a few beers coupled with some tasty crunchies...3 levels of pure bliss with seating available to accompany you mood !!

Author: Rohit Dey
Description: Went there for a bachelors party..being 11 thirsty, hungry dudes, we ended up ordering most of stuff on the menu..so food in general is great to taste although proportions are not filling..I am a bit partial to the bacon which was absolutely amazing in both burgers as well as wrapped in sausages. The beer was fantastic and after a point we sort of lost track of how many pitchers we had gulped down. What is not good is the service. Although waiters are reasonably friendly it takes a LONG time for anybody to pay attention to your table. After a point we got tired of calling them and just waited till they empathetically showed up. The orders also get served all wonky..main course comes up first followed by starters. I guess this much of chaos you can expect from a pub. In all, it might have gotten a higher rating as the experience of eating, smoking and drinking till the night became blurry , celebrating with good friends is a memory worth remembering.

Author: Archit Agrawal
Description: A nice and decent place for peace loving as well as corporate guys !! It was a nice experience. Oktoberfest was the plus point .. Brewed beer tastes great 👍 for that !!

Author: Aishwarya Ravi
Description: One of the very few places I have walked out with full satisfaction. We went for a late lunch and we tried the jager bomb, sangriana and some brewed beer. For Starters we ate cheese balls and topped nachos. They both were on point. For the mains we ordered three pepper pizza and lasagne. They were really well cooked a and tasted well too. For the dessert we tried the chocolate mud pot with icecream. Just was the right thing to end with.

Author: Vijay
Description: Not sure how many times I have visited this place. The first micro brewery for Bangalore. I tried all of their beers and no other micro brewery can match the wheat beer they serve. Their food is also awesome.

Author: Avijit Dey
Description:
Probably the best place to hang out on a rainy evening. 
The sense of calm that you get sitting on the top floor with the wind in your face and a mug of chilled ale in your hand chatting away with your loved one, sometime staring out at into the night sky is unbeatable.
The staff very cordial, the food great and the beer - probably the very best in Bangalore. Though is a bit on the costlier side as compared to other great pubs like toit. 
Nevertheless, would definitely love to come back to the place again and again

Author: Surya Bose
Description:
An entire evening with good food and beer was totally spoilt by the hopeless floor manager Prajwal. At 11:00 PM , this guy started to push us out of the restaurant , even though we are very much aware of the 11:30 PM deadline in Bangalore.
This person was showing us the way to the stairs and once i confronted him on what was his problem , he started behaving like a road side hooligan.I showed him how the other floors were still occupied with guests who were finishing their last drinks.
I have written a detailed mail to their management today and am waiting for their course of action.
Guys i would suggest that please try out alternate beer venues in Bangalore as we now have plenty of options. I believe if a restaurant fails to have a decent conduct with its guests , there is no second thought of reviewing the food or the ambiance.I do not want to hear that others have also faced the same ill treatment like me even after dishing out Rs 5k for an evening.
So think twice and check out other venues if possible.

Author: SimpleMalt
Description: Fantastic service, the team there made us feel at home from the very first visit. Its family friendly; our college-goers loved it. The food is great too, be sure to try the Ham, Salami and Chorizo pizza; one of the best pizzas I have had. As for the beers and ales; you won't stop with just one! One of my all time favourite watering holes.

Author: Sachin Krishnan
Description: Great place to hang out, loved the open seating on the first floor, watching the world go by on the Lavelle road. Ordered the wheat beer, this one is excellent, robust, nuttier and has a fruity flavor. Ordered the chicken nacho and cheese to accompany nothing to complain hot nachos topped with guacamole and sour cream. Finally came the assorted fries again a great accompaniment for the drinks, mixed spice, hot crispy fries and wedges.

Author: Abhishek Sen
Description:
Blessed with a terrific positioning this watering hole can beat the blues of all competition in the vicinity. But, somethings amiss.
Guess its that ever welcoming factor. A bit of a warmth is what is needed to be added. Else, the wheat needs are good and one can order a mutton olive platter on the sides.

Author: Abhishek Ranjan
Description:
One of the first Microbreweries that I visited in Bangalore with a group of colleagues. The place has an amazing interior and the music is not loud here.

We were a group of 12 people so you can imagine us ordering most of the dishes on the menu. Their thin crust pizza is nice and their kebab platters are the ones to go for. Also try the grilled chicken with melted cheese nachos.

I prefer Ale and Wheat beer but my friends tried Stout too and they found it very smooth.

Author: Speakup
Description:
I don't know where to start from,Biere club had been in my wishlist since long

Finally last Tuesday got to go there.

Alright lets get to the point

Amazing ambiance,interiors(i would say very well thought and implemented, the idea behind keeping these socializing games which let you make new friends and add on to your experience)

Coming to beer,good variety and prices are affordable(one of the finest brewery in Bangalore so far)

Talking about food,I guess loads to be done with food...food menu is more or less like a regular bar menu with 2-3 different things added to it

Its time for you to change your menu a bit to hit the top list

Because food is something which has to go with the theme,since you have an amazing brewery,try keeping food which goes well with beer
(harmony between food and beverage)
Very approachable staff,well dressed and hospitable

All and all amazing experience

Coming back here soon

Till then good luck guys hope to see the change next time

Regards

Author: Shakthi Yazhini
Description:
Noticed this place when I visited Bootleggers.
The outdoor seating of Biere club seemed attractive and I decided to visit it.
Tried out 3 of their beers and loved all of them.
The sad part is that the place doesn't have most of the drinks that are listed in the menu.
On the whole, Biere club is a calm place with nice music. And I shall surely revisit to try out the food.

Author: Tanuj Jhunjhunwala
Description: Epic variety of beers! Epic Ambiance! One of the best places I have been to in bangalore. Met a bunch of friends after a while at Biere club. Their thin crust pizza was just perfect. Ordered some starters in chicken which came with a variety of dips. They have a table mat which has outlines of unknown countries that are known for their beer. The first person to identify the countries for the day gets a free beer. Well i got all answers correct but missed out on the free beer. Maybe next time!

Author: Aditya Seth
Description:
As a Beer Lover..i loved the place. The taste of the freshly brewed beer is amazing with the great set up and the whole feel of the place. 

Just look out for stand up comedy nights in the weekdays which will add on the entertainment factor also. Easily one of the top breweries in Bangalore. A Big Thumbs Up.!!

Author: Maninder
Description:
Beer is good but service is pathetic.

UN organised completely.

Not having WiFi these days another dark spot. Why can't u have WiFi for customers...its a joke not having wifi

Author: Puja Deb
Description: The first microbrewery in South india as everyone say so was quite curious to visit them. They have really good craft beers. The seasonal and golden ale were the best. The stout was strong but good too.. didnt like the club special much. The bacon wrapped sausages were to die for. One of the best starters i had. Ambience is very lively with good crowd. Waiters are knowledgable and friendly. Loved this place. Will return soon

Author: Sharath Kumar Shankara
Description: Went in on a Saturday night, to find it surprisingly quiet. Turns out it was Oktobiere fest time and Karaoke night was just starting. Thoroughly enjoyed the beer, food and the Karaoke. One of my all time favorite hangout places. Deepti Kulkarni Amrutha Roshan Rao

Author: Go Veggie!
Description:
Located in lavelle road, Biere club has 3levels. Ground floor which is non smoking, first floor for smokers.

Have visited this places couple of times. While the food is average, their wheat beer and Ale beer are nice . Crispy baby corn starter was pathetic, however their pizza and fries are better options.

Service was quick and good as usual. No complaints there.

Personally I would go back here for their wheat beer alone.

Author: Deadmanwalking
Description:
Good beers and incredibly bad and overpriced food. Nothing is actually good to eat there.

You may want to visit the place for beer but thanks to their abysmally bad food and mediocre service, the best option is to go elsewhere instead. Sadly.

This is the third time they've consistently screwed up in the food department. Shekhar Sharma

Author: Shekhar Sharma
Description:
Beer is quite good. Food was pathetic, don't try crispy baby corn with barbecue sauce.
Ambience is okay, average music.
Better try other places nearby.

Author: Anupam Ekkanath
Description:
My favourite place for beer! Their brews always hit the sweet spot. You can't go wrong on the hefeweizen. Nor can you on the Belgian Wit.

The beef skewers are good. Could have been much more better with a tad bit more tender meat. The bacon wrapped sausages are to die for. The topped nachos are so so....

Author: Rinji Viswam
Description: This is a great place to have a few drinks and just chill with family and friends. The food is really good too. I ordered the potato wedges,crispy fried chicken wings, Chettinad style roasted prawns and the jumbo platter. Whew! We all had to work very hard to finish off the jumbo platter :-p All in all it was a great night,it was my mum's bday btw! Will b going back!

Author: Sayantika Bhattacharya
Description:
Horrible Attitude!!!
Had heard a lot about this place and wanted to visit it for long, but it was a disaster. Visit Arbor Brewing Company for a way better experience!

A great place is always a combination of great food beverages and also a very good service. I cannot tell about the food as I was bummed by their attitude.

We had booked a table last Saturday at 6:30 PM for 2 people with my fiance who came to the town for a day, we just wanted to grab some quick bites and a drink or two before heading for a nightclub. The lady at the reception confirmed our booking and the guy there took us inside in the ground floor and told us to sit in the high chairs near the bar stool. I was not comfortable sitting there at all due to personal reasons. We explained to him and requested that we would be leaving in another half an hour to 40 minutes if he could give us any of the lower chairs.There were very few people(around 7-9 maximum) and most of them were 2 people seated in lower chairs, while all the bigger tables were empty and I could also see small tables with lower chairs and sofas were empty.

But the guy very rudely said he cannot give any other table, if you have to sit, you have to sit here.

I have been to several 5 star restaurants across cities and generally the more famous the place the more classy the service should be, but this was an impolite behavior. We obviously went out and told him sorry we are not comfortable so we are going out to which the guy shrugged indifferently.
We quickly finished  our dinner from Toscano in UB City and pledged never to return to this horrible place. Look at the other micro breweries in Bangalore with such great food and great service. You guys sucked bug time.

Author: Utpalendu Bhagawati
Description: I went there twice and both times it was pathetic. The staff knows nothing, they are just clueless. Damn expensive if we compare the quality. The starters are good but boring ambience. I call this as waste of location.

Author: Ashika Singh
Description:
Saturday evening 9:30pm
Me and two other friends went to this place to catch a beer and were on a right schedule. We had to go to the bar on the first floor because the place was packed. All three floors. We tried the taster tray which was priced at 40rs per taster. We tried 5 and picked our favourites- Bangalore malt, wheat beer, stout.
We got a place after 10 mins and were seated beside the pool table which was a little inconvenient as people and sticks were coming in the way at times. We also ordered chicken wings which did not take much time to arrive. I personally didn't like the wings as the meat was not tender and it seemed a bit dry and crunch whereas I prefer juicy and tender. My friends seemed to like it.
Its a nice place to chill out and unwind and their beer seems to be a hit. We all loved it. I'd have to come back and try a bit more things to really know the place but overall good.

Author: Shiv Kumar
Description:
My all-time fav when it comes to Beer in Bangalore. They make the best Belgium Wit in town. Food menu has improved over time; but still lot greasier items than healthy. What about cut carrot and cucumber sticks with some chat masala! The seating quality is reasonable (and varied for each type of group), service has improved significantly over time.

Had a bad experience recently with my phone charging. Left the phone for charging; they brought back my phone. Forgot my charger. After that had to make so many calls and responses are always vague and non-specific. After four calls I was told we have nothing from the ‘lost and found’….Ha ha. Since charger was near their cash counter, hope they don’t lose their cash same way. So folks – avoid giving your phone for charging with them.

Wonder why restaurants cannot offer a charging point near every damn table – Huh!

Author: Ashwini Srinivas
Description: This is one place you can't go wrong with. The ambience is lovely, the staff are efficient and friendly. And the beers!! My favorites are their wheat beer and Belgian Ale (but they didn't have the latter when i went last week), but rum fans would love the taste of their stout beer. If in doubt, take a taster of all their beers. That's a treat in itself! The food they serve goes perfectly with the beer. So take your friends and head over!

Author: Hiren Karnani
Description: Great food. Great ambience..location options..... ideal hangout for a Saturday eve.......bangalore at its best......try the wheat.options.....

Author: Suzratzz
Description: Very nice hang around place...go to second floor...food and beer quality is very good...a bit European feeling, the crowd was nice and the food quality was very good

Author: Jose Philip
Description: Really great place to hangout with friends. The chicken wings are really awesome. No one can have just one of those. It can get crowded and would be advisable to reserve in advance.

Author: Pankaj Krishnan
Description: Great ambience combined with good drinks and great food!! The only drawback is how it can't accommodate the number of people that turn up there week in week out! Apart from that there's no reason to not go out and enjoy your time at the biere club!

Author: Mahasweta Roy
Description:
One of the reasons to give this 3.5 is because it closes down between 4-7. Come on. I mean a brewery shouldnt close down noon time, that too on a saturday. So we reached at 7:15 p.m. Almost all the tables were reserved. Normally I don't mind sitting on a high table, but we were told since there were two of us, only high tables are available. I mean you could have given us a table for four because many of them remained empty for a long time. Turnovers and all is understandable but I honestly didn't like it. It's expected from a fine dine restaurant but not from a bar, especially in Bangalore.
Anyway after settling down we ordered the lager and the wheat. They have a standard selection of lager, wheat, stout. Nothing to complain on that. Beer was normal. For food we ordered sausage wrapped bacon, onion rings, pepperoni pizza, fish n chips and three selection desserts (some combo thing they have in the menu). Sausage was not good. Not juicy, didn't seem fresh. Bacon, well. How can bacon be bad? ;) onion rings-normal. Fish n chips was the one I loved. Especially the way they were served. Very cool. Pizza was also good but not the one which I would say is unforgettable.
Big let down was the dessert. The fried bounty was one of the yuckiest things I ever had. The coffee toffee thing wasn't great either. It was good, but nothing extraordinary. Another marshmallow fruit thing was okay. Atleast it was fresh( do not remember any of the names).
Price is on the steeper side. I liked the wall graffiti. Overall ambience is quieter than most pubs, which is a refreshing thing. Would I pay a visit again? Not sure. There are many more options in the city, but would not keep this on closure list yet.

Author: Varun
Description:
I had been looking forward to visit The Biere Club since long especially after hearing the amazing reviews about the place from almost everyone who had been to the place, but for some reason or the other, it wasn't just happening.. Our patience was finally put to test around two weeks back, when we went to The Biere Club but as destiny had it, it was closed due to BBMP elections in Bangalore.

But, better late than never..We (Me along with a couple of great friends) had the privilege of visiting The Biere Club yesterday and luckily got a table for seven on the second floor of the fantastic place.

AMBIANCE: The ambience of the place is electric. It definitely has a classy and elegant feel to it with extremely spacious and posh interiors. The clustered sitting is not cluttered at all and gives a very good and satisfactory feel. It was great to see that the management very politely refused to our request of adding seats to the existing sitting of 5 people and making it 7, as it would disturb the décor of the place.

SERVICE: The service was very quick and the staff very courteous and professional. Despite being a packed Saturday evening, there didn’t seem any slack in service as orders were being delivered as quick as quick can be.

FOOD / DRINKS: The beer in particular at The Biere Club was show stopper. We made it a point to try almost all the variants viz. Lager, Dark Ale, Stout, Wheat and they were amazing, very smooth to say the least. Equally delicious was the food especially - The Refried Beans, Melted Cheese Nachos and Crispy Fried Potato Wedges. Asian style cottage cheese skewers were a little disappointment though, both in terms of quality and quantity..Can’t comment on non-veg (as I am a vegetarian), but my friends seemed to be enjoying it a lot.

All in all, an awesome place, with an extremely awesome beer and an equally awesome ambiance and service..A must recommended place for all the pubbing enthusiasts…

Author: Vinutha Ramamohan
Description: Been here a million times with office colleagues and friends! This place has always treated us well! Love the stout and wheat beers! The food compliments well with the drinks. You will get good suggestions on what food would go well with your drinks! Will keep going back!

Author: Dilip Hari
Description: I've been here twice and both times I've find the beer (or biere) a little flat and lacking in body.  It's definitely not bad but I expect something better from a microbrewery. The ambience is pretty good for a night out with a group of friends.

Author: Akash Selvaraj
Description: One of the best breweries in bangalore, very crowded during the weekend nights. Has 2 floors with the middle one containing a pool table and foosball. The staff is courteous but service can be slow, food is quite delectable, beer is great.

Author: Ameet KKatyal
Description:
You will sink into the atmosphere at this place. Slated as one of the better brewery in town, you cannot miss the location and can seldom get bored here!

Decor and menu compliment each other - kinda English style and finger food going well with the Brewer Beer and cocktails.
