My friends drink like a pig and love all of their beers. My favorite is white wine sangria and smoked pineapple vodka.

Gorge on their finger food - beer onion rings, mezze platter, bucket fries, cheesy grilled mushrooms and pizzas.

The staff is well trained, courteous and energetic- they try to match the pace of each table!

The table arrangement is well done - you can be inside or face the road. You can also chill around playing pool and fooseball with friends. Great place to host evening get-togethers with friends and business

The place gets very busy over the weekends and sprawls across 3 floors with valet parking.

Overall: Must Visit again and again and Chill out!

Author: Manoj Babu Balaraman
Description: Very awesome place for beer lovers. Food was average. Little expensive - weekend no place to hang out reservation are not happened. But it's ok to be there

Author: Anirban MITRA
Description: Been here with friends mostly. . Great location  food and ambience . If you are coming in big groups reservation is recommended on all days as it gets really crowded .

Author: Mehtab P Easa
Description: I went here last around 3 years ago. When I wet recently also it felt the same and a little more better. Loves hanging out here. It's a pub with brewery and so people who don't drink can dig into their yummy food menu. Waiters need a little more swift reaction when they are called for service and the place needs a bigger parking space. Otherwise its the best friends hangout with some drinks in hand.

Author: Swathi B
Description: This place is exclusively for brewed beer lovers but since I do not enjoy beer the experience was not worth it. I give a 3 for the average crowd during weekends and ok kinda music.

Author: Udayan Jalan
Description: Was disappointed at Belgian wheat unavailability, other than that pretty good,no complaints.Do try their pizzas,quite delectable.Staff is quite well informed about the beers.

Author: Rajit Haridas
Description: I like this place. It has something for everyone. Nice chilled beer and yummy snacks in a happening place......what else you can ask for. Little expensive but well spent. Will definitely visit again.

Author: D Yogendra Rao
Description: I totally love this place. Have visited this place many times especially after office hours. Nice place to hang out. They have their own brewery. One must try their ale and wheat beer. It was good. Even the food is good. I absolutely love the chicken wings tossed in sauce. That is really good. The ambience is good too and they play some pretty awesome soundtracks. I love their idea of giving a scribbling pad at the table to jot down the ideas once you are high :-P :-D

Author: Arijit Dey
Description:
Good ambience n music. The staff was courteous but service was pretty slow. My vegetarian friends had a hard time waiting for their orders and eventually the burgers they ordered were fine n filling but not worth the high prices. The non vegetarian kebab platter we tried was well served but again too expensive considering the quantity. Their brewery seems to be good though could be better. Personally the grilled chicken breast main course was the best dish we ordered (attached picture) and it was well served too.
A 3.5 rating to suffice but the overall feeling was not worth the bill.

Author: Saketh
Description: Brewhouses Brewhouses now that's one crazy thing you can find in Bangalore! And then there is THE BIERE CLUB, one of the top three breweries in Bangalore. Loved all their brewed beers and a wonderful place to hang out with friends. Went their at 12 noon, it was all peaceful enjoyed playing pool and foosball! The staff too are extremely friendly. Loved the place and surely the best brewery I've been to in Bangalore.

Author: Karthik B J
Description: Every I visit here.. New experience.. Best place to hang out .. Beer and assorted fries the best combo and those mini burgers mouth watering..

Author: Akshay Tg
Description:
Well first of all top marks for the location of the place which situated right at the intersection of Lavelle road and Vittal Mallya Road. The building looks how an old pub looks like which goes to the appeal of the place.Totally love the way they have placed the tables which overlooks the roads on either side of the buildings.

This place has its own brewery which is one of the main reason why it has become so famous in Bangalore and the wheat beer they brew over is one of the best beers you will get in any breweries.The food completely compliments the ambience of the place with typical bar food offering mainly a English menu of which I enjoyed the English herb rice and Moroccan lamb burger.

Have to say i was little disappointed with the service as the day I went was not really crowded and could have been better, however would surely come back for their beer and the ambience of this place. Cheers!!!

Author: Rajeev Kumar
Description: The next  best bar in bangalore city after HRC, TOIT, Windmills, ABC and Social. They serve a variety of beer and most of them taste good. just opposite to bootlegger on the other side of the road. Spread across 3 floors they have AC, semi-open, outdoor sitting, smoking & non-smoking zones.

Author: Dieon Roger
Description: Excellent ambience. Nice crowd. Good customer service. You can get free beer if you solve a puzzle. We just missed it. Beer is good. Food too but some are rip offs. You can play pool on first floor. Great place to meet with people and spend a lot of time. Enter with Fat pockets.

Author: The Party Insidr
Description: This place had great ambience and amazing service. I am very very wow'ed with their quantity but I do appreciate their food. Their beer is yum and refreshing. It is indeed is beer lovers happy place!

Author: Let'sEat
Description: Lecherous behavior from the neighboring table and the  management 's absolute inability to handle the complaint,  and instead being on the defence and saying that if we three girls on one table had a problem with three shabbily clad men letching at us from the adjacent table, then it is our problem.  very sad experience to take back from such an 'elite' place.  pathetic, is an understatement. When the management is like this what's the point in talking about the experience of food and beverage.

Author: Hasika Menon
Description: Loved the interiors and ambience. It's classy and new age. The wall hangings and brewery posters and lights and everything about this place is beautiful. The wooden interiors also give it a modern yet rustic look! We had some Nachos and a Mediterranean Kebab Platter. The kebab platter has so much choice it's incredible. The Biere Club brews their own beer and their beer is incredible. Had some stout, dark beer, Belgian, Ale, Lager and Golden Sangria. My favourites were the dark beer/stout that has a coffee and dark chocolate-like flavour in it, the Golden Sangria topped with exotic fruits were amazing too. We also got some coupons for free drinks. Was a great day.

Author: Deshna Shah Desai
Description: I love this place from the first time I'd been there . Their beers taste really good and the food is also awesome !! Great place to hangout with old friends :)

Author: Sundeep Clive
Description:
The beer place in Bangalore. One of the first breweries to open up in this city. I personally like their brews especially their German variants. Perfect place for a Sunday brunch, located at a central place with good ambience and everything just sorts itself out with beer.

It's one of the most sought after places on a Saturday night when it takes you ages to enter, I prefer a Sunday afternoon rather than the mad Saturday night.

Food is good again only commenting on their short eats, beer is refreshing, ambience of a maybe English pub and service is good.

Major part is the price and this place is not gonna be nice to your pockets :)

Author: Kaushik Sunil Mohanty
Description: My go to destination for craft beer. :D Their food menu is just tantalizing and compared with most other breweries, the cost factor is affordable. It maybe just me, but the music they play just goes too well with the setting of the restaurant. Not too long a waiting time if you're going on weekends.

Author: Vishal Dikshit
Description: Spread across multiple floors, this place is buzzing in the evenings no matter wht day of The week. One of the few micro-breweries to offer pitchers. I'd vouch for their food too and the service is pretty good no matter how packed the place is. Shouldnt be missed by a beer fan

Author: Kaushik Kumar
Description:
One thing you got to know about this place :The BEST BREWERY in india!..and I say this only Coz of the beer(which is why it's a brewery in the first place).. There is no beer in india that tastes better than the ones you get here... And I've tried Mumbai,pune and obviously most of bangalore. You cannot go wrong with the wheat beer which is my personal favourite and also the best wheat beer in bangalore.
Going to the next section :the ambience is pretty good. Its on lavelle Road so you can't get a more posh view than that unless you go to the Whitefield branch which i think has an amazing European setting equalled by no other.
And then the food :Non veg platter, the pizzas and some of the burgers are really worth the spend and compliment your beer. The fish and chips too go really well. Other than that you can go wrong with some of the food as I mentioned earlier this place is known for the beer. CHEERS :D

Author: Aksshat Goel
Description:
A very good place to hang out with friends. 
Has variety of drinks. I am very fond of beer here. Taking a balcony seat and having beer is awsome.
The place however lacks quality north indian food.

Author: Ankita Ostawal
Description: Prompt service even if they got a busy evening. Beer's good, variety of yummy food options. A must-go place!                                     .

Author: Sukanya Seth
Description: A nice place to hang out and very strategically located. I am not much of a drinks person but my friends quite likes the beer here. The ambience is lively and they have a three floor sitting area. The crowd is good too and I quite liked their veg non veg platter. Good portions good presentation n good taste!

Author: Aaliyah Misra
Description: Been here a couple of times for drinks after work ! A decent place to chill out with friends .. Like the cocktails & shots here especially the liquid cocaine.. Did not get to try out a lot of options in terms of food.. Baked potato skin was quite decent but the cheese fingers could have been better .. Potato wedges and french fries were a good accompaniment for the drinks !

Author: Sneha Iyer
Description: A friend of mine took me here and this is like a laid back and nice place. I hear its one of the first and oldest breweries in the city. We ordered the beer samplers for my benefit and I got to taste it. Finally settled in for the Ale which was refreshing. Being an open area is always a plus in Bangalore as the weather is great! Food is good, music good amd great place for conversations! Must visit. It does reminds me of breweries in Pune.

Author: Ankita Singh
Description: Ok Ok...  Food is not that great, we ate it all as we were hungry to death... We took one veg platter which was super sad, but chicken was delicious.... I loved there Peach flavoured fresh brewed beer... It was an average experience 😊😀

Author: Mithra Ramesh
Description:
Yet another place knocked down my list. I loved the brew beer in this place. one of very few good breweries in Bangalore. I loved their Lager brew beer. They have a very good space it is located in a very good spot on Lavelle road. To start with the service was really good and they got us a table real quick. Loved the Biere Battered onion rings and assorted fries as well. Few of my friends had ordered the pork sausage platter and apparently they were very happy. Also had the chance to try the cheesy garlic mushroom. Overall food was good. I just loved their beer and would go back again for the same. 

Food - 3.5/5
Ambience - 3/5 
Beer - 4.5/5 

Overall happiness experience - 4 :)

Author: Adithya Kalliath
Description: Been here a couple of times, Good old fashion brewery. Lager beer here is in my opinion one of the best in Bangalore (Yes, there are other places too). Delightful French fries and chilly coriander chicken are tasty sides with golden drink. But I feel , food menu can do a revamp has potential to serve better food.

Author: Vijay Gaikwad
Description: This place is closed.It doesn't have out door sitting like they have it in Whitefield.Liked the crowd pretty young n decent music.Must try their fresh beer (wheat & ale) n pizza.Starters were decent.Ambience n Service is wokay!

Author: Abhiroop Dutta
Description:
The Biere Club at Lavelle Road is at an amazing position. The building itself is very good looking and quite nicely designed.
We were lucky to get a place there. There are multiple levels at that place.
They are also a brewery with good options. My favorite is the wheat beer. This is less bitter and bit fruity. Ale was a bit stronger and tasty as well.
Nachos with grilled chicken and cheese was really good. Just felt that the quantity could have been more.
Moroccan spiced chicken had an unique taste. I really liked the soft boneless pieces along with the sauce.
English style chicken tikka masala with rice was my main course option.
I don't really know what was English in this dish except for the fact that it was served like a continental main course. The chicken tikka was not that spice but more creamy. It tasted good with rice.
Tender lamb chops had a good serving.
Cost is on the higher side.

Ambiance 3.5/5
Quantity 3/5
Quality 4.5/5
Cost 3.5/5
OVERALL 3.5/5

Author: Anjali Mangla
Description: Dint liked it that much.. Went in afternoon for a frnds treat.. AC not working.. Food nt that good.. And drinks was also ok.. NT that great.. Overall experience was boring.. :(

Author: Tushar Srijan
Description:
"The Biere Club" - 
The most impressive is the name itself.  To define this place there are not many words needed, just say "WOW, WHOA !!"

Very nice ambiance, really good food. 

And of course, Awesome Beer ! I tried their two different drinks but the Bangalore Red ALE was amazing. Along with the drinks we ordered some Chilly Coriander Spicy Chicken. It was so so yum that we couldn't resist to repeat it.

The place is really nice. Little on the higher pricing side but quality comes for a price.

Ambiance - 4/5
Food / taste - 4/5
Drinks - 4/5
Staff Courtesy - 4/5
Pricing/Bill - on the higher side as aforementioned. 

A must try place !

Author: Shubhamranka61
Description: Worst place third class managers arrogant and rude they don't know the meaning of hospitality place is good but filled with bunch of idots manager

Author: Babu Medehal
Description:
Wow !! Wow for the ambience, wow for the locale , wow for the service/crowd/beer.

If you are a beer lover and in the central business district of Bengaluru , searching to have really good in house brewed beer then head right here. Cheers !!!

Author: Pravalika Reddy
Description: Went here for lunch on my bestfriend's birthday. I must say that the service, staff and the food were equally great. This place has a very cozy and a comfortable ambience with good music. The highlight of our lunch was the chicken nachos with the perfect blend of cheese and not to forget the chicken wings. You won't be disappointed with the food :)

Author: Dr. Ankit Mohapatra
Description: Awesome place. Must go. Happening one. Smoking not allowed in da ground floor area. Both the upper floors u can smoke.. normal pricing. Must try da brews...

Author: Preethi
Description: Only writing this review to thank the amazing staff at the Biere Club. The floor manager was super accomodating and made sure to give us a table and customized our orders too without blinking an eye! Oh yes about the food..! Would give it a 4 on 5 for everything we ordered, we had the Pizza Samosas, trio of Hummus with Chips and a Fettuccini aglio olio. I'm not a beer drinker but my friend loved the in house lager. Had a great time!

Author: Pulak Dasgupta
Description: Awesome crafted beers, food and ambiance, this is what can be defined about this place. We 3 guys were lucky to get a table near the balcony. Tried out the beer of which stout and wheat were outstanding. Grab your drink and stand by the balcony and your day will be made. Try out your hand on snooker and foosball and you won't remember where time has passed. Along with food and ambiance, staff are very friendly and courteous. Looking forward to visit again.

Author: Varun Gupta
Description:
Biere club stole my heart away as soon as i saw the pool table at first floor.

Since this is 2nd visit to biere club, but it was a completely different experience this time.

Enter and you see a all the happy faces all around.

Beer is the best which i had in town. And the best part they serve it in pitcher as well.

Just go out, drink and eat . Enjoy the blessed company of your friends.

Happy beerinking !!!!

Author: Sayanti Dutta
Description:
This weekend we visited the Biere Club.  As usual the place had some very nice crafted beers along with some seasonal varieties. Nice finger foods. We tried some  crafted beers like, wheat, lager and mango beer. Lager was very nice. Didn't like the mango beer much. I tried their Shandy called Stout Cole and that was amazing. Please do try it, if you're not a very big fan of the bitter taste of the beer. Most of their food options were not available as it was quite late. But we tried some appetizers which were quite good. Special mention for the Rava Fried Fish. The beef skewers were average. Main course was a disappointment. We tried Beef with nachos, not much beef to eat their, only nachos. They have very good cupcakes as well. I loved the chocolate cream one.
Overall experience:: Nice place to chill out in the weekend. Decent food, nice beer, good ambiance. Then why did I rate it 3.5? Just on the service. The servers can a bit for polite and friendly.

Author: Yalamarthi Venkata Kiran
Description: Fresh brew the place to have...  Food is okay nice ambience and value for money for what you drink. One place to visit if you love only beer

Author: Amit Maini
Description: One of the best micro breweries in Bangalore. Prime location . Great ambience .. Brilliant food. They have happy hours on Mondays and Tuesdays which is superb. My personal favourite : Kebab platter / Pizza's and the Lager brew. Meal and few rounds of beer for 2 is a 2K+ damage.

Author: Chirag Gahlaut
Description: I am not verrrryyyyy happy with this place because their biggest turn off is their beer. I didn't like it at all. they have around 6 options but i found them to be very sour.. Ambience wise food wise and location wise its a super place.. Also their service was a bit slow that too on a saturday.. but as a package its a pretty good place.. Please try their nachos and the non-veg platter..

Author: Akshat Verma
Description:
Nice beer and good service. The place is huge with a different floor for smoking section. We went there on a Friday night, it was packed completely. Finally we got high chairs. Beer is excellent as they make it of their own. They have very different shots of their own mixing certain drinks. So you got to try those. The food is also amazing. We ordered for a platter and they decorated it nicely before serving. Talking about ambience, they have some crazy wall paintings which adds to the dine experience. The place is just walking distance from mg road and also from UB city. In all, worth a visit. Do make a reservation before you visit.
Ambience - 4/5
Food - 4.5/5

Author: Jayesh Gajre
Description:
This place is one of the best beer makers in the town. I went here for an office party a long time ago, and I still remember the crispy, refreshing taste of the seasonal varieties that this place presents. The food to complement the alcohol is good, too. I don't recall any specific variety except the pasta, which was rich and creamy, just right to sort of soothe your beery appetite!
Beer lovers, this is another getaway that should be on your Bengaluru bucket-list.

Author: Sid
Description: great location,great ambience and great beer and food.its a bit heavy on the pocket but u must try visiting once!! they've a crazy variety of brewed beers!!n yeah!!dont miss the yummy chicken nachos !

Author: Nicky
Description:
We went there for dinner and drinks from office . Two floors nothing great standard brewery . The fish Ajwain tikka is a must try and the fries are good.

Food : fish tikka and fries were good hummus assortment was pretty bad 😕
Drinks: though the promotion for JD was on but after first round of order they said its over pretty lame we had to manage with Jim. They had interesting mango beer not sure how it's made but few from our group had it.
Service: not bad
Ambience: manageable
Parking : valet

I think the only thing going for this place is the pool table and location. An average place .

Author: Surya.gopi88
Description: I quite liked the place with the lovely decor on the wall. It kind of bought in an old world charm. We ordered the pepperoni pizza and the ham and pineapple pizza. While I was skeptical about having pineapple on the pizza, it turned out to be quite good. The beer was good as well.For desserts we ordered a cheesecake, but the waiter came after half an hour and told us that they did not have it. We then decided to go for the warm chocolate stodge cake and ice cream.While it tasted more like a brownie, I really couldn't complain, as it was delicious. :)

Author: Sanjay Pandey
Description: Good place to visit for hangout with friends ....nice place for couple too ...................................................................

Author: Aditi Gangopadhyay
Description: Super place to have beer. The beer chart us very impressive. Food is also good. The standup comedy shows organized is outstanding. A great place to be on the weekend.

Author: Shishir Belur
Description: Absolutely love this place! The beer they brew is one of the best in Bangalore according to me. The pizzas here are also extremely good and make an ideal combination with the beer.

Author: Sourav Kejriwal
Description:
This place is the reason for love for brewed beer, every beer they serve is good.
Nice ambiance, good service and food is quite good as well.

Author: Mustard Chef
Description:
After having been to Biere Club over 30 times in three years, I can only do a really short review that distills it down to the essential bits.

The beer is decent, not the top 3 in the city, but not the bottom of the barrel either. Some of their specials (IPA, seasonal mango, etc.) are quite good and the Hefe/wheat is always a safe bet.

The Biere Club menu isn't very exhaustive and does some really nice small plates and pizzas as its forte. It has recently been given a slight makeover though not a very radical one. If you were going there for the first time, these are my favorite hits:

- assorted fries: wedges, curlies, double fried, etc., very good for snacking on endlessly
- mini lamb kibbeh burgers
- mini fish and chips: crispy light batter on the outside, soft flaky fish inside
- the non-veg kebab platter!
- chicken/shrimp popcorn: sidekick to the assorted fries

They used to do a couple of decent spaghetti and meatballs and spaghetti aglio e olio, but those seem to have disappeared with the revamp.

A old jaunt, one of the forefathers of the microbrew movement in the City, and still going strong. Grab a place upstairs when the weather is nice (which is pretty much always) and really good option for large groups.

Author: Thilak Kumar
Description: Located at ub city. Good ambiance, food,  loud music and of course brewed beer. It's good place to hangout with friends and enjoy the drink.

Author: Puneet
Description:
Went to the Biere club on a Monday evening and the place was almost full. Thumbs up on the ambience. It's my habit to always order a sampler whenever I visit a microbrewery as it really provides an overall view of the place's expertise on brewing. This place stood out as it provided option of light ale which tasted better than lager (I have never experienced this earlier).

Stout was the game changer as the taste was really good and the bitterness was just right. Food options were good and we ordered Moroccan chicken, chettinad prawns and mutton pepper. All were delicious.

Recommended for foodies and beer lovers.

Author: Naveen
Description:
Another Brew Pub with good varieties of beer and great dishes. The non-veg platters were great. The cost is higher than other pubs of similar level.

One important negative point being, we have been offered sample on all types of beers in the pub and finally those have included in the bill i.e., we have been charged Rs.240+taxes additionally. The point to be noted is, we neither asked for the sample beers nor they mentioned that is chargeable.

Author: Poorna Subramanyam
Description:
Biere club is one of my favourite place in banglore. Pub with brewery. Their beers are must try. Food is just delicious. Friendly staff. Ambience is calm cozy. Highly recommend and one of the best place in banglore for brewery's.

Taste 5/5
Ambience 5/5
Service 5/5

Author: Sayantan Mandal
Description: Brilliant ambiance, brilliant music, brilliant service and more brilliant beers! Each and every beer is better than the other! You are a party animal, then surely it's your place! You want to have 2 or 3 drinks with your loved ones, then also it's your place! Sheer brilliance in every nook and corner of this place! :-)

Author: Ujjwal Agarwal
Description: Best beer in bangalore along with really good pizzas... Have been here a couple of times and have not been disappointed.. Beer lovers a must visit.... The atmosphere is amazing during any important games when people can chill with friends...

Author: Devansh Kataria
Description: This is one place I have visited time and again. Love the location and ambience of this place. The variety of brews available is good enough to keep you engaged in a long conversation you are having with the people you are with. Weekend nights are usually a packed house with an acceptable waiting time. The choice of music is a big contributor in making the experience enjoyable. The place feels lively for a weekend night or for that matter any other night with a decent struggle involved in getting the food order across your table. As per myself, a must visit place with a group of people.

Author: Vinay Kumar
Description:
4,well this 4/5 is given by me for the food and beer.I really love this place the beer is just too good(stout). The wrapped sausages were really juicy and well done. Chicken wings were also good nothing wow about it.
The grilled chicken nachos were just at par.
The pizza was a complete disappointment.
Coming to the service,I had a few friends along with me and frankly speaking we were not treated well.we ask for a glass of water they take 10min,we ordered a pitcher they made us wait for half an hour. And in top of that they took 10min to serve the beer I go on calling them they just walk as if we are not there.
And the only thing which I got as soon as I asked was the "bill".

Well,overall the service here is not that appreciating.

Author: Suraksha Mattoo
Description:
Watta drink I had!!! Apple juice with pineapple froth. Very distinctive taste. We repeated our pita bread and hummus. My friends enjoyed their beer and I hogged on mini burgers.
Will surely repeat that hummus and pita bread!!

Author: Anjani Jajodia
Description: Perfectly named.... its a club.. sit on the top floor.. dnt miss out LIT. It hits u...it hits u hard.. fantastic ambiance...wonderful food..u can yell, dance, talk, date, sit alone.... no1s gonna bother u...its u and ur evening...pizzas are a must try..

Author: Gijo George
Description: The ambience and the interiors of the place just set the tone for a beautiful evening! The staff are very Courteous and would rate a 4/5!! A must try here would their wheat beer and the non veg platter! Good food and good music collection and neither do they play it that loud that you would have to shout at the top of your voice to have a decent conversation.

Author: Dipti Jashnani
Description:
I live in Indiranagar and there r so mny places to visit there that I never go out of my area. This time i decided to step out n im glad i did. This place is just awesme. Perfect beer, yummy food n everything perfect. On a tuesday nite it was buzzing with so much energy and full of life....
We ordered mezze platter n it jst blew us away. It was so tasty much more than i can describe!!! Their brewery is so fine thatthe beer was fabulous
Overall a must visit for everybody...

Author: Sneha Vishwanath
Description: Good food. Was the only  place which also allowed stags. Music was also okay. Food was good. Drinks were also good. It's on the expensive side.

Author: Sanjib Das
Description: This is the first microbrewery in Bangalore and still holding the flag of being pioneer. Actually I dont have much things to say about this place as already it is so famous. Location Location & Location is the huge plus point. 3 Floor Brewery has a very cosmopolitan crowd always. Beer and Food is worth my rating. Weekends dont expect to get table if not booked in advance. Cheers!!

Author: Srimaitri Hazra
Description: A three storey restaurant, this place has a very good ambiance. There is a pool table and a foosball table. Beer tasted good. The staff are ever smiling. The food wasn't satisfactory though. Overall, a good experience.

Author: Mythreyi
Description: I went there with friends on a Sunday for lunch, and the place wasn't as crowded as the other places nearby. The ambience was good, but could have been better if the music was not so loud. The pizzas were good and The salads were amazing. Service could have been a little faster. Definitely a place I would suggest to my friends.

Author: Vinila
Description: Good beer & decent food. But did not find the place great. Definitely not worth the hype. Definitely found toit better. Best thing about the place is the cost of beer. Much better than other breweries considering the quantity.

Author: Gp Pradeep
Description: Good menu.Food was great,spicy ! Pizzas are good.But the ambiance need to be improved-music tracks could have been selected with more care.Alcohol was great but service tax really Is a bumber.

Author: Satyaki Dutta
Description: This one is huge, spread across three levels. The ambience is great. The in-house brewed drinks taste good too. The food they serve falls a little short of awesome. Overall, a nice place to hang out. Music was not that great though.

Author: Pankaj Jindal
Description:
Food: 4.5
Drinks: 4.0
Service: 2.5

Had to wait 20 mins before anyone came to ask for order on a weekday (not even crowdy). And even he left mid way to handle something. They need to hire more waiting staff.

Author: Subin Jacob
Description: The ambiance is awesome the music was nice they have a courtyard with an open sky witch just add to the whole ambiance to a different level and the staff is courteous the brewery is good and the food is great...

Author: Supratim Ghosh
Description:
In Short: fantastic location. Buzzing crowd. Good beer and good variety of food in the menu. Courteous waiters helps in choosing the food and drink you would like to have.
But I guess my hard luck with good steak continues. I asked for a medium done and got a well done meat. Though the server apologised but my feeling of love at first sight was over by then.

Saying that I will like to visit them once again for the beautifully crafted Ale and Lager.

Author: Aditi Bhardwaj
Description:
Favorite place in Bangalore... Perfect ambience for a Friday evening drink... Amazing beer.... Superb food !! Be it the starters, main course, desserts, the fries or the chicken... The crowd is neat and they host events like stand up comedy shows and all... Open air seating that's a smoking zone with couple of board games
The service is nice too... Quick and clean
Sit on the bar counter or just on the normal seats... The music is just right
If you make it in time there is not going to be a waiting too
Just the best beer place in the city !!!

Author: Nithya
Description:
Visited this place on Thursday afternoon!
Hubby and I have actually decided to visit brew pubs.therefore with the help of zomato ventured here.
We ordered club special and mango flavoured beer both were good. In fact it was decent.
Starters were pototo platter that's a combo of French fries, masala fries and wedges,bacon wrapped sausages,chicken nachos these were all tasty no comments but the portion just don't match the pricing meaning the portions are very small!! And the chicken nachos was like a treasure hunt for chicken.
Main course was chicken burger and pork vindaloo with rice. The burger was tasty and decent sized. But the vindaloo and rice was extremely poor quantity. In fact the taste of vindaloo was very bad though it was highly recommended by the waiter. Come on paying so much at least our tummy should be full, which was not the case.
Then desert was blueberry cheesecake and deep fried bars the fried bars was just one deep fried bounty bar with probably few grams of ice cream! And the cheesecake was actually some cake. I have never seen or eaten something like that and that too called as cheese cake! It was very different and not cheese cake.
Then the funny part was we had to order main course before 3pm as the kitchen for main course close at 3! That's very weird but we could request the waiter to hold our order till we finished our drink!
Actually we paid a very very very fat bill of almost 5k for the above which would have at least been OK if we were satisfied with the food.
Anyways was an experience!

Author: Astha Pawar
Description: It's always the experiences and memories you create at a place that makes it special. It was the second time in biere club and it was as awesome as the first time. The awesome beer try the seasonal mango biere, if its available) amazing food, excellent staff, and the wonderful ambience. Absolutely delightful. :) :)

Author: Akash Poddar
Description: The ambience and the set up is nice. Their brewed beer is good. The food was disappointing for us. The music and beer sets the mood  but the food disappoints. The staffs are friendly.

Author: Ali Esa
Description: Located so central that you access all walking around it. Including the UB City. What a choice of beer that too fresh. Amazing food choice. well done ambiance. Music to compliment it over all. The good Bangalore crowd of course adds to the charm of the lively place. Priced quiet reasonable.

Author: Nikheel Kedia
Description:
Lavelle Road has so much to offer... The corner spot is taken by The Biere Club... It has an excellent open seating which combined with the amazing Bangalore weather makes for a great evening...

The ambiance inside is set well and music compliments it well... It is crowded even on weekdays and i am sure; they have regulars coming in too...

The food was a disappointment for me and so was the service... The Hummas platter was still decent but the pizza samosas were bad tasting and even thought i left the same the waiter did not bother inquiring... a request to change my seating was also declining sighting reasons which din feel serious enough to me...

Overall a good place to have a fun evening...

Author: Bharat Tiwari
Description:
This as the name suggests is the place to go to for some decent brewed beer. They have 5/6 types of beers and also seasonal mixes that they do which keep changing. Food is ok.

Go here for a good evening with friends and ofcourse beer 🍻!!

Author: Shwetha Shanmugam
Description: Situation just a few metres away from UB City. One the first breweries in Bangalore. They have a variety of brews and the give you tasters in shot glasses for you to choose your option. The food is also good and their finger foods are a good option for the brews. They have shows and acts as well nowadays (stand-up comedies etc) which is awesome. On the whole not a bad experience.

Author: Mona Boro
Description: The freshly brewed beer especially wheat beer is amazing. The food is good too.. With The quality of beer the prices are reasonable. The place has awesome environment and the music that they place is good.. You can dance too.. Rooftop is amazing..

Author: Maya Ramesh
Description: The Biere Club is located on one of the finest areas in Bangalore, right next to the famous UB City. Adding to my tour of microbreweries in the city, the Biere Club definitely ranks among the best. Tad bit on the expensive side, it is recommended to ensure a table reservation is advance, especially over the weekend. The music is amazing, they have a fussball table and snooker table, and has some fine crowd turning up here. The beer is definitely delicious, try the Mango Beer since it's the seasonal favourite. :)

Author: Anirban Banerjee
Description: Nothing special about the place. The service is beyond pathetic.. Drinks are very random. Food not great. Neither the ambience is very good. A total let down. Ha expected this to be a nice place!! The waiter especially was disgusting. He kept on telling 5 minutes thrice when we said please take the order. Placing the order is such a task.. Forget about when u gonna get it. I felt like i will get my order only the next day.. This place needs to work on the service or should shut down!

Author: Shivani Shah
Description: This centrally located pub is great on a night of pub hopping. It has everything and more a good pub should have. Great food, great music, great ambiance, etc. Their suggested dishes Meatballs Tossed In Hot Tomato Salsa, The Biere Club Plank Pizza's From the Wood Fried Oven are really great and a must try. Will visit again soon. It is on the more expensive side but i must say that most people would find it worth it itself. It gives good competition to all its nearby competitors. It is one of my favourite places to hang out.

Author: Vishnu Rai
Description:
A crazy friday night of pub hopping started with Biere Club with the usual gang. I have always liked the place, nice ambience, space is just about right, neither sprawling nor congested.
Ground floor size just about seems comfortable, good music yet you can talk. We couldn't get any table, so stood at the counter, which is alright with me, I like watching bartenders work their magic & chatting them up is always a pleasure.
Tried the Mango beer sampler, which isn't bad at all, just didn't feel like spoiling my mango taste buds, summer is still on, so!
I continued with the wheat beer. 
We ended up cutting short our visit to hop onto the next door neighbour, but the short period of time that we spent there was fun. Need to go again to do a proper review & more importantly enjoy the food there.

Author: Vinay Tiwari
Description:
One of the best places for craft beers in Bangalore.Ambience reminds me of crowded market place. My ratings
DRINKS 4*
FOOD 4*
SERVICE 4*
AMBIENCE 5*

Author: Apoorva Nath
Description:
I had a bad service experience ... We reserved a table for 8:30 but it started raining and everyone knows how bad traffic gets so we informed them we'll be late. After getting a cab with a lot of difficulty and walking in dirty water we get there and everyone (3 people) is showing us the watch ... Absolute mood spoiler ... Seriously !!!

Now that we've got that out of the way ... The beer is good ... I tried wheat beer and my friends tried ale ... We liked both ... Service in terms of time taken to serve the order was fine ...
Food wise ...it was alright ...not too great ...onion rings are nice though ... (Note: I'm talking about vegetarian food)

So yeah! You can give it a shot ... It's a brewery ...one's pretty much looking for the beer... Hope mine was a one off and they are usually courteous (fingers crossed)

As for me - not big on beer drinking and with Sunny's located few steps away - I'm not so sure ;)

Author: Sameer Chillarige
Description: Awesome place with the best beer I've tasted..very retro music takes U back into your teens..lively environment and good service.Definitely a must go.

Author: Tejas Deshpande
Description: Good food and a good collection of beer. Typical bangalorean pub feel to the outlet. Intimate lighting and decent music that plays all day long. Love the wheat beer. Tried a mago beer which wasnt quite for my liking even though I am crazy about mangoes. Do try the non veg platter if assorted is your thing. Can visit.

Author: Rahul Mondal
Description:
This place is close to UB city and I've passed it by many times, so last Sunday, I thought of giving it a try. We had made reservations for the non smoking zone, which is the first floor but when we got there, we changed our mind and proceeded to the first floor which is the smoking zone and were luckily able to get a table.
 I must say, this place is classy and it shows in every aspect, starting from the receptionist, the waiters to the decor. The first floor is like a covered roof top and has a nice pool table at the center. They also have a foosball table by the bar. The waiters were very courteous as they brought us the menu, which I must say is a bit limited. We ordered cheese nachos, a caesar salad and bacon wrapped sausages along with a mug of hefeweizen and their special brewed strong beer. The waiters happily obliged when I asked them to add olives and jalapenos (which does not usually come with a caesar salad) to my salad. The beer was delicious, probably one of the best in town. I was quite happy as the bacon wrapped sausages, though deep fried, had very less oil. The mustard sauce which came along seemed freshly prepared as it had a strong aroma. The nachos came topped with cream and hot molten cheese and were delightful. Another good thing is that they don't charge for playing pool (which almost every other pub in town does).

Overall, I loved the entire setup. Would come back soon!


*****************************************************

30/04/2019
Its been four years that I wrote this review, and this place is still one of my favourite breweries in town!
Adding a few more photos.
Cheers!

Author: Santosh Bollina
Description:
Best in town ! Every time I am in Banglore this is the first place I head to !
To be honest there are quite a few brewery places but this by far is the best I've had !

Author: Live To Eat
Description:
Nice strout beer .. Black beer is nice brewed well the bitterness is awesome .. My friend had a mango beer ..!! Was ok but was taken by surprise .. The snacks are nice but a little heavy in the pocket..
It's a steep place so .. Watch what u order

Author: Nikhil Hegde
Description: One of the first breweries in Bangalore. Pretty good food and the at beer! Could do with dimmer lighting as far as ambience is concerned . Always a visit!

Author: Rahul Maney
Description: One thing you must have is the " wheat beer" at bier club. One of my favorite jaunts in bangalore, bier club never ceases to amaze me. Crowd ranges from the prim and proper dressed business men to the flip flop wearing college dude, seemingly coming together in a group of beer loving public. Has 2 sections which makes a lot of sense for smokers. Food is typical pub grub, hence tasty and not for the calorie conscious .5 stars if they can add more variety to flavoured beers.

Author: Anamika Suresh
Description:
Bierre clubbb !!! Visited here last sun . We had a good seat where we could view the entire ambience of the pub . The ambience is fantastic with excellent wall art . Starting off , we ordered the beers for tasting and we chose what we liked . We ordered the starters.. A bucket of potato wedges and fries . Then we ordered a Veg and Non Veg platter . Then we ordered squid & bacon which was ok and a chilli coriander chicken which was fantastic . The mayo dip was superb . Moving on to main course we ordered a Chicken Quesadilla which was good , 2 mixed grill platters was good but the beef was very tough and the pork in it were a little tough too . The pork chops had a good marinade but was little tough , grilled smoked chicken pizza was very good . The staff was very courteous and encouraging and was happy to help . Overall , we had a good experience .

Cheers
Bon Apetit ! :)

Author: Mohit Kumar
Description: If I have to review this place will say a must visit for microbreweries , they claim that the first breweries in South . But seriously I like their beer and the food also really tastes great . Nice located at Lavelle Road , hard to find table during weekend. But over all good place would recommend to visit anytime if you are in a mood to have fresh brewery.

Author: Namo Kaul
Description: Great Beer ! Good Food !What can be better it the interiors and one small thing that troubled me a little when i last visited was a rat which i happened to see inside. Can be improved on. Again no question on the awesomeness of the Beer !!

Author: Kamal
Description: My most favourite micro-brewery in a city where you find one in every corner. The beers are really good. The servers are not haughty as in many other places but are rather friendly and make customers feel comfortable..

Author: Arpan Peter
Description: Was having a great time here till we had a flying Roach. Will be really nice if this place gets a pest control. What's worse the guests you were hosting were absolutely grossed out. Obviously.

Author: Jaisinh Vaerkar
Description:
This is a good place for catching up with friends.

The place is spacious and cheerful with good food options.


I was however, disappointed with their full English breakfast which served highly processed chicken sausages instead of pork and burnt toast.

Their beers are good and I enjoyed their summer ale.

Author: Sandhya Surendran
Description: I like the place but I hate the crowd. Prices are not reasonable. Service is just about ok. Food is great, booze is great - their saving grace! Do not however, go to their sister concern Biere Street. They are not half as good as the main branch.

Author: Jayant Mahishi
Description: The first time I was here, I fell in love with the club. The beer tasted a lot different than the ones we drank from bottles. The food is good too. The place is good for friends to hang out.

Author: Swapna Laxman
Description: Great ambience , good food and with good company, its the best place to chill out. Make sure to get there quick or reserve a seat for yourself.

Author: Jacob Cherian
Description: i quite enjoyed the beer here.. i forgot how surpisingly reasonable this Lavelle Road brewery is. i was in a burger mood and unfortunately the bread wasn't in stock. if it was i'm sure i would have rated it even higher. but no worries, the tenderloin steak was great! i'd give it an 8 on 10. Medium rare was very well done (pun intended). in other words, it was done just right. It did not fill me up though, which is surprising for a fairly solid steak. Maybe i was just extra hungry that afternoon. So i went on to order a whole other pizza and proceeded to polish off more than half by myself.. Good pizza, but not mindblowing! It was the Ham, Salami and Chorizo. The sticky toffee and date with icecream dessert was excellent!

Author: Manish Sharma
Description: I'm a regular here and love the convenient location. Keeps me going back despite the average beer. Above average food. Good for a quickie or a boys night out. Have had some pretty poor service experiences, though.

Author: Shivansh Magan
Description:
A perfect place for a evening hangout. Located near UB city mall on lavelle road. They have a good range of craft beer's and decent starters to go along with it. The ambience is pretty good with nice music.
Not to heavy on pocket can be a good option to visit for a drink. Will rate 4.0/5.0.

Author: Happy Garg
Description: Very poor experience, food was aweful, staff behaviour sucked to the core... Very slow service... One of my friend had ordered well done steak and she got rare steak ... The chicken was also undercooked...they didn't even provide us knife fork tissue papers... Behavior of staff was such as if they are doing us some charity... Highly overrated place... Not recommended... Might have had been first microbrewery of south India but now it has lost it touch...don't go here...

Author: Jithin Reddy
Description: located in the most happening area of bangalore, this place doesn't live up to the expectations. Sober interiors and sober crowd adds to your disappointment. The only good thing about this place is their food. do not go by the name and expect varieties of brewed beer, they only serve one flavour, which will not even live up to your expectation.

Author: Saibal Das
Description:
The Biere Club is my first brewery in Bangalore. Loved the ambience. I had gone there twice with friends and both times had a great evening. Its a conversation haven.

The food here is good as well. The place will kick you in your pocket but the beer is worth the #kangaali ;)

Good place for a college group. Go for the Stout! #gulpinall

Author: Anirudh Bapna
Description:
Great ambience.... Equally good food n beer.... Ideal place to go on a weekend afternoon and enjoy the bangalore scenic beauty...
Service is the only aspect which really needs improvement..!!
Pratik Rai

Author: Lord Thor Of Asgard, Nine Realms
Description: You gotta visit this place for the ribs, amazing. Stay not, but order to go before the stale stench gets the better of you. No, you dont have to reinvent the wheel, aircons that work exists.

Author: Kabir
Description: The beer and food here are decent but the prices are a bit high compared to other microbreweries. However, what really did it for me was the terrible service I recently experienced here. Early on a Friday afternoon, before it even got too crowded, service seemed to move at a snail's pace. We had to wait 20 minutes just to place our order. Everytime I tried to waive the waiter over, he seemed to not take notice (or ignore me - I'm genuinely not sure which). Later he could be seen causally chatting up his friends behind the bar while several tables went without service in the dining area. This kind of unresponsive service is simply unacceptable to me at the prices they charge here.

Author: Madhava Chandra
Description:
Chilled out.
Been here a couple of times. The food is quite ok. Beers pretty good. Service on the slower side owing to huge crowds on weekends. Ambience is a relaxing if you plan to hang out with friends over beers and large tables to shout out to each other.
Food 3/5,
Ambience 3.5/5,
Drinks 4/5,
Service 3/5,
VFM 3.5/5.

Author: Saurav Basu
Description:
One of the finest microbreweries in this haven...We ordered a sampler first to decide on which one to order. I went for the stout and a wheat lager...very smooth and tasty.
Non veg platter didn't turn out that great on a whole, wood fried pizza was awesome.
This place gets mad by 11 with loud music and people dancing crazy at times on tables.

Author: Varun G Manay
Description: I wouldn't probably go back here because they would only serve brewed beer, so if your expecting any bottled beers don't be here. Otherwise the ambience and seating perfect! Any day worth a visit, got good crowd.

Author: Vikram Joshi
Description:
Plus:

Location: It is at the junction of Vittal Mallya and Lavelle road, close to UB City and thts a major plus point

Ambience: Basic , nothing very fancy works well. No loud music which is a welcome change frm other pubs

Beer: Great choice of around 6 different beers brewed in house. I personally like the dark All Malt Beer and another brew which has an alcoholic content of 7%

Service: good and friendly

Minus:

Food: not so much of a minus , but the food choice could have been better. They just have a non veg platter, chicken wings and chicken drumsticks

Price: Beer and food dont come cheap at a place like this and at this location

Author: Atig Bagchi
Description:
I went here in a huge group and was grumpy coz we reached around closing time. Coming from Mumbai, the fact that places in Bengaluru close this early is a bummer and it reflected in my mood. And thus comes my disclaimer: I have no clue what food was ordered! I can recollect chicken wings, fries and sausages wrapped in bacon.

The brews here are good but not the best I've had. When I asked them to get me a full bodied beer, they were clueless and that is sad. So I settled with a blonde wheat beer and a (tad too dark) ale. The ale was strong for my palate and the wheat beer was refreshing.

So thus ends the worst review I've written in a while - I go in to a place near its closing time, get angry, eat finger food and decent beer. And that's that!

Author: Ankur Sen
Description:
3.5/5 ambiance

4.5/5 Price- Value for Money

4/5 - food

4.5/5 Service

Good place, good locality - amazing place for having fresh beers! Mojito Beer is my favorite, Think crust chicken Pizza is awesome here. Even good for vegies

If you are beer lover and plus you want try some great eateries - it is the place.

Author: Ash
Description:
At 8 pm, this place was crowded as usual. We waited for a good 15 minutes before getting a table for two in second floor.

Our choices of brewed beer were wheat and seasonal. Both were worth the try. As the crowd started turning crazy, we ordered onion rings and nachos beans to go along with our sippings.

I was'nt too happy with the onion rings. They had mashed the onions, battered with beer and deep fried. Came in a stand having a pole in the middle to which they were stacked to. They could've been better.

Nachos for a price of 260 were very little. They could have had equal circular distribution of guac and sour cream. But, they held them as a dollops on top side to side and did not serve much of a purpose other than damping the chips underneath them to a greater extent. The taste was standard, so no much disappointment. But, they could've been a bit more generous in their portion when the price is considered.

We left this restaurant after paying a bill of 1200. I wasnt too happy or too sad with the experience. But, will I go back again? I really doubt it. I can spot better breweries compared to this.

Author: Chhavi Agrawal
Description:
Great place to hang out with friends on any day of the week!
Quirky ambience and light music make it even better to catch up with pals.
The first floor has a foosball table and a pool table which provide even more options of having fun!
Kudos!

Author: Ananth Kishore
Description:
Hmm. When I think of biere club the first thing I can ever think of is the wheat beer. I don't know if its beer or not cause its so damn tasty. I have been here like a lot of times yet it never gets bored.
The ground floor is more suitable for a business discussion over beer.
But if you want to get drunk enjoy music , its always the top floor :P
I recommend people to go there by late evening , cause that's when its happening :)
Last but not the least do not forget to eat Mediterranean Pizza cause its too great :)

Author: Lavish
Description:
The 1st microbrewery of Banglore , still have not lost its efficiency and standards . Went on a Monday . And it was full by 8 pm.
It's a 2 floor place , each with a different decor but all vibrant . Though the place is a bit crampy , with tables quite near to each other .We sat on top floor .
Beer - better of the lot in Bangalore , but not upto arbor / Toit / big pitcher . Left a lot desired in terms of brew . We had their wheat / dark / seasonal . Wheat is their best .
Food - though tasty and presented well , but portions are damn small for the price .
We ordered an array of starters - veg siZzler/ chicken tikka / Panner chilly / bruschetta / garlic prawns / tandoori chicken / nachos / onion rings .... All good but small portions and that is why we had to keep on ordering ...
Service - good but could be better and more efficient . They weren't able to take order properly , might be a trainee .
All in all -
Food - 4
Ambience - 3
Service - 3
Beer -3.5

Author: Sam
Description: The Biere Club is one of ma favourite place to hang out. Their crafted beer is one of the best in town. It's got a very relaxed ambience and you could hang out at noon or in the evening. Assorted fries and pizza served over here is really upto the mark. The fries are crisp and it's thin crust pizza is fresh. Staff at Biere Club are friendly and their response is great.  Overall it's a good place.

Author: Nupur Awasthi
Description:
After reading all the great reviews about this place, me and my husband decided to visit it. Let me say that it met all my expectations. The ambience is really nice with a nice view of the lavelle road.
The food was really goood. They serve fries in a cute little bucket and the pizza was yummy. They have their own brewery and the beer was great.
Staff was very attentive and courteous.
And there was snooker which made our time even better. They also have foosball.
Overall we had a great time and I will definitely re-visit this place.

Author: Chandann Reddy
Description: Typical pub interiors and very good variety of beers. Didn't try all of them but what Eva we had were great. Food was so so could have been better.

Author: Faheem Hameed
Description:
Excellent ambience with a lot of solid woodwork and that beast of a micro brewery chugging in the background. I see bit of proclivity for 90's rock which seems passe at times and takes a little away from the ambience. But that minor (possibly uniquely particular) complaint aside, this place is hard not to love.

The home brews are outstanding. I especially love their wheat beer. Slightly sweet, light and gives a really smooth buzz. The food is pretty good as well. Do not miss their sausage platter and pepperoni pizza.

Will most definitely visit again, as I already have.

Author: Sandesh Cadabam
Description:
I personally feel the service and the food is not the same as before. 'Club special' is a must try for all the beer lovers.

Pizzas were average!!

Author: Sunish Vohra
Description:
Situated in the prime location Near UB city mall on Lavelle road. Have 3 floor seatings with really nice n happening ambience.
We decided to sit on the top floor which happened to be open without windows. The Bar looks nice. Yes it does. Tried their crafted brews and were not much impressed. Not bad though. Chicken nachos were definitely a thing to order as munchies. Everything else is good about And be prepared for a bit rude Service ppeople
Brew-3.5/5
Food-4/5
Service -1/5
Ambience -5/5
Visit again - sure to try other stuff
Recommend - Yes!!

Author: Pradeep Bogadi
Description: I only knew that beer exists and it is wonderful on ones taste buds but this biere club is something else. U get flavours in beers wch makes it very interesting. A nice hang out but a lil on d expensive side..

Author: Sidharth Mohanty
Description: If Beer comes into your mind..Then it's the place where you get the best beer in town.Go for the Belgian Strong with Bacon Ham Sausage with Mustard Sauce.pizza are excellent too.

Author: Zain Hasan
Description:
Ambiance -  4/5 The Biere Club is one of the many Club/Pub/Brewery that adorn the Lavelle Road. Built in 3 floors there is ample seating place on all the floors with a different experience on every floor. We sat on the ground floor and the decor was really nice. The Cartoon scene of a pub that ran along an entire wall is a masterpiece.

My friend and I visited this Brewery on a Sunday evening, what was initially meant to be a pit-stop before we headed to the original dinner place selection, we decided to stay back because unlike other breweries this wasn't as crowded and noisy.

Food & Beverages - 3/5
Here's what we ordered,

A sampler Stack
A Mock Biere
A Stout
A portion of Hummus, Falafel and crispy lavosh chips
and a half and half of 'Chicken Salami & Caramelized onions' and Ham, Salami and Chorizo.

From what my friend tells me she loved the stout, the mock biere was good.The Hummus was very bland and the flavorless, the falafel was fine.

Our biggest disappointment was the pizza. We very specifically ordered a half and half and gave clear instructions of what we wanted and yet we ended up getting the wrong order. Upon pointing it out to the waitstaff here's what we got as a response "Now we've made it sir". Not my bloody problem, I gave clear instructions and you goofed up, take it back and get me the right one. So upon our insistence the guy took it back and minutes later brought back what you see in the picture. To describe it my friend very aptly put it and I quote "They just slapped some salami and soggy onions on it".

Service - 2/5 
Service is pretty slow and from the experience listed above very unprofessional.

Cost - 2.5/5
If they charge 300+ on service tax for service as lousy as this I may as well put on a green shirt  and take up part time job here. Easy money with minimal effort at work, ROI never looked this good.

Note: We did many other appetizing dishes being ordered and served around and would love to come visit to try those out on other floors as well.

Author: Kartik Balasubramaniam
Description:
Top Notch. Tasty food. Tasty Beer. 

This place simply hits every note you need. Probably the best beer around the city, and some really tasty pizza, burgers, fries and omelettes to go with it.  

At a minimum, you are guaranteed not to go home disappointed with anything.

Author: Pradipta Poddar
Description: Good place ,ambient...the food is good! Breakfast pizza is something which should be tried!!!! :) and beer-golden ale too!!! Service was okie..

Author: Subin
Description: Love their Ale, Wheat and Stout beer... !!! Starters are okayish..!! The ambience on MG Road is ok.. Whitefield is much better..!! This is a awesome place to hang out with friends..!!

Author: Saagar Gavri
Description: Great beer and super service. I wish I could say the same for the ambience and the crowd. Maybe you'd like to cross the road and jump over to Bootlegger.

Author: Evangelyne
Description:
The madness on the streets surrounding this place is nothing compared to the delicious madness you'll enjoy in every bite at Bierre Club! After reading plenty of postive reviews and seeing this place constantly circulate on Zomato, I knew that I had stop by and see what everyone was praising during my time in that part of town.

It was a late Sunday morning, and it was pretty empty when we entered the place. 
Once inside, I was able to observe this uniquely classic styled restaurant. Graphic knickknacks outlined the walls of this place with lovely wooden floors that followed. The front of house immediately took our orders and brought us our water. The 2 of us took up the seat near the balcony, front and side facing the open road. It was fun watching the world run by while we were relaxing away!

Now the service was stellar! Our waiter was a free spirit. My friend and I both ordered the full English Breakfast and Thick Wedges of French Toast with Bacon and Maple Syrup, along with a Stout of Black & Tan (Similar to The Dark Lord and Le Kapitan).

The stout was delicious, a counter-intuitive beautiful beer mixture where the dark thick stout sits atop a lighter honey-coloured lager .I couldn't taste the alcohol for that matter, but it was still good.  

FULL ENGLISH: TWO FRIED EGGS, BACON, SAUSAGE, GRILLED TOMATO, BAKED BEANS, SAUTEED MUSHROOMS AND HASH BROWNS.

The good:

1) Lots of meaty chunks of flavorful bacon in every bite.

2) The eggs were cooked perfectly.
This was the first time I've had great hash browns. They were well-made and quite crispy.

The bad:

1) I hate tomatoes. I still wonder why they put them, when folks hardly ever eat them. Such a waste of space.ugh.

2) The baked beans were the usual. Canned and sweetened and felt horrible to eat them.

Overall very good for my first time there. I'm still in a food coma 2 hours later.
Bierre Club is one place you cannot miss if you're in this part of town!

Author: Snehasis Ghosh
Description:
This is a very nice place. We went on a Friday evening without reservation and luckily we found a place here. The staff was extremely polite and the ambiance was quite lively. I love open air sitting, so that's another plus point. They have 4 'swing' like seatings which is perfect for a romantic evening.  Although they were occupied when we came in, we got to sit on one of them after an hour or so.

As for the food, we only starters. Me being a non veg and my friend being veg we had to order both.  Every item we ordered were good to decent.  Nothing that I didn't like but at the same time, nothing that blew my mind. This goes for both veg and the non veg items.

As for the drinks, we ordered cocktails after cocktails . From iced teas to martinis, everything. My friend being a bigger drunk, she had 6 cocktails. I had 4. Just as the food, all of them good to great.

Oh and if you're lucky, one of the waiters would come to your table and perform some party tricks. That was quite amusing.

All in all, I had a great time here. No complaints. Surely a place I might visit again.

Author: Adesh Tg
Description: Been here on a stand up night and these guys have one of the best lager in town which goes very well with the potato wedges ,their crowd management was apt given the show circumstances ,best place to chill

Author: Vidya Lakshmi
Description:
I've always keep going to Biere Club.... the decor has changed and looks spacious. we were seated in the game room the space was pretty much empty at 8 to my surprise but by 9 it was full. I always love their pizzas and pasta and totally recommend to try them all. 

Beer is freshly brewed the flavor are amazing I ordered the shandy and was waiting for all my friends to arrive Shandy is a cocktail lager and lemonade i would call this a ladies drink was totally refreshing.

Once all my friends arrived all of us settled down a bit and ordered for the biere bombs its a glass of beer of your choice with fun shots we had coffee kick which is lager with coffee stout. this was yumm so tasty never ever tasted anything like this before...

Then from the cocktail we had the L.I.I.B  which was served in cutting chai glasses totally looked funny and tasted real good..I loved all the combination...

Finally after all that beers and fun cocktails we had starters paneer satay, corn curd, chips and dips...cheesy tomato samosa...

 
Paneer satay was perfectly grilled was served with a peanut sauce....cheesy samosa was bang on the gooey cheese and tomato masala was perfect starter along with a chill lager..I've never tasted corn curd before it was crispy and tossed in garlic and chillies was totally yum...

we were not done with beer so there was second round of starters crispy deep fried  beer batter basa, beef and potato puffs, prawn and mutton chettinad, dragon chicken...

Beer batter basa along with mint chutney was too good almost melting in my mouth, mutton chettinad was cooked to perfection more than the meat we tptally loved the prawns it was too good the balance of spices was super the fish was fresh and was so tasty...

we were full at this point but wanted to taste the mains and had pork vindaloo, tortellini, rice and thai red chicken curry we had all the mains in small portions...what i liked from the mains was the tortellini and pork vindaloo...will totally recommend you try this...

for desserts we had sticky toffee pudding, strawberry ice cream, beer battered bounty bar in ice cream...the cutting chai theme was on bounty bar was served in cutting chai glass...so was the strawberry ice cream we loved the fusion experience here and will keep coming here for more...

Thank you so much for reading my review have a blessed day ahead...

Author: Anant Vidur Puri
Description: Biere Club is an awesome place for a nite out with close chums. Good beer - especially the LIIB and amazing food. Plus they often have comedy nights which are pretty fun. It's a largish place with both indoor and outdoor seating with the roof providing a pretty good ambience. Good variety of beer and I love their Wheat. The food is excellent as well particularly the prawns!

Author: Audrey Coutinho
Description: Really liked the ambience of the place.. very comfortable, good seating and colours. The waiters were friendly and really nice in general. Huge variety of drinks and quite a good amount of food. I ordered a crispy chicken burger and thoroughly enjoyed it! Big, juicy burger totally worth it's price. The music was good and low initially (8 pm) but got louder and noisier over time.

Author: Shailesh
Description:
Very good options for the beers...nice time to spend evenings....book your place if going on weekends.... Food is ok...but good crowd and beers....worth a visit
..

Author: Revathi
Description: This used to be my fav place... Went this time, music was just too loud. I requested to lower it a bit, asked two helpers.. One ignored me... Pretended to serve my request. The other one politely refused saying there this was how the speakers were! Water was offered late. Food n drinks were ok. But the billing was prompt!! Lost its charm...

Author: Siddhant Prasad
Description: Really liked the non veg  platter and pork pizza that we ordered.The chutneys accompanying the platter were very Indian masala based  and strangely appealing personally.Was a tad bit disappointed with the service because they didn't offer water until after we had our beers .loved the graffiti on the ground floor

Author: Jubin George
Description: Amazing place. Good crowd. Love the brewery. Needs a nice smoking area. Pretty good food :) best place around UB city for the weekends. Peace.

Author: Sharan Dhanala
Description: Great place for beers but not a preferable one for non - beer drinkers. Food was great and the place is seats decent number of people. Will be back if I am a beer drinker but unfortunately I am not. :-)

Author: Ankur Deswal
Description: When I visited the Biere Club, they did not have their iconic Wheat beer. They brought me other four varieties and despite being a beer enthusiast and having developed a sound taste for different types of draught beers, I could not wash down even one of them. I finally ordered the strong beer, somehow got through it and it was indeed strong. I rate this place 3.5 for its really good food. Stuffed cheese mushrooms were decent, but its Morrocon Chicken was "exquisite". Its wood burnt pizza was brilliant and all this food somewhat compensated for its mediocre beer. If you want to visit this place, go there for its food rather than its beer.

Author: Sweta
Description:
Superb ambience,best brew,lovely people n good food.
Do try the pepperoni pizza ,the lamb mini burgers n my favorite stout ;).
Loved this place ,tops my list for now!:)
Cheers!

Author: Khyati Bhatia Purohit
Description:
Not much beer lover.. i had tasters though.. its was average for me.
Cocktail was good.
The BEST WAS HUMMUS AND FALAFEL. 
must try this.... yummy and refreshing

Author: Raghu Prasad
Description: This is still 1 of my fav beer place despite there are more than a dozen place who brew their own. Location makes it desirable, pizza is not bad and the place is huge. Love it here on Sundays for its laidback atmosphere

Author: Arjun Ramesh
Description: Ahh one of my favourite place the best wheat beer in town great food great service great music everything's just great here be there if u haven't but don't go here if your a football fan or any sports and surprisingly because they have no hd channels at all and I really hope they do install it as soon as they can

Author: Nik
Description:
I finally visited The Biere Club with a few friends today. The exterior is reminiscent of a quiet bar outside LA county, perhaps Anaheim. Excellent ambiance, quick service and delicious food. As for the brews, I only had the stout, and this was because I personally judge the competence of a microbrewery on the basis of its ability to brew a robust stout - and I wasn't disappointed; hands down the best stout I have ever tasted in Bangalore (watch out Murphy's and Guinness). My friends had the Pomegranate and Green Apple Martinis, they were nice too. We had the Bacon-Wrapped Sausages (one can never go wrong with those) and the Smoked Grilled Chicken Pizza, and it was wonderful. All in all, a pleasant experience, and one I look forward to repeating. 

I would give it a 5.0 but for the excruciatingly loud music - it was great music, good old classics, but the sound system and direction of speakers need to be re-thought.

Author: Tejas Ramaswamy
Description: The very first brew pub in Bangalore if I'm not wrong offering some wonderful starters n pizzas to go with the beer. Really fantastic crowd. The seating reminds you of your good old school days, but Biere club is a different kind of school where u learn to train your senses to get acclimatised to the buzz and the Brew.

Author: Abhishek Gandhi
Description: Biere club has unfortunately become a very ordinary place and it could be one of the first craft breweries in blr to shut out.. Beer is ordinary, drinks are dilute and food is pathetic.. Ordered the fried prawns with barbecue sauce and got them with ketchup instead.. To top it all, the manager is arguing that its barbecue sauce only.. The place definitely needs an overhaul, also change that manager who doesnt know basic sauces..

Author: Kiran Annamdas
Description: They serve excellent food. They brew their own beer, try samplers before ordering one. Ambience is very good. Only bad experience I had was bad staff.

Author: Harsh Jaju
Description:
Located at that corner off lavelle road, Bierre Club boasts of a great location, fine craft beer (Be it Wheat, Ale, Lager or Stout) as well as a great open second floor (much better than the ground and first floor).

They give their tasters in little 'chai' glasses and the place has a nice rustic touch to it. It's got great thin-crust pizzas, absolutely yummy. It's also an apt place for a get-together, small party as they book out the entire ground floor for you. (If you got that many people coming) and offer deals of unlimited craft beer at pretty competitive prices.

A pretty fine place, and from what I hear they got a great breakfast too (Though it starts only by like 11:30). Must try that soon.

Author: Srivatsa
Description: This restaurant gets the best of Bangalore's crowd. True. But if u are a person who doesn't like homemade beer, you're at the wrong place as the restaurant doesn't sell bottled beers.

Author: Nicky Agarwal
Description: It was a sultry afternoon.I was with my best friends.The three of us ,we just wanted some place to go ,sit and relax.And then this place ,the first microbrewery of South India was suggested to us by one of my friends who also happens to be a Banglorean.Big TV screens,wall carvings,English architecture,beer machines around make you feel like you are in some place West.What else can you ask for.Superlative degrees wont suffice to express the quality and flavour of its beer .And their wood fire pizzas are just too good.Staff very humble .Must must visit.

Author: Rohit Goel
Description: I went to this place with a bunch of friends and it was amazing experience..the main thing is that the ambience is superb and the beer tastes very good..must try pizza..staff are courteous  and service is fast...

Author: Priyanka Garga
Description:
This place is really lively during the evenings,
The food is good, filling and full of flavours. The different kinds of beers are worth the try as well as the flaming tower.
Hummus and Pita bread and Non veg platter is a must try.
It's expensive but worth it.

Author: RIHAN ASHRAF
Description: Pretty good ambience... A good place to hang out with frends... Food is good specially the starters like chicken wings..  had tried burger too but it was a bit disappointing.. Little pricy too...

Author: Dnyanesh Deshpande
Description:
Located in a very posh area of Bangalore. Spacious. Remarkably, not crowded on a Friday evening. And thankfully no loud music.

Nice seasonal beer (Saison) and German Pilsner lager, average Stout and English Dark ale.
Coming to food, Bacon wrapped sausage was great, cheese stuffed mushrooms were nice. Very fiery chicken skewers, not for the weak stomached folks.

Overall,
Service - 4/5
Beer - 4/5
Food - 3.5/5

Author: Nidhi Rai
Description:
Perfect afternoon hangout. We sat on the third floor with the tables near the window facing the beautiful Lavelle Road area. The place was bustling at 1 pm with all parties there to cheer India on in the World Cup Semis. But that dint stop the servers from looking after us with efficiency.
The food was the pub grub kinds and the tasty at the same time.

1) If you are not a beer drinker and a looking for a drink to give company to the beer lover, I would suggest the Mock Biere. I was a little against ordering anything that even remotely like beer, but it was delicious! Apple, pineapple and grape juice with soda! Perfect harmony and a cool tall drink for a warm Bangalore afternoon.

2) The Moroccan chicken was a little tough and spicy for my taste. I dint like the pita bread. Thought it dint go too well with the dish

3) The fish n chips appetizer. Full marks for this dish. This is the first time I had a beer batter fried fish n chips, where the batter had the perfect flavor of beer in the dish. The chef's got his measurements hitting the nail! It's the right hint of beer and fish and I would call this the must order appetizer. 

4)The wood fried oven pizza with mushrooms and sun dried tomatoes and some smoked chicken added because we love our pizza with chicken. The pizza was delicious!! Cooked perfectly and generous amount of toppings.

The place is heavy on the pocket even without alcohol so make sure somebody else is paying. :P

Author: Soum Chakraborty
Description:
Biere Club, Lavelle road,Bangalore

This is perhaps one the first Micro brewaries to open in Bangalore on Lavelle Road the street is also coincidently the first micro brewery I have visited as such a concept was bereft in Aamchi Mumbai at that time. Lovely ambience, great music, and amazing array /selection of brews. The whole fresco setup coupled with Bangalore's amazing evening weather make this an place for a get together during my frequent trip to IT City The music is at about the right volume for one and all to catch up. Met up with an old Alumnii Vinod Varghese here at the Biere Club. Cold winter weather very conducive and wonderful in Bangalore was present as well.

Wonderful brew concoction spread over Lager ~Ale~Wheat Beer~Stout Brew and the very own Club Special and Seasonal was available at this microbrewery in the ranges of Rs.275 – Rs.350 /-. What tickled me pink was that a whole array of 8 test tubes representing different brews, spread over Lager ~Ale~Wheat Beer~Stout Brew and the very own Club Special and Seasonal was presented to me for choice as sample at Rs30/- each. I freaked out on this experiment.

Biere Bombs which is a house concoction of Biere Lager Brew plus Jager at Rs.425/- is as lethal as it gets.Tried this as a closure after the 5 mugs of beer. A must try!!!

We were seated in the lower stalls or the section when a PLT friend of my friend ushered us over to the higher mezzanine floor where all the action was beating to the rhythm of the roadhouse rock amidst the cheers and chorus of the excellent rocking crowd.

Finger Foods at galore here and there was no dirth to the food available. Everybody seemed to eating, hogging, guzzling amidst great lively conversation and music.
