We went in for the Grilled Pork Bangers served in a soft bun, with salad, fries and choice of our topping of hot salsa at Rs. 400/- per plate. Second round of the dark german lager and more food commencing with Char grilled Vegetables and Harissa at Rs.400/- per plate, tomato mozzarella with sweet basil pizza from the Clubs wood fired ovens at Rs320/- per plate of pizza, and then for the famous Chicken livered Bruschetta, Bacon wrapped sausages, Biere battered Fish, Meat balls all on a tapas plate for Rs.600/- This feast was parexcellence to state in few words. We then went in for the Non Vegetarian platter for Rs.780/- per plate of imported cold meats, hams, salamis with pieces of home made breads. Someone suggested Moroccan Chicken and Fish n Chips, I could hardly waddle by the time I guzzled 5 mugs of the german lager so decided to give the recommendation a miss.

Truly an excellent experience, something that still hasn’t ceased to impress me till date.

Recommend – Visit to Lavelle Road into the great Biere Club and have a blast totally club class

Ambience – 11/10 Wonderful fresco, Breath taking view of the road, excellent crowd, superb weather, fabulous my-kinda-music

Menu – 8/10 Excellent choice of finger food.

Taste – 8/10 Great, but who remembers the taste after the excellent surreal experience of guzzling 5 mugs of beer?

Customer Service – 7/10 Excellent, chirpy smiling waiter aiming to please

Value for Money –7/10 Excellent expensive perhaps a tad bit less in quantity

Recommend – MUST VISIT, in Bangalore, more so in Winter

Author: Rohith Reddy
Description:
Love the Brew, Very authentic! Probably the best in town. The food maybe needs improvement, but the beer is superb.

Not a very big fan of the ambience. The top floor is the best if you don't mind other people smoking.

Author: Raisin George
Description: Don't opt for second floor if you are not smoker. Best way to watch cricket match. The only downside is that India lost semis #worldcup. They have their own brewing and yeah variety of good options. My recommendation is wheat beer.

Author: Shruti Kumari
Description: Best place to have beer. Their beer taste really good. Ambience is too good and staff are welcoming. It is located at the corner of ub city road.

Author: Varun Sanjeevan
Description: Always been a fan of "The Hangover Breakfast". The omelettes are delicious. The chicken wings were impressive too. They play some good music most of the time. Visited the biere street recently but I'd still upvote this!

Author: Adwait Bhattacharya
Description:
Prime Location. Prime Microbrewery. Prime Food.
This place is so well placed, so well made, that when you look out from one of the top floors, the bungalows outside give you the feel of a Movie set full of Film stars' bungalows

The service is brilliant, always packed and open till late, their beers are perfect !
I didn't have the chance to have their food coz we were on bar hopping spree. But I am sure I will come back soon to this place

Not too expensive, fits the decor and location and is highly recommended!
Do visit!

Author: Timmu Reddy
Description: Service was really bad. Our food was cold. We ordered steak n chicken breast both became very  hard by the time it reached us. Never going back.

Author: Nikhil J
Description: The best wheat beer in town but the other brews are just about average. The food is good and the ambience better, so not a bad way to spend a lazy Saturday night or even a Sunday noon.

Author: Ashita Narayan
Description: Very near to the UB city, courteous staff, loads of people having a good time. Great food. I tried the Moroccon Spiced Chicken for starters which was pretty decent. Followed it up with the Grilled Chicken Pizza which had a good fresh crust and nice topping. Being a teetotaller I can't vouch for their beer but heard that their home brewn beer tastes quite good. They have their brewery tanks nicely visible just behind the bar. I also loved the wall mural which covers most of the restaurant. Nice times.

Author: Deepak Machettira
Description: It is one of the oldest brewery in Bangalore maintained properly at Good location, service was good,my visit was at odd hours but it was nice and painting on walls are also nice, Price was!!!!!

Author: Teni
Description:
If you haven't been here you have certainly missed some good beer! Biere Club is one of those places where you can be at anytime in the day and still have a good time!
Their beers will always surprise you; in a good way. Not everyone can handle it, I've seen. The food is awesome too. Blends in well with what you're drinking.. Definitely a winner in the microbreweries category...

Author: Ranjit Jose
Description: The decor and ambience is very spirited. Quite apt for a place like this. Their beer is really good and so is the food. The platters are quite elaborate and their thin crust pizzas are a joy. The place is just awesome for a lazy day or to catch up after a busy day at work. The location is almost unbeatable. I'll go there any chance I get.

Author: Nilendu Das
Description: The crowd is awesome who seem to enjoy the ambience to the fullest. The beers were great specially the 'Craft Special' one, it was really special and I have never tasted any beer like that before. The food was just ok and was not that great. The music was good. One should definitely visit it for the ambience and the fine beer.

Author: Rakesh Gopalani
Description: Awesome Wheat Brew. Lovely Ambience. Must have the chicken wings! You visit is incomplete without it. Only concern is the staff becomes un-empathetic near closing hours. Feels as if you're being served for free...!

Author: Sachin Premnath
Description:
Every about this place is just ok.. not very great and not very bad.. so an average place for you to spend your money..

Now to details:  We ordered the non-veg platter with beer battered fish and chicken and stuff.. It was not very good as per reviews by wife.. .

Now the veg part:  I ordered french fries which was good as expected.. Ordered crispy fried cheesy garlic mushrooms... Which was better... or i should say decent.. then ordered sun dried tomato and goat cheese pizza.  It was really bad.. i mean not upto standard..

Now the beer- It was not too great.. when compared to TOIT or ABC ..

IN EFFECT I WOULD NOT RECOMMEND YOU TO SPEND YOUR PRECIOUS MONEY ON A PLACE THIS AVERAGE PLACE...

Author: Rajendran J
Description:
Food was good. Should try the vegetable platter. Nice variety and awesome taste.

Veg Pizza was simple and neat. Nice music and moderate crowd.

Onion rings had more oil than expected. The service was not quick as expected.

Author: Kurien C K
Description: Had heard about this place from friends and finally when I dropped in wasn't disappointed. Great brews great music rustic ambience and service to match.

Author: Ainee Ansaari
Description: A showcase of brilliant ambience where you find a very fine crowd who enjoy the night with some drinks and finger food. Table reservation is recommended but inspite of us booking the table we were asked to sit on bar chairs. The service is really slow because they have a paucity of waiters. Another major let down is the variety of food and mocktails. The food doesn't taste exceptionally great but renders good quality with quantity. I had hot and spicy mary and virgin sangria to drink ; upto the mark. I had a very bland tasting spaghetti in white sauce. Fish and chips were good but the chocolate cake dessert was out of the world to end the night on a good note.

Author: Ramamoorthy Kumar
Description: Happening  place any time of the week, microbreweries are always special, you'll always find varieties and different taste. I'd like to visit again and explore their menu

Author: Pranav Prashant
Description:
Tasted the best beer of my life "wheat beer"
Its too smooth to take in.
However the chairs are not that comfortable, they are pretty much 90 degree n u can't relax.

Author: Kavita Rajith Nair
Description: Had been here today as a casual Friday visit with family...  We all liked the place... Infact the ground floor absolutely kids friendly with decently loud music and sufficient space.... My two n a half  year old niece enjoyed running around the painted walls... Liked this place coz very few microbreweries have a kids friendly environment,  this is definitely one among them... We had the German lager beer, which was decent....  N the food tasted well too...  Chicken Nachos, bites platter (2nd in the list), fettuccine pasta, morrocan spiced chicken,  chicken breast cous cous salad, assorted fries....

Author: Kim Hooper
Description: It's true, the beer is very good, but I had probably the best Margarita I've ever had. Good friendly staff, nice spacious bars and a nice "Hum" of music and chat. Haven't eaten there yet, but it looks great, nice but unfussed. The upstairs, partially open air bars are great, you can take a cigarette with your drink, without going outback, like a naughty schoolboy!Cheers, I'll be back, tonight actually!

Author: Sandeep Senapati
Description:
We went here on 14th Feb. We had a reservation so no problem der. The place looks amazing. Cool graffiti on walls, nice music, own brew... So everything looks nice. We reached our table, and a spoiler... The chair looks like a school meeting hall chair.
We ordered wheat beer pitcher, potato wedges, mixed veg and non veg platter, chicken kabab platter. I would say without a doubt food is awesome. The beer was heavenly. Surely, the order was delayed. But I didn't mind, given d fact the place was crowded. Veg and Non veg platter is not a good option. Other den dat rest was good.

Author: Nitin Hajela (hajela.in)
Description:
Situated on one the most prominent area of Bangalore and very close to my office at UB City , Biere Club has always caught my imagination since its inception few years ago.One of my favorite microbreweries in that part of city , my most recent trip was to attend a Wine Appreciation event held there last week.Claimed to be the first ever Craft brewery of Bangalore , the ambiance gives you a instant good feeling once you are in the vicinity.

They have recently opened the The Biere Club Chophouse that serves grills and steaks too. It also has a pub counter and pool table to compliment the environment.Their array of crafted beers,Beer shandys ,bublies and wines (rose, White & reds) , cocktails will seldom let you run out of the choices you can make. 

I feel that the Menu is lavish by the brewery standards with separate sections like :
- The Hangover Breakfast menu options , available only on weekends daytime.
- Day Specials and Soups of the day , usually scribbled on the Black board - Platter large enough to be shared by friends are great hit here too
- Shawarmas & Med food
- Not to miss , delectable a'la italian wood fire pizzas and other Italian delicacies.
- All the Breakfasts for those who feel it's morning only when they wake up :)

This place is certainly drink lovers paradise that will also satiate the foodies like me.

Author: Swaroop
Description: The service sucks now...the staff do not let you move between floors....if you do so they apparently mix up the bills and create a big fuss...the quality of the brews has also declined of late...

Author: ST
Description: This place is very good. Recommended. Excellent beer samples, which they ofcourse brew in house (their micro breweries) and good food. I like their french fries, which comes in a tiny bucket and dips along with it. Nice touch. The pizzas are good too. A definite value for money and I bet you would only walk out with a smile on your face.

Author: Thuppati Harish
Description: Yashwanth A had great fun 😊 unforgettable night..!! fa weekends it was an awsum place to bang. I will give 5 rating . The drinks wat they serve are prepared in biere club

Author: @KSB
Description: The oldest brewers in south India,and one of the best too! The biere club, situated in the posh locality of Lavelle road, is one of the better places to hangout and drink till your livers burst. The price is reasonable. The food is good. We tasted almost all the beers and had pizza and spicy chicken starters. The pizza was really good. The double ipa beer was the best. Highly recommend for a gala Saturday evening.

Author: Balakumar Seethapathy
Description:
Beer flavours are excellent! Tomato basil thin crust pizza, Humms with Falafel, Nachos complemented our drinks very well! Would like to try cinnamon flavours in beer hope they bring it on near future! 

Overall enjoyed my time there and will visit again!!

Author: Arijit Bhowmick
Description: Just like another top class brewery.  Food definitely good which is an added benefit.  I assume one of the oldest brewery in Bangalore.  Ideal place for couples.

Author: Neha Jain
Description: Nice ambience... Brilliant interiors with great bear and food... Probably the best bear in town... And we cannot forget the music and crowd????

Author: Rajeev Goenka
Description:
A must visit place
Fresh beer on tap from micro brewery
Do try the tasting glasses of all 5 in house beers
After tasting all,settled for the Ale glass
Wasn't disappointed
Ordered nachos with beans too
Resonance priced...good food....great atmosphere

Author: Kanika Gaur
Description: D first brew in blore...a wonderful place to spend a weekend...loved d food n d beer...friendly and helpfull staff...the place was full wen we reached...plus the crowd is also gud here...ll Def come back...

Author: Richa
Description: Bad food and service. My stomach still upset with the food I had there. Credit card machine didn't work either! Even the decor is very average..

Author: Kaushik Divya
Description: One of the good places for beer lovers. With good ambience. Good staff. And varieties of beer, cocktails and mocktails to offer  for everyone.

Author: Haricharan
Description:
Absolutely fantastic! Had been there for new year with my friends. Did taste all the beers but fell in love With wheat beer. Parking is an issue.
Beer 5/5
Food 4.5/5
Ambience 4.5/5
Service 4/5

Author: Ayush Sharma
Description: Nice ambience and gives a feeling of a proper brewery. Though there was only one waiter present to take order at times. Four cheese pizza and mixed frittata are a must have.

Author: Hari Camala
Description: Bierre Club is where my tryst with craft beers started and so i'm shamelessly biased with my review. Jokes apart, it figures in my top 5 microbreweries in Bangalore and is equally famous for craft beers, cocktails, breakfast spread, tapas style pub grub, kebabs. platters and pizzas. I like almost all their brews and keep coming back here in-spite of the new micro breweries in town. Its spread across multiple floors and yet is always crowded., reservations are a must. You guys are doing a great job, Happy Brewing!

Author: Rushabh Doshi
Description: The Bier Club is situated in the posh area near UB City and definitely gets a 5/5 for its location. But, the tables on the inside are a bit disappointing. The Beer was good but not as good as other places in Bangalore. It is a good place to catch up with friends but would not be on my to-do list in Bangalore!

Author: Ramanujam
Description:
One of the best hang out places in bangalore. I must say the biere club has everything in it. The best part is they occasionly host some comedy shows too which is terrific and extremely relaxing. The interiors are awesome. Now being a veggie and a non drinker I had good options on my hand,while my friends invariably compared the beer with what they had in Toit in terms of taste. Their pizzas are great. However the best part of this place is the way the bill is given to us. It's smartly wrapped up in a cover stating. "Damages".
A must try place for every bangalorean.

Author: Priyam Chowdhury
Description:
Checked into this place a few times with friends, although I do NOT drink at all but I have to say I have been intimated as well as fascinated by this place for a long time now.
The location and the people along with the staff make it a must go for anyone alcoholic, you might not just want to miss this one in this city.

Author: Soumyashanto Mandal
Description: This place is located right at the crossing of Lavelle road and vittal mallya road. We went there late evening, and it was quite crowded. The ambience is good, the waiters are courteous and friendly. The cocktails were good and so was the food. The cost is on the expensive side.

Author: Nancy
Description: Very impressive! It was the first time we had been there and the food was delicious. But it was not the food that made me love the place, it was the staff! My friend had ordered a non alcoholic cocktail which he did not like, so it was kept aside. The waiter who was serving us noticed it and came back to ask why he did not take the drink? When he told him that he did not like it much, immediately they offered us to take another drink instead of this. It was a very thoughtful gesture and would definitely keep me going there often!

Author: TheFKitchenRulesGuy
Description: Good food, tasty beer, nice pizzas and cheerful music. You'll find a lot of families here on weekends, which is a v.healthy sight. But the best part about this place in my opinion, is the service. My nonalcoholic friend ordered a Virgin Mary and didn't know what to expect. Unfortunately, he didn't happen to like it, while me and the other friend gulped down some awesome beer and a Virgin Sangria. The waiter on noticing the two of our glasses being almost empty, while my friend's was the only one full, came up to us and asked if there was a problem with the drink. We replied that it wasn't what he expected unlike the both of us who were relishing every drop of our drink. The waiter then smiled and said, "Sir, if you don't have a problem, I could replace your drink with a free one of your choice. Would you be happy with that Sir?" We guys were just super-amazed coz he actually gave us a free drink as replacement! Now that definitely deserves a thumbs up!!

Author: Sudheen
Description: Excellent ambience, especially the swinging couches in the open. Had shredded lamb with capsicum and onions. Freakishly spicy but heavenly taste. Will go again and have some more lamb dishes. But I did get it after two of us finished the beer tower.

Author: Shailaja B
Description: We came here on a Friday date night and really enjoyed this place . The drinks were good and loved the food! We ordered a plate of the mini lamb kibbeh burgers which were yummmm followed by the V+NV mixed platter. This was way too much food for the 2 of us . Here's what we loved in the platter- assorted fries,  marinated olives, chicken wings and fish. Rest were ok.

Author: Maneni Kayina
Description: The chicken wings is a must try! The drinks are quite okay. It's a loud place. So if u want a quick drink this is the place to go to. It's quite crowded too.

Author: Siddarth Sadashiv
Description: Not bad ambience. Both dark and blond beers are great here. Food is delicious too. Topped burritos with chicken is exquisite and the prices are pretty decent.

Author: Vinay Chopra
Description:
The beer is crisp!! It's one of the oldest brewery of bangalore and you will love to be there with your group.
Our group consists of veggies and this is an awesome place for us the food was marvelous!! If you are a veggie must go for this place as you will love mushrooms and some dish named potatoes with corn that was amazing to taste.
The staff was also good but the background music was more amazing.. You will surely miss your college days at that time.
There are multiple floors of the resto though we reserved for non smoking zone but that looked sofesticated so shifted to smoking zone but there wasn't that much smoke luckily.

We went on Monday so it's was not fully packed. If you are a brewery lover must try wheat and ale of this place.. Jainish Jain

Author: Sumitra Sunder
Description:
Great Food and Beer.

I am not an expert on Beer but I do have my favourites here. I am particularly fond of the Wheat Beer and Indian Pale Ale.

Their breakfast menu on weekends is also great. Specially the fritatas (Fried onions, potatoes, spinach and tomatoes and of course the sausage and ham).

Heavy on the pocket so multiple visits required to get a better idea of the Menu :D

Author: Puja Bhattacharjee
Description: I was here for an afternoon lunch, not the best time to really enjoy the place maybe. However, I absolutely loved the place. A quiet time is also a great time to be around this place. The colours they have used fo rtheir interiors, the art wall - nice. The food was great. The service too. Their bar looks quite extensive and I saw a few notices about upcoming live events which weren't only about music. I think I am going there again!

Author: Samantha Santhanam
Description: I love coming back to this place! They have the best wheat beer, tasty finger bites, lovely music and lovelier crowd. My veg lasagna was so good that a meat lover abandoned his chicken and stole from my plate (I wouldn't vouch for that poor chicken though). Try and grab a seat on the 2nd floor overlooking the road, best spot for the Blore weather.

Author: Praman Arora
Description: They can't do much wrong here, beer was awesome. We started with tasting all the available beer options. The nonveg platter was to die for, it just was so so good. The lamb burgers were also nice. Overall the experience was awesome.

Author: Karishma Dugar
Description:
If you are trying to decide where to go, and haven't been here already - its a no brainer! The biere club is the safest bet for a fun evening with great drinks and food and crowd. For those that prefer conversations, stay on the ground floor :D

I ordered the veg burger- it was so healthy and tasty! But everything else on the menu sounded so good too- I will need a lot more visits to figure out what's served best here!:)

Author: Naitik Tarway
Description: Was amongst the 1st few pubs of Bangalore which gave the feel of the west..  good ambiance..  good crowed..  good beer..  good food..  still a much liked place..

Author: Chandru R
Description: Excellent beer trued both the Belgian wheat and the Stout. Ordered spicy lollypop - the one with the special in house chilli was damn hot and spicy. I had to gulp half my beer to soothe my tongue. The other lollypop with the mint chutney was sooooo good . the taste of the chutney still lingers in my mouth. Ordered the usual chicken winglets and it was also really good. Ordered a chocolate spongy cake with ice cream. It was decent. I would have wished to have a cheesecake or a panacotta in the desert menu. Choice was limited in deserts. The staff was polite and fast. The position of TVs were not impressive specially for two people tables. Will definitely go back together.

Author: Pranoy Mitra
Description:
It's been our regular office party place.
Ambience is good, for a large group of say 20 people bill has never crossed beyond 1.25k per person.... That's promising.

One can spend an entire night on beer and pizza over there.

Good way to spend a weekend.

Author: Nikil Paramesh
Description: Great place in a great location. Brews are pretty good . great meat options in starters. My vegetarian friend found it tough as it was not all that great . staff are friendly and nice. Pizzas are worth trying . will visit again soon !!!!!

Author: Santosh Chavali
Description: Place is very good with loud music and fantastic environment. Food is decent and ambience is perfect. Service guys can be bit more chilled than with those serious faces..

Author: Rakshith Gowda
Description:
Well, used to be gold when it started had the best crowd in town. Somehow fells a little fallen now. Yet, some things go unchanged, if you are ever in the mood for a light, sweet beer, Biere Club's Heffenwezier is the beer to drink. Some roasted stuffed mushrooms, and chili smoked chicken will the meal devine.

Parking is the biggest problem that you may face. Pretty good service.

Author: Kaushik Adhyapak
Description: This place is hard to be missed, located at the corner of lavelle road. To start with, the place has an excellent ambience. They have tried to depict the history of brewing beer through paintings on the wall and on coasters, place mats etc. Secondly they have an innovative beer menu, i.e. beer cocktails. This is first brewery which started serving it. Their beer cocktails and crafted beer are both amazing. Alongside, they have an excellent variety of food. Starting from appetizers to desserts, everything gets an A. The staff is attentive and courteous enough to explain the types of beer and how they taste. It's an excellent place to catch up with your friends. I'd say, one visit to this place is a must.

Author: Nisha Prakash
Description:
A place like The Biere Club has got one thing right - it's beer. The brews here are great. We first sampled all the six beers on board and finally decided on the old ale. An amazing beer. A tad strong.
As for the food - the Caesar's salad and the Mediterranean pizza were amazing. The kebab platters were not that great. Would avoid that the next time.
Ambience was good. A nice place to hang out with family and friends.

Author: Madananteshwara Bhat
Description:
I'm pretty much pleased with the place - that is the long and short of my review.

The ambience is subdued and cozy, the volume of the music in the top floor isn't too loud, and the beer is exceptional, and the food does good justice to the tap brews.

I only wish that parking arrangements were better.

Author: Kanwal Bali
Description:
Have been to this place twice and it didn't seem to disappoint a bit.
Tried Lager and club special after trying the tasters. Not so many options for a vegetarians. Tried the Mediterranean pizza which seemed to be fine. There always is a chef's choice to go for. Superb ambience and music.Extra credits for the wonderful service. Smoking and open seating area available as well. Overall,it's all about the beer at the Biere club and the brewery certainly lives upto the expectations.

Author: Aditya Jaiswal
Description:
My friends and me had decided to visit this place for the Christmas Brunch. The spread was huge and tasted even better. Initially was going to try veg, but I couldn't resist non-veg seeing the menu. Thus selected non-veg.
Turkey was nice and well roasted. Onion rings were exceptional.
Coming to the craft beer, they were serving Golden Ale, Belgian Wit and a Christmas Ale which were decent. However, I would still prefer to go to other brew houses in Bengaluru (read A.B.C.) for the beer.
Nevertheless, its worth a visit for its history of being the first craft brewery in Bengaluru.

Author: Tushar
Description: A microbrewery that I have been to quite a few times. A pretty impressive place with a pretty impressive address. The Biere club serves you very good craft beer. The Ale's and stouts here trump most beers you would find in Bangalore. And its not just their beer, they take their food seriously too , especially the brunch items off the menu. A good mix of people , nice music and courteous service make The Biere club a sought after place. 4.1/5

Author: Diptarka Gupta
Description: Being the first Microbrewery in Bangalore this place lives upto the expectation. Their Belgian Witbier is probably my favorite beer in Bangalore, along with the Hefeweizen from Windmills Craftworks. Food is also quite good here. The seafood pizza is awesome.

Author: Ankit Kataria
Description: Small place, with okish beer. Despite having a few options, nothing that stands out tall. The rooftop is much better than the ground floor. Music is average, food isn't great either. My friends had to leave most of their dishes. Not too crowded nor the music is too loud. So if u r in mood to have a conversation with background music, u may decide to come here. Rooftop is the only save grace for this place.

Author: Arun Kaul
Description:
THE WHEAT BEER!
Thats the signature beer guys.
Must visit place with friends, family and clients.
Its amazing how they are still doing. A great job in spite of heavy competition around.
Great job guys
Keep up the good work.
The kebab platter and chicken popcorn cannot be missed.
A must visit place.

Author: Shibu
Description:
Went with friends for dinner after finishing a reception party of our friend,

I heard lot about this place but found Nothing great.

 

Food was very normal nothing spl to mention.

Service was very bad.

Very Disappointed.....

Food: 2/5

Ambience: 3/5

Service: 0.5/5

Value for Money: 2/5

Author: Hemant Poddar
Description:
Place is good
They have the brewery but beers are not very good.
Crowd is very good especially in weekends
Little expensive but it's worth if u get place in top floor

Author: Binod Kumar
Description:
I walked into this place with my wife on a Sunday evening. Waited for someone to attend me and when no one turned, I approached a steward and said:

Me: Could you please arrange a table for two of us?

Steward: Sorry sir, as you can see we are full and walked away.

Waited for five minutes and asked the same steward: 

Me: How about upstairs? Could you please check if I can get table there?

Steward: With a sarcastic smile on his face, You can go upstairs and try your luck!!!

Try my luck?? Seriously? Felt humiliated but approached the top floor. Plenty of empty tables and I was glad. Waited for about 10 minutes for someone to hand over the menu but no one turned up.. Called few stewards and they said. “one minute…” but they never came back. I had to walk out of this place without even tasting their so-called very popular brewed beer. Highly disappointed
.

Author: Anmol Srivastava
Description: I have been to The Biere Club thrice now. No doubt they have really good beer but it just fades away with average food and a below average service. My last visit was a total let down. They served wine and beer with a great enthusiasm but they delayed serving of the kebab platter by more than an hour even after reminding them twice. In the end, I lost my patience and had to go the reception to complain. When we finally got the food, it was cold, very average in taste. It's a good place to have a chilled beer but that'a about it.

Author: Soham Goswami
Description:
Have been through this part of town quite often and always had this place on the to visit list.

Yesterday we planned and made for this pub to gulp down beer and food.

What did we order :

Booze : wheat beer
Grub : veg taco for the souls who do not eat non veg and fish for the rest of our buddies .

They have the concept of tasting the beer before you decide to choose the poison that would suit you the best for the evening chargeable at 40 buck. A good concept as it helps you choose among the few beers served and what I chose was wheat . Less bitter than the rest , being a sweet tooth don't prefer bitter stuff. Well, now when you have boozed so much you will compare with other places and that's what I did . The beer was a tad low in taste from what I like that is served in Toit but the beer was good. The food was served within 5 to 10 mins of placing the order which is appreciable considering a Saturday evening and the pub being in full swing.

The taste of the food was 2.5/5. Portion was good.

The cost is ok, but my view it could have been 10-15% lower than the bill received so I state that it's bit on the higher side.

Will I come to this place again, for booze , no, there are better places which we've better booze. Food, well depends , if I'm in the locality and in need for food.

Author: Sumit Gera
Description: Used to beer samplers being free in Delhi and Gurgaon, the first reaction to seeing this as paid item was 'are you serious?'. However, the place grows on you once you spend some time there. Nice beer and some beer cocktails, retro music and a huge smoking area. Didn't focus much on food though.

Author: Pankaj
Description: They serve one of the best brew beer. Great taste. Love this place. If u wish to smoke than go to top floor. Amazing place. Happy to help staff.

Author: Akhil Arora
Description: One of the best brewed beers in the whole of bangalore. Their wheat beer is one of the most awesome wheat beer I have ever had in my life. Overall a very good experience and a Saturday Night well spent!

Author: Aditya Kushwaha
Description: This place is huge and i went here first on my return to bangalore after a long time. Lavelle Road is a fine place. Across the road from the Harley showroom this is the ideal beer place. Really liked the lager here and the side eats. Bacon wrapped sausages were good. Ambience is great up on the second floor with football being screened live. Great city. Great place.

Author: Musthaq
Description: One of the few best micro breweries in Bangalore n also located in a prime location in lavelle road...the spirits here have thr own flavour...the ambience is juz perfect wit the cool breeze in the balcony of 2nd floor...juz a perfect weekend hangout to relieve all the stress..

Author: Indira Mohanty
Description: Don't understand what the hype is about ! Not deserving of the love it gets .... Pretty ordinary. For example we ordered cheesy fries and all we got was soggy french fries with tasteless stringy cheese on top. Won't come back here ! Thoroughly disappointed !

Author: Abhyudai Ravooru
Description: It's a really cool place location is awesome ambience is nice you should have reservations on Saturday for sure, one of the best self brewed beer places I've been to try it all

Author: Khushboo Rajput
Description: Went there on Thursday night for a standup Comedy show by Sapan Verma. The place is a real chilled out with cool graffiti on walls,microbrewed beer and a majestic entrance. We tried smoked cheese and sweet pepper pizza with virgin mojito and Belgian brew. The beer was alright and frankly, i have had better. So, I felt it was a lil over hyped. But do visit this place on the first Thursday of the month for a kicks-ass stand up comedy show.

Author: Anand Krishnan
Description:
One of the first micro breweries in Bangalore and I wanted to try their beers. I love the ambience of the place. The top most floor being my favourite. The beers were good when they first started but the taste tends to vary each time I visit. This happens with other micro breweries too. Personally, I feel arbour brews better beer.
The food is good. I have only had starters and never tried the mains.
I will visit this place again for the mains!

Author: Nikhila
Description:
I really like this place. The beer was good and the food was good too. Love the old english feel that you get when you step into this place! The pizza is also heavenly! Top quality stuff. 

Definitely one of my top breweries in Bangalore.

Author: Vaishnavi Venkataramanan
Description: Awesome ambience!! Must visit place for a weekend hangout. Thin crust pizzas are must eat in menu. It is the one of the crowded place in Lavelle road. Recommend for resevation

Author: Priyam Pai
Description: I was told this was the first brewery in the entire of South India. I had visited this place 7 years back and till today during my 2nd visit this place has hardly changed. However the one thing that has changed is the crowd. In my previous visit, the place was absolutely packed.... Both floors. In this one and that too on a Saturday night the place was barely 50 percent full and that to only the ground floor. The only reason i can attribute is that microbreweries popping up all over bangalore and the place is a little on the expensive side. The brews are alright. We had the Mediterranean pizza and the nachos crusted chicken. Both were strictly ok. ..

Author: Chandini Arjun
Description:
If I have to save one place in the city, it would be this one????
My wheat beer ❤
Like their pizzas, not heavy and really fresh goes well with the beers.
Food has always been good, be it the old menu or the new one.
From the time it's opened, it's dedicatedly been my at least ones or sometimes four times a month place ????
Summers are never complete without mango beer????

Author: Parikshith J
Description:
The first ever microbrewery in Bangalore still maintains the quality of the brew . Not many other microbreweries (except arbor and biere club ) have quality brew these days. Excellent variety!
Food is decent ,but don't expect too much of authentic Mediterranean cuisine.
However, the service here is absolutely shambolic for a place like this! No courtesy or etiquette at all inspite of dropping by a Saturday afternoon with not much crowd

Author: Anand Mani
Description: This place is just awesome food is gr8, nice music had blast tonight, I had lots of trouble to park my vehicle there -:( vested 1/2 hurs on parking only, they need to improve on service also a lot I guess...

Author: Adharsh Ravi
Description: Another famous microbrewery.. Great beers.. Belgian strong ale was my choice.. Worth evry penny.. Pizzas again.. Even pizza huts n dominos dont serve such yummy pizzas.. But d problem s d same wd al these wonderful places.. Thy al close by 12..!!

Author: @foodiefrombeyond
Description: One of the best microbreweries in town.... The Beer and Service is something you could look forward to... The food could be have been a tad better to keep up with the high standards.... Should try out The Hangover Breakfast here

Author: Swati Ahuja
Description: Could be the best beer in Bangalore. Great food and music. Easy on pocket too. Interesting trivia - this used to be KPMG office at some point in the past.

Author: Utsav Kumar
Description:
Excellent collection of beers 
(both taste and variety, especially ginger ale), great ambience and setting. Must visit, as the combo of food and beer here would never disappoint. :-)

Author: Steak^Out
Description: Been there on an afternoon and you know what: this place stinks, literally. Let me be clear, bad air circulation. Probably not as bad as your average watering holes of blore, but yeah. The chefs special was pork ribs with rum = not bad at all minus the stink. The fish steak whatever was cool too. Vanilla shake tasted like lassi. Plus the music was loud for a weekday afternoon.

Author: Mahesh Alanthat
Description:
Beer - a good selection to choose from obviously
Food - awesome
Music - loved it
A great place to unwind with friends .
A must visit if u in bangalore

Author: Sudha Reddy
Description: Good place, amazing non veg platters. Heard from colleagues that the beer is quite good. Overall a place worth revisiting . Wide range of drinks and starters

Author: Amogh Ravikumar
Description:
bierre club oktoberfest ROCKS!! just WOW... Went there with just 1500 bucks in our pocket... Reached by 12.30 noon... And started drinking with my buddies.... Amazing variety of beers... On par with arbor... The food.... Well the food was good and unlimited... No complaints... whatsoever... Service was real nice and as the sun was setting people were flowing and crowd was getting better and better and we were still drinking.... All in all i would say worth every freaking penny....

Ps : we headed out at around 10.30...

Author: Rachit Agarwal
Description:
We planned to get to this place just after our exams got over to get drunk. We had often heard of this place as it served good brewed beer.
We had checked into this place around 4. We ordered our choice of beers & we were not so happy enough when we tasted it. The food was brilliant. The music was great. The hospitality was amazing. I just hope to find a better taste of beer when I walk in next.

Author: Pradhumn Kumar
Description:
Beer can't be any better than what is served here. Right in the heart of Bangalore city Biere club is always high on both quality and taste.

I always have a Lager, Wheat or Stout beer with Salsa dipped potatoes wedges !! A must must must visit for Beer lovers.

Author: Sheen Sb
Description: I love this place. My parents not so much cos we took them up on the top floor with all the smokers and where.music was loudest. Food is really good here. The beer isn't. I'll definitely get back here soon.

Author: Srijata
Description: I finally got to visit this place, after lot of recommendations from everyone. Well it's nice, ambience is good. Services is very good and staffs are really friendly. Tried couple of beers, ale, wheat, special etc. Only the wheat one is good. Since I don't like dark beer. The food is good too. The music is okay. But if u compare with abc, toit and prost, then I feel they can improve the interiors too. Otherwise it's a good place to hang out.

Author: Deepawali Tyagi
Description: The biere club is an alright place to hangout. I have been here a few times. Beers are good. But their special one are just passé. Food is fine.

Author: Murali Kumar
Description: This is top of the chart breweries in bangalore. I specifically love their spiced ale. Their tandoori platter goes very well with the brew and also the nachos, which are fresh and superb.

Author: Saharsh
Description: Visited to attend the East Indian Comedy Show. Food is good, ambience is rustic and relaxed. Incidentally, people serving my orders were equally rustic and not well trained. I was not made to feel comfortable and the waiter seemed to be confusing me than suggesting things to order.

Author: #bellyman
Description: It's a nice place to chill with friends and eat some food. I have been here many times and also end up having lot of fun. Positive vibes and good crowd.

Author: Anup Deshpande
Description:
One of my favorite pubs in bangalore. Excellent food and beer. Only slightly disappointed they stopped my favorite drink - the mango beer. Also, they have managed to honor the region from each of the dishes come from.

Great ambiance to catch up with friends.

A paradise for a beer connoisseur

Author: Nishant
Description:
tried the lager beer
it was pretty good,along with it ordered onion rings and Moroccan chicken with a dip .
surprisingly the Moroccan chicken was good and i ordered it again ..
loved it!!
later i requested the waiter to call up the chef who made the Moroccan chicken!!!
service was nice.
food was lovely.
ambiance was OK
overall worth visiting again...
good job guy's ..
keep up the spirit

:)

Author: Ankur Gupta
Description:
Excellent service, good drinks, nice food, classic music and decor.
Definitely a place to go more often, if not for price.. The challenge on the house is an exciting item to try one day..

Author: Shivdeep
Description: Ambience is decent, ground and first floor are non-smoking section, the second floor is a smoking zone. The nachos which i ordered was good, decent quantity. The second time when I went, they said they do not have nachos! I had to try the chicken popcorn (it tasted pretty nice).The dark beer was awesome. The pricing is on the higher considering this is a up market place. But worth trying once. The quantity of the veg items which we ordered, some sorta mushroom and cheese balls was very lessOverall:Ambience: 3/5 decent, nothing great, nice and airy on the second floorService: 3/5, the waiters do not speak the local language and expect you to speak only in english or hindiFood: 3.5 /5Cost: 2/5, really expensive by my standardsAll said and done, i will still visit this place for the dark beer

Author: Sachin Balaji R
Description: Beer is ultimate!!!! Love the food served here too!! Overall an awesome place to hangout and chillax!! Love the ambiance and service too!! People here are quiet friendly and make u feel comfortable

Author: Nikhil Patil
Description: This is one place which is not extravagant but have got all the basics right.  Like the feel and ambience of the place, the staff is courteous, good mock tail options etc..  The only let down is the lack of good veggie stuff.  Have been there 3 times now,  didn't like the veg stuff I ordered...  Hope my next experience is good.

Author: Shayak Banerjee
Description:
Situated in the better part of Bangalore this restro pub dishes out a variety of beers which i never thought existed. Its a micro brewery basically and they make their own beer. I tried out wheat beer and coffee beer, called stout. The pitchers are a bit pricy at 800, but who is complaining. Tried out onion rings also which are made after soaking the onions in beer. Thin crust pizza with mushroom topping was ok, anyways who concentrates on food when you get such nice beers. Ambiance is like a pub should be, but i liked the wooden stairs and flooring. Overall its a place where you can go frequently and I'm so waiting for my next visit.
P.S. they are open in Whitefield also.

Author: Saptarshi 'shoppy' Ghosh
Description: A nice brewery with a pretty good menu. The platters are awesome. It's not very pocket friendly but each penny is worth spending.

Author: Rahul Banur
Description: One of the best breweries in the town. I had been there for the Okotberfest and felt it was worth every penny. The beers are definitely the best i have had in bangalore. The food was also pretty good although i didnt try much apart from the pizzas, onion rings and fries. The service is pretty good but it may slow down during the peak hours. Overall, it was really good and I recommend all the beer lovers to visit it.

Author: Kishor Kumar
Description:
Been here few times and it always proved a great place to hang out with friends.
Their micro brewery is average compared to others. But the food here is very good.
We ordered nachos n salad. Very good.
Main course they have pizzas n burgers. Veg pizza was real good.
Overall
Ambience: 4/5
Service: 4/5
Food: 4.5 /5
Cost: 4/5

Author: Md Ayub
Description:
The liveliness of this place won my heart!!!!
Had been to this place last week with my friends it was really fun. Food and drinks and the variety will make u go crazyyy.

Author: Ashutosh Mohanty
Description:
If you are feeling fancy, and fancy having a tall glass of good beer or ale then you should drop by this place and make sure one of you made reservations. These guys brew their own beer and also provide a good atmosphere for you to enjoy it.

So now that you are here you must try the "You got to be crazy bomb".I am assuming you have already finished your glass of ale or wheat beer or club special.If not then why are you here??what are you doing with your life??Where is my beer?? You will get to the second question only if you had a bad day and got drunk after you answered the first question as "for beer"(don't worry the good vibes and alcohol help ignore the second question);if not then you end up with the third question which means you are having a good time in which case CHEERS!!

The food is worth mentioning.If confused about the food order a variety veg/nonveg platter if feeling choosy and not sure,take a chance to experiment, there are low odds that you will be disappointed with the food.Do try the pizza i was quite satisfied with pepporoni and tomato mozerella and pesto.

In short you get to have a good time in a causal/relaxed/this chair is so comfy place.For those who think Price is on the higher side, that should not be a deterrent since we already established that you are feeling fancy. Stress about the money on monday I am sure you have been planning to go on a diet for sometime now.If money is not a concern I hope you bought a round of drinks for your friends.CHEERS again!

Author: Sujit Koshy
Description: Have been frequenting the place for a while. While the location is to die for, given the fact that there are multiple micro breweries in town now, it's high time the biere club management takes a serious look at the competition and buck up. Service needs to improve, menu needs a reboot & appoint few good managers as well. Tapping on the regular customers would certainly help sustain. Wishing the management all the very best.

Author: Puja Lunani
Description: Been hearing about this place for a while. Finally got a chance to come here. Love the beer and the ambience! Service was also pretty good. But food was ice cold by the time it came to the table. It's an ideal place for brunch.

Author: Milan
Description:
The Biere Club has the best beer in this city. That's why I keep going back to this place. All of their beers are of great quality, but my favourites are the Irish Stout, Belgian Ale and Wheat Beer. Even the seasonal beer here has an element of surprise - mango beer and orange peel beer.

In a place like this, food becomes secondary but I've tried a few things and have never been disappointed by the quality of the food served. Chicken wings are great and so is the special platters and pizza.

The ambiance reminds you of a European pub and the music gets you in the mood to enjoy the amazing crafted beers. If you are lucky, you can catch a live performance with your beer.
The staff knows about the beer but if they can improve the service, The Biere Club could be the The Biere Heaven. Cheers :)

Beer - 5/5
Food - 5/5
Ambiance - 5/5
Service - 4/5

Author: Gaurav Tamotia
Description: Great place, very good beers and good food as well. The tasters menu is good if you can't decide which beer is for you but the wheat beer is probably the best there..good service as well.

Author: Anirudh
Description:
Having been to most of the micro breweries in town, I can vouch for this place to have quality beer, food and ambience! Keeping up to the hi-fi locality where this pub is located the interiors of this place are well done and make one feel like they are in a pub abroad!

All the beers are top notch but my personal favorite would be the irish stout. This stout is like the benchmark for me whenever i order stout elsewhere in the city! The dark color and bitter taste of this beer just cant be matched in town! The food here though expensive is pretty good( dont get the pork sausage platter, total waste of money). Wide variety of starters and mains will give you ample choice to choose from! Would recommend the non veg platters for starters considering that there would always ve multiple rounds of beers :)

Most recently when i went here i was pleasantly surprised to see they have started serving beer in 1.5ltr pitchers which is just what the doctor ordered! More beer, more fun! Even if it gets crowded you can expect good service by the staff here which is a major plus at this place! All in all a must try place for drinkers and non-drinkers alike :)

Author: Sameer Bisht
Description: This place is distinct and I can see why people would like it; it is energetic and spirited which is cool.This place did not disappoint! It got unbelievably crowded, the management  ROCKED. Took really good care of everyone. Can't wait to go back!. we occupied the top floor love the view of the intersection from there . We order their pitcher of "You got be crazy bomb " and just love it ..In food we order four cheeze pizza and it was Delicious , love every single bite of it... This microbrewery is definately a place to visit when you are in Bangalore

Author: Sarita Jatia Berlia
Description: Wonderful concept ..... They brew their own beer .... Always full with youngsters .... Loved the cocktails and finger food .... Ambience was cool and the staff extremely courteous ..... A must visit and very exclusive place for all ages

Author: Ameya Patil
Description: The best micro brewery in the city. Ehatever you order from the menu is the best and you would crave for some more.. the pizzas are to die for.. try it...

Author: Krishna Raghavan
Description:
I come from a family where drinking is considered a sin. Obviously, i started drinking in college. Once i started interning, me and my friends wanted to go to places which were relatively more expensive. We decided to go the biere club. We had to wait for so long for a table. I don't mind that since it was our mistake. We finally got a table. We ordered soms pasta and shooters. It took like ages to come to the table. Ghey were alright. Then we ordered beer. A pitcher of a lagger that was there in their choices. The waiter actually spilled the beer on my friend and me. If that's not clumsy i dont know what is. Leter it was cleaned and then after sometime the waitors asked us to vacate the table becausse they had reserved it for someone else. I mean why couldn't they tell us in the beginning itself?

Then t of us sat at another small table. We ordered some more food and beer. We speculated that it would be served late. So i took a friend of mine who hadn't seen much of bangalore to UB city. We just walked around and came back. The food had still not come.

Coming to think of it, i doubt why i went there in the first place and more than that... why did i stay to put up with all that.

I really hope if i go there again, i am offered a better service. Hope the management actually keeps tans on these reviews

Author: Neil Shah
Description:
THE GREAT BANGALORE MICROBREWERY JOURNEY:

THE BIERE CLUB

Located on a busy intersection on Lavelle Road, is The Biere Club. I am a great fan of Stand Up Comedy and when I saw that they had Sorabh Pant performing on a Thursday night, my friend and I made a beeline for it. Microbrewery and a comedy show together! What could be better? 

We were seated in the ground floor section. I really liked the interiors, made me feel like I was in an old English pub. While my craving for a good Irish Stout was left unsatisfied at The Arbor Brewing Company a few days back, Biere Club delivered in grand Fashion. The perfect Irish Stout, very yummy. I followed it up with a unique Orange peel beer. While not for everyone, I really liked the unexpected flavor of the orange peel in a beer. Refreshing.

Speaking of food, we did not have much to eat. My friend had Chicken Wings which he loved and then we ordered a serving of Cheesy Fries. They were good, but nothing spectacular. Will visit again to review the food. 

The service was good, attentive without being intrusive. And the show was awesome. Sorabh Pant had me in splits. They have such shows on the second Thursday of every month, so plenty of incentive to visit again. Cheers!!

Author: AM7
Description: The best brewed beer in town along with amazing Pizza's.

Author: Pallavi Kawatra
Description: I had heard a lot about this place since d tym i hav shiftd to bangalore bt nevr gota chance to be here..finally came here yestrday...being a sat nyt i expectd d place to b crowded..bt it was kinda empty despite d fact that there is an octoberfest gng on..the seasonal beer was gud..wid an excellent after taste..muat try d biere club non veg platter..d fish is amazing n their meatballs r heavenly..overall it was a gud experience.

Author: Abhijit Kottur
Description: Amazing beer. Beer lovers should visit this place. And very nice food and service. I have visited the whitefield outlet. The ambience there is elegant.

Author: Karthik Gurumurthy
Description: An outstanding microbrewery and the beer brewed is really good. There are some spices beers and Indian ales. Food is mainly finger food and ambience of open air is very good.

Author: Srikanth B Iyer
Description: Great location - easy to hail a driver for the evening if you have had one too many! good food too, service can be a notch better, but overall a very decent brewery!

Author: Firoz Alam
Description:
I went to this place on weekend with few of my friends. Thats y rush were there. But the crowd was really awesome. Music was awesome. I dont drink liquor thats y i have ordered mock beer & virgin sangrian both were awesome...& as my friends said beer was also good.
Ambience is nice.
But whenever u plan to go thr ur pocket must be full ;) :D

Author: Allam Kumar
Description: Nice ambience and music. Went with friends. Staff us helpful and cooperative. Will definitely go again. Lager beer is good. Reservstion is recommended if you are going on weekends evenings.

Author: Shivi. M.D.
Description:
Ocktober fest is a con job at rs 1500/-unless u can drink till u fall . They claim unlimited beer and sangrias which are diluted with loads of sprite and juice . Food at the ocktoberfest is literally finger food .. fries. And more fries,onion rings. The only food we could really call food were the veg and non veg pizzas. The service was absolutely slow when no of pxs went up. They opened only top floor which could choke u if u r not a smoker cause its their smoking area. The fans were not enough on a hot day like today . Music was too soft had to keep requesting them to increase volume . Quite disappointed .though v stuk around for quite a few hours .
I feel you can walk up to glasshouse on a sunday and enjoy same unlimited liquor if u r not fussy about brews and food tht includes salads pastas and pizzas...

Author: Rohit
Description: Biere club is the first place in my search for craft beers in bangalore and it did not disappoint. Tried the stout and it was refreshing with heavy taste of coffee and really chilled. It's not even close to a real stout but it's better than drinking kingfisher or haywards. We ordered small fries and the waiter got us large, so there was some confusion. Waiter was rude. So we paid for the beer and left. Where do these restaurants hire people from? All the waiters should be trained in  some basic courteous behavior. Not happy with the service but beer is as good as it gets in Bangalore.

Author: Divya
Description:
In one of the trendiest cities of India, opp the most decadent mall (UB city), lies this club called the bièrre club.
So, what is the obvious thing to do? Step in and try the place out.
And why would one? You are greeted by a chalkboard that lists the beers that are in the micro brewery, and with the likes of mango, cinnamon flavors, you are bound to walk in.
That is, of course, if you are a beer snob.

So, the concept of micro breweries had been around for a while, with a lot of them opening up in Bangalore recently. And what makes one stand out from the other is simply the infusions, pricing and the quality. This place has a check in all 3 areas.

The pricing is apt, the quality is fresh and the flavors, well, did I mention they have mango beer ;-)

The ambiance is very laidback and beerlike. The food menu is also pretty beer friendly and is reasonably priced.

The only downer, perhaps, is the service. I mean, it isn't down right bad, but it can take a bit of an effort to get a waiter's attention.

All in all, this is place gets a thumbs up from me. It is definitely on my go-to list, when in Bangalore.

Author: Abishek Chandrasekhar
Description: Not so much a fan of beer. But I've got to say. Those were the best Pizza's I've ever had in my life. And the sausages as well. In fact. Even I could even tolerate the beerz way better than your Kingfishers

Author: Kartik
Description: Amazing place. You will just live the beer and the service. Food is pretty good too, i mean the starters. The best and a must try beer is their Octoberfest beer thought its seasonal. The beer just rocks. The sides and starters, nachos, cheese platter are just the right thing to have with the beer. Though i would suggest to stick to beer and not try regular cocktails as a simple mochito did not come up well in taste and flavour. Must go place.

Author: Jai Shankar, R
Description:
This place is happening...The beer quality is amazing and tastes much better than District 6.

This place has quite a good food. ..which is not expected from this place when compared to previous visit. ..The place is quite in center of the city and easily access able.

Quality of beers are wonderful...Please ask for flavor of the day and never miss it..at least take a sampler to taste it..

Author: Anudeep Gowda
Description: There has always been a crave for tastes to me, be it a beer or food. Now thas has been my fav place to have been brewing wheat beer. Pizzas to platter has been the best combo to me.

Author: Amogh Js
Description: If you are a beer lover, this place must be on your list. They have their own brewery which is an added advantage. If you are not sure which beer to order, you can try a sample beer and then decide. Apart from the lager beers you also get ale beers which is relishing. The music is peppy and cheers you up. If you are tired after a week's work and want to rejuvenate along with friends, then this is your place. The crowd is cosmopolitan and makes you feel that you are in England's own backyard. Food is strictly continental but delicious. Best time to visit Saturday evening.

Author: Sandeep Bg
Description:
Typical As we were sipping coffee sitting in lavelle road coffee day (LCD) we saw this microbrewery in front of us, one of the very few in Bangalore. And it hit us then that none of us have tried the fresh brewed beer till then! Realizing the insult we've been doing to the beer fraternity we walked across the road to try out. Typical bar setup with long legged wooden chairs and dim lights. They had a very interesting menu with several flavours of beer. U can try a sample beer of 90ml if u r not sure how it would taste. We tried 3 diff flavours and finally sticked to the one with spice flavour. Was good and different. We ordered a veg platter for starters, which was not bad at all. Overall, nice hangout to visit now and then.

Beer-3.5
Food-4
Ambience -3
Value-3.5

Author: Joyson D'Souza
Description: Overall a good experience. The Staff was poor. Waiters never bothered to take orders. We'd to stretch our necks to find one and stare at him hoping he'll look at you at some point of time so u can call him. That said , food was tasty . Nice pizzas . We tried 4 cheese pizza. Crispy squids weren't so great. Same with mashed potatoes.

Author: Swathi Rao
Description: A lot to yack about....just lets say that the menu is overpriced and the food is no big deal. On the contrary, the manager is good. IF i ever go back it will be because of him.

Author: Chegu Ruthwik
Description:
Ask for the 2nd floor.
Nice and classy place.
One of my favourite brewery and order the seasonal beer whenever they have it
Don't miss the crispy fried cheesy garlic mushrooms
Also for the meat lovers, try the wings

Author: Pooja K
Description:
Do you crave authentic pizza? This has been so far the only place in Bangalore whose pizza transports me back to Milan or Florence.

I'm sure the beer is great too but being a work lunch no one had any. The ambiance is nice, sort of a modern hoffbrau house ( German beer hall however it is spelt). 

The loaded cheesy fries were good but a lil soggy. The cheese with grilled corn and peppers and some jalapenos was nice and the cheese generous. It was missing some creamyness and so I asked for mayo. What came out was a duo of harisa mayo and garlic mayo. Both fantastic and the garlic mayo being thicker and with real roasted garlic went best with this dish. They should bottle and sell their mayo mixes, fantastic. 

Next came heaven on earth in the form of pizza. I got the sundried tomato, mushroom and goat cheese pizza. The crust was amazing though I like mine a little bit more well done. The sundried tomatoes are REALLY salty so be prepared. The mushrooms were juicy and well seasoned and the goat cheese along with the base cheese blend was exceptional with just the right amount of sauce too. Tre Magnifique. So far the only woodfire pizza I would whole heatedly recommend in Bangalore.

Dessert was banoffee pie which was not pie but a parfait. Gooey, with a delicious crumble and whipped cream, it had a great banana-toffee taste. However it was a little goopy for my taste, specially when I was craving pie. I would add a bit more chocolate as well but then again I am a chocolate lover. 

This was enough for two people and worked out to about 500 per head which is not bad for the quality but a bit steep for all vegetarian and no alcohol. Still worth going for a special occasion. The service was sort of good but things were off-putting. First one then two servers stood right in front of me to watch the wall mounted TVs. Would not even respond to my polite excuse me to get some water. There were others clustered in the corner talking loudly and not paying any attention. The bill was paid by card but they made me walk over though it was a portable machine. Only one server seemed to be on top of things and running around to all tables (only 3 were occupied). For the standard of this place I would expect MUCH better service.

Food- 4.5/5
Service- 2.5/5
Ambiance- 4/5
Price- 3.5/5

Author: Nihal Soans
Description: Went with my friends for this one... Ordered a Kabab platter along with brewed beer.. The chicken Kabab was well done the dip sauce was also perfect for non veg dishes. And the veg had steam cooked potatoes and paneer which was also good.. Over all this place is mainly for beer and for dishes. Coming to the waiters, friendly and explained in detail about the beer and what it contained.. Also have the French fries..

Author: Gargi Mukherjee
Description: This place has been on my "places to visit in Bangloare list" since too long  hence i was elated to know that this place lived up to everything i've heard about it.This place is situated right next to UB city so its not really difficult to locate it.A big thumbs up to the ambience well as the service there.Though this place lies more on the expensive side,i'd say its still worth every penny.The alcohol here is really nice and i've friends who swear by their awesome beer.The food isnt that great though,we had grilled chicken nachos and it was slightly disappointing.All in all,this place is a must visit for all beer lovers and anyone who justs to chill out with friends

Author: S. Ray
Description: It was one of first kind of to be open in the city. Nice rustic ambiance. They used to give 6 varieties of beer initially to taste complimentary to choose from. Now they have stopped the same

Author: Bala
Description: I have known this place since its beginning, however it has sadly evolved to just another place to drink. The food is good but not how it used to be, burnt lamb chops & disproportionate seafood main course don't look very inviting among other small but vital details. Still preferred to be here as the standards are higher. Please watch the food.

Author: Ryan Dias
Description:
My visit to The Biere Club was a long time coming. Finally ended up going with some very special people who came on holiday to visit. Now, i'm not saying that the fact that it was 20 meters away from the new Lamborghini showroom had anything to do with us going there, but i'm sure it deserves to be mentioned! :D The place was pretty crowded, which is why I was quite surprised that the middle floor of the joint was not in service. Considering I had to wait a good 15 minutes for a table. So, these are the kind of problems rich people face, too much business, not enough servers.
As with any visit to a micro-brewery, we started off with samplers. None of which my guests liked. And I was forbidden as I was the chauffeur for the evening!! Pity, I kinda liked the after-taste of the mango beer. Starters, which included squid, filafel, and assorted fries, were quite appeasing, But, being an Indian, I yearned for more quantity, which was "majorly lacking" at Biere Club. I mean, a single dish wasn't enough for one person!! Service was
inadequate, to say the least as our server was very polite and accommodating, but at the same time was overwhelmed with guests. Suggestions? The entire building should rightfully be in service and the portions could be a tad more generous.

Batter fried squid with bacon. MMMMM.....bacon!

Author: Tina Andrews
Description:
Lavelle road is swamped with fine dining restaurants and raving pubs that just segregates this part of the city from the rest especially on weekends. If you are celebrating a special night, just head to Lavelle road cause that is where the party is. One such ale house around here is The Biere Club, a small shack that is buzzing with crowd and perfect for any date night.



The ambiance is versatile, eclectic and subtle all in one. The seating arrangement is more alive at the ground level than at the first floor, so for large crowds book a table in advance. Service is quick and the food rich and tantalizing for your taste buds.The pub has a bit of rustic comfy feeling that can turn any boring weekend into interesting one.



Contrary to its name, this alehouse does not boast much of French style but mostly houses a Mediterranean type of cuisine. Brace yourself Bangalore, if you love Belgian ale this place has the best Belgiany ale anywhere in the city. My husband was so gaga about it, he almost forgot he was in the city. They pride themselves in brewing fresh and original beers and is recognized as Bangalore's first craft brewery. For the non-alcoholics, they make good cocktails. But then again, the drinks menu is so diverse, you really have to be driving to skip the alcohol.



If you are wondering about the food, no worries, they have a preposterous menu selection. From salads, shwarma rolls, kebabs, panini sandwiches pastas and pizzas that are all described to look and feel flavorful. We tried the non-veg Biere Club mixed platter which had a whole lot of healthy and scrumptious eats and the hummus, falafel with crispy lavosh chips for some nibbly adventures.



Located in the central part of Bangalore, this pub has made an impression. It can be pricey but for the kind of service and quality of food, I found it reasonably good. Go solo or with a group, just remember to sit back, relax and regale at The Biere Club.

Author: Satadru Mukherjee
Description: Awesome place to hang around with your friends. The best thing is the location. The crowd is really nice. This place has a western ambience and the songs they play are really awesome. Make sure you call the official number for booking as I did face some problem regarding reservations. But I did enjoy myself, to be honest!

Author: Dhiraj
Description: Had to settle for a table in the top floor on a busy Saturday.. Excellent ambiance with fresh cold breeze.. We ordered the regular Lager, Ale and Stout varieties. In the seasonal variants, we tried out mango. It was decent. At 2345hrs we were asked for the last orders as the place closes by 0030 hrs.. We went for a non veg ham and salami pizza.. It was a wood fired one.. Good taste and salami was on the form of triangular slices on the face of pizza.. Between 2345 and 0030 hrs, we were reminded twice of the deadline and finally at 0030 hrs, we were the last to vacate this place.. Good aspect is the ambiance and the seating arrangements.. Not at all cluttered!!

Author: Nevillene Fernandes
Description:
A nice place to hangout with friends. Good crowd. Interesting beer options. Nice menu too
Tried their beer mohito and the one with peach. I did not quite like the peachy beer. However they have many options to choose from or you can go for the regular.
The food served is pretty good too.

Author: Murali Mg
Description: Grand....Great...Friendly and Social Environment!

Author: Ankit Saboo
Description:
Location: Great location, Just diagonally opposite UB City.

The brew: I sampled the Mango beer (Seasonal) and the Belgian Strong Ale (Club Special). The mango beer tasted fresh and had very good mango notes. Bubbly enough for a comfortable summer beer.

I ended up getting myself 2 x 500ml Belgian Strong Ale (Club Special). It may seem as an over-exaggeration but this was the best beer I have had at a microbrewery in Bangalore. The bitterness was just adequate and the beer had a lovely body. It was just tapped 2 days before so it was fresh. Sadly I had to leave the next morning and all I am left with is craving for the Belgian Strong Ale. I know the first thing I will be doing the next time after landing at Bangalore!

The food: Not that great. We ordered the pesto cottage cheese cubes. Could have been a lot better.

Overall, brilliant place for beer. The staff is responsive. Its a must visit for a beer lover!

Author: Nivedita Basu
Description:
It was a Saturday and I had to meet my old friend. And hell, I don't know why I am always handed over the duty to choose 'the place'.

 

And I chose The Biere Club (I loved the mixed up spelling. Yeah I have weird reasons to choose a place).

 

I will go straight to the score-card:

 

Location: Right there. Spot on. You can't miss it once you are on Lavelle Road.

 

Decor: Soothing.

 

Food: I was so confused that I went for the non-veg platter. For confused souls like me, go for the platter. It has everything and you won't regret anything.

 

Beer: With Toit and Arbor fresh on my tongue, I don't think I have anything much to say. At the end of the rounds of beer, I had few shots of Malibu. It was heavenly. For not-so-in-love-with-alcohol people like me, the light coconut flavor of Malibu is a welcoming change.

 

Staff: Courteous.

Author: Saugat Saha
Description:
I would like to call this review the Bangalore Brewary Battle.. I have been to half a dozen brewaries in the city over the last 1 month and this one sticks its neck out and wins hands down.
Not a big fan of the bitter the beer in this place is good and consistent at any time of the day and any day of the week.
At most places in Blore the quality of beer has an inverse relationship to the day of the week but of course there are exceptions there like a place called U4ia that manages to serve stale beer everyday of the week.
Arbor is another place that manages to disappoint every other time. Windmill is plain expensive for its mediocre fair and that leaves me with Tiot which is just the only other place after the Biere club where you can enjoy a consistent rightly priced mug of beer.
Everything else in the city is fermenting garbage and calling it brewed..

Author: Mithila Mehta
Description: Good place to hang out With friends it' is situated in lavelle road which attracts most of the customers to this bar but we have to wait for hours

Author: Yashvit Naik
Description:
Great food. Loved the juicy beef burger!! Beers dint quite suit my taste. I preferred the beers at other breweries around.very courteous staff and great ambience.
Edit:
Visited this place third time today. Loved the Honey Pale Ale! The mini mutton burgers were Superb!

Author: Eshwar
Description:
Love the fresh brewed beer the serve. Fan of their German Pelisner.
Pizza, Chops and the platter are my choice.
The one on White field is quite big and impressed with the brunch.
No regrets for the visit.

Author: Jigar Jatania
Description:
I have been to this place a couple of years backk...
Its one of the best beer experience I have had...
It was the first fresh brewery I have been to...
The varities of Beer here is just amazing.... German wheat was the best one which we ordered
However we tried about 5-6 different beer shots before placing the main beer order... Yes sir "Beer Shots" small 60 ml shots which u can try for all the beers here... Totally superb concept...
We were 5 of us there all similar age and new to bangalore... 3 guys and 2 girls... totally enjoyed the night and I must say the VM road and its crowd added to the excitement.... 
The food too is great..
The bill was about 3500 which is not bad for 5 people considering we were in one of the best beer clubs in India...
Kudos and Cheers !!

Author: Prateek Palsodkar
Description: Brewery at its best. ...I bit crowded all d tym...but its worth it...:-) :-)

Author: Abhinav Kohar
Description: you can always hangout here.

Author: Lochan Durgam
Description: One of the first breweries I visited in Bangalore and I must admit that it is a benchmark that I use to compare every other brewery I visit in Bangalore! I absolutely love this place. A special mention of their thin crust pizzas which are absolutely yummy and affordable! An absolute must go place in Bangalore!

Author: NS Kanmani
Description: A very good ambience( when not crowded). The dip which they give the fries is amazing.

Author: Simran Thakur
Description: I love this place, the ambience, food, beer everything is perfect! Expensive, but definitely a must visit place when in Bangalore!

Author: Karthik Sadanand
Description:
One of the first breweries in town, Biere club still holds its reputation even though there are a lot of competitors like toit, ABC etc. I've gone many breweries in Bangalore. But this place is absolutely my personal favorite! Its the biere and the crowd I guess that gets you going.

This place is located on Vittal Mallya Road and is very easy to locate, as it is a building standing out on a junction.

Whenever I have been here, friends and I have always taken the 2nd Floor as that where the real feel of biere club is felt! Yeah its the smoking section, but the crowd really gets going here! The ambiance is pretty decent, nothing too fancy. Getting a table on a weekend is next to impossible in the evenings. and your only chance here is start a little early. There are all the times you see people standing on the bar and drinking, and why not, the biere is simply amazing!

The Wheat biere is a good one to start with. Looks like some concoction of mango and has a subtle taste , this biere is surely the most popular. The wheat here is by far the best wheat i have had in bangalore including toit! Take a pitcher as a glass is not going to last :P

The next one is you can try is ALE, a copper colored biere which has a slightly strong taste compared to wheat, this also is pretty neat! Another Pitcher? Why not? :D

If you like burnt flavored subtle coffee taste, then Stout is for you. This is what I always take when I go to breweries as I somehow have a thing for stouts. Friends ask how I drink this, well its just a matter of taste.

Food is good here. We tried Moroccon chicken which was pretty good. Wood fire pizza which was brilliant(mozzarella, tomato and basil), potato basket i.e fries n wedges fired to perfection. Note that the proportions are pretty small unlike the biere :(

Overall I give a 4.5 for its amazing biere in town and decent food. Though it is a tad bit high on the pocket, well which place isn't in bangalore?

Author: Yoges Waran
Description: One of the best brewery in bangalore located near ub city..... the brewery is the highlight here with enough varieties.... Food could be better...

Author: SnigdhaM
Description: One of the best pubs ...the staff gladly gives you the quirky coasters if you want . best platters . good portions .

Author: Abhijit Nagendranath
Description:
One of the best things about this place is it's location. You enter inside and realize the ambience inside is just as good.

Had the pork belly which was the chef's special for that day and it was yum!

The only drawback - we were sitting in the first floor area and they told us the kitchen was closing but when we went up to the second floor we could still order there.

Strange but overall the food and beer was still quite awesome.

Author: Karthik
Description: Having a beer here, was on my wish list before coming to Bangalore, Their in house brewery has made and is making, some good beers and Belgian Wit now is  surely one of it. Their crew  is very courteous in explaining in detail the nature of each custom made beer and this has got the finest ambience and crowd around

Author: Anuranjani Rathore
Description: Perfect ambience for brewed beer, they give testers for diff beers they have so that's one thing different abt them.

Author: Pramod Singh
Description:
A good place at the heart of UB city !
Nice brewery and cool place !! There beer is good and they have good selection of side items !!
overall 2nd place after ABC ! :)

Author: Parivesh Dhariwal
Description: One of the nice place to be on a sunny day. The seating is comfortable and well placed with spaces to walk freely. The food is ok but the rye beer is too good. Do visit this place for a good crowd and good beer.

Author: Dibyanjana Chowdhury
